Yi N' ayɛw, Nadom na enyimpa Hwɛɛ egyanom ahohiam'; Yi No ayɛw, ɔnnsakyer da, Ɔka enyim nyaa, ohyira ntsɛm:
Yi No ayɛw!
Nyimnyamfo wɔ nokwardzim'.

Verse 3
Ɔhwɛ hɛn, dze fir hɛn dɛ egya;
Onyim hɛn mberɛwyɛ dodow;
Ɔma hɛn do dɔ mu ara, Ɔgye hɛn atamfo nyina nsam', Yi No ayɛw!
Dɛ mbrɛ N' adom pem mber nyina.

Verse 4
Sor abɔfo hom nhuhor No;
Hom hu N' enyim na enyim;
Ewia, bosoom, hom nkotow, No, Mber na mbea nyinam' abɔdze, Hom nyi N' ayɛw!
Hom nye hɛn nyi Nyame ayɛw. Amen.

title: Wonyi Nyame Hen Ayew
raw_title: CAN9 Wonyi Nyame Hen Ayew
lyrics:
Verse 1
Wonyi Nyame Hen ayɛw!
Wɔmfa ayɛyindwom mbrɛ N';
Chorus
N' ehumbɔbor tsim hɔ daa, Osi pi yɛ nokwar daa.

Verse 2
Wonyi N' ayɛw: ɔayɛ ewia, Dɛ ɔkɔ aprɔw daa daa nyina:

Verse 3
Na eso ɔayɛ ewia, Ma odu anafua a ɔhyerɛn:

Verse 4
Wonhyira N' dɛ ɔtɔ nyankom, Ma ɔma edziban fifir:
Chorus
N' ehumbɔbor tsim hɔ daa, Osi pi yɛ nokwar daa.

Verse 5
Na ɔma asaase pa so Oyi no ndɔbaa ma hɛn:

Verse 6
Ɔama buber so aba, Ɔahyɛ hɛn asan mama:

Verse 7
Ɔama edziban a ɔsen dɛm, Daa daa dɛw ho ahobadze:

Verse 8
Enyimnyam nka, Hen dɔyɛfo
Abɔdze nyina ntow enyimnyam,
Chorus
Enyimnyam nka Egya, nye Ba, Nye Sunsum, Ebiasa Kor. Amen.

title: Nyimnyam Hen, Asomdwee Hen
raw_title: CAN10 Nyimnyam Hen, Asomdwee Hen
lyrics:
Verse 1
'Nyimnyam Hen, Asomdwee Hen,
Mobɔdɔ Wo;
Na dɔ no rommbɔ adze da, Meserɛ Wo.
'Wo ama me m' ebisadze,
'Wo etsie me; Ɔwo hun mbrɛ mo bɔn tse, Dze moho akyɛ m'.

Verse 2
Medze me nyimdzee mapa M' bɔtow Wo ndwom, M' akomam' ndzepa nyina Medze bɛma W'.
Kaansa mo bɔn kaam' tsiaa m' mpo a,
Esaan mo ho;
Wɔpraa ano guu mo do no, Ɔwo 'tsiee me.

Verse 3
N-daesuon na nnyɛ da kor,
M' beyi W' ayɛw,
Mudur sor mpo a, m' akomam' M' bohuhor Wo.
Osuar, na ɔmmfata dɛ
Medze ma Wo;
Onnyiewiei mpo yɛ tsia dɛ Wɔtonton Wo.

title: Hen Nyame N' abodze Nyina
raw_title: CAN11 Hen Nyame N' abodze Nyina
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hɛn Nyame N' abɔdze nyina, Hom mma hom ndze do ny
e hɛn ntow
Alleluia, Alleluia!
Ewia hyeehyew, 'hyerɛn dɛ sika,
Bosoom nwinwin, 'tse dɛ dwetɛ,
Chorus
Yi N' ayɛw, yi N' ayɛw
Alleluia, Alleluia, Alleluia!

Verse 2
M-frama a itu ehum dzendzen,
Esuwusiw a esen wimu, Yi N' ayɛw, Alleluia!
Bosoom, fa enyigye yi N' ayɛw,
N-woraba, hom mbɔ hom ndzem'

Verse 3
N-su krɔngyenn a erepem, Tow ndwom ma w' Ewuradze ntse,
Alleluia, Alleluia!
Ogya hurenhuren a eyɛ dzen,
'Wo a ema nyimpa hyew na kan,

Verse 4
Asaase pa a Nyame ama Daa daa iyi siar ma ne mba, Yi N' ayɛw, Alleluia!
Wo mu nhyiren nye nduaba so, Womfifir nkyerɛ N' enyimnyam,

Verse 5
N-korɔfo a hom 'koma dwe nyina, Na hom dze bɔn kyɛ, hom so mbra, Hom so ntow Alleluia!
Amandzehufo, 'werɛhofo,
Hom nyi N' ayɛw, mfa ne nyina nsoa N',

Verse 6
Ao, Owu, yamuyiefo a edwe,
'Wo a itwa hɛn owu ngyam do, Yi N' ayɛw, Alleluia!
'Wo na 'dze Nyame mba kɔ fie, Hɛn Wura Christ faa wo kwan n' mu:

Verse 7
Ndzɛmba nyina nhyira Bɔfo n',
Wɔmfa mbrɛhoadze nkotow No,
Nyi N' ayɛw, Alleluia!
Wɔmfa ayɛyi mma Egya, nye Ba,
Nye Sunsum no, Ebiasa Kor,

title: Kronkron, Kronkron, Kronkron, Otumfo Nyankopon
raw_title: CAN12 Kronkron, Kronkron, Kronkron, Otumfo Nyankopon
lyrics:
Verse 1
Krɔnkrɔn, krɔnkrɔn, krɔnkrɔn, Otumfo Nyankopɔn!
Hɛn ndwom bɔfow edu Wo nkyɛn anapahema; Krɔnkrɔn, krɔnkrɔn, krɔnkrɔn, mbɔbɔrhufo, tumfo,
Nyame Baasa Kor, Ɔkorsa siarfo!

Verse 2
Krɔnkrɔn, krɔnkrɔn, krɔnkrɔn, ahotsewfo sɔr Wo,
Wɔtow hɔn sika nhenkyɛw gu ahwehwɛ po n' ho; Cherubim nye Seraphim twa hwe W' enyim ara, 'Wo a obi annyɛ Wo, na itsim hɔ daa.

Verse 3
Krɔnkrɔn, krɔnkrɔn, krɔnkrɔn; sɛ sum dze Wo suma,
Na dasanyi a omuo hu W' enyim a ɔnnyɛ mpo a Wo nko na yɛ krɔnkrɔn, obi nnka Wo ho bio, Wo tum, Wo dɔ, Wo krɔnkrɔnyɛ dzi mu!

Verse 4
Krɔnkrɔn, krɔnkrɔn, krɔnkrɔn, Otumfo Nyankopɔn!
W' edwinsa beyi Wo dzin ayɛw wɔ mbea nyina; Krɔnkrɔn, krɔnkrɔn, krɔnkrɔn, mbɔbɔrhufo, tumfo, Nyame Baasa Kor, Ɔkorsa siarfo! Amen.

title: Osor Egya A Wo Do Kese N
raw_title: CAN13 Osor Egya A Wo Do Kese N
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔsor Egya a Wo dɔ kɛse n
Abɔ werdam ama hɛn kra, Abɔn yɛkotow W' egua enyim; Wo bɔnfakyɛ dɔ n' fa dom hɛn.

Verse 2
Ba Tumfo, Asɛm a ɔbrae,
Hɛn Nkɔnhyɛnyi, Sɔfo, Pomfo, Abɔn yɛkotow W' egua enyim; Wo nkwagye adom n', fa dom hɛn.

Verse 3
Sunsum Bɛkyebo a W' ahom ma
Wɔgye kra fi bɔn nsa na wum', Abɔn yɛkotow W' egua enyim; Wo nkwahwea tum no, fa dom hɛn.

Verse 4
Krɔnkrɔn mprɛnsa, Egya, Sunsum Ba;
Nyametsir nwanwa, Ɔkorsa,
Abɔn yɛkotow W' egua enyim; Adom, fafir, nkwa, fa dom hɛn. Amen.

title: Ewuradze Nye Mo Guanhwefo
raw_title: CAN14 Ewuradze Nye Mo Guanhwefo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ewuradze nye mo Guanhwɛfo,
Biribiara nnkehia m'; Ɔma meda mfunoma mu, Ogya m' kɔ nsutaae ho.

Verse 2
Ɔdze me kra san ba nkwam' bio,
Na ɔma menantsew
Ne ndzeyɛtsenenee kwan no mu, Wɔ Noara Ne dzin ntsi.

Verse 3
Nyew, sɛ menam wu bɔnsam' a,
Munnsuro mbusu biara;
Osiandɛ 'nye m' nam, Wo poma Na W' abaw hyɛ me dzen.

Verse 4
Mo pon so Ɔwo ewie to
Wɔ m' atamfo enyim; Edze seradze asera me tsirm'; Mo kuraba ebu do.

Verse 5
Yie na adɔe bɛka mo do,
Mo nkwa mber nyinara,
Na medze Nyame fie bɛyɛ Me tsenabew daa nyina.

title: Hwe, Bow Mpetsema Hyenhyenn
raw_title: CAN15 Hwe, Bow Mpetsema Hyenhyenn
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hwɛ, bɔw mpetsema hyɛnhyɛnn
Sosɔ nhaban do;
Ber, a wɔrehyerɛn, wɔkyerɛ Dɛ, Nyame ye daa.

Verse 2
Hwɛ 'napa wi nserɛmɛn,
Ɔsesa kwaa mu, Dzinn, naaso wɔreka 'Dɛ, Nyame ye daa.

Verse 3
Tsie koko n' woraba,
No nko da hɔ no,
Eminim a ɔrobɔ n' ka Dɛ, Nyame ye daa.

Verse 4
Due no sor nhaban mu,
Mbrɛ suro bi nnyi n',
Nnoma rotow ndwom kyerɛ Dɛ, Nyame ye daa.

Verse 5
M' akoma, ndaase ndwom n',
Fa w' afamudze bra,
Ndzɛmba nyina bɔm' ka Dɛ, Nyame ye daa.

title: Ayeyi Nka Ewuradze, Tumfo, Abodze Nyina Hen
raw_title: CAN16 Ayeyi Nka Ewuradze, Tumfo, Abodze Nyina Hen
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ayɛyi nka Ewuradze, Tumfo, abɔdze nyina hen;
O me kra, yi N' ayɛw, Ɔno nye w' ahom na nkwagye;
Hom a hom tse,
Enuaam na nkyerɛbaa, hom mbra, Hom ntonton No enyigye mu.

Verse 2
Ayɛyi nka Ewuradze a otu w' edwuma mpon, weɔn wo,
Ampaara Ne yie nye N' adom ka wo do daa wɔ ha:
Dwen ho bio hwɛ
Dza Otumfo No tum yɛ, Sɛ ɔdze No dɔ fa w' nyɛnko a.

Verse 3
Ayɛyi nka Ewuradze, ɔno a ehumtuber no mu,
Ɔno na ber a abɔdze nyina etwa ayer wo no,
Ɔma wogyaa,
Begyabegyayɛ taa dzinn, Ɔma ehum na po yɛ komm n'.

Verse 4
Ayɛyi nka Ewuradze, ɔno a ber a bɔn na sum agye,
Ɔno na abosonsɔrfo dzi nyim mmbu papayɛ bi a
Ne kan hyerɛn,
Pam sum mu ewurkadze,
N' adom bɔ esiarfo ho ban.

Verse 5
Ayɛyi nka Ewuradze! Ao, dza ɔwɔ mo mu nyina ntonton N'!
Dza wɔwɔ nkwa nye ahom m-fa ayɛyi mbra N' enyim!
Wɔmma Amen
Ngyegye bio wɔ nkorɔfom'
Yɛtonton No enyigyem' daa.

title: Oyi Nye Nyame A Yesor No N
raw_title: CAN17 Oyi Nye Nyame A Yesor No N
lyrics:
Verse 1
Oyi nye Nyame a yɛsɔr No n',
Hɛn Dɔfo pa a ɔnnsakyer da n', No dɔ so dɛ No tum kɛse n', Onnyi mbanano, nnyi ewiei.

Verse 2
Jesus, Kandzifo, Kyirdzifo n',
No Sunsum dze hɛn bodu fie; Yeyi N' ayɛw wɔ dza etwam', Yɛtwer No wɔ dza ɔreba.

title: Me Nyame, Mbre Dua Ye Nwanwa A
raw_title: CAN18 Me Nyame, Mbre Dua Ye Nwanwa A
lyrics:
Verse 1
Me Nyame, mbrɛ 'dua yɛ nwanwa a W' ahentum ne hyerɛn a! Wo mbɔbɔrhu egua n' ne fɛw a Wɔ kan a ɔhyerɛn mu!

Verse 2
Wo mfe a ɔmmbɔ adze n' no hu a,
Domankoma Ewuradze,
Esunsum wotwa hwe W' enyim Tonton Wo daa nyina.

Verse 3
Mbrɛ odua yɛ fɛw, yɛ fɛw a,
Dɛ yebohu W' enyim
Wo nyansaa bun n', Wo tum kɛse n' Nyame W' ahotsew nwanwa.

Verse 4
Ao Nyame, mbrɛ misi suro Wo a,
Suro a no mu dɔ, Na medze ahopopo enyidar, Nnuhu nyinsu som Wo!

Verse 5
Ma mo so maadɔ W', Ewuradze,
Ɔwo a 'yɛ Tumfo yi, Abɔ Wo mu adze ebisa M' akoma brɛfo no dɔ.

Verse 6
Egya bi nnyɛ dɔ dɛ Ɔwo;
Na bi nndwe dɛ Ɔwo, Wonnyi abotar dɛ mbrɛ ewɔ n' Emi babɔn yi ho.

Verse 7
Jesus N' egya, dɔ n' akatua,
Na enyigye bɛn a
Dɛ m' botwa ahwe W' ahengua enyim, Mahwɛ Wo, na mahwɛ W' !

title: Odo Hen Nye Mo Guanhwefo
raw_title: CAN19 Odo Hen Nye Mo Guanhwefo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔdɔ Hen nye mo Guanhwɛfo,
N' ayamuyie mmpa ara da; Meyɛ Nedze ma ɔyɛ medze aba, Mirinnhia hweeara da.

Verse 2
Mbrɛ nkwa esutsen fi pem no,
Hɔ na ogya me kra kɔ,
Ɔdze sor edziban nyɛn me Wɔ mbrɛ m-funoma wɔ no.

Verse 3
M-ber pii na mikyiin bɔn mu,
Na ɔdze dɔ hwehwɛɛ me; Ɔdze me too Ne batsir do Dze me baa fie edɛw mu.

Verse 4
Owu bɔnsam' munnsuro mbusu,
Ber a, mo Wura, ebɛn me;
W' abaw na Wo poma hyɛ m' dzen, Na Woara idzi m' enyim.

Verse 5
'Wo na eto pon wɔ m' enyim;
Ihue adom gu mo do;
Ao, enyigye bɛn na ofi Wo kuraba mu bu do!

Verse 6
Dɛm na W' ayamuyie mmpa ara da,
Mo nkwa nda nyinara mu;
Mo Guanhwɛfo pa, ma montow
W' ayɛyi wɔ Wo fie daa! Amen.

title: Minsi Den Mondo Me Nyame
raw_title: CAN20 Minsi Den Mondo Me Nyame
lyrics:
Verse 1
Minsi dɛn mondɔ me Nyame, Minsi dɛn nyi N' ayɛw? Minsi dɛn nhu N' adom no war, Ne trɛ, no krɔn, no bun?

Verse 2
W' adom tsen du obiara do,
Na onnyi mbanano; Ɔto adasamba nyina; Ɔwɔ hɔ afebɔɔ.

Verse 3
Odu wiadze tɛtɛr nyina,
Ne trɛ nnyi mbanano; Ɔtrɛ ma onngya baako mpo, N-kyɛ ɔpaa mo ho.

Verse 4
Mo mfom nyinii dur sorsor no;
W' ehumbɔbɔr traa hɔ;
Christ no mu edoom me fakyɛ, Fakyɛ a wɔnnto n' abaw.

Verse 5
Sor abɔfo bɛn botum akyerɛ Wo nkwagye dɔ n' no bun? W' akyɛdze a onnyi kabea yi, Ao, ma monsɔ monhwɛ.

Verse 6
Bra ntsɛm, adom Ewuradze,
Bɛfa Woara Wodze; W' adaworom, bɛyɛ m' akoma W' ahengua afebɔɔ. Amen.

title: Enyimnyam Nye Ntonton Nka
raw_title: CAN21 Enyimnyam Nye Ntonton Nka
lyrics:
Verse 1
Enyimnyam nye ntonton nka
Wo, hɛn Hen Agyenkwa,
Ɔwo a mbofra ndze dɛɛdɛw, Toow Hosanna maa Wo!
Chorus
Enyimnyam nye ntonton nka
Wo, hɛn Hen Agyenkwa,
Ɔwo a mbofra ndze dɛɛdɛw, Toow Hosanna maa Wo!

Verse 2
Ɔwo nye Israel Hen,
Ɔhen David ne Ba a
Enam Ewuradze dzin mu Reba dɛ hɛn siar Hen.

Verse 3
Abɔfo dɔm nyinara
Kamfo Wo Nyame manm': Nyimpa nye abɔdze nyina Bɔ ose gye hɔn do.

Verse 4
Hebrewman mu nkorɔfo dze
Mberɛnkɔnson huaa Wo;
Hɛn so yɛdze ayɛyi Nye mpaabɔ ba W' enyim.

Verse 5
Irikehyia mbusu no,
Wɔtoow ndwom yii W' ayɛw; N- dɛ a wɔakrɔn Wo sor yi, Hɛn so yehuhor Wo.

Verse 6
Egyee Jewfo ayɛyi;
Gye hɛn so hɛn mpaabɔ,
Ɔhen dɔyɛfo, yamuyiefo a Ndzepa nyina yɛ W' fɛw.
Chorus
Enyimnyam nye ntonton nka
Wo, hɛn Hen Agyenkwa,
Ɔwo a mbofra ndze dɛɛdɛw, Toow Hosanna maa Wo!

title: Nkorofo Nyina Nhua Jesus Dzin
raw_title: CAN22 Nkorofo Nyina Nhua Jesus Dzin
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nkorɔfo nyina nhua Jesus dzin;
Abɔfo nhwe No fam';
Wɔmfa ahenkyɛw no mbra mbɔsoa N', Na wɔnhyɛ N' abɔso Hen.

Verse 2
'Sɛmpa n' ho atɔfo, hom nhua N'
Wɔ N' afɔrmbukyia n' do;
Hom nhua nyia hom tsia N' anamɔnm' Na hom nhyɛ N' abɔso Hen.

Verse 3
Israel mbasantsen, hom a
Woeyi hom asehwem',
Hom nhua nyia ɔdze N' adom gye hom n', Na hom nhyɛ N' abɔso Hen.

Verse 4
Bɔnyɛfo, mma hom werɛ mmfir
Bɔwen na bɔwema n';
Hom mfa hom asadze nkɔ nkɛma N', Na hom nhyɛ N' abɔso Hen.

Verse 5
Ebusua na ngyirama nyina,
Wontwa nhwehwe N' enyim;
Na hɔn nyina wɔntow ndwom nhua Nyia wɔahyɛ N' abɔso Hen.

Verse 6
Ao, nkyɛ yɛnye sor dɔm yeetwa
Yɛahwehwe N' ananadze,
Yeekua ho ma wɔaatow daa ndwom n', Na yaahyɛ N' abɔso Hen!

title: Jesus Dzin Bo Adze Nyina Do
raw_title: CAN23 Jesus Dzin Bo Adze Nyina Do
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jesus dzin bɔ adze nyina do,
Wɔ hɛll, nye ase, nye sor, Abɔfo na nyimpa kotow n', Na mbɔnsam fi enyim guan.

Verse 2
Jesus! dzin a ɔyɛ abɔn dɛw,
Dzin a wɔdze akyɛ abɔn; Ɔhotse hɔn suro nyina, Na ɔdan hɔn hɛll yɛ heaven.

Verse 3
Jesus! otu adaduafo apo,
Otsia abɔnsam tsir do;
Ɔdze tum hyɛ nyia onnyi ahom, Na ɔma ewufo nkwa.

Verse 4
Ao, nkyɛ N' adom ahonya no Wiadze nyina aasɔ ahwɛ! N-kyɛ No dɔ abaw n' bofua Adasamba nyina.

Verse 5
Ne tsenenee na No nkwagye
Na mobɔ no dawur, M' edwuma nye dɛ mekam' dɛ, Wɔnhwɛ Eguambaa no!

Verse 6
Edɛw bɛn na nkyɛ ɔbɛyɛ,
Dɛ mo wumpa no do, Mobɔbɔ Ne dzin na matseam' Dɛ, Wɔnhwɛ Eguambaa n'!

title: Eguambaa Bi, Nkwagye Dzin Bi
raw_title: CAN24 Eguambaa Bi, Nkwagye Dzin Bi
lyrics:
Verse 1
Eguambaa bi, nkwagye dzin bi,
Enyidar bi nnyi sor anaa ase, Fɔdzi nye fɛr ho guansumabew bi nnyi, Dɛ Wo nkotoo.

Verse 2
Me gyedzi suar, m' enyidar suar,
M' akoma ne hia nye no mbusu nko Na ɔbɔ mu dɛ senaman wɔ mo mu Kekam' frɛ Wo.

Verse 3
Kaansa muwu a, Ɔwo yɛ nkwa;
Meyɛ nwim mpo a, mo Wura, dɔ ne gya nye W'
Minnyi etsidaa, minnyi fie biara so Gyedɛ Woara.

title: Mbre Jesus Ne Dzin Dua Ye Dew
raw_title: CAN25 Mbre Jesus Ne Dzin Dua Ye Dew
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mbrɛ Jesus ne dzin dua yɛ dɛw Wɔ gyedzinyi asom' a! Otu ne ya, yɛ ne yar edur, Na otu no suro nyina.

Verse 2
Ɔbɔ sunsum a oepira esu,
Na ɔdwe akoma a ɔahaw, Edziban ma sunsum a kɔm dze n', Ahomgye ma fonafo.

Verse 3
Dzin pa! Botan a motow do,
Me kyɛm na mo sumabew, M' egyapadze a ɔmmpa da, Adom na ɔahyɛ n' ma!

Verse 4
Jesus, mo Guanhwɛfo, mo Nua
Mo Sɔfoe na me Hen,
Mo Wura , mo Nkwa, mo Kwan, m' Ewiei, Bra bɛgye m' ayɛyi.

Verse 5
Mo mbɔdzembɔ ɔyɛ mberɛw,
M' akoma yɛ wɔɔwɔw;
Na ber a m' bohu W' dɛ mbrɛ Ɔwo tse n', M' beyi W' ayɛw dɛ mbrɛ ɔsɛ.

Verse 6
Kɛpem da n' na m' bɛka Wo dɔ no Medze nkwahwea tsiabaa 'i; Na ma Wo nsanku dzin dɛɛdɛw n'
Ɔnhom me kra wɔ wum'. Amen.

title: Pomfo Kese, Nyame Eguambaa
raw_title: CAN26 Pomfo Kese, Nyame Eguambaa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Pomfo kɛse, Nyame Eguambaa, Yɛdɔ Wo ho n-sɛm;
Ndwom biara nnyi hɔ a ɔyɛ dɛw Dɛ Wo dzin nwanwa no.

Verse 2
Ber a yɛwɔ wiadze mu yi, Jesus nye hɛn nkɔmbɔ: Na ndzɛmba nyina so sɛɛ a Jesus bɛyɛ hɛ ndwom.

Verse 3
Da a yɛbɔfora esiarfo
Wɔ sor man mu noho n' Yɛbɛkam' yɛatow ndwom dɛɛdɛw, Na Christ bɛyɛ hɛn ndwom.

title: Jesu, Wo Ho Adwen Nko Mpo
raw_title: CAN27 Jesu, Wo Ho Adwen Nko Mpo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jesu, Wo ho adwen nko mpo
Dze dɛw hyɛ mo mu ma; Na meba m' bohu W' enyim dze a, Edɛw no bɔbor do.

Verse 2
O adasa hɛn Agyenkwa,
Dzin biara nnto Wodze a
Yɛdze enyigye bɔtow ho ndwom, Na yɛadwen ho dɔ mu.

Verse 3
O 'koma bobɔe n' Enyidar,
Abrɛfo Enyigye,
Iye ma asehwefo na Hɔn a wɔhwehwɛ Wo.

Verse 4
Na hɔn a wohu Wo nka dɛn? Wonnhu dza wɔnka mpo: Hɔn a wɔtse Wo dɔ nko ara Na wonyim ne dɛw no.

Verse 5
Jesu, yɛ hɛn enyigye ndɛ,
Hɛn ndaamba akatua; Jesu, yɛ hɛn Enyimnyam ndɛ
Na mfesantsen nyina. Amen.

title: Jesu, 'Koma Doyefo Hon Dew
raw_title: CAN28 Jesu, 'Koma Doyefo Hon Dew
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jesu, 'koma dɔyɛfo hɔn Dɛw,
Adasa Kan, nkwa Nsunyiwa,
Wiadze mu ndzepa nntum mmee hɛn, Yɛdze kɔm yɛdan ba Wo hɔ.

Verse 2
Wo nokwar si pi, ɔnnsakyer; Nyia ɔfrɛ Wo n' egye no nkwa; Iye ma nyia ɔhwehwɛ Wo, Nyia ohu Wo n' N' adze nyina.

Verse 3
Yɛsɔ Wo hwɛ, n-kwa Edziban,
Na hɛn kɔn dɔ yeedzi bi daa; Yɛnom Wo, n-kwa Esutsen, Na hɛn kra pɛ ma wɔaahyɛ n' ma.

Verse 4
Hɛn sunsum haahaa hwehwɛ Wo,
Mbrɛ ɔbra dze hɛn si biara, Eyaa W' ano hɛn enyi gye, Yesuo Wom' a siar aka hɛn.

Verse 5
O Jesus, nye hɛn ntsena daa,
Ma hɛn mber pa na asomdwee;
Yi bɔn no sum nyina wɔ hɔ,
Ma Wo kan no nhyerɛn wiadze. Amen.

title: Jesu, Me Kra No Dofo
raw_title: CAN29 Jesu, Me Kra No Dofo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jesu, me kra no Dɔfo,
Ma munguan mbɛhyɛ Wo bom',
Ber a esu no repem yi,
Ber a ehum no rutu yi,
Me Gyefo, fa me hunta,
Ma ehum no mbɔ mbɛsen; Gya me kodu berano, Ao, ewiei no gye me kra.

Verse 2
Minnyi sumabew biara,
Me kra twer Wo nkotonoo; Mma nndan mo nkotonoo nngya, Suo mo mu, kyekye mo werɛ:
Mo werɛ gyina Wo do,
Mo mboa nyina fir wo hɔ; Fa W' atsaban kɛse no Kata m' etsikwa yi do.

Verse 3
Christ, morohwehwɛ Wo nko,
Minya W' a menya adze nyina, Ma mo do si, hyɛ me dzen, Yɛ m' edur na gye me nkwa:
'Wo na eyɛ tseneneenyi,
'Midze, meyɛ brakyewnyi; Bɔn na ahyɛ emi ma, Adom ahyɛ wo so ma.

Verse 4
Adom pii wɔ Wo nsam' a
Ɔkata mo bɔn nyina do;
Ma nkwa nsu no ɔmpem mbra, San mo ho na fa me sie:
N-kwa Nsunyiwa nye Woara,
Ma membɛsaw bi monnom,
Bra bɛtaa mo 'koma mu,
Taa mu kɔ mfesantsen nyina. Amen.

title: Jesus, Hen Guanhwefo
raw_title: CAN30 Jesus, Hen Guanhwefo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jesus, hɛn Guanhwɛfo,
Pepa hɛn nyinsuwa; Sɛ yɛda no bom' a, Yennsuro biribiara.
Wɔmma yɛnka No do
Mbrɛ ɔbɛkyerɛ biara, Yɛnka no do sar do na 'Saase pa do.

Verse 2
Jesus, hɛn Guanhwɛfo,
Ne ndze yɛ hɛn dɛw; Ɔwasa kakra ara a Nna hɛn enyi agye.
Otwuw hɛn enyim mpo a,
Ne ndze n' ɔdɔ wɔm'; Yɛmmpɛ kwankyerɛfo biara Dɛ No nkotoo.

Verse 3
Jesus, hɛn Guanhwɛfo,
No nguan ntsi owui;
No bɔgyaa enuma No nguambaa nyina. Ɔwɔ dza ɔdze hyɛ
Hɔn mu biara nsew,- Hɔn a wɔyɛ Nedze no Wɔ no Sunsum.

Verse 4
Jesus, hɛn Guanhwɛfo, N' abaw weɔn hɛn daa: Ngyata kyin hɛn ho mpo a, Hɔn nsa nnkɛka hɛn. Owu bɔnsa mu hɔ, Sum huhu hyɛ mpo a, Yennsuro mbusu biara:
Yɛka wu hyɛ.

title: Mbre Mudua Do Jesus
raw_title: CAN31 Mbre Mudua Do Jesus
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mbrɛ mudua dɔ Jesus, Osiandɛ odzii kan dɔɔ m'.

Verse 2
Mo werɛ nnkefir N' da, Ɔno owui maa me.

Verse 3
Metse mema Jesus:
Ɔdze No nkwa maa me.

Verse 4
Jesus siarfo, kora me:
Motwer Wo dzin nkotoo.

Verse 5
Ao, Jesus, m' bɔdɔ Wo:
M' bɔdɔ W' akɔ owum'.

Verse 6
Enyimnyam nka Jesus, Wɔ dɔ a ɔdze adɔ m'.

title: Tsie ! Abofo Ruhua De
raw_title: CAN32 Tsie ! Abofo Ruhua De
lyrics:
Verse 1
Tsie! abɔfo ruhua dɛ
Wɔawo hɛn Hen nyimnyamfo n', Asaase wɔ asomdwee, Nyame na abɔn abɔm'.
Aman nyina, hom mfa dɛw
Nye sor abɔfo ntseatseam' Hom nye hɔn mbɔm mpaa mu dɛ, Wɔawo Christ wɔ Bethlehem.
Chorus
Tsie! abɔfo ruhua dɛ
Wɔawo hɛn Hen nyimnyamfo n',

Verse 2
Christ a sorsor tonton No,
Ɔdomankoma Ewuradze n', Hwɛ N', ɔkyɛree mpo a ɔaba. Ɔbaabun wotoam' ɔba!
Hwɛ, Nyame hyɛ nyimpadua! Nyame a wɔayɛ N' onyimpa! Ɔpɛ dɛ ɔnye nyimpa tsena, Jesus, hɛn Immanuel.
Chorus
Tsie! abɔfo ruhua dɛ
Wɔawo hɛn Hen nyimnyamfo n',

Verse 3
Mbo, sor Asomdwee Henba! Mbo, Ndzeyɛts' enenee Ewia! 'Dze kan na nkwa brɛ wiadze, Yarsa wɔ N' atsaban mu.
Ɔdze N' enyimnyam too nkyɛn,
Bae ma nyimpa eennwu bio, Ma ɔaama asaasemba do, Ma ɔaama hɔn awo-enu.
Chorus
Tsie! abɔfo ruhua dɛ
Wɔawo hɛn Hen nyimnyamfo n',

title: Agyedzifo, Hom Mbra
raw_title: CAN33 Agyedzifo, Hom Mbra
lyrics:
Verse 1
Agyedzifo, hom mbra
Dɛw na konyimdzi mu,
Hom mbra, O hom nyina mbra Bethlehem; Hom mbra mbɔhwɛ dɛ Wɔawo abɔfo Hen:
O hom mbra mma yɛntonton Ewuradze Christ.

Verse 2
Nyame mu Nyame,
Kan a ofir Kan mu,
Hwɛ! oennkyir ɔbaabun n' awotoa;
Nyame ara ampa,
Wɔwoo N', na wɔannyɛ No;
O hom mbra mma yɛntonton Ewuradze Christ.

Verse 3
Abɔfo, hom ntow
Ndwom ehurusi mu,
Sor ahemfiemba nyina ntow ndwom Dɛ, Enyimnyam nyina
Nka Nyame wɔ sorsor:
O hom mbra mma yɛntonton Ewuradze Christ.

Verse 4
Enyimnyam nka Wo,
Yeyi Wo dzin ayɛw,
Jesus, Ɔwo a wɔawo W' n-dɛ da yi,
Ɔdomankoma Egya
N' asɛm ayɛ honam
O hom mbra mma yɛntonton Ewuradze Christ.

title: O Christianfo, Hom Nnyan Na Adze Akye
raw_title: CAN34 O Christianfo, Hom Nnyan Na Adze Akye
lyrics:
Verse 1
O Christianfo, hom nnyan na adze akye,
Anapa yi na wɔwoo Agyenkwa;
Hom nsoɛr na hom ntonton Nyame dɔ,
Esumasɛm a abɔfo tow ho ndwom;
Hɔn na wodzii kan kaa n-sɛmpa no, Mbrɛ Nyame bɛbrae ma ɔbaabun woo N'.

Verse 2
N-guanhwɛfo a wɔroweɔn hɔn nguan no Tsee bɔfo huafo ne ndze dɛ ɔse:
Hwɛ, medze Agyenkwa N' awoo ho nsɛm
Bɔ hom na wiadze nyina amandzɛɛ;
N-dɛ Nyame apon N' anohoba,
Wɔawo Ewuradze Christ, hɛn Agyenkwa.

Verse 3
Owiee kasaa n', nna sor adwontofo
Dze enyigye toow ndwom fofor koraa,
Wɔkamfoo Nyame dɔ a ɔropon hɛn,
Na Alleluia gyigyee wim' nyina;
Hɔn ndwom nye dɛ, Enyimnyam nka Nyame, Asomdwee na enyisɔ mbra nyimpam'.

Verse 4
Hɔ ara na nguanhwɛfo n', kɔr Bethlehem Kɔhwɛɛ dza Nyame ayɛ ama adasa:
Wɔdze enyigye saan kɔhwɛɛ hɔn nguan,
Dɛ wɔda ho riyi Nyame ayɛw, Yinom nye asomafo a wodzii kan Wɔbɔɔ Abofra no ho nsɛm dawur.

Verse 5
N-kyɛ yaakaa Nyame N' anwanwa dɔ a
Ogyaa N' ma ɔregye adasa nkwa;
Abofra a ɔama yeenya hɛn siar yi,
Yɛnhwɛ N' mbowadan mu nkɔ mbeamudua n' do: Ɔmboa hɛn ma yentsia N' anamɔn mu Nkodu adasa hɛn sor sibea hɔ.

Verse 6
Dɛm na hɛn ho bɛtsew ma yaafora
Abɔfodɔm yɛatow konyimdzi ndwom;
Nyia wɔawo N' n-dɛ enyigye da yi,
Ɔdze enyimnyam bɛhyerɛn hɛn ho nyina; No dɔ bɛgye hɛn nkwa na yaatow ndwom Afebɔɔ yɛakamfo sor Hen tumfo n'.

title: Adzekyee Mba Nyinara Mu Dansewa
raw_title: CAN35 Adzekyee Mba Nyinara Mu Dansewa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Adzekyee mba nyinara mu dansewa,
Pa hɛn isum na fa wo mboa brɛ hɛn; Boka nworaba a epue ma wim' atsew wann, Gya hɛn kɔ mbrɛ wɔawo Gyefo ama hɛn.

Verse 2
N' adasoe do na bɔw rososɔ hyɛnhyɛnn;
Nantwibuwm' na ɔdze Ne tsir ato komm; Ɔda hɔ n' abɔfo ruhuahua no dɛ, Adasa Yɛfo, Ɔhen na Gyefo.

Verse 3
Aso ampa dɛ hɛn so yɛbɛkyɛ No
Edom nduhuam na asomfo akyɛdze,
Mbepɔw do mbobaa, po do nankyenema, Kwaa mu wandze, daadzetsirmu sika?

Verse 4
Hɛn ayɛyɛdze piigyan nyina nnsɛ hwee;
Akyɛdze biara nntum nnya N' enyimpa; Akomam' ndaase na abɔbɔfo mpaabɔ Som bo kɛsekɛse ma Onyame.

Verse 5
Adekyee mba nyinara mu dansewa,
Pa hɛn isum na fa wo mboa brɛ hɛn; Boka nworaba a epue ma wim' atsew wann, Gya hɛn kɔ mbrɛ wɔawo Gyefo ama hɛn.

title: Hwe, Woawo Nyame Eguambaa A
raw_title: CAN36 Hwe, Woawo Nyame Eguambaa A
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hwɛ, wɔawo Nyame Eguambaa a
Wɔdze N' bɔɔ anohoba n', Oesian aba asaase
Rebɛkyerɛ hɛn ɔsor kwan.
Chorus
Ao, hɛn siar da, aba yie!
Hwɛ hɛn nkwahosan aba!
Tow ndwom twa Jerusalem:
Wɔawo Christ wɔ Bethlehem!

Verse 2
Hwɛ, nyia ɔtse ahengua do
Wɔ sorsor abɔfo ntam' Nyia ɔyɛɛ wim' nworaba n', Da mbowa dzidzidaka mu.

Verse 3
Hom n-guanhwɛfo krɔnkrɔn, Hom dze asɛmpa bɛn nam? Wɔyɛ n' dɛn na hom egya Hom nguan wɔ haban mu yi?

Verse 4
Esuom a yɛroweɔn no, Hwɛ, yehun kan nwanwa bi:
Abɔfo dze adwontow Kaa dɛ wɔawo Agyenkwa n'.

Verse 5
O Akɔkowaba krɔnkrɔn, Wo dɔ yɛ nwanwa dodow!
Dɔ a ogyaa W' ma ifii sor Baa wiadze a ɔtse dɛm yim'.

Verse 6
O Nyame Ba, Kyerɛkyerɛ hɛn
Wo suban a ɔdwe no, Ma yensua Wo mbrɛhoadze, Na yɛnyɛ dɛ mbrɛ Ɔwo tse.
Chorus
Ao, hɛn siar da, aba yie!
Hwɛ hɛn nkwahosan aba!
Tow ndwom twa Jerusalem:
Wɔawo Christ wɔ Bethlehem!

title: Anago Bi Na Nguanhwefo
raw_title: CAN37 Anago Bi Na Nguanhwefo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Anago bi na nguanhwɛfo
Tsena fam' roweɔn hɔn nguan, Ewuradze bɔfo fi sor bae, Na kan hyerɛɛn hɔ nyina.

Verse 2
Ihu kɛse kaa hɔn n-tsi
Ɔsee dɛ, Mma hom nnsuro: Mebrɛ hom na adasa nyina Asɛmpa a ɔyɛ dɛw.

Verse 3
Wɔawo Agyenkwa ama hom
Wɔ David ahenkurowm',
Wɔawo Ewuradze Christ n-dɛ; Yi na hom dze bohu N':

Verse 4
Hom bohu dɛ Akɔkowaba n'
Da mbowa dzidzidakam', Hom bohu No nantwibuw mu, Dɛ tam kyekye No ho.

Verse 5
Nyame bɔfo n' wiee dɛm ka ara,
Na sor dɔm pii bae a
Wɔdze ndwom yii Nyame ayɛw Enyigye mu see dɛ:

Verse 6
Enyimnyam nka Nyame wɔ sor,
Asomdwee nka 'saase; Nyame enyisɔ nhyɛ ase
Wɔ adasa mu ndɛ. Amen.

title: Osor Do No okron Dodow
raw_title: CAN38 Osor Do No okron Dodow
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔsor dɔ no ɔkrɔn dodow,
Nyame Baatan N' ayamuhyehye;
Ɔdze Agyenkwa fi sor bae,
Ɔmaa da pa n' hyerɛɛn hɛn do, Na tsenenee ewia no puei, Bɛtseew hɛn sum wiadze enyi.

Verse 2
Nyame daa edzi wɔ Christ mu,
Dze Ne kan abɛpam hɛn sum,
Etu hɛn bɔn na enyifura,
Dze hɛn nan esi kwan pa mu; Na hɛn akra a woenya fakyɛ, Akɔ daa ahomgye man no '.

Verse 3
Ewuradze, fa Wo kan bra,
Gyedzi a otu hɛn suro no a;
Ma Wo dɔ nkitsa hɛn 'koma,
Gya hɛn kɔ W' asomdwee kwan mu; Hɛn akra a wosuro wu dzen, Gya hɔn twa no sunsuma mu.

Verse 4
Ma W' adom ne nhyehyɛɛ nda edzi,
Nyame a ɔbɛyɛɛ nyimpa maa m';
Mo sunsum nyɛ Wo fie krɔnkrɔn,
Yɛ me kan na mo nkwagye mu; Gya me twa owu sum no mu Kodu W' ahengua enyim hɔ.

title: Adom Nwanwa, Woawo N' ampa
raw_title: CAN39 Adom Nwanwa, Woawo N' ampa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Adom nwanwa, wɔawo N' ampa! Nyame Akyewa ɔabra nyimpa!
Ɔhen Jesus, Siar Enyidar, Ɔasoa wiadze nkukunkakar.

Verse 2
Nwanwa bɛn na metse n' wim' yi?
Enyimnyam wɔ sor ma Nyame, Asomdwee wɔ asaase do, Enyisɔ wɔ adasa mu.

Verse 3
Ao o! hom ntsie ahobowsɛm, Nwanwa esi wɔ bethlehem: Ɔsor-asaase Twerammpon, Wɔayɛ N' ɔbɔn ama abɔn.

Verse 4
Abɔso Hen esian nyimpam',
N' adae nye mbowa dzidzidakam', Mbersantsen dɔ a ɔtra nhum', Oeku Tumfo, ɔasɛɛ no tum.

Verse 5
Yɛkaa Wo mbae, Nyame Ba Christ; 'Wo na abɔpon Paradise.
Akra nyina bɔ se kamfo:
Enyimnyam nka Gyefo siarfo.

title: Igyaa W' ahengua
raw_title: CAN40 Igyaa W' ahengua
lyrics:
Verse 1
Igyaa W' ahengua
Na W' ahenkyɛw so,
Ber a 'baa wiadze wɔ me ntsi n';
Na woennya kwan wɔ
Bethlehem fie hɔ,
Amma Wo wiadze ha ne mbae: Ao, bra m' akomam', Ewuradze, Ɔkwan wɔ m' akomam' ma Wo.

Verse 2
Sor nyina gyigyee
Ber a abɔfo toow ndwom
Bɔɔ W' adehye dzin no dawur n';
Na mbrɛadzem' ara Na, Ɔsor Wura, Ebaa asaase do ha: Ao, bra m' akomam', Ewuradze, Ɔkwan wɔ m' akomam' ma Wo.

Verse 3
N-sɔ wɔ etu,
Na nnoma berɛbuw,
Wɔ nkyindur no nwin ase;
Na Wo mpa nye dɛtse,
O Nyankopɔn Ba,
Dɛtse, wɔ Galilee sar do; Ao, bra m' akomam', Ewuradze, Ɔkwan wɔ m' akomam' ma Wo.

Verse 4
Ao, Ewuradze,
'Dze nkasɛm no bae,
Dza nkyɛ ɔbɛma fahodzi;
Na wɔdze atwetwesi
Na nsoɛ katraka
Wosunsum Wo kɔr Calvary: Ao, bra m' akomam', Ewuradze, Ɔkwan wɔ m' akomam' ma Wo.

Verse 5
Sor bɔwosow bio
Na abɔfo atow ndwom,
Ber a 'bɛba konyimdzi mu n';
Ma Wo ndze mfrɛ me fie Dɛ, Kwan da ho wɔ hɔ,
Kwan da ho wɔ me nkyɛn ma Wo! Na, mo Wura, m' akoma bedzi dɛw Ber a 'bɛba na ebɛfrɛ me n'.

title: Woana Na N-guanhwefo
raw_title: CAN41 Woana Na N-guanhwefo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Woana an n-guanhwɛfo Kotow No mbowadan mu hɔ n'?
Chorus
Ewuradze a! O anwanwasɛm!
Ewuradze a, Enyimnyam Hen n' a. Yetwa hwe N' ananadze; O wɔnhyɛ No abɔso Hen.

Verse 2
Woana na oridzi edwin Wɔ dan kakraba mu hɔ n'?

Verse 3
Woana na ɔrekyen kɔm, Ɔreper wɔ sar do hɔ n'?

Verse 4
Woana na orusu wɔ Lazarus ne nda do hɔ n'?

Verse 5
Woana na ɔrobɔ mpaa Esuom wɔ Gethsamane n'?

Verse 6
Woana na ɔserɛ nhyira Ma abɔn wɔ Calvary do n'?

Verse 7
Woana na oefi ewufom' Roboa hɛn, regye hɛn nkwa n'?

Verse 8
Woana na No nko dzi Hen Sor na asaase nyina do n'?
Chorus
Ewuradze a! O anwanwasɛm!
Ewuradze a, Enyimnyam Hen n' a. Yetwa hwe N' ananadze;
O wɔnhyɛ No abɔso Hen.

title: Na Nyimpa A Woaye Petsee Yi
raw_title: CAN42 Na Nyimpa A Woaye Petsee Yi
lyrics:
Verse 1
Na nyimpa a wɔayɛ petsee yi, Wɔnam ɔhyew do yi, ase ɛ?
Ebɛn nye adzekyee ehyia yi? Wentwiwenti 'i ase nye dɛn? Okuw n' sii ndze adze buaa dɛ, Narazeth Jesus na ɔresen n'.

Verse 2
Jesus nye woana? Ɔyɛ dɛn Na ɔbɔ kurow ebutuw dɛm? Ɔkwantsennyi a ɔresen, Ɔdze bɛn twe nyimpa pii yi?
Awɔse ndze no buaa bio dɛ, Narazeth Jesus na ɔresen n'.

Verse 3
Jesus! 'No na ɔbaa wiadze
Boduaa mbusu kwan yi mu bi n'; Wɔdze ayarfo nyina brɛɛ No, Etsitsifo ɔnye mpakye:
'Nyifurafo dze dɛw tsiee ntseamu n':
Narazeth Jesus na ɔresen n'.

Verse 4
Ɔreba bio, fi ha kɔ ha,
Yɛtse N' anamɔn wɔ mbeambea,
Oegyina hɛn abobowano,
Ɔahɛn dɛ ɔrobɔsoɛ hɔ; Ana hɛn so yɛnnkɛpaam' dɛ, Narazeth Jesus na ɔresen n'.

Verse 5
Ao o! akobɔfo, hom mbra; Fakyɛ nye ahomgye wɔ ha;
Hom a hom efi Egya fie,
Hom nsan mbra bio mbɛgye N' adom; Amandzehufo dɔbea nye 'i- Narazeth Jesus na ɔresen n'.

title: Metsee De Jesus Ne Ndze Se
raw_title: CAN43 Metsee De Jesus Ne Ndze Se
lyrics:
Verse 1
Metsee dɛ Jesus ne ndze se:
Bra Mo hɔ na bɔhom;
Ɔwo a aberɛ fa wo tsir, Bɔto Mara Mo bom'!
Mokɔree dɛ mbrɛ metse ara, Maberɛ, Mo werɛ ahow; Minyaa ahomgye wɔ No mu, Na ɔmaa m' enyigye.

Verse 2
Metsee dɛ Jesus ne ndze se:
Ɔwo a sukɔm dze wo,
Hwɛ, mema n-kwa nsu no kwa, Bɔ wo mu adze nom bi!
Mebaa Jesus hɔ mobɔnoom
N-kwa esutsen n' bi;
Mo nsukɔm gyaae, me kra nyaa nkwa, Na afei metse No mu.

Verse 3
Metsee dɛ Jesus ne ndze se: Emi nye wiadze Kan: Hwɛ Me na adze bɛkye wo, Wo kwan mu bɛyɛ kann!
Mohwɛɛ Jesus na minyaa N' ma Ɔyɛɛ ewia maa me!
N-kwa Kan yim' na m' bɛnantsew M' akwantu nda nyina.

title: Owo A Wopemee Betsiee Wo
raw_title: CAN44 Owo A Wopemee Betsiee Wo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔwo a wɔpemee betsiee Wo,
Wotsiee Wo nsɛm, wɔtsee Wo tum; Ma abɔn kwan ma yɛmbɛn Wo, Na gye hɛn adom mu ara.

Verse 2
Ɔwoara na aka dɛ,
Primprimfo nnhia oduyɛfo; Emi meyar, mihia Wo mboa, Mihia Wo tum a ɔgye nkwa n'.

Verse 3
Wo tum, nokwar na nyamedɔ,
Tsim hɔ mbersantsen mfesantsen; W' asɛm, W' adom asɛm kor mpo, Otu yarba dzendzen biara.

Verse 4
Kaansa makyɛr esu yi bo,
Ma mo sunsum nntum nnka noho a, W' ano kasa bɛma masoɛr, Ɔbɔbɔ m' esu ntsɛmara.

Verse 5
Ma dɔnhwer yi nyɛ ɔgyeber; Ao bra, me kra no Duyɛfo!
Da W' ahosan tum no edzi,
Ma munhu Wo nkwagye n' sesei. Amen.

title: Jesus Fre Hen! Se Hen Bra Po
raw_title: CAN45 Jesus Fre Hen! Se Hen Bra Po
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jesus frɛ hɛn! Sɛ hɛn bra po
Wor mpo a, yɛtse Ne ndze,
Ne ndze dɛɛdɛw n' gyigye daa daa, Ɔse: Christian, ka Mo do.

Verse 2
Tsetseber do asomafo n'
Tsee wɔ Galilee po do n',
Wogyaa ebusua, fie nye edwuma, Lɛkaa' No a wɔdɔ No n' do.

Verse 3
Jesus frɛ hɛn mma yɛnnsom
Wiadze mu ndzɛmba huhuw;
Ɔhwɛ ndzɛmba a wɔsom hɛn bo a, Ɔse: Christian, dɔ M' kyɛn hɔn.

Verse 4
Enyigye nye awerɛhow mu,
Dwumadzim' nye ahomgyem', Ɔda ho frɛ hɛn dɛ yɛndɔ N' Ma ɔkyɛn adze nyina.

Verse 5
Jesus frɛ hɛn! O Agyenkwa,
Yɛserɛ W', ma yɛntse Wo frɛ n', Hɛn 'koma nyɛ setsie mma Wo, Yɛndɔ W' nkyɛn adze nyina.

title: Ka 'Sem Dadaw No Kyere Me
raw_title: CAN46 Ka 'Sem Dadaw No Kyere Me
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ka 'sɛm dadaw no kyerɛ me,
Sunsum ndzɛmbam' asɛm, Dza ɔfa Christ N' enyimnyam ho Dza ɔfa No dɔ so ho.
Ka 'sɛm no pefee kyerɛ m' dɛ
Ereka kyerɛ abofra;
Na meyɛ mberɛw na mafona,
Minnyi ahom, mo ho fi
Chorus
Ka 'sɛm dadaw no kyerɛ me, Jesus no dɔ ho asɛm.

Verse 2
Tɔ w' bo ka 'sɛm no kyerɛ me,
Na meetum medze esie- Nyame No werdam kɛse a Ɔdze yɛ bɔn edur.
Si do mber pii ka kyerɛ m'
Na meyar awerɛfir;
Ahanamakye bɔsu
Ewia fir a ɔpa.

Verse 3
Ka 'sɛm no bɔkɔɔ kyerɛ me,
Nwinwin mu dɛ ehiasɛm,
Kaa dɛ meyɛ bɔnyɛnyi a
Jesus bɛpeer mo nkwa,
Ka 'sɛm no mber nyinara,
Sɛ epɛ ampaara
Dɛ ema m' akomatɔm' Wɔ ahokyer ber biaram'.

Verse 4
Ka ' sɛm kor n' ara kyerɛ me,
Aber a isuro dɛ
Wiadze enyimnyam huhuw n' Ridzi m' adwen dodow.
Nyew, na ɔsor n' enyimnyam
No so regye mo do a,
Ka 'sɛm dadaw no kyerɛ m' dɛ, Christ Jesus bɔ w' esu!
Chorus
Ka 'sɛm dadaw no kyerɛ me, Jesus no dɔ ho asɛm.

title: Idzii Mbuada Adaduanan
raw_title: CAN47 Idzii Mbuada Adaduanan
lyrics:
Verse 1
Idzii mbuada adaduanan
Adzekyee nye adzesaa, Adaduanan wɔ sar no do Wɔsɔɔ Wo hwɛe na annyɛ bɔn.

Verse 2
Ewia sii Wo do adzekyee,
Bɔw tɔɔ Wo do anago,
Mbowa abɔyafo paar wo ho, Edaa fam', isum ɔbo.

Verse 3
Ma yɛnsɔw Wo bene no bi,
Yɛmpow wiadze edzifodze; Na yɛnye Wo nweɔn mpaabɔm', Nye Wo nsɔw yaw ahoɔdzenm'.

Verse 4
Sɛ abɔnsam dze ebufuw
Toa honam anaa sunsum,
'Wo a edzi no do nyim pɛn,
Dom hɛn mma yaannhwe ase.

Verse 5
Nna yebenya W' asomdwee;
Dɛw krɔnkrɔn bɛyɛ hɛndze;
Dɛ mbrɛ abɔfo soom Wo n', Wɔbɛhyerɛn hɛn so hɛn ho.

title: Jesus, Motwer Wo, Medze Me Kra Twer Wo
raw_title: CAN48 Jesus, Motwer Wo, Medze Me Kra Twer Wo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jesus, motwer Wo, medze me kra twer Wo,
Fɔdzifo a mayew, 'Wo na 'botum agye m', Obi nnyi sor anaa ase a ɔnye W' sɛ; Ɔwo wui maa abɔn, Ɔwo wui maa me.
Chorus
Motwer Wo dɔ no na mohwehwɛ W' enyim; W' adom nwanwa no ntsi na muhuhor Wo. Jesus, motwer Wo, medze me kra twer Wo, Fɔdzifo a mayew, 'Wo na 'botum agye me.

Verse 2
Jesus, m' bɔtwer Wo, m' bɔtwer Wo kyerɛwsɛm; Osiandɛ matse Wo mbɔbɔrhu ndze no. Wo Sunsum kyerɛkyerɛ m' a, ɔyɛ m' dɛw dodow, Ma mentsena W' anan ho ara mintsie.

Verse 3
Jesus, m' bɔtwer Wo, mobɔdwen W' akwan do,
Ewɔ wiadze n' eyɛɛ dɔ nye mbɔbɔrhu, Ndzebɔnyɛfo fɔɔr Wo, 'kwatafo hwehwɛɛ W', Hɔn mu biara ho annyɛ Agyenkwa nkɔw.

Verse 4
Jesus, ' bɔtwer Wo, mennkɛgye Wo kyim da, Obiara a ɔba Wo nkyɛn no emmpam no. W' anohoba si pi, Wo bɔgyaa som bo; 'Wo nye me kra no nkwagye, me nyankopɔn.
Chorus
Motwer Wo dɔ no na mohwehwɛ W' enyim; W' adom nwanwa no ntsi na muhuhor Wo. Jesus, motwer Wo, medze me kra twer Wo, Fɔdzifo a mayew, 'Wo na 'botum agye me.

title: Mma Nnsu Mma Nyia Oso Mbeamudua
raw_title: CAN49 Mma Nnsu Mma Nyia Oso Mbeamudua
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mma nnsu mma Nyia ɔso mbeamudua
Dze rokɔ Calvary no; Ɔnnserɛ dasanyi ne nyinsu, Ɔapen dɛ obowu.

Verse 2
Yaw huhu bi a atow N' enyim, Oegura ne nyimpadua n',
Mmfir amenhyɛ anaa 'nyimguase:
Onnsuro mbeamudua n'.

Verse 3
Yaw wenwen a ɔbor do yi,
Ahoguan a ɔnnka,
Dza Wo dɔ nnya mu ahotɔ yi, Wo nko so ne nyina.

Verse 4
Ohu akra a hɔn ntsi oruwu
Dɛ wɔtar hɔn bɔn ho, Hɔn a ɔsor-man dzi wɔ hɔn Wɔmmpɛ dɛ wɔhɛn mu.

Verse 5
Ao, ma menye Wo ndzi Wo yaw,
Munsu dɛ emi mo bɔn
Bepira Wo dɔ akoma, Dze yaw bɛhyɛ Wo do. Amen.

title: Yaw Nyimpa! Wonhwe Dzin Bi A
raw_title: CAN50 Yaw Nyimpa! Wonhwe Dzin Bi A
lyrics:
Verse 1
Yaw Nyimpa! Wɔnhwɛ dzin bi a
Wɔdze frɛɛ Nyame Ne Ba a Ɔbɛgyee adasa nkwa
Alleluia! Ɔgyefo bɛn a!

Verse 2
Wɔhyɛɛ N' fɛr, woyii N' ehi, Wɔdze m' afɔdzi soaa No; No bɔgyaa sii m' fakyɛ pi:
Alleluia! Ɔgyefo bɛn a!

Verse 3
Yedzi fɔ, hɛn ho yɛ nkɔw Na Ɔno nye mpata-guan:
Bo adwe koraa!- aso ampa?
Alleluia! Ɔgyefo bɛn a!

Verse 4
Ɔsɛn wimu na owui, Ɔkaam' dɛ, Afei mewie! N-dɛ wɔakrɔn No wɔ sor Alleluia! Ɔgyefo bɛn a!

Verse 5
Na hɛn Enyimnyam Hen n' ɔba Ɔbɛfa No nkorɔfo kɔ a,
Ber n' yɛbɔtow ndwom yi bio:
Alleluia! Ɔgyefo bɛn a!

title: Aa! Jesu Kronkron, Eben Bon Na Aye
raw_title: CAN51 Aa! Jesu Kronkron, Eben Bon Na Aye
lyrics:
Verse 1
Aa! Jesu krɔnkrɔn, ebɛn na ayɛ, Na nyimpa dze enyitan bu Wo fɔ yi? Atamfo si W' atwetwe, wodze apa W', Ao, mandzehunyi.

Verse 2
Woana dzi so? Woana dze yi baa Wo do? Ao, Jesu, mo bɔn na ɔabɔ W' mbusu yi; Mara a, Wura Jesu, emi na mepaa W':
'Mi mobɔɔ W' mbeamuduam':

Verse 3
Wodze Guanhwɛfo n' abɔ afɔr ama nguan n';
Akowaa ayɛ bɔn, Ba n' agye ho ntsea; Ber a nyimpa noara no nkwagye nnyɛ n' asɛm, Nyankopɔn per no.

Verse 4
'Mi ntsi, Jesu pa, na ebɛyɛɛ nyimpa,
Wo wuyaw wenwen, na wo nkwa afɔrbɔ; Wo wum' ahoguan, W' amandzehu yawyaw, 'Mi mo nkwagye ntsi a.

Verse 5
Dɛm ntsi, Jesu pa, dɛ murunntum kaw tua 'i,
Muhuhor Wo, mobɔsɔr ama Wo daa, Hwɛ W' ayamuhyehye na Wo dɔ a ɔnnsakyer, Nnyɛ dɛ mefata.

title: Kokwaa Bi Wo Ekyirkyir Noho
raw_title: CAN52 Kokwaa Bi Wo Ekyirkyir Noho
lyrics:
Verse 1
Kokwaa bi wɔ ekyirkyir noho,
Kurow bi ban ekyir, Hɔ na wɔsɛɛn Ewuradze a Owui dze gyee hɛn nkwa n'.

Verse 2
Yennkotum yeehu, yɛakyerɛ yaw
A ɔsɔwee no dur;
Na yɛgye dzi dɛ hɛn ntsi na Ɔsɛɛn hɔ na owui.

Verse 3
Owui ma yeenya bɔnfakyɛ,
Owui ma yaayɛ yie,
N' adehye bɔgya n' aagye hɛn, Ewiei n' yaakɔ sor manm'.

Verse 4
Obi nnyihɔ a oye dɛ Ɔno
Na oeetua bɔn ho kaw n'; No nko na otum bue sor abow n' Na ɔdze hɛn kɔ mu.

Verse 5
O, ɔdɔ bɛn na ɔadɔ hɛn
Otwar dɛ yɛdɔ N' bi,
Yɛtwer No bɔgyaa a ɔapon hɛn n', Yɛper yɛ no ndwuma.

title: Nyame Eguambaa, Yerekaa
raw_title: CAN53 Nyame Eguambaa, Yerekaa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyame Eguambaa, yɛrekaa,
Wo dɔ a woepira no n',
Fi sor noho gye hɛn do, Na bohu hɛn mbɔbɔr:
Kaa hɛn a yɛdwen Wo ho;
Na gye kra biara a ɔreper; O, yɛserɛ W', kaa Calvary,
Na ma yɛnkɔ asomdweem'!

Verse 2
W' amandzehu yayaw no,
Wo bɔgyaa fifir no,
Wo dɔ a ɔmaa iwui ntsi,
Yɛserɛ W' , yi hɛn bɔn kɔ;
Bubu hɛn mpokyerɛ mu na
Gye hɛn emumuyɛ nyinam';
O, yeserɛ W', kaa Calvary,
Na ma yɛnkɔ asomdweem'!

Verse 3
Gyedzi mfa Wo bɔgyaa no
Nsɔw hɛn bɔfakyɛ ano;
Si n' pi dɛ woebu hɛn bem,
Yɛ hɛn yar nyina edur;
W' amandzehu wɔ dua n' do
Ntsi, twa hɛn yaw nye fona do; O, yɛserɛ W', kaa Calvary,
Na ma yɛnkɔ asomdweem'!

title: Moto M' enyi Hwe Anwanwa Dua A
raw_title: CAN54 Moto M' enyi Hwe Anwanwa Dua A
lyrics:
Verse 1
Moto m' enyi hwɛ anwanwa dua a
Enyimnyam Hen no tɔɔr do n' a,
M' adze pa biara mummbu n' hwee, M' ahopɔw nyina yɛ m' nkɔnkɔw.

Verse 2
Mo Wura, ɔmpar me dɛ m' botuw, Gyedɛ m' Agyenkwa No wu mu: Egyangyandze a modɔ kɛse n', Mobɔ n' afɔr ma No bɔgyaa.

Verse 3
Hwɛ mbrɛ yaw na ɔdɔ rosɔn Ne tsir, Ne nsa, nye N' anan ho: Dɛm dɔ na yaw yi mmbɔɔ mu pɛn, Na nsoɛ kyɛw yi bi nnsoaa bi da.

Verse 4
Wiadze nyina yɛ medze mpo a,
N-kyɛ ɔyɛ akyɛdze a osuar koraa;
Dɔ nwanwa yi, Nyame dɔ yi, Gye me kra, mo nkwa, m' adze nyina.

title: Onyame Do! Ben Na Na Aye I
raw_title: CAN55 Onyame Do! Ben Na Na Aye I
lyrics:
Verse 1
Onyame dɔ! 'bɛn na ayɛ 'i?
Bɛkyebo Nyame ewu ama m'!
Egya No domankoma Ba N' Soaa mo bɔn nyina wɔ dua n' do; Bɛkyebo Nyame ewu ama m'!
Mo Wura, mo Dɔ, wɔabɔ N' mbeamuduam'.

Verse 2
Akwantsemfo nyina hom nhwɛ N-kwa na Asomdwee Hen ruwu!
Abɔn hom Bɔfo na oruwu 'il!
Aso yaw bi nye Nedze 'i sɛ?
Hom nye m' mbɔsɔ No bɔgyaa nhwɛ:
Mo Wura, mo Dɔ, wɔabɔ N' mbeamuduam'.

Verse 3
Woeku No ama wo nye me, Ma yɛnye Nyame abɔ mu:
Hom ngye Nsɛmpa n' ara ndzi dɛ,
Jesus bɔgyaa pon hɛn nyina,
Fakyɛ pem Ne mfem' ma obiara;
Mo Wura, mo Dɔ, wɔabɔ N' mbeamuduam'.

Verse 4
Wɔmma yɛnko dua n' n' ase ha,
Yɛmfa dɛw ndɔw yarsa nsu n' bi,
Yembu adze nyina ahwerdze,
Yengyaa hɛn akomam' mma No; Mma yɛnndwen hwee, yɛnnka hwee, dɛ
Mo Wura, mo Dɔ, wɔabɔ N' mbeamuduam'.

title: Hom Mbra Ma Yenka Mmom Kakra
raw_title: CAN56 Hom Mbra Ma Yenka Mmom Kakra
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hom mbra ma yɛnka mmɔm kakra; Hom mbra Agyenkwa Ne nkyɛn ha; Hom mbra ma yɛmbɔm', yɛnka mmɔm:
Hɛn Wura Jesus, wɔabɔ N' mbeamuduam.

Verse 2
Worisi No atwetwe yi, Ana yennkosu ama No?
Ao! hwɛ mbrɛ ɔayɛ komm sɛn hɔ:
Hɛn Wura Jesus, wɔabɔ N' mbeamuduam.

Verse 3
Wɔbɔɔ Ne nsa nye N' anan mu Ne men mu wewee, nsukɔm twaar No!
Mbusu dze sum hyɛɛenyi do:
Hɛn Wura Jesus, wɔabɔ N' mbeamuduam.

Verse 4
Ɔkaa ɔdɔ nsɛm mpɛn esuon; Ndɔnhwer ebiasa na ɔtaa dzinn Serɛɛ mbɔbɔrhu maa adasa:
Hɛn Wura Jesus, wɔabɔ N' mbeamuduam.

Verse 5
Ma yengyina mbeamudua n' ase, Na bɔgya a ofi Ne mfem' no, Ɔbɔhor hɛn ho bɔn nyina:
Hɛn Wura Jesus, wɔabɔ N' mbeamuduam.

Verse 6
6.'Koma bobɔe na nyinsuwa,
Wɔmmfa nnkam hɔn a wobisa; Dɔ ahyɛse nye 'koma bobɔe:
Mo Wura Jesus, wɔabɔ N' mbeamuduam.

Verse 7
Onyame dɔ! nyimpa no bɔn! Munnsu 'i asɔ hom tum ahwɛ; Na Nyame dɔ edzi konyim:
Hɛn Wura Jesus, wɔabɔ N' mbeamuduam.

title: Ko Do Ko Kan Ahentum Mu
raw_title: CAN57 Ko Do Ko Kan Ahentum Mu
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ko do kɔ kan ahentum mu!
N-tar saw abowa no do;
Tsena do, na eyɛ Ɔhen mu,
David ne Ba, wiadze Gyefo.

Verse 2
Ko do kɔ kan ahentum mu!
Ɔwo na Sion rotweɔn Wo;
Wɔdze n-tar nye mberɛnkɔnson Egu Wo kwan mu dɛ fa do.

Verse 3
Ko do kɔ kan ahentum mu!
Ɔkatakyi, hell ne sɛɛfo; 'Wo na ibue sor ahenman To hɔ petee ma Wo nkorɔfo.

Verse 4
Ko do kɔ kan ahentum mu?
Dɔmtutuw fi sor rohwɛ Wo, Dɛ 'rokɔbɔ afɔr huhu Ana akɔko W' ahengua do.

Verse 5
Ko do kɔ kan ahentum mu! Wiadze nyina hɛn Enyidar!
Dzi nyim, brɛ hɛn 'komatɔmu, Ndzeyɛtsenenee, ɔdɔ, nye siar.

title: Hwe Adasa Hon Agyenkwa
raw_title: CAN58 Hwe Adasa Hon Agyenkwa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hwɛ adasa hɔn Agyenkwa Wɔ enyimguase dua n' ho! Dɔ a ɔkaa N' ma okyii bɔgya Wui maa wo n' so so pa!

Verse 2
Tsie, ɔrepen! abɔdze rihim,
Asaase rowosow;
Asɔrdan mu ntwamutam atsew, Abotan repaapaa.

Verse 3
Oewie! wer a ho hia n' ɔatɔ; Ɔrekam', Gye Mo sunsum! Hwɛ mbrɛ ɔabɔ Ne tsir adze, Ɔabɔ n' adze ewu!

Verse 4
Na obobu wu apon mu ntsɛm,
Na ɔahyerɛn enyimnyamm'; Nyame Eguambaa, yaw bɛn a, Dɔ bɛn nye Wodze sɛ?

title: Yetow Ayeyindwom Kamfo
raw_title: CAN59 Yetow Ayeyindwom Kamfo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Yɛtow ayɛyindwom kamfo Jesus a owuu mbeamudua do n':
N-dzebɔnyɛfo enyidar;
Ne ntsi yemmbu wiadze yi hwee.

Verse 2
Ne mbeamudua no kyerɛ petee Ma yehu dɛ Nyame nye dɔ: Ɔsoa hɛn bɔn wɔ dua no do; Ɔdze Nyame adom brɛ hɛn.

Verse 3
Ne mbeamudua n' yi hɛn afɔdzi;
Ɔtaa hɔn a wɔtɔ bitsi; Ɔhyɛ hɛn dzen mbusu ber mu; Ɔma dza ɔyɛ wen yɛ dɛw.

Verse 4
Ɔma ohufo mbanyinndam;
Ɔhyɛ okotoo dzen ma ɔko;
Ɔma kan hyerɛn hɛn wumpa do, Mma yennsuro samanadze.

Verse 5
O Jesus, Wo mbeamudua no yɛ Ɔbra ne dɛw, mbusu n' edur N-dzebɔnyɛfo guandɔbea:
Abɔfo kamfo Wo dɔ daa.

title: Jesus, Fa M' Sie Mbeamudua N' ho
raw_title: CAN60 Jesus, Fa M' Sie Mbeamudua N' ho
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jesus, fa m' sie mbeamudua n' ho,
Hɔ na nsu a ɔyɛ edur n' Fi Calvary koko no do Pem kwa ma obiara.
Chorus
Mbeamudua n' mu, mbeamudua n' mu,
Na menhyehyɛ moho,
Nkɛpem dɛ me kra bɔhom Wɔ esutsen n' ekyir hɔ.

Verse 2
Mbeamudua n' ho na dɔ na adom
Too me kra bɔbɔfo;
Adzekyee Nworaba hyɛnhyɛnn n' Ne nserɛmɛn hyerɛɛn mo do.

Verse 3
Dza osii mbeamudua no ho n',
Nyame Eguambaa, yi kyerɛ m'; Ao, boa me ma mennantsew No nwin ase daa daa.

Verse 4
M' bɔweɔn matweɔn mbeamudua n' ho,
Mahwɛ kan ekodu Sika man no n' esuegya Wɔ esutsen n' ekyir hɔ.
Chorus
Mbeamudua n' mu, mbeamudua n' mu,
Na menhyehyɛ moho,
Nkɛpem dɛ me kra bɔhom Wɔ esutsen n' ekyir hɔ.

title: Bura Bi Wo Ho Bogya Ma
raw_title: CAN61 Bura Bi Wo Ho Bogya Ma
lyrics:
Verse 1
Bura bi wɔ hɔ bɔgya ma,
Wɔtwee n' Immanuel mfem', Na ndzebɔnyɛfo bɔtɔm' a, Wɔyew hɔn ho fi nyina.

Verse 2
Owifo no ɔdze dɛw hun
Bura n' wɔ n' aber do; Hɔ na kaansa mo ho yɛ nkɔw a, M' bɔhor mo ho bɔn nyina.

Verse 3
Nyame Eguambaa, Wo bɔgyaa
No tum ɔnnkɛpa da,
Gyedɛ W' asɔrmba nyina enya nkwa, Mma wɔnnkɛyɛ bɔn bio.

Verse 4
Ofitsi dɛ me gyedzi hun
Esu a ofi Wo mfem',
Onyame dɔ ayɛ mo ndwom, Na ɔbɛyɛ edu wum'.

Verse 5
Na owu ma me gyirama
Yɛ komm da dɛtsem' a, Me kra bɔtow ndwom dɛɛdɛw bi Akamfo Wo wɔ sor.

title: O Tsir Kronkron, Wopiraa Wo
raw_title: CAN62 O Tsir Kronkron, Wopiraa Wo
lyrics:
Verse 1
O tsir Krɔnkrɔn, wopiraa Wo,
Yaw mbordo hyɛɛ Wo do, Wɔdze nsoɛ yɛɛ W' ahenkyɛw Dze sii Wo atwetwe!
Mbrɛ W' enyim esi atow,
Ɔnam ahoguan ntsi; Enyim a nkyɛ ɔkyɛn wi, Hwɛ mbrɛ oesi enyam.

Verse 2
Enyimnyam nye nkwa Wura, Dɛw krɔnkrɔn bi a nkyɛ ewɔ a! Mekenkan nsɛm nwanwa yi a Dɛw ka m' dɛ 'yɛ medze.
W' awerɛhow n', W' ayamuhyehye n',
Abɔn nya mu mfaso;
Emi mbom na motoo mbra, Ɔwo na inyaa wuyaw.

Verse 3
Minya gyirama wɔ hen
Dze eyi Wo ayɛw Wɔ W' amandzehu wu yi, Wo tsema a ɔmmbɔ adze yi?
Mo Wura, fa m' yɛ Wodze koraa;
Mma memmpa W' ara da; Pa gu ma m' dɛ m' betsiatsia W' anwanwa dɔ yi do!

Verse 4
Muruwu a, mo Wura, bɛn me;
Ao, yi Woho kyerɛ m'
Ao, tu faa bra bohwim me,
Bɛgye m' fi mbusu nsa;
Gyedzi ntom' mma n' enyiwa
Ontsim Jesus Wo do; Na nyia owu gyedzi mu n'
Wo dɔ ma owu sɔnn. Amen.

title: Ewuradze Christ Asoer Nde; Alleluia
raw_title: CAN63 Ewuradze Christ Asoer Nde; Alleluia
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ewuradze Christ asoɛr ndɛ; Alleluia! Nyimpa nye abɔfo ka: Alleluia!
Hom mma dɛw na ehurusi do: Alleluia!
Sor ntow, wiadze ngye do: Alleluia!

Verse 2
Ɔdɔ edzi dwuma no; Alleluia!
Ɔako oedzi nyim koraa: Alleluia!
Ɔbo nye aweɔmfo n' yɛ kwa; Alleluia!
Christ efi samanadze: Alleluia!

Verse 3
Hɛn enyimnyam Hen tse ae; Alleluia! Owu, wo hwirom wɔ hen?
Prɛko na owui gyee hɛn: Alleluia!
Owu, wo konyim wɔ hen? Alleluia!

Verse 4
Wɔakrɔn hɛn Wura Christ wɔ sor; Alleluia! Yedzi N' ekyir rokɔ hɔ: Alleluia!
Yɛtse dɛ Ɔno a, yɛbɔsoɛr; Alleluia!
Mbeamudua n' nye sor man n' hɛndze a: Alleluia!

Verse 5
Hɛn enyimnyam Hen siarfo! Alleluia! N-kwa a onnyi ewiei nye dɛ, Alleluia!
Yehu Wo, yɛtse Wo tum, Alleluia!
Na yɛkamfo, yɛdɔ Wo. Alleluia!

title: Jesus Christ Asoer N-de, Hallelujah
raw_title: CAN64 Jesus Christ Asoer N-de, Hallelujah
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jesus Christ asoɛr n-dɛ, Hallelujah!
Hɛn konyim dapɔn krɔnkrɔn, Hallelujah!
Ogyaam wɔ Mbeamudua no do, Hallelujah!
Dze poom hɛn a yɛayew no, Hallelujah!

Verse 2
Wɔmma yɛmfa ayɛyindwom, Hallelujah! Ntonton Christ, hɛn sor Hen a, Hallelujah!
Ɔsɔɔw Mbeamudua nye wumaa, Hallelujah!
Dze poon abɔn gyee hɔn nkwa n'. Hallelujah!

Verse 3
Na amandze a ohunii n', Hallelujah! Ɔdze nkwagye abrɛ hɛn; Hallelujah!
Afei odzi hen wɔ sor, Hallelujah!
Mbrɛ abɔfo tow ndwom daa. Hallelujah!

Verse 4
Yɛntow ndwom mma hɛn Nyame, Hallelujah! Nkamfo No dɔ afebɔɔ, Hallelujah!
Ɔsormba, hom nyi N' ayɛw, Hallelujah!
Egya, Ba, Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn. Hallelujah!

title: Christ Asoer O! Hallelujah
raw_title: CAN65 Christ Asoer O! Hallelujah
lyrics:
Verse 1
Christ asoɛr o! Hallelujah! Hɛn konyim adamfo asoɛr.
Wonyi N' ayɛw! Hallelujah!
Christ asoɛr ewufo mu.
Hɛn 'koma dze ndaase tonton N',
Dɛ Ne kan ahyerɛn bio; Yɛdze dɛw bu ntwɛr wɔ N' enyim, Yɛsoɛr fi yaw na nyinsuam.
Chorus
Christ asoɛr o! Hallelujah!
Hɛn konyim adamfo asoɛr. Wonyi N' ayɛw! Hallelujah!
Christ asoɛr ewufo mu.

Verse 2
Christ asoɛr! No wiadze abrabɔm'
Awerɛhow nyina abɔ adze,
Ɔnam enyigye mbotsen mu
Asan aba nkwa mu bio;
Owu na hɛll akotow No;
Ɔasoɛr, oedzi konyim ndɛ
Abɔfo dzi N' ekyir roweɔn N' 'Nyimnyam abɔ N' abɔtsir.

Verse 3
Christ asoɛr! ofitsi ndɛ dze
Owu na hɛll remmen hɛn,
Yɛyɛ Christ dze, Wɔ No mu na
Yeedzi adze nyina do nyim;
Ekyingye na mbɔbɔryɛ nyina
Na suro abɔ adze;
Ndɛ da yi nye No wusoɛr da, Hom mma yɛnsoɛr yɛnhyɛ fa.
Chorus
Christ asoɛr o! Hallelujah!
Hɛn konyim adamfo asoɛr. Wonyi N' ayɛw! Hallelujah!
Christ asoɛr ewufo mu.

title: Ewuradze Christ Asoer Bio
raw_title: CAN66 Ewuradze Christ Asoer Bio
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ewuradze Christ asoɛr bio;
Christ ebubu mpokyerɛ nyinam';
Tsie, abɔfo robɔ se,
Rotow ndwom wɔ sor daa daa:
Hallelujah!

Verse 2
Nyia ɔdze No nkwa maa hɛn n',
Ɔno a hɛn ntsi ɔsɔɔw ko n' Ɔyɛ hɛn Mpataguan ndɛ;
Hɛn so dɛw tow ndwom dɛ:
Hallelujah!

Verse 3
Nyia ɔsɔɔw obene nyina
No werɛ hoow wɔ mbeamudua n' do n', Ɔtse enyimnyam' wɔ sor ndɛ, Odzi ma hɛn, tsie hɛn su.
Hallelujah!

Verse 4
Ɔno a wɔnnto No kwan dzin,
Ɔno a osianee kɔr hɛll,
Nyia katakyi too n' mpokyrɛ n'
Ndɛ wɔasoa N' 'henkyɛw wɔ sor.
Hallelujah!

Verse 5
Ɔno a ɔdaa nda n' mu n'
Wɔakrɔn No dɛ ɔngye nkwa; Ndɛ wohua N' Christianman mu Dɛ Eguambaa N' yɛ ahemfo Hen.
Hallelujah!

Verse 6
Ndɛ ɔse yɛmbɔ n' dawur
Mbrɛ abɔn besi enya nkwa,
Mbrɛ nnuhofo enya fakyɛ
Mbrɛ hɛn so bɛyɛ ahɛn sor,
Hallelujah!

Verse 7
Hɛn Mpataguan N' nye W' ampa
Christ, nyɛn Wo nkorɔfo ndɛ; Yi hɛn bɔn na hɛn mfom kɔ,
Ma hɛn nyina atow ndwom dɛ:
Hallelujah!

title: Oko Kese No Abo Adze
raw_title: CAN67 Oko Kese No Abo Adze

title: Christ Tse Ase! Afei Owu
raw_title: CAN68 Christ Tse Ase! Afei Owu
lyrics:
Verse 1
Christ tse ase! afei Owu,
Wo hu nnkotum etu hɛn bo;
Christ tse ase! yi ma yehu
Dɛ samanadze nnkɛmen hɛn.
Alleluia!

Verse 2
Christ tse ase! sor nye asaase
Tum nyina wɔdze ama No; Hɛn so yɛbɔkɔ Ne nkyɛn,
Yɛnye N' ekedzi Hen sor hɔ.
Alleluia!

Verse 3
Christ tse ase! hɛn ntsi owui; Dɛm ntsi yɛbɛtsena ama No,
Yɛatsew nyɛe nye adwen ho, Yɛdze hɛn bra eyi N' ayɛw.
Alleluia!

Verse 4
Christ tse ase! yenyim ampa
Dɛ hwee nnkɛpaa hɛn No dɔ ho; Wu o, n-kwa o, samanadze o, Nnkɔtwe hɛn efi No ho da.
Alleluia!

Verse 5
Christ tse ase! afei owu
Yɛ onnyiewiei nkwa abotsen; Yi bɛka hɛn bo atɔm', Ber a wu no sum bɔtɔ hɛn.
Alleluia!

title: Tsetse Mbobow, Hom Mbuebue Yie
raw_title: CAN69 Tsetse Mbobow, Hom Mbuebue Yie
lyrics:
Verse 1
Tsetse mbobow, hom mbuebue yie! Enyimnyam Hen n' reba o!
Sahen n' dze ndɔmmum reba fie:
Wonhyira N', wɔmma No mbo.

Verse 2
Mununkum kumbɔɔ yi ase ɛ? Nkɔntwe pii yi so dɛn? Werdam son no oewie pɛsɛɛ; Wɔmfa abɔso nhyɛ N'.

Verse 3
Konyim Damfo kɔ sor no sor,
Ɔsɛ, ɔfata nwionn;
No sor-kɔ tɔ N' Asɔr bobor, Naaso ɔbɛba bio.

Verse 4
Orisiesie adampan pii
Wɔ hɛn Egya kurowm';
N' Egya N' abanyimfa na ofi Soma Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn.

Verse 5
Ɔrennkyɛr san; hɛn Nkwa bɛba Abɛfa hɛn akɔ.
Ɔsor noho mbrɛ wu nndu da Na hɛn so yɛbɔkɔ.

Verse 6
Wiadze Kasamaafo Kortoo
Ɔakrɔn emi saa yi,
Ɔapɛ enyimnyam kokroko Ama Ne gyedzinyi.

Verse 7
Ɔsor ndɔmba, mma hom nngyaa da,
Nsiesie aka abɔn;
Enyimnyam nka Nyame Egya, Ɔba, Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn!

title: Hwe Da A Christ Fowee Kor Sor, Alleluia
raw_title: CAN70 Hwe Da A Christ Fowee Kor Sor, Alleluia
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hwɛ da a Christ fowee kɔr sor; Alleluia! Ma hɛn enyi egyina N' Alleluia!
Ɔannkyɛr adasamba nkyɛn, Alleluia!
Na ɔasan kɔ no sor fie. Alleluia!

Verse 2
Wɔrotweɔn wɔabɔ No se: Alleluia!
M-botsen n' mma hɔn tsir do; Alleluia!
Hom nyina mbuebue petee, Alleluia!
Ma Enyimnyam Hen n' nkɔ mu. Alleluia!

Verse 3
Kaansa ɔahɛn ɔsor mpo a, Alleluia! Ɔda ho dɔ nyimpamba; Alleluia!
Ɔasan kɔ N' ahenguam' mpo a, Alleluia!
Ɔda ho frɛ hɛn Nedze. Alleluia!

Verse 4
Hwɛ! ɔama Ne nsa do sor, Alleluia! Hwɛ! No dɔ epiratua n'; Alleluia!
Tsie! N' anofamfa kasa Alleluia!
N-hyira gu N' Asɔr do. Alleluia!

Verse 5
Hɛn Wura, sɛ afow kɔ sor, Alleluia! Afa wim' ekyir noho a, Alleluia!
Ma hɛn so hɛn akoma Alleluia!
Nka Wo do nkɔ Nyame manm'. Alleluia!

title: Hwe Konyimdzifo N' Afow Sor
raw_title: CAN71 Hwe Konyimdzifo N' Afow Sor
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hwɛ Konyimdzifo n' afow sor,
Hwɛ Hen n' ahyɛ N' ahentar
Dze Ne tseaseanam fua do
Rokɔ No sor ahemfie;
Tsie! sor adwontow kuw ruhur
Hallelujah enyigyem', Na sor mbotsen no ebuebue Regye hɔn sor Hen akɔm'.

Verse 2
Woana na ɔreba 'nyimnyam mu Ma ehurusi mbɛn ka do 'i?
Ɔko Wura, dɔm Nyankopɔn.
Ɔno na oedzi konyim
Ɔno a ɔsɔɔw mbeamudua do fona
Ɔno a ofi ndam' soɛree, Ɔaka bɔn na Satan egu, Nam wu do asɛɛ N' atamfo.

Verse 3
Ɔama hɛn nyimpasu no do
Fi fuam' kɔ Nyame nyimfa;
Ɔsor hɔ na yɛbɛtsena,
Yɛnye N' egyina 'nyimnyam mu:
Jesus dzi hen, abɔfo sɔr N';
Nyame Nyimpa tse ahenguam' Ewuradze Tumfo, Wo sorkɔm' Yɛdze gyedzi hu hɛndze.

Verse 4
Enyimnyam nka Egya Nyame; Enyimnyam nka Nyame Ba a,
Oewu, ɔasoɛr na ɔafow sor,
Ɔno a oenya sor ahenman n'
Enyimnyam nka Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn;
Nye Nyame Baasa Kor no
Enyimnyam a onnyi ewiei nka Hɔn wɔ sor nye asaase.

title: Sika Mbotsen No Ebuebue
raw_title: CAN72 Sika Mbotsen No Ebuebue
lyrics:
Verse 1
Sika mbotsen no ebuebue,
Kwan ada mu petee;
Enyimnyam Hen no ahɛn mu, Ɔkɔ N' Egya Ne nkyɛn.

Verse 2
Ewuradze, edzi hɛn kan,
'Rekɛpɛ hɛn tsenabew,
Ama yeekefir mbrɛ ewɔ, Na yeehu Nyame enyim.

Verse 3
Dɛm n-tsi enyimnyam hyerɛn
Hɛn kwan do wɔ asaase; Fua a osiiw W' hɛn enyi do n', Kan fi sor hotse no.

Verse 4
Ma hɛn 'koma nye adwen do,
Fa W' adom pa n' dom hɛn, Na yɛnenam asaase ha 'i, Hɛn 'koradze ada sor.

Verse 5
Na hɛn enyidar na dɔ eegyina Nyame nyimfa mbrɛ 'tse n'. Tsena hɛn mu na ndaamba hɛn so Yaatsena Wom' afebɔɔ. Amen.

title: Mbowa A Jewfo Dze Boo Afor
raw_title: CAN73 Mbowa A Jewfo Dze Boo Afor
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mbowa a Jewfo dze bɔɔ afɔr,
Hɔn bɔgyaa nyinara
Nn-kotum ama etsidaa, Anaa ɔatsew hɛn ho.

Verse 2
Christ, sor Eguambaa n' dze,
Oyi hɛn bɔn nyina;
Afɔrbɔdze a ɔwɔ dzin, Na ɔsom bo kyɛn hɔn nyina.

Verse 3
Me gyedzi nsa bɛda
W' etsifi pampam' hɔ, Ber a medze nnuho gyina ha Mereka mo bɔn yi.

Verse 4
Me kra twa n' enyi hwɛ
Dza obuu Wo kɔn a, Ohu dɛ n' afɔdzi ka ho Ma 'sɛn mbusu dua n' do.

Verse 5
Yɛgye dzi a yɛtse dɛ
Mbusu no efi hɔ;
Yɛdze dɛw hyira Eguambaa n', Yɛtwer N' anwanwa dɔ n'.

title: Me Gyedzi Tsim Wo Do
raw_title: CAN74 Me Gyedzi Tsim Wo Do
lyrics:
Verse 1
Me gyedzi tsim Wo do, CalvaryEguambaa, Gyefo Krɔnkrɔn:
Morosɔr yi, tsie me;
Yi mo bɔn nyinara; Ma ofir ndɛ menyɛ Wodze koraa.

Verse 2
Ma W' adom kɛse no
N-hyɛ m' akoma dzen,
Ma menyɛ ndam;
Dɛ mbrɛ iwui maa me n',
Ao, ma mo so mo dɔ
Ɔmfram dzendzen mma Wo Na mma ɔnndan da.

Verse 3
Menam bra sum mu yi,
Na yaw etwa mo ho 'i, Woara kyerɛ m' kwan;
Ma sum ndan adzekyee,
Pepa me nyinsuwaEso mma monntɔ gon Mimmfi Wo nkyɛn.

Verse 4
Ber a bra bɔbɔ adze,
Na owu n' esutsen
Bɛpram mo do n',
Ao, m' Agyenkwa siarfo,
Pa m' suro na ekyingye, Fa me kra a apon no n'
Kɔ sor fie sɔnn. Amen.

title: Dzi Dew, Nyame Ye Hen
raw_title: CAN75 Dzi Dew, Nyame Ye Hen
lyrics:
Verse 1
Dzi dɛw, Nyame yɛ Hen!
Kotow w' Ewuradze;
Ɔdasanyi, tow ndwom, Na dzi dɛw daa nyina:
Chorus
Ma w' akoma nye wo ndze do; Dzi dɛw, mese wo dɛ, Dzi dɛw.

Verse 2
Agyenkwa Christ dzi hen,
Nokwar nye dɔ dzi wɔ n'; Ɔhoor hɛn ho fi no, Ɔgyee egua wɔ sor:

Verse 3
N' ahendzi mmbɔ adze da, No tum wɔ sor na ase; Saafee ama Jesus:

Verse 4
Ɔtse Nyame nyimfa
Kɛpem dɛ N' atamfo Bɔbɔ hɔn mu adze Edzi N' ahyɛdze do:

Verse 5
Obedzi nyim ewie,
Oetu hɛn bɔn nyina, Ma dasanyi biara Eenya sor enyigye:

Verse 6
Dzi dɛw enyidadom';
Hɛn Jesus brɛba bio Abɛfa hɛn akɔ Hɛn domankoma fie:
Chorus
Ma w' akoma nye wo ndze do; Dzi dɛw, mese wo dɛ, Dzi dɛw.

title: O Bra, O Bra Immanuel
raw_title: CAN76 O Bra, O Bra Immanuel
lyrics:
Verse 1
O bra, O bra Immanuel,
Na bɔpɔn ndɔmmum Israel, Ɔka mmɔn ananabea ha Kodu dɛ Nyame Ba bɛba.
Chorus
Dzi dɛw! Dzi dɛw! Immanuel Bɛba wo nkyɛn, O Israel.

Verse 2
O bra, O bra, Wura Tumfo,
Ɔwo a tsetse n' edze mbra Maa mbusuakuw wɔ Sinai do Wɔ fua, hu, nye ahentum mu.
Chorus
Dzi dɛw! Dzi dɛw! Immanuel Bɛba wo nkyɛn, O Israel.

Verse 3
O bra jesse Poma, bɛgye
Wo man fi Satan tum ase; Gye Wo nkorɔfo fi hɛll bun mu, Ma hɔn konyimdzi wɔ wu do.
Chorus
Dzi dɛw! Dzi dɛw! Immanuel Bɛba wo nkyɛn, O Israel.

Verse 4
O bra, Adzekyee Woraba
Ma wo mbae nkyenyan hɛn sunsum; Bɔbɔ anago sum hwetse, Bɔ owu sunsuma petse.
Chorus
Dzi dɛw! Dzi dɛw! Immanuel Bɛba wo nkyɛn, O Israel.

Verse 5
O bra, David Saafee, O bra,
Bue hɛn sor fie pataa ma hɛn,
Yɛ kwan a wɔdze kɔ sor n' sɔnn, Na siw dza ɔdze mbusu ba n'.
Chorus
Dzi dɛw! Dzi dɛw! Immanuel Bɛba wo nkyɛn, O Israel.

title: Hwe! Odze Mununkum Risian
raw_title: CAN77 Hwe! Odze Mununkum Risian
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hwɛ! Ɔdze mununkum risian,
Nyia da bi ɔtɔɔr hɛn ntsi n';
Ahotsewfo mpempem ka ho, Dzi N' ekyir kumbɔɔ reba:
Alleluia!
Nyame reba ebedzi hen.

Verse 2
Enyienyi nyina bohu No
Dɛ oewuna ahentar wusuww;
Hɔn a woemmbu N' bi, wɔtɔɔn No n',
Wopirapiraa N', bɔɔ N' mbeamudua mu n' Wobotwa ewuo,
Da a wobohu Messiah n'.

Verse 3
N' amandzehu ho nsɛnkyerɛdze
Da ho ara wowɔ No ho;
Dza N' asomfo a wɔapon hɔn no
Dzi ho ehurusi daa n';
Yɛdze dɛw bɛn
Bɔhwɛ enyimnyam etua n'.

Verse 4
Ɔnyɛ hɔ! nkorɔfo nyina mbu W' ntwɛr
Wo domankoma ahengua n' enyim;
Gyefo, gye tum na enyimnyam no,
Gye ahendzi n' yɛ Wodze; Alleluia!
Onnyiewiei Nyankopɔn, sian!

title: Kwantunyi Ankonam Ne Kan
raw_title: CAN78 Kwantunyi Ankonam Ne Kan
lyrics:
Verse 1
Kwantunyi ankonam ne kan,
Adzekyee Woraba,
Pue, na tow W' anapa nserɛmɛn n' Fa pam hɛn yaw nyina.

Verse 2
Ewuradze siarfo, ma mbeambea
Na nsupruw nyina ntow
Ndwom nyi W' adehye Dzin ayɛw, Wɔmfa Wo nyɛ hɔn Hen.

Verse 3
Ma wiadze nyinara a afei
Wɔasɛ sor man hyɛnhyɛnn n', Wɔmma ehurusi ndwom do Wɔmfa nkaa Wo dɔ no.

Verse 4
Jesus, W' abɔdze risi nkrum- Asaase, Po, nye wim'- Wɔnye hɛn akoma yɛ kor Kekam' dzendzen frɛ Wo.

Verse 5
Mbeamudua n' n' adom, n' asomdwee
Ne nyinara Wodze a, Afei enyimnyam ahenkyɛw n'
Na konyim n' nyɛ Wodze. Amen.

title: Beebiara Mbre Ewia Onhyeren
raw_title: CAN79 Beebiara Mbre Ewia Onhyeren
lyrics:
Verse 1
Beebiara mbrɛ ewia ɔnhyerɛn,
Jesus twa dɛ obedzi hen; N' ahendzi tsen fi pom' du pom', Gyedɛ ewia fir dɛ ɔnntɔ bio.

Verse 2
Asɔr nyina wɔbɛyɛ ama N',
Na wɔdze ayɛyi ebu N' kyɛw; Ne dzin, tse dɛ eduhuam a, Nye afɔr nyina botu akɔ sor.

Verse 3
Nkorɔfo na ngyirama mpem nyina
Dze No dɔ ho ndwom dɛɛdɛw mu; Na mbofra so ma hɔn ndze do, Wɔtow Hosanna ma Ne dzin.

Verse 4
Mbrɛ odzi hen n', nhyira ahyɛ ma,
Wotu adaduafo apo;
Afonafo nya daa ahomka; Na ehiafo so, wohyira hɔn.

Verse 5
Beebiara mbrɛ ɔkyerɛ No tum, Wu na mbusu fi hɔ koraa:
No mu na nhyira a Adam yeew no n', Ne mbanana nya ma ɔbor do.

Verse 6
Wɔmma abɔdze nyina nsoɛr
M-fa ayɛyɛdze mbrɛ hɔn Hen;
Sor abɔfo mfa ndwom nsian bio, Na asaasemba so nsuo mu ntow. Amen.

title: O Nyame Do, Sian Famu
raw_title: CAN80 O Nyame Do, Sian Famu
lyrics:
Verse 1
O Nyame Dɔ, sian famu,
Bra bɔhwehwɛ me kra,
Fa Woara Wo hyew dzendzen bi n' bɔsoɛ mu; Kyigyinafo e, twe bɛn!
Bopue m' akoma mu,
Na ma Wo gya krɔnkrɔn no mbɛfram me kra.

Verse 2
Ma ɔndzɛw ara yie,
Nkodu dɛ ɔbɛhyew
Wiadze akɔndɔ nyina ma ɔaatɔ nso;
Na ma W' enyimnyam kan n'
Ɔnhyerɛn m' enyim daa,
Ɔnhyerɛn mo ho nye mo kwan mu nyina.

Verse 3
Na ma ɔdɔ krɔnkrɔn
Ɔnyɛ m' egudo atar,
Na ma menhyɛ ahobrɛadze wɔ ase;
Ahobrɛadze 'koma a,
Ɔdze noho to famu,
Na ɔdze nyinsuwa kyir noara n' esintɔ.

Verse 4
Dɛm yi na ɔbɛma
Akɔndɔ dzendzen a
Me kra benya no nnkenya kabea mpo;
Mbrɛ n' ahoɔfɛw bɛyɛ n'
Obi runntum nnkyerɛ
Gyedɛ Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn ayɛ n' ne tsenabea.

title: Tsetseber A Nyame Siaan Wiadze N'
raw_title: CAN81 Tsetseber A Nyame Siaan Wiadze N'
lyrics:
Verse 1
Tsetseber a Nyame siaan wiadze n',
Ɔbaa n' tum nye ebufuwm'; Fua bɔɔ apetse N' ananadze, Fa yɛɛ sum, fa daan gya.

Verse 2
Na ne mprɛnu no a ɔbae no,
Ɔbaa n' tum nye dɔ mu;
Bɔkɔɔ kyɛn anapa mframa Nna Ebubur Krɔnkrɔn n' bae.

Verse 3
Ogya a osiaan Sinai do no
Ɔframee ma ɔyɛɛ hu,
Ɔdaan enyimnyam ahenkyɛw
Wɔ ahotse

title: Egya, Hye Wo Ba Enyimnyam
raw_title: CAN82 Egya, Hye Wo Ba Enyimnyam
lyrics:
Verse 1
Egya, hyɛ Wo Ba enyimnyam, Yɛ dza Ne mpaabɔ bisa n':
Ma Kasamaafo no mbra,
Fa Werɛkyekyefo n' ma hɛn Yɛnam gyedzi do regye N', Jesus dzin ntsi, fa N' ma hɛn.

Verse 2
Yɛnam gyedzi do bohu
Na yɛatse Sunsum no nka; Ɔdze N' adom nye No dɔ Bɛtsena hɛn akoma mu: Hɛn mboa nye papa nyina Pem fi No nkotoo mu ba.

Verse 3
Ennkɔsɔw asɛm n' ano, 'Wo, nokwafo, yamuyiefo? Ennkɛma Werɛkyekyefo n'
Abɛtsena hɛn 'komam' daa?
Ɔyɛ dɛn ara a 'dze N' bɛma:
Christ Kaa dɛ edze N' bɛma ampa.

title: Ansaana Hen Gyefo Siarfo
raw_title: CAN83 Ansaana Hen Gyefo Siarfo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ansaana hɛn Gyefo siarfo
Nye hɛn ridzi mpaamu n', Ogyaa hɛn Ɔkwankyerɛfo dɛ Ɔnye hɛn ntsena.

Verse 2
Ɔbae wɔ ebubur suban mu,
Dɛ ɔatrɛ n' atsabanm', Ɔdze dɔ na asomdwee boguu No nkorɔfo do.

Verse 3
Ɔdze ogya ngyrama bae dɛ
Ɔrebɛkyerɛkyerɛ hɛn; Ɔtse dɛ mframa, ɔyɛ dzen, Na wonnhu so.

Verse 4
'Koma biara a ɔbrɛ adze n',
Ɔba bɛtsena mu hɔ, Na ɔdae ahom dɛɛdɛw bi Dze gye no do.

Verse 5
Ne ndze na yɛtse no bi
Dɛ ewimbir mframa n'; Osiw mfomso kwan, Ka sor ho nsɛm.

Verse 6
Papa biara a ɔwɔ hɛn ho,
Konyim biara a yedzi, Adwen krɔnkrɔn biara a yenya, Ofir Noara.

Verse 7
Ahotsew nye adom Sunsum,
Hwɛ hɛn mberɛwyɛ tsemam'; O tsena hɛn 'komam', na yɛ ma Ɔmfata Wo. Amen.

title: Ao O, Sunsum Kronkron, Bra
raw_title: CAN84 Ao O, Sunsum Kronkron, Bra
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ao o, Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn, bra! Fi sor noho dwir hɛn do, Tow Wo kan hyerɛn hɛn do.

Verse 2
Ehiafo hɔn Boafo, bra! 'Wo a ema sor ahonya, Akoma nyina kan, bra.

Verse 3
Ɔwerɛkyekyefo kɛse, Bɔsoɛ hɛn akoma mu, Na ma yennya W' asomdwee.

Verse 4
Ɔfona mu ahomgye, Ahohyehyem' ahotɔ, Bra beyi hɛn nyinsuwa mu.

Verse 5
Siar Ewia! yɛserɛ Wo, pue; Fa Wo kan nye Wo ntseasee Hyɛ agyedzifo mu ma.

Verse 6
Sɛ Ɔwo ammboa hɛn a, Yɛbɔ mbɔdzen dɛn ara a, Ne nyinara bɛyɛ gyan.

Verse 7
Hohor hɛn mu fi nyina, Fɔw hɛn akoma a woetwie, Yɛ sunsum pirafo edur.

Verse 8
Ma asoɔdzenfo nyɛ Wo pɛ, Bɔ hɔn a wɔyɛ hyew, Fa akobɔfo bra fie.

Verse 9
Dom agyedzifo nyina, Ma wontsintsim Woara, Ma hɔn Wo dɔ akyɛdze n'.

Verse 10
Ma yɛntsena krɔnkrɔnyɛ mu,
Na dom hɛn asomdwee wu,
Na fa hɛn kɔ Wo dɛw mu. Amen.

title: Nyame Sunsum, Tsie Hen Mpaabo
raw_title: CAN85 Nyame Sunsum, Tsie Hen Mpaabo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyame sunsum, tsie hɛn mpaabɔ,
Fa dan yi yɛ wo fie,
Fa W' adom no tum nyina sian; Bra, Sunsum kɛse, bra.

Verse 2
Bra dɛ ekan: ma yenhu hɛn
Mbɔbɔryɛ na mbusu Na fa hɛn dua ɔbra kwan a, Atseneneefo nyina duam'.

Verse 3
Bra dɛ ogya, bɛtsew hɛn ho,
Dɛ afɔrbɔ gyaframee; Ma hɛn kra nyina nyɛ afɔr Mma hɛn Pomfo Ne dzin.

Verse 4
Bra dɛ ɔbɔw, na dɛw mu ara
Hyira ber krɔnkrɔn yi, Ma dza etwie ndzi dɛw dɛ onya, Wo prɔmprɔmyɛ tum no.

Verse 5
Bra dɛ ebubur, tserɛw W' atsabanm'
Asomdwee dɔ atsaban n'; Na ma W' asɔr a ɔwɔ asaase Nyɛ siar dɛ sor Asɔr n'.

Verse 6
Bra dɛmframa a ɔdze twitwi
Na Pentecost adom, Ma hɔn a Ɔbaa awo hɔn nyina Eehu W' enyimnyam no.

Verse 7
Nyame Sunsum, tsie hɛn mpaabɔ; Yɛ wiadze a 'ayew Wo fie; Fa W' adom No tum nyina sian;
Bra, Sunsum kɛse, bra. Amen.

title: Nyame Ahom, Gu Mo Do
raw_title: CAN86 Nyame Ahom, Gu Mo Do
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyame ahom, gu mo do;
Hyɛ mo mu nkwa fofor, Ma mondɔ dza Ɔwo edɔ Na menyɛ dza eyɛ.

Verse 2
Nyame ahom, gu mo do;
Ma m' akoma mu ntsew,
Kɛpem dɛ menye W' nya pɛ kor Dze sɔw fona, dze bɔ bra.

Verse 3
Nyame ahom, gu mo do;
Ma menyɛ Wodze koraa,
Kɛpem dɛ me nyimpadua mpo Nyame kan bɛhyerɛn mu.

Verse 4
Nyame ahom, gu mo do;
Nna munnkowu ara da, Na mbom menye Wo bɛtsena ase Mber a onnyi ewiei mu. Amen.

title: Okorsa Nyame, Yesor Wo
raw_title: CAN87 Okorsa Nyame, Yesor Wo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔkorsa Nyame, yɛsor Wo,
Ndzɛmba nyinara do Tumfo; Enyiasombea, nyansabuakwa, W' akwan nyinara yɛ nwanwa.

Verse 2
Yɛnam nokwar gyedzi do pen
Ɔkorsa Krɔnkrɔn n' dɛ Hen; Yɛkotow sɔr Wo Nyame-su Wɔ W' ahendzi ahoɔdzen n' mu.

Verse 3
Egya no hyɛ Ɔba N' No mu
Regye hɛn nkwa ma yeedzi mu; Sunsum no dze Ɔba N' N' adom Tsew hɛn ho ma Nyame No som.

Verse 4
Krɔnkrɔn, krɔnkrɔn, krɔnkrɔn, mprɛnsa,
Wo ho adwen tra hɛn nyansaa;
Ndzebɔnyɛfo twa hwe W' enyim
Yɛserɛ fakyɛ, adom, konyim. Amen.

title: Mboborhu Egya, W' asem Mu
raw_title: CAN88 Mboborhu Egya, W' asem Mu
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mbɔbɔrhu Egya, W' asɛm mu Enyimnyam ahyɛ ma! Abɔdzin nyinaa nka Wo dzin W' adom nsɛmpa yi ntsi.

Verse 2
Ha na akɔhweaban nyina
Nya ahonya mbordo; Ahonya a bi nnyi wi ase, Otsim hɔ afebɔɔ.

Verse 3
Ha na nyimdzee nduadzewa fifir
Ma hɔn a kɔm dze hɔn;
Edziban pa a wiadze nnyi bi, Rotweɔn nyia no kɔn dɔ.

Verse 4
Ha na hɛn Pomfo N' ndze dɛɛdɛw
Ka asomdwee kasa; Na nkwa na dɛw a onyi ewiei Wɔ Ne nsɛm nyinaa mu.

Verse 5
Kyerɛkyerɛfo pa, adom Wura,
Bɛn Wo ba daa nyinaa; Kyerɛ m' ma mondɔ W' asɛmpa,
Na munhu m'Agyenkwa. Amen.

title: Sunsum Kronkron, Bra Hen Komam
raw_title: CAN89 Sunsum Kronkron, Bra Hen Komam
lyrics:
Verse 1
Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn, bra hɛn 'komam',
Ma yɛntse Wo tum no,
Wo na tsetse wɔdze W' hyɛɛ nkɔm, Na kan na dɔ fir Wo.

Verse 2
Bra, na Ɔwo na nkɔnhyɛfo n'
Dze W' kyerɛwee, dze Wo kae;
Bue nokwar no, Ɔwo nye saafee n', Tsew nwoma krɔnkrɔn n' ano.

Verse 3
Sor Ebubur, trɛ W' atsabanm'
Wɔ hɛn isum no do,
Butuw hɛn kra no sum no do, Na ma hɔ ɔnyɛ kann.

Verse 4
Sɛ 'hyerɛn hɛn mu a, yɛnam Nyame
Nankasa do bohu N', Na yɛnye Wo mba nyina esusu Onyame dɔ no bun. Amen.

title: Ewuradze, W' asem Tsim
raw_title: CAN90 Ewuradze, W' asem Tsim
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ewuradze, W' asɛm tsim,
'No na yɛhwɛ nantsew, Nyia ɔgye no nokwar Nya kan nye enyigye.

Verse 2
Atamfo ba hɛn do a,
W' asɛm yi hyɛ hɛn dzen, Awerɛkyekyer nsɛmpa, N-kwagye amandzɛɛ.

Verse 3
Ɔbra n' ehum tu hɛn,
Na sum gye hɛn do a,
Ne kan hyerɛn ma hɛn, Na ɔkyerɛ hɛn kwan.

Verse 4
Woana botum akyerɛ
Ahotɔ nye dɛw a W' asɛmpa yi dze ma N-tsetsekwaa nyinaa?

Verse 5
Ehumbɔbɔr nsɛmpa,
Ɔboa atseasefo; N-kwasɛm, ɔkyekye Hɔn a wɔda wuso werɛ.

Verse 6
Ewuradze, ma yenhu
No mu adzesua krɔnkrɔn n',
Na yaadɔ, yeesuro Wo, Daa nyinaa yaabɛn Wo! Amen.

title: Kanea A Yedze Hwe Hen Kwan Mu
raw_title: CAN91 Kanea A Yedze Hwe Hen Kwan Mu
lyrics:
Verse 1
Kanea a yɛdze hwɛ hɛn kwan mu,
Mma yaammfom kwan yɛannyew;
Adom n-su a ofi sor tɔ
Ma akwantufo nom bi;

Verse 2
Edziban a ofi sor tɔ Ma yɛdze nyɛn hɛn kra:
Nwoma a yɛkenkan a yehu
Mbrɛ ɔsor man mu tse;

Verse 3
Ɔyɛ gyafadum anago,
Munumkum adzekyee;
Ɔbra po tu ne tsir gu do a, Hɛn sekyɛ nye tabon.

Verse 4
Onyame Twerammpon N' Asɛm,
N' enyimmyam Ba N' Ahyɛmu,
Yeennya wo a yenntum bra yi bɔ, Yenntum nnya Nyame man.

Verse 5
Ewuradze, dom hɛn ma yensua
W' Asɛm mu nyansa n' yie,
Na yɛmfa mbofra 'koma ngye Ne nkyerɛkyerɛ krɔnkrɔn no.

title: Ma Yentow Anwanwa Do Bi Ho Ndwom
raw_title: CAN92 Ma Yentow Anwanwa Do Bi Ho Ndwom
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ma yɛntow anwanwa dɔ bi ho ndwom,
Nokwar ɔdɔ a,
Ɔdɔ a ofi Sor Egya N' akomam' Rehyɛ adasamba ma:
Anwanwa dɔ
Ɔwɔ hɛn Ɔsor Egya N' akomam'.

Verse 2
Jesus, Agyenkwa n', dze dɛw sianee bae
Bɛkaa 'Sɛmpa n';
Ɔduaa N' amandzehu pii do hwehwɛɛ Hɔn a hɔn enyidar asa n'.
Hɔn a wɔayew n',
Otuaa kaw mbordo na ɔgyee hɔn nkwa.

Verse 3
Jesus da ho hwehwɛ hɔn a wɔayew n': Wokyin yɛ dɛn?
No dɔ pɛ dɛ ɔkata hɔn bɔn do:
Afonafo, hom mbra fie!
Anwanwa dɔ
Ɔwɔ hɛn Ɔsor Egya N' akomam'.

Verse 4
Anwanwa dɔ, bra mo so m'akomam', Bra bɛtsena hɔ:
Tsew me kra ho na oeefi dza ɔnntsenm'- Enyiber nye atorsɛm mu.
Ahobrɛadzem'
Na mepɛ dɛ mepɛ Wo suanyi bi.

title: Ana Ahaw Na Abere
raw_title: CAN93 Ana Ahaw Na Abere
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ana ahaw, na aberɛ, Na wo kɔn ebu?
Tsie! Obi dɛ, Bra, na m' bɛma w' Ahomgye.

Verse 2
Ana akam bi wɔ No a, Medze m' bohu No?
N' anan ho, Ne nsam', nye Ne mfem' Wɔ epiratua.

Verse 3
Ana kyɛw bi so N' a ɔma Ɔyɛ dɛ ɔhen?
Nyew, ahenkyɛw ara ampa; Na nsoɛ dze a.

Verse 4
Sɛ muhu N' n a meka No do a, Ebɛn na m' benya? Amandzehu, nye ɔfona, Nye nyinsuwa.

Verse 5
Sɛ menngyaa dɛ meka No do a, 'Bɛn na nkyii m' benya? Ɔfona, nye yaw, nye Jordan Botwa mu.

Verse 6
Ana mese N' dɛ ɔngye m' a, Ɔbɛse m', Oho?
Dabi; gyedɛ sor nye asaase Etwam' kɔ.

Verse 7
Muhu N', ka No do, meper a, Obehyira m' ampa? Ahotsewfo nye asɛnkafo Bua dɛ, Nyew!

title: Ewuradze Matse Nka De
raw_title: CAN94 Ewuradze Matse Nka De
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ewuradze, matse nka dɛ
'Rowora nhyira nsu pii,
Edze rofɔw daadze a oetwie, Ma bi nsosɔ mo so do,
'Mi dɛm yi.

Verse 2
Mma mmpa mo ho, dɔyɛfo Egya,
M' akomam' wɔ bɔn so ampa;
Ɔfata dɛ igya m' hɔ dze,
Na fa mbɔbɔr hu me so,

Verse 3
Mma mmpa mo ho, Agyenkwa brɛfo,
Ma mondɔ Wo na mentar Wo;
Mo kɔn adɔ W' enyimtsewee;
Ber a 'refrɛ yi frɛ me so,

Verse 4
Mma mmpa mo ho, Sunsum tumfo,
'Wo na ibue furafo enyi;
Jesus Ne yie ho Dasefo,
Ka tum kasa n' kyerɛ me so,

Verse 5
Nyame dɔ krɔnn a ɔnnsaker,
Jesus bɔgyaa a ɔsom bo,
Nyame adom a ɔmmbɔ adze n',
Dua mo so do yi kyerɛ,

title: Jesus Gye Ndzebonyefo
raw_title: CAN95 Jesus Gye Ndzebonyefo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jesus gye ndzebɔnyɛfo; Bɔ adomsɛm yim' kyerɛ Hɔn a wofi sor kwan mu, Wɔahwe ase, reyɛ ekyim.
Verse
Si do tow, si do tow bio;
Si do ara tow, Si do ara tow
Christ ɔgye ndzebɔnyɛfo
Christ ɔgye ndzebɔnyɛfo
Amandzɛɛ n' ma wɔntse ase;
Amandzɛɛ n', kyerɛ mu yie
Christ ɔgye ndzebɔnyɛfo

Verse 2
Bra, ɔbɛma W' ahomgye; Twer No: N' asɛm si no pi: Ɔgye abɔn mu abɔn; Christ ɔgye ndzebɔnyɛfo.

Verse 3
M' akoma mmubu me fɔ bio,
Mo ho san wɔ mbra n' enyim; Nyia ɔhoor mo ho fi no Apata mbra no koraa.

Verse 4
Christ ɔgye ndzebɔnyɛfo,
Emi mpo a mo bɔn dɔɔ so; Me nkekae nyinaa botu;
Ɔnye m' bɛhɛn sor man mu.

title: Abon, 'Kobesaefo, Hom Mbra
raw_title: CAN96 Abon, 'Kobesaefo, Hom Mbra
lyrics:
Verse 1
Abɔn, 'kɔbesaefo, hom mbra,
Bahatɔfo, epirafo,
Jesus rotweɔn agye hom nkwa;
Tsema na tum ahyɛ N' ma;
Ɔyɛ Tumfo
Ɔpɛ, mma hom nngye kyim bio.

Verse 2
Hom mbra, akɔhweaban, hom mbra;
Hom nhuhor Nyame ayamuyie,
Nokwar gyedzi, nnuho mapa,
Adom a ɔtwe hɛn bɛn N', Wɔmmfa sika,
Bra Jesus hɔ bɔtɔ bi.

Verse 3
Hom mbra, hom a hom kɔn ebu,
Hom a asehwe epira hom;
Sɛ hom rotweɔn ayɛ yie ana a,
Hom nnkɛba dabiarada; Nnyɛ atsenenee a, Abɔn na Jesus bɛfrɛe.

Verse 4
Mma tsibowaba nnyɛ w' mma nkyinkyin,
Mma emudzi nnyɛ w' adwendwen, Emudzi a ɔregye ara nye, Ibohu wo hia a ihia N': 'Yi ɔdze ma w';
Ɔyɛ Sunsum 'napawi.

Verse 5
Nhwɛ! Nyame-nyimpa N' afow sor,
Gyina No bɔgyaa do dzi ma W',
Fa woho ma N', fa ma N' koraa; Mma adwen fofor nntwa ntamu!
Jesus nkotoo na otum yɛ abɔn yie.

title: Bra Ma Hen Yegye Christ Dzi
raw_title: CAN97 Bra Ma Hen Yegye Christ Dzi
lyrics:
Verse 1
Bra ma hɛn a yɛgye Christ dzi
Ntonton hɛn Agyenkwa,
Yɛmfa enyigye ndze nkamfo N' adom enyimnyam no.

Verse 2
Ogyina bɔnyɛnyi biara
N' akoma ekyir robɔm';
Nyia ɔasɛɛ koraa nnyi dɛ ɔpam N' bio, Anaa ɔyɛ ma ɔkɔ.

Verse 3
Yɛnam adom do tsie Wo ndze,
Pen do dɛ yi hɛn bɔnm', Yesi pi dzi dɛw enyidarm', Dɛ Ɔwo 'bɛhɛn mu.

Verse 4
Bra mu ntsɛmara, sor Hɔho,
Na mma mmfi ha nnkɔ da Nye hɛn ndzidzi, ma edziban no Nyɛ ɔdomankoma dɔ. Amen.

title: Mma Mmpa Mo Ho, Agyenkwa Brefo
raw_title: CAN98 Mma Mmpa Mo Ho, Agyenkwa Brefo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mma mmpa mo ho, Agyenkwa brɛfo,
Tsie mo mbɔbɔr su; 'Reyaa W' ano kyerɛ binom, Mma mmpa mo nko ho.
Chorus
Agyenkwa, Agyenkwa, Tsie mo mbɔbɔr su!
Na 'refrɛfrɛ m' asɛfo yi,
Mma mmpa mo nko ho.

Verse 2
Mbɔbɔr ahengua enyim ha ma m' akomatɔm'; Mokosɔw ha awerɛhow mu Na pa m' ekyingye.
Chorus
Agyenkwa, Agyenkwa, Tsie mo mbɔbɔr su!
Na 'refrɛfrɛ m' asɛfo yi,
Mma mmpa mo nko ho.

Verse 3
Motwer Wo yie no nkotonoo,
Mohwehwɛ W' enyim; Yɛ mo sunsum pirafo edur, Nam W' adom do gye m'.
Chorus
Agyenkwa, Agyenkwa, Tsie mo mbɔbɔr su!
Na 'refrɛfrɛ m' asɛfo yi,
Mma mmpa mo nko ho.

Verse 4
M' aweɛkyekyer n- sunyiwa,
'Wo 'kyɛn me nkwa mpo; Mowɔ woana wɔ ase ha, Anaa sor dɛ 'Wo?
Chorus
Agyenkwa, Agyenkwa, Tsie mo mbɔbɔr su!
Na 'refrɛfrɛ m' asɛfo yi,
Mma mmpa mo nko ho.

title: Per Gye Hon A Woreyew
raw_title: CAN99 Per Gye Hon A Woreyew
lyrics:
Verse 1
Per gye hɔn a wɔreyew,
Tse ma hɔn a woruwu,
Hwim hɔn fi bɔn na adakamaa mu:
Su ma dza ɔafom kwan,
Ma asehwefo do,
Se hɔn dɛ Jesus tum dɛ ɔgye nkwa.
Chorus
Per gye hɔn a wɔreyew,
Tse ma hɔn a woruwu,
Jesus yɛ mbɔbɔrhu, ɔbɛgye nkwa.

Verse 2
Sɛ wɔmmfa N' nnyɛ hwee mpo a, Ɔda ho rotweɔn.
'Rotweɔn ɔba a oenu noho n' ɔagye n'.
Enye hɔn nka n' ka pa, Enye hɔn nka n' berɛww; Sɛ wɔgye dzi ara a ɔdze bɛkyɛ.
Chorus
Per gye hɔn a wɔreyew,
Tse ma hɔn a woruwu,
Jesus yɛ mbɔbɔrhu, ɔbɛgye nkwa.

Verse 3
Sɛ abɔnsam daadaa
'Nyimpa n' akoma a,
Nyame N' adom twe n' ekyir a ɔyɛ:
Eyɛ no ayamuyie,
Ekyerɛ no Wo dɔ a,
Dza nkyɛ ɔnntse no afei ɔbɛtse.
Chorus
Per gye hɔn a wɔreyew,
Tse ma hɔn a woruwu,
Jesus yɛ mbɔbɔrhu, ɔbɛgye nkwa.

Verse 4
Per gye hɔn a wɔreyew:
Dwuma 'i da wo do;
Ewuradze bɛma w' ho ahoɔdzen.
Frɛ hɔn ma wɔnsan mbra,
Fa abotar twe hɔn;
Se kobɔfo n' dɛ Gyefo n' wui maa no.
Chorus
Per gye hɔn a wɔreyew,
Tse ma hɔn a woruwu,
Jesus yɛ mbɔbɔrhu, ɔbɛgye nkwa.

title: Abow Bi Woaka Awaw Ho
raw_title: CAN100 Abow Bi Woaka Awaw Ho
lyrics:
Verse 1
Abow bi wɔaka awaw hɔ,
Na kan fi mbeamudua ho
Gyigye no mu hyɛnhyɛnn Yi Gyigye no kwan no mu hyenhyen Yi Gyefo No dɔ n'edzi.
Chorus
Ao, ehumbɔbɔr no bun ny' 'i:
Abow n' wɔkae waaw hɔ maa me!
Maa me! Maa me!
Wɔkae waaw hɔ maa me!

Verse 2
Abow n' waw hɔ ma nyimpa nyina a
Wodua mu hwehwɛ nkwagye; Ebirɛmpɔn nye akɔhweaban, Akɛse nye nkakraba.
Chorus
Ao, ehumbɔbɔr no bun ny' 'i:
Abow n' wɔkae waaw hɔ maa me!
Maa me! Maa me!
Wɔkae waaw hɔ maa me!

Verse 3
Ber a adom abow n' da hɔ yi
Sɛ dɔm rusuar mpo a, hom do Soa mbeamudua n', kɛfa nkwa kyɛw n'a Ɔyɛ dɔ n'a sɛnkyerɛdze n'.
Chorus
Ao, ehumbɔbɔr no bun ny' 'i:
Abow n' wɔkae waaw hɔ maa me!
Maa me! Maa me!
Wɔkae waaw hɔ maa me!

Verse 4
Yedu esuegya noho a,
Yɛbɔto mbeamudua n' adze,
Na yɛakɔ yɛakɛfa ahenkyɛw n' Na yɛadɔ n' mbordo sor hɔ.
Chorus
Ao, ehumbɔbɔr no bun ny' 'i:
Abow n' wɔkae waaw hɔ maa me!
Maa me! Maa me!
Wɔkae waaw hɔ maa me!

title: Bra Fie, Bra Fie
raw_title: CAN101 Bra Fie, Bra Fie
lyrics:
Verse 1
Bra fie, bra fie!
Na w'akoma apa;
Ɔkwan mu ayɛ sum, Ayɛ kɔnn, ayɛ hu; Ɔba dzesɛɛfo!
Bra fie, ao, bra fie!
Chorus
Bra...fie....
Bra; ao, bra fie!

Verse 2
Bra fie, bra fie!
Yɛrohwɛ, yɛrotweɔn;
Yegyina abowano
Nwim ano tɔ-ber yi Bra fie, ao, bra fie!
Chorus
Bra...fie....
Bra; ao, bra fie!

Verse 3
Bra fie, bra fie!
Fi awrɛhow n'mu bra,
Fi bɔn nye fɛr no mu, Fi gyigyefo no nsa, Ɔba dzesɛɛfo!
Bra fie, ao, bra fie!
Chorus
Bra...fie....
Bra; ao, bra fie!

title: Bra Agyenkwa Ho, Mma Nnye Ekyim
raw_title: CAN102 Bra Agyenkwa Ho, Mma Nnye Ekyim
lyrics:
Verse 1
Bra Agyenkwa hɔ, mma nnyɛ ekyim: Ɔakyerɛ hɛn finimfin ha n-dɛ, Reka No mberɛwm'dɛ, Bra.
Chorus
N-hyiamu no bɛyɛ enigye
Ber-a hɛn akomam' astsew wɔ bɔn ho Na yɛnye Ɔwo Agyenkwa atsena Hɛn fi a onnyi ewiei n'mu.

Verse 2
Tsie, ɔse dɛ: Wɔmma mbofra kwan! Wɔmma akoma nyina ndzi ehurusi; Ma yɛmfa No nyɛ hɛn afamudze: Mma nnyɛ ekyim, na bra.
Chorus
N-hyiamu no bɛyɛ enigye
Ber-a hɛn akomam' astsew wɔ bɔn ho Na yɛnye Ɔwo Agyenkwa atsena Hɛn fi a onnyi ewiei n'mu.

Verse 3
Dwen prɛko bio dɛ ɔwɔ ha ndɛ;
Bu Ne siar frɛ no bi, na dzi do;
Tsie, N'awɔse ndze n'rowosow dɛ:
Ao, me mba, ao, hom mbra!
Chorus
N-hyiamu no bɛyɛ enigye
Ber-a hɛn akomam' astsew wɔ bɔn ho Na yɛnye Ɔwo Agyenkwa atsena Hɛn fi a onnyi ewiei n'mu.

title: Oduyefo Kese N'aben
raw_title: CAN103 Oduyefo Kese N'aben
lyrics:
Verse 1
Oduyɛfo kɛse n'abɛn
Ɔnye tsimbɔbɔr Jesus; Ɔkasa ma akoma tɔ yam'; Dɔfo, tsie Jesus Ne ndze!
Chorus
Ndwom bi a ɔyɛ dɛw wɔ sor, Dzin bi a ɔyɛ dɛw wɔ ase, Enigye ndwom a ɔwɔ beebi:
Jesus, siarfo Jesus!

Verse 2
Wɔdze wo bɔn nyina akyɛ w'
Dɔfo, tsie Jesus Ne ndzi; Fa asomdwee tu wo kwan kɔ sor Kɛnye Jesus nsoa ahenkyɛw.

Verse 3
Enyimynam nka Nyame Eguambaa!
Megye Jesus Ne dzin dzi;
Modɔ Gyefo siarfo Ne dzin, Modɔ me Jesus Ne dzin.

Verse 4
Ne dzin pa m'afɔdzi nyina, Dzin bi nnyi hɔ dɛ Jesus! Me kra dze enyigye dze tsie Jesus dzin a ɔsom bo n'.

Verse 5
Nuanom, hom ngya m'minyi N'ayɛw; Hom nyi Jesus dzin ayɛw!
Nkyerɛbaa hom so mma hom ndze do, Hom nhyira me Jesus Ne dzin.
Chorus
Ndwom bi a ɔyɛ dɛw wɔ sor, Dzin bi a ɔyɛ dɛw wɔ ase, Enigye ndwom a ɔwɔ beebi:
Jesus, siarfo Jesus!

title: Abofo Rikyin Hen Ho
raw_title: CAN104 Abofo Rikyin Hen Ho
lyrics:
Verse 1
Abɔfo rikyin hɛn ho.

Verse 2
Na wɔdze nsɛmpa akɔ fie.

Verse 3
Wɔ Salem fofor no mu. "

Verse 4
Dɛ bɔnyɛfo reba fie,

Verse 5
M-bofra so reba fie,

Verse 6
Na Jesus se dɛ wɔmbra,

title: Werehonyi, 'Wo Hen Ara A
raw_title: CAN105 Werehonyi, 'Wo Hen Ara A
lyrics:
Verse 1
Werɛhonyi, 'wɔ hen ara a, Mbeamudua n'ho wɔ kwan!
Ka dza ɔhow wo werɛ, Mbeamudua n'ho wɔ kwan!
Ka ma w'Agyenkwa no ntse,
Gyaa suro nyinaa mu ma ɔnkɔ, Kasa ara na ɔbɛtse;
Mbeamudua n'ho wɔ kwan!

Verse 2
Kobɔfo, ka w' ho, mma nnkyim; Mbeamudua n' ho wɔ kwan!
Hwehwɛ bea a woehyira do n': Mbeamudua n' ho wɔ kwan!
'Wo a wo kɔn ebu, aberɛ,
Jesus tum deda adwen;
Jesus tum deda adwen; Hom wɔ w'Agyenkwa no mu:
Mbeamudua n' ho wɔ nkwan!

Verse 3
Bɔnyɛnyi a enndwen, ndɛ bra, Mbeamudua n' ho wɔ kwan! Tsie! Sunsum n' nye Asɔrmba se, Mbeamudua n' ho wɔ kwan!
Hwɛ nkwa nsubura woebue n' hɔ,
Woebue ama me nye wo, Ebirɛmpɔn nye akɔhweaban Mbeamudua n' ho wɔ kwan!

Verse 4
Asɛmpa ny' 'i! Kwan wɔ hɔ Ma nyimpa nyina!
Dɔ ayɛ mpata-dwuma n', Mbeamudua n' ho wɔ kwan!
Adom esutsen repem,
Nyimpa nyinaa wɔ ho kwan; O nkyɛ adasa nyina eehu dɛ Mbeamudua n' ho wɔ kwan!

title: Obon, Ye Ntsem Hu Nyansa
raw_title: CAN106 Obon, Ye Ntsem Hu Nyansa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔbɔn, yɛ ntsɛm hu nyansa!
Mma nntweɔn da fofor bi ana; Sɛ eda ho pow nyansa a Ɔyɛ dzen ma w' dɛ ibenya.

Verse 2
Su frɛ ehumbɔbɔr ntsɛm!
Mna nntweɔn da fofor bi ana;
Ansaana ndɛ wi bɔtɔ,
Nna annyɛ a wo mber abɛsen.

Verse 3
Bɔnyɛnyi, san w'ekyir ntsɛm!
Mma nntweɔn da fofor bi ana; Bɛyɛ na wo kanea edum, Ma wo nkwahosan abɔ w'.

Verse 4
Bɔnyɛyi, yɛ ntsɛm gye siar!
Mma nntu nnhyɛ da bio ana; 'Bɛyɛ na mbusu ato w' Ansaana adze akye.

title: Jesus Christ Na oresen N'
raw_title: CAN107 Jesus Christ Na oresen N'
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jesus Christ na ɔresen n'
Bɔnyɛnyi, to w'enyi hwɛ N'; Ber a ɔho wɔ na resa, Kekam' dɛ, Hu me mbɔbɔr.

Verse 2
Jesus Christ na ɔresen n'! Aso ɔbɛbɛn wo dɛm daa?
Seiseiara nye ɔgye da, Hwehwɛ nkwa ber a ibenya.

Verse 3
Hwɛ, Ogyina hɔ refrɛ wo. Ɔse dɛ, 'Rohwɛ bɛn?
Soɛr, ka wo hia nyinaa kyerɛ m' Soɛr, ɔfrɛ wo ampaara.

Verse 4
Se N' dɛ, Mepɛ W'adom ahwɛ,
Mo Wura, yi Wo dɔ kyerɛ m' Ma onhwiram' nkitsa me kra, Ɔnhyɛ 'koma nye bra do.

title: Si Do, Si Do Tow Kyere M'bio
raw_title: CAN108 Si Do, Si Do Tow Kyere M'bio
lyrics:
Verse 1
Si do, si do tow kyerɛ m' bio, Nkwasɛm ɔyɛ nwanwa!
Ma munhu ne dɛw bi so, Nkwasɛm ɔyɛ nkwa, yɛ dɛw, Kyerɛ m' gyedzi nye edwuma!
Chorus
Nsɛm ɔyɛ dɛw! nsɛm nwanwa!
Nkwasɛm ɔyɛ nwanwa!

Verse 2
Christ, siarfo n' , dze ma hɔn nyina, Nkwasɛm ɔyɛ nwanwa! Bɔnyɛnyi tsie dɔ frɛ no,
Nkwasɛm ɔyɛ nwanwa! Ne nyina wɔdze ma kwa, Ɔrotwe hɛn akɔ heaven.
Chorus
Nsɛm ɔyɛ dɛw! nsɛm nwanwa!
Nkwasɛm ɔyɛ nwanwa!

Verse 3
Nsɛmpa frɛ n' gyigye dɛɛdɛw, Nkwasɛm ɔyɛ nwanwa! Ɔma fakyɛ nye asomdwee, Nkwasɛm ɔyɛ nwanwa!
Jesus, Gyefo kortoo, Tsew hɛn ho daa nyinaa.
Chorus
Nsɛm ɔyɛ dɛw! nsɛm nwanwa!
Nkwasɛm ɔyɛ nwanwa!

title: Wombo Aben N' mu, WomboM'
raw_title: CAN109 Wombo Aben N' mu, WomboM'
lyrics:
Verse 1
Wɔmbɔ abɛn n' mu, wɔmbam',
Ahomka awɔse abɛn n';
Wɔmma amanaman ntse, Nkɛpem wiadze ntuadze; Afahodzi afe n' aba!
Hom a wɔapon hom, hom nsan mbra.

Verse 2
Jesus, Sɔfopanyin,
Ɔaba werdam prɛko;
Sunsum a wɔahaw, wɔnhom;
Awerɛfo ndzi dɛw,
Afahodzi afe n' aba!
Hom a wɔapon hom, hom nsan mbra.

Verse 3
Wonyi Eguambaa n'ayɛw, Mbusupadze Eguambaa n' ; Werdam wɔ No bɔgyaam'- Wɔnka wɔ aman nyina do.
Afahodzi afe n' aba!
Hom a wɔapon hom, hom nsan mbra.

Verse 4
Hom, bɔn nye hɛll n-kowaa,
Hom mfa homho hom ndzi,
Hom nnya nkwa ntsena Christ mu, Hom nyi Jesus ayɛw; Afahodzi afe n' aba!
Hom a wɔapon hom, hom nsan mbra.

Verse 5
Hom a wɔatɔn hom sor Egyapadze koraa,
Christ dɔ ho akyɛdze ny' yi, Hom ngye hom adze kwa bio:
Afahodzi afe n' aba!
Hom a wɔapon hom, hom nsan mbra,

Verse 6
Hom ntsie nsɛmpa n' abɛn n'
Ɔsor adom nsɛmpa n' Na hom nnya nkwa mfir ha Nkefir hom Agyenkwa enyim.
Afahodze afe n' aba!
Hom a wɔapon hom, hom nsan mbra.

title: Bra Jesus Ho Sesei
raw_title: CAN110 Bra Jesus Ho Sesei
lyrics:
Verse 1
Bra Jesus hɔ sesei.

Verse 2
Ɔbɛgye w' nkwa sesei.

Verse 3
Woana gye dzi sesei?

Verse 4
'Mi megye dzi sesei. "

Verse 5
Abɔdzin nka Nyame.

title: Rotweon Aye Den, Mo Dofo
raw_title: CAN111 Rotweon Aye Den, Mo Dofo
lyrics:
Verse 1
'Rotweɔn ayɛ dɛn, mo dɔfo?
Tsie w' Agyenkwa bɔn Adamfo Rowasa bɔkɔɔ tu Wo fo
Dɛ, 'Mo nua, rotweɔn ayɛ dɛn?

Verse 2
Aso nkobu ne pɛ no hwee Nyia No bɔgyaa kyii maa wo yi? Ekyim dzi mbusu, soɛr si n' pi Ao, mo nua, rotweɔn ayɛ dɛn?

Verse 3
Soɛr, bɛkamfo Ne dzin nwanwa n'
Jesus Ɔdomankoma Ba n' Ka No do daa, onnkowie gyan; Bra, mo nua, rotweɔn ayɛ dɛn?

Verse 4
Wo dwuma dzi ma w' Agyenkwa
Na wo nkorafo adasa; Yɛ ntsɛm, buber n' abɛn ampa; Fonafo, rotweɔn ayɛ dɛn?

Verse 5
Jesus Gyefo bɔ wo awoo!
Dɛ No dɔ no mma nnyi n' emuo; Nkwa Wura na ɔresen n' o, Mo dɔfo, rotweɔn ayɛ dɛn?

title: Medze 'Koma A Yaw Ahye N' ma
raw_title: CAN112 Medze 'Koma A Yaw Ahye N' ma
lyrics:
Verse 1
Medze 'koma a yaw ahyɛ n' ma,
Ewuradze na merefrɛ Wo; W'adom ehumbɔbɔr ka pii; Me Nyankopɔn, hu me mbɔbɔr.

Verse 2
Motwe me nsa hwe mo bo do,
Afɔdzi ɔyɛ dur ahyɛ m' do; Christ na Ne mbeamudua nye mo su; Me Nyankopɔn, hu me mbɔbɔr.

Verse 3
Migyina ekyir nyinsu egur m'
Munntum mma m'enyi do wɔ sor; Wo na ihu me yaw nyina; Me Nyankopɔn, hu me mbɔbɔr.

Verse 4
Nyɛ ayamuyie na ndzepa a mayɛ
Na obotum etua bɔn kor kaw;
Calvary nkotoo na muguan kɔ Me Nyankopɔn, hu me mbɔbɔr.

Verse 5
Wonya pon me bɔn nye hɛllm' a,
Ma menya adehye dɔm n' kɛtsena a,
M'abɔdo ndwom daa bɛyɛ dɛ,
Nyankopɔn na oehu m' mbɔbɔr.

title: Metse Wo Ndze Deedew N'
raw_title: CAN113 Metse Wo Ndze Deedew N'
lyrics:
Verse 1
Metse Wo ndze dɛɛdɛw n'
Ewuradze, dɛ erefrɛ m'
Ma maatsew moho, wɔ bɔgyaa a Ɔpem Calvary do n' mu.
Chorus
Ewuradze, maba!
Maba Wo hɔ ndɛ!
Guar m', tsew mo ho, wɔ bɔgyaa a Ɔpem Calvary do n' mu.

Verse 2
Kaansa meba mberɛwm' a, Woara bɛhyɛ me dzen:
Ebɔhor mo ho bɔn nyina Ma mo ho aatsew koraa.

Verse 3
Jesus, 'Wo na efrɛ m'
Kɔ gyedzi na dɔ mu;
Ema m'enyidado asomdwee Wɔ ha a wɔdze kɔ sor.

Verse 4
M'akomam' siar dwuma n'
'Wo na ehyɛ no ma;
Edze adom gu adom do Ma ɔhyɛ bɔn tum do.

Verse 5
Wonhua Jesus bɔgyaa! Wonhua Jesus N'adom! Wonhua Jesus, hɛn Ahoɔdzen Nye Ndzeyɛtsenee!
Chorus
Ewuradze, maba!
Maba Wo hɔ ndɛ!
Guar m', tsew mo ho, wɔ bɔgyaa a Ɔpem Calvary do n' mu.

title: Mbre Metse Yi Ara, Minnyi Hwee Ka
raw_title: CAN114 Mbre Metse Yi Ara, Minnyi Hwee Ka
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mbrɛ metse yi ara, minyi hwee ka
Dɛ wɔkaa Wo bɔgyaa gui maa m', Na efrɛ m' dɛ membra Wo nkyɛn, Nyame Eguamba, maba!

Verse 2
Mbrɛ metse yi ara, monnkɔtweɔn dɛ
Mara meper tu me kra ho fi, 'Wo na Wo bɔgyaa tum tu fi, Nyame Eguambaa, maba!

Verse 3
Mbrɛ metse yi ara, kansa aperper
Ɔnye ekyingye piinara Ko nye suro amen me mpo a Nyame Eguambaa, maba!

Verse 4
Mbrɛ metse yi ara, hianyi, furafo;
Enyiwa ɔnye ahonya, Dza mihia nyina wɔ Wo mu, Nyame Eguambaa, maba!

Verse 5
Mbrɛ metse yi ara, ebɛgye m', 'beyi m',
Edze bɛkyɛ m', na atsew mo ho Megye W'anasɛm dzi n-tsi
Nyame Eguambaa, maba!

Verse 6
Mbrɛ metse yi ara, Wo dɔ kɛse n'
Ebubu mpampi nyina mu,
N-kyii m'bɛyɛ Wo nko Wodze, Nyame Eguambaa, maba!

Verse 7
Mbrɛ metse yi ara, adehye dɔ n'
Ne trɛ, no war, no bun, no krɔn, M'bɔsɔ wɔ ha na sor mahwɛ Nyame Eguambaa, maba!

title: Okra Bonyarfo Gyefo
raw_title: CAN115 Okra Bonyarfo Gyefo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔkra bɔnyarfo Gyefo, Ma m' gyedzi ma ɔmbɔ m'esu! Wie W'adom edwuma kɛse n' Twa no tsia wɔ tseneem'.

Verse 2
Kasa bio dɛ, Wo ho mfiri!
Yi mo mu bɔn fi hɔ,
Yi fintsidua nyina fi hɔ Fa dɔ mu tutu no hɔ.

Verse 3
Monnkɔhewhwɛ adze a osuar,
Mommkɔhwehwɛ adze a ɔso, Kyɛn dɛ wodze Christ bɛma m' Christ n-ko, sor o, ase o.

Verse 4
Kɛtsenankyɛ maapem adze!
Nkyɛ mbrɛ metse nyina aayew! Ma menyew adze nyinaa,
Ma mo Wura nyɛ m'adze nyina.

title: Maba W'asendua N'ase
raw_title: CAN116 Maba W'asendua N'ase
lyrics:
Verse 1
Maba W'asɛndua n'ase,
Meyɛ furafo mbɔbɔrnyi,
Mebu ne nyina ntwaree, Morohwehwɛ nkwahosan.
Chorus
Ewuradze morotwer Wo,
Calvary Eguambaa siarfo; Misi W'asɛndua n 'ase:
Gye me, Jesus, gye m' sesei.

Verse 2
M'akoma afe W' akyɛr,
Bɔn edzi mu hen akyɛr Jesus ka nsɛm pa kyerɛ m' dɛ- M'bɔhor wo ho bɔn nyina.

Verse 3
Medze m'adze nyina ma Wo,
M'dze a ɔwɔ wiadze nyinaa,
Mo sunsum nye mo honam, Nyɛ Wodze koraa da nyina.

Verse 4
Mo werɛ twer W'anohoba n',
Minyim dɛ bɔgya n' ruguar m'; Medze moho ato daadze, Menye Christ ewu dua n'do.

Verse 5
Jesus aba abɛhyɛ m' ma!
Medzi mu wɔ No mu;
Mo ho nyinaa asan koraa, Enyimnyam nka Eguambaa.
Chorus
Ewuradze morotwer Wo,
Calvary Eguambaa siarfo; Misi W'asɛndua n 'ase:
Gye me, Jesus, gye m' sesei.

title: Migyinaa Abow N' ekyir
raw_title: CAN117 Migyinaa Abow N' ekyir
lyrics:
Verse 1
Migyinaa abow n' ekyir,
Kwantunyi bɔbɔfo;
Ebum a ɔyɛ dzen,
Otuu m'akoma mu; Suro hyɛɛ me kra do, Dɛ ber yi mber apa ho! Mo ho popoo dodow, Na mosɔɔr abow n' ekyir.

Verse 2
Mekaam' dɛ, Ao, adom, Soa mo bɔn yi ma me!
Na ndze bi buaa dɛ, Nyoo, Na adom dze me kɔr danm'.
Ɔkyekyeer m'epirakur,
Na ɔkaa m'akoma toom'; Ɔhoor m'afɔdzi nyinaa, Na ɔmaa m' ahomgye.

Verse 3
Gyefo n' a memmbu N' bi n',
Ɔno ohun m' mbɔbɔr,
Nyia ɔregye m' akoma
Na mammfa amma N' a, osui n'.
Aso mo bɔn pii yi,
No ho akatua ny' 'i!- Migyinaa abow n'ekyir,
Na Jesus dze m' kɔr danm'.

title: Tsie Mo Sufre, O Hu Me Mbobor Sesei
raw_title: CAN118 Tsie Mo Sufre, O Hu Me Mbobor Sesei
lyrics:
Verse 1
Tsie me sufrɛ, O hu me mbɔbɔr sesei! Bra, Gyefo kɛse, bra!
