Me kra a ɔabɔm no kɔn adɔ W' dodow, Bra, Gyefo kɛse, bra!
Chorus
Mabɔ ko nam awɔwim' wɔ akokwaa do,
Mefi fie abɔ ko akɔ ekyirekyir;
O, nkyɛ gye m' na fa m' kɔ Wo nguambuw mu, Bra, Gyefo kɛse, bra.

Verse 2
Minnyi beebi a odu adzesea a m'bɛda Bra, Gyefo kɛse, bra!
Ehwɛ m'prɛko ara a, m'benya kan na nkwa, Bra, Gyefo kɛse, bra!
Chorus
Mabɔ ko nam awɔwim' wɔ akokwaa do,
Mefi fie abɔ ko akɔ ekyirekyir;
O, nkyɛ gye m' na fa m' kɔ Wo nguambuw mu, Bra, Gyefo kɛse, bra.

Verse 3
Mo kwanm' yɛ kɔnn, m'anan so ebubu, Bra, Gyefo kɛse, bra!
M'enyi tua sor rohwehwɛ W'enyimtsew, Bra, Gyefo kɛse, bra!
Chorus
Mabɔ ko nam awɔwim' wɔ akokwaa do,
Mefi fie abɔ ko akɔ ekyirekyir;
O, nkyɛ gye m' na fa m' kɔ Wo nguambuw mu, Bra, Gyefo kɛse, bra.

Verse 4
Akoma a ɔabɔm dze, innkeyi n' edzi, Bra, Gyefo kɛse, bra!
Hu me mbɔbɔr na tsie mo mbɔbɔr su, Bra, Gyefo kɛse, bra!
Chorus
Mabɔ ko nam awɔwim' wɔ akokwaa do,
Mefi fie abɔ ko akɔ ekyirekyir;
O, nkyɛ gye m' na fa m' kɔ Wo nguambuw mu, Bra, Gyefo kɛse, bra.

title: Duyefo Nwanwanyi, M'adom
raw_title: CAN119 Duyefo Nwanwanyi, M'adom
lyrics:
Verse 1
Duyɛfo Nwanwanyi, m'adom!
'Wo etsie W'akowaa mo sufrɛ;
Hyɛ m' dzen ma daa menka n' mo somm' Dɛ, ampa, ɔnnso Nyame yɛ.

Verse 2
Mudur owu n'abowano,
Mesaree na meyɛɛ fonafona
Na 'gyeem'; ntsi ma ɔnyɛ mo ndwom so Dɛ, ampa, ɔnnso Nyame yɛ.

Verse 3
Agye mo nkwa efi tamfo nsam'
Na 'so ayɛ m' dehyedehye;
Asɔr Wura, ma menka n' mpaabɔm' Dɛ, ampa, ɔnnso Nyame yɛ.

Verse 4
'Dze m' esi koko a ɔkrɔn do,
N-dzepa nna ama mahyehyɛ,
Si me gyedzi pi wɔ 'yi mu, Dɛ, ampa, ɔnnso Nyame yɛ.

Verse 5
Sunsum mu esubɔ so mihia,
Ewuradze, mihia n' n-dɛ; Ma m'enyidar nyɛ aber nyina Dɛ, ampa, ɔnnso Nyame yɛ.

title: Megya Dofo, Hyira M' Sesei
raw_title: CAN120 Megya Dofo, Hyira M' Sesei
lyrics:
Verse 1
M' egya dɔfo, hyira m' seesei,
Wɔ mbeamudua n' ase ha;
Fa mo mfom na me yaw kɔ, Tsie na yɛ m' edur sesei.
Chorus
Hyira m' sesei, hyira m' sesei, M'Egya dɔfo, hyira m' sesei.

Verse 2
Mo Wura dɔnhwer yim' sesei,
Kyerɛ W'adom ɔnye Wo tum; Ber a motwer W'anosɛm yi, Mo Wura, bra behyira m'sesei.
Chorus
Hyira m' sesei, hyira m' sesei, M'Egya dɔfo, hyira m' sesei.

Verse 3
Sesei onsian Christ n-tsi,
Bɛpa m' sum, botu m' apo; Ber a morohwɛ W' musu yi, Fa Wo nsa ka m' san mo ho.
Chorus
Hyira m' sesei, hyira m' sesei, M'Egya dɔfo, hyira m' sesei.

Verse 4
Wo Babanyin Jesus Christ,
Menntetar N' dɛmara pɛn; Ber n' nye ndɛ, na bea n' nye ha, M'Egya dɔfo, kyerɛ W'adom.
Chorus
Hyira m' sesei, hyira m' sesei, M'Egya dɔfo, hyira m' sesei.

title: Hen Na Me Kra A Nwanwa Aka N'
raw_title: CAN121 Hen Na Me Kra A Nwanwa Aka N'
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hen na me kra a nwanwa aka n' Ɔnhyɛ ase nhwɛ sor adze nko?
Onya a mefi wu na bɔn nsa,
Gyantsia a woeyi m' daa daa gya mu, Minsi dɛn ntonton mbrɛ ɔsɛ, Minyi Gyefo kɛse n' ayɛw?

Verse 2
M'Egya, ao, minsi dɛn menka Yie a edze ayɛ me yi?
Dɛ hɛll na ebufuw nyimpa
Wɔafrɛ mo so Nyame ba bi;
M'bohu, m'bɛtse mo bɔnfakyɛ, Ha ara m'benya sor enyigye!

Verse 3
Aso m'bɔpow m'Egya no dɔ? Munnkobu N'akyɛdze no bi?
Aso m'beyi N'adom emuo?
Mbeamudua krɔnkrɔn n' no pow ntsi, Aso ne tseneneesɛm no M'bɛkam do wɔ m'akoma mu?

Verse 4
Wiadze ntɔmpam', awartofo, Epoobɔfo, nwifo,hom ntsie!
Ɔrotweɔn ayɛ hom etuu;
Abɔn na N'adom gye hɔn sie; Apaafo nnyi No ho hia;
Ɔbae bɛgyee dza 'ayew n' ara.

Verse 5
Hom mbra, mo nuan'm afɔdzefo a Bɔn adzesoa retseetsee hom! Kwan wɔ ne pirakur nom' ha, Jesus ne mfem' tokura nom' Ɔfrɛ hom ndɛ, afɔdzifo e!
Hom mbra, mo nuanom, hommbra fie!

title: Na Obeye De Mibenya
raw_title: CAN122 Na Obeye De Mibenya
lyrics:
Verse 1
Na ɔbɛyɛ dɛ mibenya
Mfaso wɔ Agyenkwa bɔgyaam'?
Owui maa 'mi a Ne yaw fir m' yi?
Maa 'mi a mitsiiw n' kɔr wu mu n'? Anwanwa dɔ, ɔyɛ dɛn yɛ Dɛ Ɔwo me Nyame wui maa m'!

Verse 2
Esumasɛm a! Nyame bowu; Woana tum hwehwɛ N'akwan mu? Kwa na seraph a odzi kan n' Ɔper hwehwɛ N'akwan mu?
Mbɔbɔrhu a! asaase nhua,
Mma abɔfo nnhwefo nnhwehwɛ mu bio.

Verse 3
Ogyaa N'Egya 'hengua wɔ sor- N'adom mbordo ɔdze ma kwa- Ɔpoow ne nyina gyedɛ ɔdɔ, Wui maa Adam afɔdzifo.
Mbɔbɔrhu a, ɔso, wɔnntɔ; Ao me Nyame, ɔtwee me puei!

Verse 4
Mber pii mo sunsum daduanyi
Daa bɔn mpokyerɛ na anago summ';
W'enyiwa toow kan nserɛmɛn
Gyegyee fiadze hɔ, minyanee; Mo mpokyerɛ gui, minyaa ahotɔ, Mifiir edzi, midzii W'ekyir.

Verse 5
Afei munnsuro afɔbu bi;
Jesus, No mu dze nyina medze a;
Metse No mu, me Tseasefo a
Ɔdze sor tsenenee efura m' Medze 'kokodur bɛn 'hengua n' Nam Christ do gye ahenkyew no.

title: Odo Nyame Baa Wiadze Ha
raw_title: CAN123 Odo Nyame Baa Wiadze Ha
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔdɔ Nyame baa wiadze ha,
Ma 'wo aakɔ sor manm'; Gye dzi, gye Jesus Ne dzin dzi, Na 'benya bɔnfakyɛ.

Verse 2
Gye Nyia owui maa wo n' dzi,
Ampaara, oewu yi
Wo kaw n' woetua, woebu wo bem; Afei wo kra ho asan.

title: Afei Menya Asaase Pa A
raw_title: CAN124 Afei Menya Asaase Pa A
lyrics:
Verse 1
Afei menya asaase pa a
Medze me kra sekyɛ bɔto;
Jesus Ne pira a mo bɔn ntsi
Wɔdze piraa N' wiadze ahyɛse n'; Sor na asaase twam' kɔ mpo a, N' ehumbɔbɔr betsim hɔ daa.

Verse 2
Egya, W'adom a onnyi eiwiei Ɔbor hɛn adwen do koraa;
W'abaatanyɛ mmbɔ adze da. Wo dɔ abaw no mu da hɔ.
Regye nnuhofo ma wɔaasɔ Mbɔbɔrhu ahwɛ enya nkwa.

Verse 3
Ɔdɔ, bun a onnyi ntuadze, Mo bɔn nyina ayew wo mu!
Ɔakata mo mumuyɛ do,
Afɔdzi biara nnyi mo do, Jesus bɔgyaa tseam' kodu wim', Mbɔbɔrhu, mbɔbɔrhu koraa!

Verse 4
Medze gyedzi dɔ bun yi mu,
M'ahomgye, dɛw na enyidar ny' 'i; Sɛ hɛll tsiw m' a muguan ba ha Moto m'enyi hwɛ m'Agyenkwa:
Ekyingye nye suro mfi hɔ:
Mbɔbɔrhu nko na ɔwɔ ha.

Verse 5
Ehum nye asorɛkye tu bɔ m', Ahoɔdzen ny e adɔfo pa m',
Me dɛw nsubura nyinaa sa, Awerɛkyekyer nyina kɔ mpo a. Iyi nko na me kra bɔtwer,- Egya, wo mbɔbɔrhu nnwu da.

Verse 6
Sɛ mo honam yi prɔw mpo a,
Mirimmfi gyinabew yi do; Sekyɛ yi nko bɛgye me kra, Ber a wiadze fapem etwam': Ber no m'bohu adom mbordo n', Ɔadɔ m' ɔdɔ a ɔmmbɔ adze da.

title: Mobotow Anwanwasem No
raw_title: CAN125 Mobotow Anwanwasem No
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mobɔtow anwanwasɛm no
Christ owui maa me N'asɛm n';
Mbrɛ ofir N' enyimnyam fie hɔ, Bae bowui wɔ Calvary,
Chorus
Nyew, m'bɔtow anwanwasɛm no
Christ owui maa me N'asɛm n';
Menye ahotsewfo bɔtow,
Menye ahotsewfo bɔtow, Wɔ ahwehwɛ po no ho.

Verse 2
Meyewee; na Jesus hwehwɛɛ me- 'Hun No guan a ɔtɔɔ gon n';
Ɔmaa mo do kaa me berɛww
Dze me baa nkwa kwan no mu,

Verse 3
M-posuow na asehwe pii: Maa motɔɔ akɔtɔmborɔnsa; M'enyi do siiw m', hu kitsaa me:
Jesus gye m' ne nyina mu,

Verse 4
Mbusu mber da ho ba mo do; Menantsew yaw kwan mu dze. Naaso Agyenkwa bɛn me daa Ogya me, obesi yie.

Verse 5
Ɔbɔweɔn me ara ekodu
Esutsen no nkɔnkɔnoa;
Na ɔama mo do etwa sɔnn Akɔ mbrɛ m'adɔfo wɔ.
Chorus
Nyew, m'bɔtow anwanwasɛm no
Christ owui maa me N'asɛm n';
Menye ahotsewfo bɔtow,
Menye ahotsewfo bɔtow, Wɔ ahwehwɛ po no ho.

title: O, Owo A Ifi Sor Bae
raw_title: CAN126 O, Owo A Ifi Sor Bae
lyrics:
Verse 1
O, Ɔwo a ifi sor bae
Edze gya krɔnkrɔn n' rebɛma, Sɔ dɔ a ho tsew ne gya no Wɔ m'akoma afɔrmbukyia do.

Verse 2
Ma ɔndzew hɔ mma W' enyimnyam
Dɛ ne framee no onndum da; Ɔmfa ahopopo nsan bio, Wɔ ayɛyi na mpaabɔ mu.

Verse 3
Jesus, hyɛ dza m'akoma pɛ ma
Ɔnyɛ edwuma, nkasa, ndwen mma Wo, Ma menda ho nweɔn gya krɔnkrɔn n', Nkenyan W'akyɛdze wɔ mo mu.

Verse 4
Mayɛ krado Wo pɛ nyinaa ho,
M'besi gyedzi na dɔ ndwuma do, Kodu dɛ W'dɔe bɛhyɛ ma
Wɔ wum' ma afɔrbɔ n' edzi mu.

title: M'Agyenkwah! M'beye Den Etua
raw_title: CAN127 M'Agyenkwah! M'beye Den Etua
lyrics:
Verse 1
M' Agyenkwa! m'bɛyɛ dɛn etua Me kaw kɛse a medze Wo yi?
Ma dza mowɔ na metse nyina, Nkyerɛ W'enyimnyam nyina daapem.

Verse 2
Munntum mma Wo kɛse biara;
Munntum nndzi dwuma kɛse mma W'; Kyerɛw nndzi dwuma kɛse mma W'; Gu m'akoma do afebɔɔ. Amen.

title: Edze Wo Nkwa Maa Me
raw_title: CAN128 Edze Wo Nkwa Maa Me
lyrics:
Verse 1
Edze Wo nkwa maa me;
Mo Wura, Wo bɔgyaa kyii
Ama aapon emi
Na meefi wum' masoɛr;
Edze Wo nkwa maa me:
'Midze, mama W' ebɛn?

Verse 2
Igyaa Wegya fie kan n',
W'ahengua abɔso n',
Baa asaase sum yi mu,
Bɔbɔɔ akwankwan 'werɛhowm': Nyew, wɔdze ne nyina gyaa m' Megyaa biribi ama Wo a?

Verse 3
Mo Wura, dzi asɔw me ntsi
Gyirama bi nnkotum ka;
Awerɛhow yerɛyerɛw
Ama eeyi m' efi hɛll; Esɔɔw m'amandzehu:
Masɔw 'bɛn mama Wo?

Verse 4
Ɔwo edze bɔnfakyɛ
Na dɔ fi sor aba;
N-kwagye a odzi mu pii,
Edze ne nyina ama me; Akyɛ me adze pii; Mo so makyɛ W' ebɛn?

Verse 5
Ao, ma memfa mo nkwa
Ne nyinara memma,
Mumbubu mo mpokyerɛ Memfa dɛw mfora yaw; Edze Woho maa me:
Mo so, medze moho ma W' Amen.

title: Mbre Metse Yi Ara, Menye Wodze
raw_title: CAN129 Mbre Metse Yi Ara, Menye Wodze
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mbrɛ metse yi ara, menyɛ Wodze,
Mbofra adamfo a edɔ m', Meretsew moho ama W', ntsi, O Jesus Christ, maba.

Verse 2
Adzekyee pa akye m' yi, medze
Mo nkwa ma, mufua me nsewdzim' Mennkam hwee do, merenyɛ ekyim, Medze m'akoma nyinaa aba.

Verse 3
Mebɛtsena Wo kan mu daa,
Mebɛyɛ dza ɔtsen dabaa; Medze m'ahom nyina bɔsom Wo, Ntsi na maba wo hɔ 'i.

Verse 4
Mbrɛ metse yi ara, ahom wɔm' yi,
Mepɛ maayɛ dansewa mapa Wɔ nokwar na tsenenee ho ntsi Mo nkwa Wura, maba.

title: Ber A M'akoma Ye Mberew Yi
raw_title: CAN130 Ber A M'akoma Ye Mberew Yi
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ber a m'akoma yɛ mberɛw yi,
M'Agyenkwa, migyaam' ma Wo; M'ahoɔdzen nyina wɔ Wo nsam', Ma ɔnyɛ Wo nko Wodze.

Verse 2
Mo Wura Jesus, gye m' seseiara,
Fa W'adom gya m'kwan nyinaram' Ma menyɛ akowaa pa mma Wo Na Nyame dɔ nhyɛ me ma.

Verse 3
Ewuradze, mbrɛ epɛ n' soma m',
Na mbom Woara kyerɛ me kwan; Fa W'adom gya m' kwan nyinaram' Na meetsie Wo enyigyem'.

Verse 4
Dza m'bɛyɛ, dza ɔbɛba mo do,
Ma omfir Wo nko Wo pɛm';
Iyi mo nkwa o, edze kyɛ m' o, Mo nkwa no Woara Wodze a.

Verse 5
Medze moho ma W' afebɔɔ,
Mowɔ hɔ ma Wo som nko; Mma mimmfi Wo nkyɛn ara da;
Ma Wo suban mbra mo do. Amen.

title: Gye Me Bra, Mo Wura, Na Ma
raw_title: CAN131 Gye Me Bra, Mo Wura, Na Ma
lyrics:
Verse 1
Gye me bra, mo Wura, na ma Muntu nhyɛ Wo nsa koraa.

Verse 2
Gye me mber na ma me ndafua; Memfa nyi W' ayɛw daa daa.

Verse 3
Gye me nsa na ma ɔnyɛ Dza Wo dɔ nko bɛkyerɛ.

Verse 4
Gye m'anan na ma no ho Ɔnyɛ har, fɛɛfɛw mma Wo.

Verse 5
Gye me ndze na ma daa daa Montow ndwom mma Woara.

Verse 6
Gye m'anofamfa na ma Ɔnhyɛ Wo nsɛmpa ara ma.

Verse 7
Gye mo dwɛɛtɛɛ na sika:
No mu wen mpo mennkɛfa.

Verse 8
Gye m 'adwen fa m'ahoɔdzen Yɛ dza Woara ehwɛ a ɔtsen.

Verse 9
Gye me pɛ, yɛ n' Wodze nwiom:
Ɔnnyɛ medze ara bio.

Verse 10
Gye m'akoma,-Wodze ampa:
Medze bɛyɛ W'ahengua.

Verse 11
1Gye mo dɔ, m'Ewuradze; Muhue gu W'ananadze.

Verse 12
1Gye m'adzeadze nyinara; M'bɛyɛ Wo nko Wodze daa.

title: Mo, Sunsum, Kra, Nye Honam
raw_title: CAN132 Mo, Sunsum, Kra, Nye Honam
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mo, sunsum, kra, nye honam,
Jesus, medze ma Wo, Afɔrbɔdze a no ho tsew krɔnn, Ɔnyɛ Wodze daa nyinaa.

Verse 2
M'adze nyinaa gu pata no do,
Morotweɔn ogya n' ma ɔaaba,
Morotweɔn, morotweɔn, morotweɔn, Morotweɔn ogya n' ma ɔaaba.

Verse 3
Jesus, Agyenkwa tumfo,
Motwer Wo dzin kɛse n';
M'enyiwa da Wo nkwangye n' kwan W'anohoba n' meregye.

Verse 4
Ao, ma ogya n' nsian sesei,
Ɔmbra mo sunsum do, Ɔmbra mbɛhyew m' afɔrbɔdze, Ɔmma mo ho ntsew krɔnn.

Verse 5
Jesus pa, meyɛ Wodze,
Eguar m' Wo bɔgyaa n' mu Fa Wo Sunsum bɛgyɛ me nsew, Ma menyɛ Nyame dze.

title: Jesus Siarfo! Jesus Siarfo
raw_title: CAN133 Jesus Siarfo! Jesus Siarfo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jesus siarfo! Jesus siarfo!
'Wo a edze Woho maa me ntsi,
Mma nngyaa m' mma minnkyin wɔ bɔn mu; Ma membra mbɔhom Wo mu.

Verse 2
Abɛrfo nyina enyidar
Bɛyɛ mo so m' enyidar;
Jesus siarfo! Jesus siarfo!
Ma membra mbɔhom Wo mu.

Verse 3
Twe m' ekyir fi bɔn nyina ho,
Gye m' mara mo suban nsam'; Jesus siarfo! Jesus siarfo!
Ma membra mbɔhom Wo mu.

Verse 4
Enyingye pa, ahotɔ krɔnn, Na Wo som dze bɛma me!
Jesus siarfo! Jesus siarfo!
Ma membra mbɔhom Wo mu.

title: Nyame Adofo, Hom Mbra
raw_title: CAN134 Nyame Adofo, Hom Mbra
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyame adɔfo, hom mbra
Mbɛda hom dɛw edzi;
Hom nsuo m' ma yɛntow ndwom dɛɛdɛw Ngu N'ahengua ho aprɔw.
Nyia onnyim hɛn Nyame n'
Ɔanntow bi a ɔnnyɛ hwee; Na Ɔsor Hen nkowaa dze otwar dɛ Wɔda hɔn dɛw edzi.

Verse 2
Nyame ɔsor Hen a
N'enyi bɔ wiadze aprɔw,
Ɔnantsew ehum do wɔ wim',
Na ɔtseam' ma po taa dzinn n'- Dɛm Nyame yi yɛ hɛndze Yɛ hɛn Egya dɔfo: Ɔbɛma sor etumfo no Abɔsoa hɛn akɔ.

Verse 3
Hɔ yebohu N'enyim,
Na yɛnnkɛyɛ bɔn da;
Hɔ yɛbɔnom daa enigye Wɔ adom esutsen mu: Nyew, ansaana yeetu
Yɛakɔ bɛkyebo mu n',
Dɛm eyiedzi ho adwendwen Ma hɛn dɛw ntaataado.

Verse 4
Adom-mba ehu dɛ
'Nyimnyam hyɛ ase wɔ ha
Sor eyiedzi fi gyedzi nye Enyidado mu ba:
Hom mma ogya n' nsian sesei,
Na yengyaa nyinsuwa kyi;
Yɛnam Immanuel asaasem' Rokɔ sor man pa n' mu.

title: Konyim Asor N' Ewuradze
raw_title: CAN135 Konyim Asor N' Ewuradze
lyrics:
Verse 1
Konyim Asɔr n 'Ewuradze,
Yɛdze dɛw yi Wo ayɛw;
Yɛwɔ ha yi
Yɛbɔtow ndwom
Dɛ enyimnyammufo no,
Verse
Yɛhyɛ ase ha ara
Ma akoma na n-dze do
Kekam' dzendzen Yi Nyame ayɛw
Wɔ hɛn n-kwahosan ntsi.

Verse 2
Yɛda fona fononoo mu yi
Na yɛnam ogya mu yi
Yehyira Wo dɔ a Onyim hɛn nda
Na daa ɔdze hɛn bɛn Wo.
Verse
Yɛbɔ hɛn nsam' dzi ehurusi
Wɔ W' enyimtsewee no mu;
Wo dɔ a ɔmaa
Yɛyɛɛ Wodze n'
Bɔkora hɛn wɔ Wo nkyɛn daa.

Verse 3
Ɔwo nye Wo nkorɔfo nam
Ngyigye n'esuyiriim';
Ebɛn hɛn yi
Yennkosuro
Amandzehu gyatanaa.
Verse
Wiadze nye bɔn nye abɔnsam
Wonnkotum esi hɛn mpa;
Yɛnam Wo do
Bɛtsew hɔn mu
Na yɛatow konyim ndwom no.

Verse 4
Hɛn gyedzi hu enyimnyam a
Edze bɔdom hɛn bio no;ɔ
Mbeamudua n' nnyɛ hwee
Akatua pa a
Edze esi hɛn enyim ntsi.
Verse
Sɛ ndaamba yɛbɛfata a
Yebohu Wo dɛ Stephen
Ohun Wo wɔ
Nyame nyimfa,
Dɛ eregye hɛn akɔ sor.

title: O Me Nyame, Se Me Kra Hwe
raw_title: CAN136 O Me Nyame, Se Me Kra Hwe
lyrics:
Verse 1
O me Nyame, sɛ me kra hwɛ
W'ehumbɔbɔr nyina a, Bobor nye dɔ nye ayɛyi Ɔhyɛ mo do koraa.

Verse 2
Eyiedzi pii a wɔnnkan na Wo dɔ dze nyɛɛn me kra. Ansaana m'abofra koma
Hun nyia 'yiedzi n' fir no.

Verse 3
Esian horow, fona na wu
Ɔpae guu foo maa me, Na dza ɔyɛ hu kyɛn yinom- Akɔndɔbɔn n'efir.

Verse 4
Akyɛdze mpempem, ɔsom bo
Gye me ndaase daa daa,
Na W'enyi sɔ 'koma a ɔdze Dɛw gye dɛm akyɛdze n'.

Verse 5
Mo nkwa ne mber nyinaa mu W'adɔe na m'bɛtaa do:
Na muwu so a, 'kyirkyir wiadzem' M'bɔtow W'ayɛyi bio.

Verse 6
Mebɛma ayɛyindwom do ama W'
Mbersantsen mfesantsen, Na onnyiewiei mpo yɛ tsia dɛ, Wɔdze yi W' ayɛw wie!

title: Siar Dasedzi- De Jesus Ye Medze
raw_title: CAN137 Siar Dasedzi- De Jesus Ye Medze
lyrics:
Verse 1
Siar dasedzi- dɛ Jesus yɛ medze!
Ao, Nyame enyimnyam nkahwɛ bɛn ny' i!
Nkwagye dzifo nye m', Nyame atɔdze; No Sunsum awo m', bɔgyaa n' ahor m'.
Chorus
M'asɛm na mo ndwom ara nye yi, Mekamfo m'Agyenkwa adzekyee nyina.

Verse 2
Ahobrɛasdze koraa, enyigye koraa,
Ahotsetɛ epue m'enyi do wora; Abɔfo fi sor sian ba bɔbɔ
Mbɔbɔrhu na dɔ ho amandzɛɛ.
Chorus
M'asɛm na mo ndwom ara nye yi, Mekamfo m'Agyenkwa adzekyee nyina.

Verse 3
Ahobrɛdze koraa, ne nyina adwe,
Menya Agyenkwam' ahomka nye siar; Moroweɔn, rotweɔn, m'enyi tua sor; N'ayamuyie amee m', mahera No dɔm'.
Chorus
M'asɛm na mo ndwom ara nye yi, Mekamfo m'Agyenkwa adzekyee nyina.

title: Ao, Bra Ma Yendzi Dew
raw_title: CAN138 Ao, Bra Ma Yendzi Dew
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ao, bra ma yendzi dɛw, Sɛ nkan n' meyɛ hianyi a, Afei menya Nyame ho dɔ, Ɔdɔ a ɔkyɛn sika.

Verse 2
Ao bra ma yendzi dɛw,
Sɛ nkan n' motɔɔ bahaw a, Afei menya Otumfo a N'abaw weɔn me dabaa.

Verse 3
Ao, bra ma yendzi dɛw, Sɛ nkan n' mobɔɔ eko a,
Nyame dze No dɔ atwe me Dɛ mensan m'Egya fie.

Verse 4
Ao, bra ma yendzi dɛw, N-kyɛ me kra reyew; M'Agyenkwa Jesus abɔtwe m' Wɔ bɔn na abɔnsam nsa.

Verse 5
Ao, bra ma yendzi dɛw,
Afei menya Nyɛnko a
No dɔ kyɛn onua mpo no dɔ, Ɔdɔ a onnyi ewiei a.

Verse 6
Ao, bra ma yendzi dɛw, Ao, 'wo a edɔ Jesus, Nyame N'abɔdze nyinara,
Wonsuo m' yenyi N' ayɛw.

title: Obra N' adandan Nyina Mu
raw_title: CAN139 Obra N' adandan Nyina Mu
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔbra n' adandan nyina mu,
Ahokyer nye ahotɔm',
M' akoma nye me gyirama
Beyi me Nyame ayɛw

Verse 2
M'botuw No nkwagye ho 'kodu
Dɛ ahokyerfo nyina
Bɔhwɛ m' enya awerɛkyekyer, Na hɔn yaw ahera.

Verse 3
O nye me nhuhor Ewuradze,
Ma yɛntonton Ne dzin,
Mefrɛɛ No m'ahokyer mu no, Ɔbae beyii m' fiir mu.

Verse 4
Nyame no dɔmtutuw twa hyia
Atseneneefo tsenabea;
Hɔn a wɔtwer No mboa nyina Ɔma hɔn No nkwagye.

Verse 5
O, bra bɔsɔ No dɔ no hwɛ,
Na woana bohu dɛ
Hɔn a wɔtwer No nokwar no, Hɔn na wɔyɛ esiarfo.

Verse 6
Ahotsewfo, hom nsuro No,
Na hom nnkosuro hwee bio; Hom nyɛ No som hom enyigye, No so bɔhwɛ hom hia.

title: M' beyi Mo Bofo Ayew Nkwaberm
raw_title: CAN140 M' beyi Mo Bofo Ayew Nkwaberm
lyrics:
Verse 1
M' beyi mo Bɔfo ayɛw nkwaberm' Na ber a me ndze bɛyew wum no, Medze tum kɛse bɛkamfo N':
M'ayɛyi nda nnkotwa mu da, Nkwa na adwen na ahom wɔ hɔ 'i, Anaa bɛkyebo wɔ do yi.

Verse 2
Siarfo nye nyia n'enyidar twer Israel Nyame! Ɔno yɛɛ wim' Asaase, Po, nye dza ɔwɔm' nyina:
No nokwar tsim hɔ pintsinn daa; Ɔgye afonafo, ɔhwɛ ehiafo, Na N'anohoba nnyɛ gyan da.

Verse 3
Ewuradze ma furafo hu adze; Osuo adwen a ɔatɔ bitsim'
Ɔma tsibowa a ɔnnda asomdwee;
Ɔboa hɔho wɔ fona mu, Kunafo nye egyanka so Na ɔdom daduanyi fahodzi.

Verse 4
Mibeyi No ayɛw nkwaberm'
Na ber a me ndze bɛyew wum' no, Medze tum kɛse bɛkamfo N':
M'ayɛyi nda nnkotwa mu da, Nkwa na adwen na ahom wɔ hɔ 'i, Anaa bɛkyebo wɔ do yi.

title: Me Kra, Tsie! Ewuradze A
raw_title: CAN141 Me Kra, Tsie! Ewuradze A
lyrics:
Verse 1
Me kra, tsie! Ewuradze a;
W'Agyenkwa na ɔrekasa n'; Tsie Ne ndze; ɔreka dɛ, Bɔnyɛnyi, ana 'dɔ M' a?

Verse 2
'Mi na megyee w' fii mpokyerɛm',
Meyɛɛ wo pira edur; Eyewee n', mohwehwɛɛ wo; Memaa wo sum daan ekan.

Verse 3
Na ɔbaatan n'abadaa Befi ne ba ho ara da? Nyew, ɔyɛ a no werɛ befir n'; Emidze, m'bɛkaa wo daa.

Verse 4
Emi Mo dɔ n' ɔnndan da,
Ɔkrɔn kyɛn ɔsor m-po,
No mu dɔ kyɛn po no bun, Ɔyɛ dzen, ɔkyɛn owu.

Verse 5
Adom wie n'edwuma yɛ a,
Ibohu M'enyimnyam ntsɛm; Enye M'bɛtsena M'ahenguam'; Bɔnyɛnyi, ana 'dɔ M' a?

Verse 6
M' Ewuradze, midzi yaw dɛ
Mo dɔ yɛ mberɛw, ɔyɛ nwin,
Naaso modɔ, W', mosɔr Wo;
O, ma mondɔ Wo mbordo. Amen.

title: Otra n-hum', Wo Do A Ho Wo Na N'a
raw_title: CAN142 Otra n-hum', Wo Do A Ho Wo Na N'a
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔtra n-hum', Wo dɔ a ho wɔ na n' a,
M'Agyenkwa Jesus; naaso me kra yi
Ɔpɛ dɛ ohu Wo dɔ no mbordo,
Ne trɛ, no war, no krɔn, no bun, na ne dzen A ɔyɛ nyinaa.

Verse 2
Ɔtra n-kaa, Wo dɔ a ho wɔ na n' a,
M'Agyenkwa Jesus; naaso m'ano yi
Pɛ dɛ dɔ a otum yi afɔdzi suro, Na ɔwo dɔ no, ɔka kyerɛ abɔn a Wɔbɛn, wɔtwem'.

Verse 3
Ɔtra ayɛyi, Wo dɔ a ho wɔ na n' a,
M' Agyenkwa Jesus; naaso m'akoma yi
Ɔwɔ dɛ ɔkamafo dɔ a ɔhye, yɛ nwanwa a Ɔdze mara mansotwenyi epin Nyankopɔn nkyɛn n'.

Verse 4
Jesus Agyenkwa, fa Wo dɔ n' hyɛ m' ma!
Gya m' ara, gya m' kɔ nkwa nsunyiwa n' ho;
Ma montɔ nkɔ noara ho wɔ gyedzim' Na mma da biara pɛn onnkwetsir Wo Mmfa beebi bio.

Verse 5
Na m'enyi nya bɔ m' Jesus enyim ma
Minya ahengua n' enyim kotow da bi a,
Ber n', No dɔ no mbrɛ otwa pa nyina, Ne trɛ, no war, no krɔn, no bun, na ne dzen Bɛyɛ mo ndwom.

title: Me Jesus, Modo W', Minyim De Medze
raw_title: CAN143 Me Jesus, Modo W', Minyim De Medze
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nye W'
Me Jesus, modɔ W', minyim dɛ medze nye nye W',
Wo ntsi migyaa bɔn ho enyigye nyinara;
Mo Pomfo domfo, m'Agyenkwa nye Woara, Me Jesus, sɛ madɔ w' da a, ɔno nye ndɛ.

Verse 2
Modɔ W', osiandɛ 'Wo edzi kan adɔ m'
Na epaa kyɛw maa m' wɔ Calvary dua no do; Modɔ Wo wɔ nsoɛ kyɛw a esoae no ntsi, Me Jesus, sɛ madɔ W' da a, ɔno nye ndɛ.

Verse 3
Mobɔdɔ W' wɔ nkwa mu, mobɔdɔ W' wɔ wum'
Na meyi W' ayɛw ber a edom me nkwa,
Na ber a owu-bɔw egu mo do n', m'bɛse dɛ, Me Jesus, sɛ madɔ W' da a, ɔno nye ndɛ.

Verse 4
Enyimnyam adampanm' na daa enyigyem', Mobɔtontom Wo na matsena W'enyim daa;
M'bɔsoa ahenkyɛw hyɛnhyɛnn no atow ndwom.
Me Jesus, sɛ madɔ W' da a, ɔno nye ndɛ.

title: Dofo, Hom Mma Yendo
raw_title: CAN144 Dofo, Hom Mma Yendo
lyrics:
Verse 1
'Dɔfo, hom mma yɛndɔ:
Dɔ fir Nyame;
Ɔdɔ Ne tsenabew pa Wɔ Nyame mu.

Verse 2
'Dɔfo, hom mma yɛndɔ:
Na hɔn a wɔdɔ n',
Hɔnara nko nye Ne mba a Hɔn awoo fir sor.

Verse 3
'Dɔfo, hon mma yɛndɔ:
Na dɔ yɛ ahomgye, Na obiara a onyi dɔ no', Ɔnnyɛ siarfo.

Verse 4
'Dɔfo, hom mma yɛndɔ;
Dɔm' na kan wɔ, Na nyia onnyi dɔ no, Ɔtse sum mu.

Verse 5
'Dɔfo, hom mma yɛndɔ:
Na dɛm nkotoo Na yebohu Nyame a Ɔdɔ hɛn no.

title: Mema M'akoma Do
raw_title: CAN145 Mema M'akoma Do
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mema m'akoma do
Ma W', me Gyefo;
'Wo nye m'adze nyina,
Na Wodze nye m'
Ana nkabɔm' dzendzen bi kyɛn iyi:
Dɛ mo Dɔfo dze nye m', na ɔyɛ medze.

Verse 2
'Kwan nyinam' Wodze nye m';
Na tsitsir dɛ,
Enam W'afɔrbɔ n' do Eyɛ medze.
Wo dɔ nkyehoma n' adwer m' dɛɛdɛw bi, Ɔdze me atakyer Wo ho dzendzen.

Verse 3
M'afɔrbɔ Eguambaa, Medan Wo nwionn;
Dza mowɔm', meyɛm', na
Minyim nyinam',
Dza mowɔ nyinara nnyɛ medze bio, Mennda hɔ nndze moho; meyɛ Wodze.

Verse 4
Mo Wura, meyɛ dɛn dze Biribi kam Wo?
Mber pa, anaa sika?
Anaa ahoɔdzen?
Medze dza ɔsom bo suma Wo dɛn, Ber a 'Wo a esom bo 'dze Woho ama m'?

Verse 5
Gyefo, meserɛ Wo dɛ Kora m' Wo dɔ mu,
Kɛpem dɛ owu nda
Beyi m' akɔ
Man pa nom' mbrɛ bɔn nye yaw bɔ adze a 'Wo na Wo nkorɔfo bɔm' kor afebɔɔ. Amen.

title: De Mbre Otwe Haahaw Nsunwim ho
raw_title: CAN146 De Mbre Otwe Haahaw Nsunwim ho
lyrics:
Verse 1
Dɛ mbrɛ ɔtwe haahaw nsunwin ho
Ber a oeguan afona n', Dɛm na, me Nyame, me kra so Haahaw hwehwɛ W'adom.

Verse 2
Wo ho nsukɔm ɔdze me kra,
O mo Nkwa Nyankopɔn,
Ao, dabɛn na m'bohu W'enyim Me Nyame Hen Krɔnkrɔn!

Verse 3
Na mindzi mbɔɔ nkodu dabɛn M'ahoɔdzen Nyankopɔn?
Mayɛ ankonam, makɛhyɛ
M'atwetwesifo nsa,

Verse 4
Me kra, bɛn yɛ wo ma abotow?
Hyɛ nsi, na ibeyi Ɔno a ɔyɛ wo Nyame ayɛw, Wo daa nkwa nsunyiwa.

title: Mobohom Ha Ara Afeboo
raw_title: CAN147 Mobohom Ha Ara Afeboo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mobɔhom ha ara afebɔɔ
Mbrɛ wo mfem' bɔgya n' wɔ; M'enyidar, m'asɛm nyina nye yi, Agyenkwa wui maa me.

Verse 2
M'Agyenkwa a 'ruwu, me Nyame,
Bura a ehor bɔn fi,
Fa Wo bɔgyaa n' petse mo do Ma mo ho ɔntsew krɔnn.

Verse 3
Guar me, na ma menyɛ Wodze,
Guar me, na yɛ medze Nnyɛ me nan nko, na me nsa ho, Me tsirm', na m'akomam'.

Verse 4
Fa Wo nkabɔmu bɔgyaa n' ka me,
Kodu dɛ m'bohu Wo,
Kodu dɛ m'enyidar bɛbam', Dɔ bɛhyɛ me kra ma.

title: Israel Guanhwefo, Na Medze
raw_title: CAN148 Israel Guanhwefo, Na Medze
lyrics:
Verse 1
Israel Guanhwɛfo, na medze Me kra ne dɛw, n'ahwehwɛdze,
Mo 'koma haahaw hwehwɛ Wo,
Mo Kɔn dɔ dɛ menye Wo tsena;
Meper mehu mfunoma pa no,k
Mbrɛ hɔn a wotsie Guanhwɛfo n' Wɔtwer Wo bom' na wodzidzi n', Na ewia ne hyew nn-ka hɔn.

Verse 2
Ao! kyerɛ me siar bea yi no do,
Mbrɛ Wo nkorɔfo nyina tse,
Mbrɛ ahotsewfo dze dɛw hwɛ
Nyame a wɔabɔ N' mbeamudua mu n';
Da Wo dɔ nwanwa no edzi,
W'ahoguan, Wo wu wɔ dua n' do;
Fa me kra kɔ Calvary do,
Menye W' nhu amandze, ndzi konyim.

Verse 3
Ha ara nko na m'enyi ber
Dɛ menye Wo nguankuw bɔhom,
Dɛ m'bɛda botan no ase,
Anaa m'bosuma Wo bo mu;
Hɔ nko ara na m'bɛtsena daa,
Mirimmfi hɔ mmfir dabida,
M'bosuma Wo mfe mu hɔ Komm, Mahyɛ W'akomam' afebɔɔ.

title: Ewuradze, Yi Woho Kyere Hen
raw_title: CAN149 Ewuradze, Yi Woho Kyere Hen
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ewuradze, yi Woho kyerɛ hɛn,
Ber a yekyin wiadze;
Kasa kyerɛ hɛn akoma, Ma Wo dɔ ndzɛw hɛn mu.

Verse 2
'Nye hɛn kasa a, hɛn werɛ fir Aber, ɔberɛ dadwen;
Dwuma yɛ ahomgye, yaw yɛ dɛw, Ber a, Nyame, ebɛn hɛn.

Verse 3
Bra me nkyɛn mbɔ, m'adom Nyame,
Ma m'akoma ndzi dɛw;
Makoma bɔbɔ no mu adze Ama W', oetsie Wo ndze.

Verse 4
Ese m' dɛ monhwehwɛ W'enyim;
Dza mohwehwɛ ara nye n';
Dɛ m'bohu W'enyimnyam no,
Matse Wo ndze mo mu.l

Verse 5
'Yi nyɛ mo dwuma nkodu dɛ
M'bohu W'enyimnyam no,
M'bɛhɛn mo Wura
Na menya heaven Wo mu. Amen.

title: Sankundwom: Marienlyst.
raw_title: CAN150 Sankundwom: Marienlyst.
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ao, nkyɛ maatakyer Nyame ho,
Meenya su a ɔdwe,
Kandzea ma ɔaakyerɛ kwan no a Ɔdze m' kɔ Eguambaa n' nkyɛn.

Verse 2
Nhyira a ber a muhun Ewuradze n' Minyae no wɔ henfa? Jesus ho yikyerɛ na N'asɛm A muhunii n' wɔ hen?

Verse 3
Asomdwee mber a mehu pɛn a! Mbrɛ ho nkaa dua yɛ dɛ a! Na ndɛ me kra atɔ pan a Wiadze nntum nnhyɛ no ma.

Verse 4
Ao, Ebubur Krɔnkrɔn, san bra,
Ahomgye ho Bɔfoe,
Mikyir bɔn a opiraa Wo n',
Na ɔpaam Wo m'akomam'.

Verse 5
Dza modɔ no mbordo biara,
Mbrɛ no su tse biara, Boa ma minyi n' W'ahengua ho, Na monsom Wo nkotoo.

Verse 6
Nna mebɛbɛn Nyankopɔn yie,
Nna menya su a ɔdwe, Nna kan mapa bɛkyerɛ kwan a
Ɔdze m' kɔ Eguambaa n' nkyɛn.

title: Okom Na Nsukom Dze M'
raw_title: CAN151 Okom Na Nsukom Dze M'
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔkɔm na nsukɔm dze m'; Jesus yɛ m'edziban:
Nkwa esutsen, pem fi
Ɔbotan no mu ma m'.

Verse 2
Ɔwo a eyɛ Paanoo,
Ma m' daadaa edziban; Dɛ mbrɛ enyɛn akra n', Nyɛn m', ɔno mubowu.

Verse 3
Nokwar Wenyinaba,
Ma monsɔ Wo dɛw nhwɛ; Woara ma m' nkwa fofor, Na fa dɔ nyɛn me kra.

Verse 4
Ber a m'akwantu hyɛɛ ase Mbɔntankyim' na mekyin: Sor Edziban, nyɛn me;
Nyimpa Ba, yɛ me boa.

title: Wo Nkyen Ara, Nyame
raw_title: CAN152 Wo Nkyen Ara, Nyame
lyrics:
Verse 1
Wo nkyɛn ara, Nyame, Wo nkyɛn ara!
Kaansa mbeamudua mpo
Na ɔma mo do a,
Mo ndwom dabaa nye dɛ Wo nkyɛn ara, Nyame, Wo nkyɛn ara.

Verse 2
Kaansa mirikyin mpo
Ma wi akɔtɔ,
Ma adze so asa me,
Ma mesum bo a,
M'adaaso mu m'bepin Wo nkyɛn ara, Nyame, Wo nkyɛn ara.

Verse 3
Ma kwan m-bɛda hɔ a
Wɔdze kɔ sor;
Dza edze ma m' nyina
Ehumbɔbɔr kwa;
Abɔfo refrɛfrɛ m'
Wo nkyɛn ara, Nyame, Wo nkyɛn ara.

Verse 4
Ber a m'enyi betsetsew n', M'beyi W' ayɛw;
M'bodua m'awerɛhow mu
M'esi Nyame fi;
Menam me yawm' m'bepin Wo nkyɛn ara, Nyame, Wo nkyɛn ara!

Verse 5
Sɛ so medze ahomka
Mutu ba sor,
Mo werɛ fir wi, bosoom,
Ɔnye nworaba a,
Mo ndwom mber nyina nye dɛ, Wo nkyɛn ara, Nyame, Wo nkyɛn ara!

title: Bra, Bosoe Me! Mebue Abow N' Sesei
raw_title: CAN153 Bra, Bosoe Me! Mebue Abow N' Sesei
lyrics:
Verse 1
Bra, bɔsoɛ me! Mebue abow n' sesei; Mo Wura, minyim Wo ndze, dɛ Ɔwoara a. Ewia atɔ dada na ehum reba; Me Gyefo, ayɛ mbrɛ ebɔsoɛ me, bra!

Verse 2
Memmper bio dɛ m'bɛsakyer hweeara Ansaana Dɔfo kɛse yi aba:
Misiesie n' yie dɛn ara a, ɔmmfata; Misianka W' kakra so a, ɔnnsɛ koraa.

Verse 3
Mbrɛ etse n' ara, fa W'ahotsew nye dɛw
Bra dan mu bɔhwɛ mbrɛ no mu tse ara; W'enyimnyam kɛse na m'ahohia ntsi Munnsuro dɛ m'bɛgye W' asoɛ me fi.

Verse 4
Bra, na nnyɛ dɛ ibohu m'akoma
Dɛ mu tsew, na mbom bɛyɛ ma ɔmfata W'; Bɛpa mu bɔn nye sum nye suro nyina Bɔsoɛ me, mo Wura Jesus, Woara bra! Amen.

title: Mihia Wo Mber Nyina
raw_title: CAN154 Mihia Wo Mber Nyina
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mihia Wo Mber Nyina,
Domfo Ewuradze;
Ndze bi nntse dɛ Wodze a, Ɔma asomdwee.
Chorus
Mihia Wo, ao, mihia Wo,
Mber nyina mihia Wo; M'Agyenkwa, Maba Wo hɔ, Hyira me sesei.

Verse 2
Mihia Wo mber nyina,
Pinkyɛn me daa;
Ber a Ɔwo bɛn me n' Mennyɛ bɔn da.

Verse 3
Mihia Wo mber nyina,
Dɛw mu o, yaw mu o;
Bra ntsɛm bɛnye me ntsena, Mma ɔbra annyɛ gyan.

Verse 4
Mihia Wo mber nyina,
Kyerɛkyerɛ m' Wo pɛ;
W'anohoba a ɔsom bo n' Pon ne nyina ma m'.
Chorus
Mihia Wo, ao, mihia Wo,
Mber nyina mihia Wo; M'Agyenkwa, Maba Wo hɔ, Hyira me sesei.

title: Jesus, me Gyefo, Nua, Nyenko
raw_title: CAN155 Jesus, me Gyefo, Nua, Nyenko
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jesus, me Gyefo, Nua, Nyɛnko, M'adwendwen nyina da Wo do; Adze nyina mu medan Wo:
Woara hyehɛ na gye m'asɔr.

Verse 2
Sɛ W'adom a ɔma nkwagye n'
Na menya masɔ bi mahwɛ, Sɛ Woara Wo Sunsum nye m' tse Na ɔdze N'atsaban kata m' do a:

Verse 3
Nna ma ɔnda ho ɔnhyɛ me dzen,
Na mma onngyaa m' hɔ ara da,
Ma ɔmpa m' esian nye mbusu,
Onsie me kra ma ɔnyɛ fofor,

Verse 4
Sɛ mofom fi kwan pa nom' a,
Ma mentse Ne ndze wɔ m'ekyir
Dɛ, San, bodua wo kwan Christ mu, Guan kɔ Christ hɔ, na bɔn abɛn.

Verse 5
No ngo krɔnkrɔn a ofi sor
Nda ho nkyekye mo werɛ, nkyerɛ m' kwan, Nkɛpem dɛ m'akoma bɔgow Na Noara dze dɔ bɛtsena mu.

Verse 6
Jesus, n-kyɛ 'nye m' aanantsew
Na meefi honam akwan do;
'Wo nye mo Kwan, yɛ m' Kwankyerɛfo; Fa me nan si botan no do.

Verse 7
Gyefo, tsen Wo nsa suo mo mu, Annyɛ n' dɛm a, nna mobɔhwe ase!
Wo nkotoo na musu frɛ Wo, Motwer Wo nko a, nna migyina, Amen.

title: Christ Nsordaafo, Hom Nsoer
raw_title: CAN156 Christ Nsordaafo, Hom Nsoer
lyrics:
Verse 1
Christ nsordafo, hom nsoɛr,
Hom mmia hom akodze,
Nyɛ dzen wɔ tum a Nyame nam
No domankoma Ba n' do ma n'
Nyɛ dzen Dɔm Ewuradzem'
Na No tum ahoɔdzenm'
Nyia ɔtwer Jesus N'ahoɔdzen n' yɛ Konyimdzifo mbordo.

Verse 2
Hom ngyina No tum kɛsem'
Mfa N'ahoɔdzen nyina nhyɛ
Na wɔmfa Nyame akodze n'
Mmia wɔ ɔko no mu;
Wɔayɛ adze nyina ewie n',
Na nkodzen abɔ adze n'
Hom nam Christ do eedzi konyim, Ewiei n' hom eedzi mu.

Verse 3
Hom nsoɛr ntsia atamfo
Wɔ mpu-na-mpu ko mu
Wɔnko ntsia mbɔnsam dɔmtutuw
Wɔ mbusu da nyinam'
Wɔnye sum mu mba nsi
Wɔnserew hɔn apam hun Wɔmma ɔsor kan akodze Ɔnye tsenenee nhyɛ hɔn.

Verse 4
Mma hom nnto beebiara
Pan, nnkyerɛ kra ne mberɛwyɛ
Wɔmfa papayɛ na adom
Mbɔ homho ban pirim;
Wɔmbɔm' nkyekyer nyɛ kor,
Hom nyina nduom akono; Wɔmfa adwen a ɔwɔ Christ m' mmia, Ɔno a ɔyɛ hom Tsir n'.

title: Memmfer De M'begye Mo Wura Atom
raw_title: CAN157 Memmfer De M'begye Mo Wura Atom
lyrics:
Verse 1
Memmfɛr dɛ m'bɛgye mo Wura atom'
Na maper N'edwuma ho,
Mesuo N'asɛm ho enyidzim', Ne mbeamudua ho enyimnyam n'.
Chorus
Mbeamudua ho, mbeamudua ho, mbrɛ midzii kan muhun kan,
Na m'akoma n'adzesoa n' pirewii fii hɔ;
Hɔ na menam gyedzim' muhum adze,
Na afei m'ahom ka mo ho daa.

Verse 2
Jesus, me Nyame! minyim No,
Ne dzin nye m'adze nyina; Ɔnnkɛma me kra afɛr da Na m'enyidar ayew.

Verse 3
N'asɛm tsim hɔ dɛ N'ahengua Na obotum akora
Dza medze ahyɛ Ne nsa n' yie Ekodu ekyir da n'.

Verse 4
Nna ɔbɛgye me dzin saa yi atom'
Wɔ N'Egya N'enyim hɔ,
Na Jerusalem fofor n' mu Ɔama me kra tsenabew.
Chorus
Mbeamudua ho, mbeamudua ho, mbrɛ midzii kan muhun kan,
Na m'akoma n'adzesoa n' pirewii fii hɔ;
Hɔ na menam gyedzim' muhum adze,
Na afei m'ahom ka mo ho daa.

title: Soer, Ewuradze N'abasa, Soer
raw_title: CAN158 Soer, Ewuradze N'abasa, Soer
lyrics:
Verse 1
Soɛr, Ewuradze N'abasa, soɛr!
Fa Wo bɛkyebo tum no hyɛ; Esoɛr a, hɛll 'henman wosow, W'atamfo gu ebiritsi.

Verse 2
Dɛ mbrɛ tsetse n' iyii Woho n';
Kyerɛw krɔnkrɔn bɔ Wo dzin dawur; Ɔwo a ennsakyer ara da, Fa W'ahentum kɛse n' bɛn hɛn.

Verse 3
Ewuradze, W'abaw du mbea nyina,
No tum a ɔgye nkwa mmbɔ adze; Eda ho nye Wo nkorɔfo tse Egye hɔn fi ɔbra asorɛkyem'.

Verse 4
Owu na hɛll betsiw, hɔn kwa,
Wo hɔ na esiarfo n' bɛba; Bɔbɔ se dɛ wɔahɛn Zion,
Woedzi wu do nyim edu fie.

title: Christian! Mma Mmpe Ahomgye Nde
raw_title: CAN159 Christian! Mma Mmpe Ahomgye Nde
lyrics:
Verse 1
Christian! mma mmpɛ ahomgye ndɛ Tow w' ahomgye adaaso n' gu; Ewɔ atamfo finimfin:
Weɔn na sɔr.

Verse 2
Etumfo nye akɛsefo
Rotwe hɔn dɔm wɔ akono, Wɔbɔkɔ wo ntoa awerɛfirm';
Weɔn na sɔr.

Verse 3
Fa wo sor akodze n' mia; Ma ɔnhyɛ wo daa nyina;
Ɔtamfo n' rehyɛ w' atsɛw:
Weɔn na sɔr.

Verse 4
Tsie hɔn a woedzi konyim n' Wɔrohwɛ mbrɛ isi ko;
Hɔn nyina yɛ ano kor se:
Weɔn na sɔr.

Verse 5
Nkanka tsie w' Ewuradze, Ɔno a edɔ dɛ itsie n';
Fa N'asɛm sie w'akomam':
Weɔn na sɔr.

Verse 6
Weɔn dɛ iyi ara nko
Na ko n' nyina gyina do;
Sɔr ma womfi sor mbrɛ w' mboa:
Weɔn na sɔr.

title: Ao o, m'afe! Hom Nhwe Frankaa
raw_title: CAN160 Ao o, m'afe! Hom Nhwe Frankaa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ao o, m'afɛ! hom nhwɛ frankaa Rinyam wɔ sor hɔ! Afei nkyidɔm riyi hɔnho, Konyim abɛm hɛn.
Chorus
Wontsim aban n', na mereba,
Jesus rinyam nsa; Wɔnto ano nse n' sor hɔ dɛ, W'adaworom yetsim n'.

Verse 2
Hwɛ dɔmtutuw a wɔreba, Abɔnsam dzi kan:
Akatakyi rohwe ase, Mbanyinndam pɛ etu!

Verse 3
Hwɛ, konyim frankaa no rinyam!
Tsie, abɛn rehɛn,
Yɛdze hɛn Hen dzin bedzi nyim Wɔ adɔm nyina do.

Verse 4
Ɔko asaasaa do akyer Na boafo bɛn hɛn: Hɛn Sahen kɛse no reba, Kofo, hyɛ akoma.
Chorus
Wontsim aban n', na mereba,
Jesus rinyam nsa; Wɔnto ano nse n' sor hɔ dɛ, W'adaworom yetsim n'.

title: Wonko! Wonko Nyi Dom, Jesu Nsordaafo
raw_title: CAN161 Wonko! Wonko Nyi Dom, Jesu Nsordaafo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Wɔnko! wɔnko nyi dɔm, Jesu nsordaafo,
Wɔntwer N'ehumbɔbɔr, wɔntwer N'anosɛm; Wɔmma Nsɛmpa frankaa n' do wɔ wim' nkyerɛ; Wɔntrɛ mu daa ma aman n-hwɛ ne fɛw.
Chorus
Wɔnko nyi dɔm! ako-mbarima,
Wɔnko! gyedɛ hom dzi konyim, Wɔnko nyi dɔm! mma wonngyaam' da; Na ahomgye n' ayɛ homdze.

Verse 2
Sɛ ngyata na yɛbɛnye hɔn ehyia mpo a,
Yeringyina gyedɛ Zion abowano;
Daa nyina yɛhom do yɛkɔ hɛn enyim, Kodu Jordan do mbrɛ hɛn enyi tua fie n'.
Chorus
Wɔnko nyi dɔm! ako-mbarima,
Wɔnko! gyedɛ hom dzi konyim, Wɔnko nyi dɔm! mma wonngyaam' da; Na ahomgye n' ayɛ homdze.

Verse 3
Wɔnko! wɔnko nyi dɔm, mbeamudua ho dɔm,
Wɔmpow enyigye na fona nyɛ hom fɛw;
Wommiamia hom ntoa mu, mmintsim hom mfowa yie; Wondzi nyim ara nkɔ, wɔnko mma hɛn Wura.
Chorus
Wɔnko nyi dɔm! ako-mbarima,
Wɔnko! gyedɛ hom dzi konyim, Wɔnko nyi dɔm! mma wonngyaam' da; Na ahomgye n' ayɛ homdze.

Verse 4
Wɔmma yɛmfa koryɛ dɛmara yɛnkɔ,
Kɛpem dɛ hɛn akwantu bɔbɔ adze,
Kɛpem dɛ yebohu sor abɔfo dɛ
Wɔdze ahentar nye konyim-kyɛw reba.
Chorus
Wɔnko nyi dɔm! ako-mbarima,
Wɔnko! gyedɛ hom dzi konyim, Wɔnko nyi dɔm! mma wonngyaam' da; Na ahomgye n' ayɛ homdze.

title: Mma Nngyaa Mu Mma Ngyigye
raw_title: CAN162 Mma Nngyaa Mu Mma Ngyigye
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mma nngyaa mu mma ngyigye
Na ngyaamu yɛ bɔn,
Konyim kor bɔboa w' ma
Eedzi nyim bi so;
Ko mbarimbam' kɔ w'enyim Hom w'apɛdze do,
Hwɛ Jesus ara daa.
Ɔdze w' bokodu.
Chorus
Bisa Agyenkwa no hɔ mboa,
Ahoɔdzen nye akomatɔmu; Ɔpɛ dɛ ɔbɔboa wo, Ɔdze w' bokodu.

Verse 2
Gyaa mfɛfo bɔn agor,
Gyaa kasa bɔn nyina;
Dzi Nyame Ne dzin nyi,
Na mmfa nndzi agor;
Dwen na ma w'enyi mber,
Yɛ adɔyɛ, dzi nokwar; Hwɛ Jesus ara daa, Ɔdze w' bokodu.

Verse 3
Nyia obedzi nyim no
Nyame bɔsoa n' kyɛw; Sɛ ɔnnkyɛr na yɛabɔm' mpo a, Gyedzi bedzi nyim:
Nyia ɔyɛ hɛn Agyenkwa n',
Ɔbɛhyɛ hɛn dzen;
Hwɛ Jesus ara daa, Ɔdze w' bokodu.
Chorus
Bisa Agyenkwa no hɔ mboa,
Ahoɔdzen nye akomatɔmu; Ɔpɛ dɛ ɔbɔboa wo, Ɔdze w' bokodu.

title: Hen Nyame Ye Abankese
raw_title: CAN163 Hen Nyame Ye Abankese
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hɛn Nyame yɛ abankɛse,
Akokyɛm nye akodze;
Amandze aba hɛn do dze, Naaso ɔgye No nkorɔfo.
Verse
Tamfo n' rohwehwɛ hɛn, Ɔmpɛ hɛn mbusu pa:
Na no tum so ɔso, Ndaadaa pii na ɔdze kol Obi nnsɛ no wiadze ha.

Verse 2
Nyimpa ahoɔdzen dze osuar,
Ɔnnkyɛr na yɛahwe ase; Hɛn Gyefo nye ɔbarimba a Nyame eyi N' esi hɔ. Epɛ ehu Ne dzin?
Verse
Wɔfrɛ No Jesus Christ,
Edɔm Ewuradze
No domankoma Ba:
Ne nsam' na konyimdzi wɔ.

Verse 3
Sɛ mbɔnsam ahyɛ wiadze ma
Rohwehwɛ amen hɛn a,
Mma hom mma hɛn bo nntu koraa: Wonnkotum afa hɛn do.
Ma abɔnsam no bo mfuw,
Verse
Ɔnyɛ n'enyim kusuww;
Onnkotum ayɛ hwee, Woebu no fɔ dada; Asɛm kor bɔhwe n' ase.

Verse 4
Nyame N'asɛm no gyina hɔ, Ndebɔnyɛfo rinnyi da. Hɛn Jesus na ɔka hɛn nkwa, Ɔma hɛn sunsum ndzepa.
Na sɛ wɔfa hɛn nkwa,
Verse
Ahodze, anaa dzin a
Wonnya ho mfaso da; Yinom nyina botwam'-
Onyame man tsim dɔ daa.

title: Tsetse Bo A Wopaae Maa Me
raw_title: CAN164 Tsetse Bo A Wopaae Maa Me
lyrics:
Verse 1
Tsetse Bo a wɔpaae maa me,
Ma munguan nhunta Wo mu;
Ma nsu no nye bɛgya n' a
Ofi Wo mfem' repem no, Ɔnyɛ bɔn edufanu,
Ɔmpa m' fɔ, ɔnsan mo ho.

Verse 2
Sɛ me nyinsu kyi daa mpo,
Sɛ mo mbɔdzen nngow da mpo, Yinom nnkotum bɔn wer tɔ; Gyefo nye Wo nkotonoo:
Me nsam' nnyi akatua bi, Metetar Wo mbeamudua n'.

Verse 3
Ber a muga ahomtsia yi,
Ber a m'bɛka m'enyi egu do,
Ber a m'bɔsoɛr maba noho,
Ebohu W' W'ahengua do n',
Tsetse Bo a wɔpaae maa me,
Ma munguan nhunta Wo mu. Amen.

title: Asomdwee Pa, Wo Bon Wiadze Yi Mu
raw_title: CAN165 Asomdwee Pa, Wo Bon Wiadze Yi Mu
lyrics:
Verse 1
Asomdwee pa, wɔ bɔn wiadze yi mu?
Jesus bɔgya ɔwasa asomdwee.

Verse 2
Asomdwee pa, dwumadzi akyer do yi?
Ebɛyɛ Jesus Ne pɛ nye ahomgye.

Verse 3
Asomdwee pa, yaw etwa ehyia hɛn yi?
Jesus No bom' asomdwee ara nko.

Verse 4
Asomdwee pa, adɔfo apetse yi?
Jesus kora hɛn do yi, hwee nnkɛyɛ hɛn.

Verse 5
Asomdwee pa, yennyim hɛn ndaamba yi?
Yenyim Jesus, na ɔtse ahengua n' do.

Verse 6
Asomdwee pa, wu gyegye hɛn do yi?
Jesus apansam wu na no tum nyina.

Verse 7
Ao, ɔdɔɔ so, wiadze aperdzi rennkyɛr, Jesus bɛfrɛ sor asomdwee mu.

title: Onyame Dua Kwan Sunsum Mu
raw_title: CAN166 Onyame Dua Kwan Sunsum Mu
lyrics:
Verse 1
Onyame dua kwan sunsum mu
Na ɔyɛ N'anwanwadze;
Ɔdze N'anamɔn taataa pom', Ɔko ehum do nantsew.

Verse 2
Asaase no bun mu noho,
Ɔdze nyansa nwanwa
Kora Ne nhyehyɛɛ pa a ɔsom bo n', Ɔyɛ dza Noara pɛ.

Verse 3
Esiarfo a hom suro, hom nnhyɛ ahom,
Ifua a hom suro n' kɛse n', Mbɔbɔrhu ma, na ɔbɛpaa Nhyira egu hom do.

Verse 4
Mma hom mmfa hom nyimpa-dwen mmbua
Nyame, hom ntwer N'adom,
Ber a ɔaka N'enyim esi n'
Na N'ano serew hyɛm'

Verse 5
No botae bɛber ntsɛmara,
Ɔbɛhan mber nyina; Kukuduuduw n' yɛ wen mpo a, Nhyiren n' botu huam pa.

Verse 6
Kyingyenyi furafo twar dɛ ɔfom,
Ɔnnkɛtse No ndwuma ase; Nyame Noara tse N'adze ase, Ɔbɛkyerɛm' pefee.

title: Wo Kwan A; Nnye Medze
raw_title: CAN167 Wo Kwan A; Nnye Medze
lyrics:
Verse 1
Wo kwan a; nnyɛ medze,
Sɛ no mu kadoo mpo a, Wankasa gye m' taataa; Kyerɛ m' kwan a mundua mu.
No mu ye o, no mu muo o,
Ɔnoara na oye;
Ɔkyeakyea o, ɔtsen o, Wɔdze kɔ W'ahomgyem'.

Verse 2
Mennkɛfa dza mepɛ; Wɔse m' mpo a mennkɛfa: Mo Wura, Woara, fa ma m' Na ɔayɛ kwan pa ama m'.
Ɔman a mohwehwɛ n'
Wodze a; na ma kwan a Wɔdze kɔm' so nyɛ Wodze, Ɔno m'bɔtɔ dɔnsuar.

Verse 3
Woara gye mo kuraba, Fa dɛw anaa yaw gum' Dɛ mbrɛ ehwɛ a oye; Yie o, bɔn o, fa ma m'.
Memmfa mara me pɛ
Woara yɛ m'kwangyafo M'ahoɔdzen, m'adze nyina. Amen.

title: Medze Mo Bon Bre Wo
raw_title: CAN168 Medze Mo Bon Bre Wo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Medze mo bɔn brɛ Wo
Dza munntum ano bu, Ama aahor ne nyina Wɔ bɔgya bura no mu.
M'Agyenkwa, medze ne nyina brɛ W'; No dur hyɛ me kra do dodow.

Verse 2
Medze m'akoma brɛ Wo,
'Koma a minnyim mu nsɛm;
Kɔhwinyi, kobɔnyi n', Akoma bɔn ampa. M'Agyenkwa, medze hyɛ Wo nsa Ma m'akoma nsi pi mma Wo.

Verse 3
Medze m' dadwen brɛ Wo,
Dadwen a munntum munnguan n' Ama eesuo mo mu Ama eeyi no hɔ.
M'Agyenkwa dɔfo, Wo nkyɛn na Medze m'adzesoa yi meba.

Verse 4
Medze me yaw brɛ Wo,
Yaw a munntum nnka n' a;
Ɔnngye dɛ meka mpo,
Ɔnngye dɛ meka mpo, Woara nyim ne nyina. M'Agyenkwa a Woara so nyim yaw, Medze m'awerɛhow brɛ Wo.

Verse 5
Medze me dɛw brɛ Wo,
Dɛw a Wo dɔ dze ana m', Dɛ memfa nyɛ atwer a Mofow mipinkyɛn Wo. Gyefo, Woara tɔɔ ne nyina maa m'; Medze ne nyina gu W'enyim.

Verse 6
Medze mo nkwa brɛ Wo, Mennda ho nndze moho; Gyefo, ma menya Wodze, Wo nko Wodze daa nyina.
M'akoma, mo nkwa, m'adze nyina, Medze brɛ Wo, me Hen, Gyefo.

title: Meye Hoho Wo Ha
raw_title: CAN169 Meye Hoho Wo Ha

title: Mefa Jesus Abawm' Sonn
raw_title: CAN170 Mefa Jesus Abawm' Sonn
lyrics:
Verse 1
Meda Jesus abawm' sɔnn,
Meda No bo mu komm,
No dɔ no kata mo do, Me kra bɔhom hɔ komm.
Tsie! Abɔfo hɔn ndze a;
Wɔdze rotow ndwom frɛ m', Fir enyimnyam sar no do, Fir jasper po n' egya.
Chorus
Meda Jesus abawn' sɔnn,
Motwer No bo mu komm,
No dɔ no kata mo do, Me kra bɔhom hɔ komm.

Verse 2
Meda Jesus abawn' sɔnn,
Mefi kɔdaannda nsa,
Mefi wiadze ngyigye nsa, Bɔn nnkotum ahaw m' hɔ.
Aka nsɔhwɛ kumaabi,
Aka nyinsu kumaabi,
Ma meefi awerɛhow nsa, Ma meefi suro nsa.
Chorus
Meda Jesus abawn' sɔnn,
Motwer No bo mu komm,
No dɔ no kata mo do, Me kra bɔhom hɔ komm.

Verse 3
Jesus, mo 'koma no dɔbea,
Me Jesus wui maa me;
Tsetse Bo no No do hɔ Na mo werɛ tsim daa nyina.
Ha na mebɛtar matweɔn
Ma adzesaa no aasen, M'bɔtweɔn ma eedu adzekyee, Wɔ esuegya noho.
Chorus
Meda Jesus abawn' sɔnn,
Motwer No bo mu komm,
No dɔ no kata mo do, Me kra bɔhom hɔ komm.

title: Metse De Gyefo N' Se
raw_title: CAN171 Metse De Gyefo N' Se
lyrics:
Verse 1
Metse dɛ Gyefo n' se,
W' ahodzen suar ampa;
Na dwen do weɔn na sɔr,
Fa Me yɛ w'adze nyina."
Chorus
Jesus tuaa ne nyina,
Ne nyina fir Noara;
Bɔn egu mo ho fi dɛnn, Ɔahor ma ayɛ fitaa.

Verse 2
Ewuradze, menya ehu
Dɛ Wo nkotsee Wo tum
Na otu kwata bɔr, Na ɔnam 'koma bo.

Verse 3
'Midze, minnyi yie bi a
Medze bɛgye W'adom;
M'bɔhor me ntar fitaa
Wɔ eguambaa bɔgyaa mu.

Verse 4
Da bi a me kra bɔsoɛr
Mo wumpa do afow sor, "Jesus tuaa ne nyina!" Begyigye wim' hɔ nyina.

Verse 5
Na minya mudu sor
Ahengua n' enyim hɔ a, Medze m'asadze nyina Bogu N'ananadze hɔ.
Chorus
Jesus tuaa ne nyina,
Ne nyina fir Noara;
Bɔn egu mo ho fi dɛnn, Ɔahor ma ayɛ fitaa.

title: Metse Sor Man Ho Do Mu 'I
raw_title: CAN172 Metse Sor Man Ho Do Mu 'I
lyrics:
Verse 1
Metse sor man ho dɔ mu 'i,
Munnsuro nsakyer biara;
M'awerɛhyɛmu yi dzi mu,
Biribiara nnsakyer ha;
Ehum botu abɔ m' ho aprɔw
M'akoma botu dze;
Na Nyame etwa moho ehyia 'i.
Ana m'bɛpa abaw?

Verse 2
Beebiara a obegya me n'.
Hia biara nnkɛsan me;
Mo Guanhwɛfo wɔ me nkyɛn,
Na minnkehia hweeara;
Ne nyansaa tse hɔ daa daa,
N'enyi nnyɛ kusuww da; Onyim kwan a ɔfa do, Na menye N' bɛnantsew.

Verse 3
Mfunoma wɔ m'enyim a,
Emidze minnyae nnhunii,k
Wimu bɛtsew kann wɔ mo do,
Wɔ mbrɛ nkyɛ fua ahyɛ n';
M'enyidar munntum nnsusu,
Mo kwan da hɔ kɔ nkwan', M'Agyenkwa esie m'akoradze Na ɔnye m' bɛnantsew.

title: Mber Pii Na Maka N' Mo Mu
raw_title: CAN173 Mber Pii Na Maka N' Mo Mu
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mber pii na maka n' mo mu;
Dɛ, Woana bɔfow sor,
Akɛfa Ewuradze Christ, Dze No esian famu?
Adwendwen dze me botu,
Ma mekohu Noara
Mbrɛ abɔfo yi No ayɛw, Wonya adzekyee nwoaraba n'.

Verse 2
Mber pii na maka n' mo mu:
Woana besian bun n' mu, Akɛfa Ewuradze Christ, Efi ewufom' aba?
Medze nokwar mbrɛahoadze
Siesie m'akoma mu dze a, Christ bɛhɛn mo mu hɔ ntsɛm, Nye me abɛtsena daa.

Verse 3
Na gyedzi mu tsenenee n' Akyerɛ me ndzɛmba pa:
Ɔdze Christ rebrɛ me no;
Ɔse: Hwɛ N' w'akkomam',
Christ ayɛ krado dze nkwa
Rema nyia ɔhaahaw ho n'; W'anomu nye w'akoma mu Asɛm no abɛn wo.

title: Gyedzinyi, Twer No, Twer No
raw_title: CAN174 Gyedzinyi, Twer No, Twer No
lyrics:
Verse 1
Gyedzinyi, twer No, twer No,
Sɛ ko n' kyer do dɛn ara a;
Ɔyɛ dɛn ara a ibedzi nyim, Wo Nyame bɔko ama w'.
Chorus
Twer No, twer No,
Sɛ sum n' yɛ hu dɛn ara a; Twer No, twer No, Na adzekyee no abɛn.

Verse 2
Twer No, na mbusu n' rebɛn,
Ngyigye dzendzen rebɛn; Obokutow wo arta Ɔbra n'awor huhu n'.

Verse 3
Ewuradze botum agye hɛn,
Ɔyɛ Nyɛnko ara ampa; Gyedzinyi, twer No, twer No, Twer N' ara ewiei.
Chorus
Twer No, twer No,
Sɛ sum n' yɛ hu dɛn ara a; Twer No, twer No, Na adzekyee no abɛn.

title: Hen Wura, Kyere Hen Ma Yensor Yie
raw_title: CAN175 Hen Wura, Kyere Hen Ma Yensor Yie
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hɛn Wura, kyerɛ hɛn ma yɛnsɔr yie, Yɛmfia enyindzi na suro: Kaansa yɛyɛ dɛtse na nso a, Otwar dɛ yɛbɛn Wo.

Verse 2
Yegyaa sɔr a na yeedzi emia: Dom hɛn tua ma yɛnsɔr! Na yɛroboa hɛnho nye W' ehyia a, Ewuradze, hyia hɛn kwan.

Verse 3
Ma hɛn ahobrɛadze ɔnye
Bɔn ho nnuho krɔnkrɔn,
Awerɛhyɛmu dzendzen a ɔma Yɛtse Wo ndze nya nkwa.

Verse 4
Dom hɛn gyedzi wɔ Afɔr a
No nko tum pata bɔn n'; Ma yɛmfa enyidar enyi Ntsim Christ n-ko ara do.

Verse 5
Abotar a 'kyɛr dɛn ara a
Ɔweɔn, ɔtweɔn na osu;
Mbanyinndam a osie hɛn kra Na 'ruku n' mpo a ɔtwer Wo.

Verse 6
Ma hɛn yi, na Wo pɛ nyɛ hɔ,
Ma, yɛahyɛ dzen dɛm no, Yeedua Wo Sunsum nye W' Ba do Yɛasɔr dɛ mbrɛ ɔsɛ.

title: Yeba W'ahengua Enyim
raw_title: CAN176 Yeba W'ahengua Enyim
lyrics:
Verse 1
Yɛba W'ahengua enyim
Bobu ntwɛr totɔ serɛ Wo a, Wo dɔ ntsi yɛ aso ma hɛn; Jesus krɔnkrɔn, tsie hɛn.

Verse 2
'Wo a egye ndzebɔnyɛfo, Na hor hɔn ho fi nyina,
Fa Wo bɔgyaa san hɛn ho:
Jesus krɔnkrɔn, tsie hɛn.

Verse 3
Ma yɛnhyɛ hɛn honam do, Ma yendzi wiadze do nyim, Ka abɔnsam gu ma hɛn:
Jesus krɔnkrɔn, tsie hɛn.

Verse 4
Sɛ awerɛhow hyɛ hɛn do, Sɛ yarba tsew tɔ hɛn do, Sɛ owu dze hɛn rokɔ a:
Jesus krɔnkrɔn, tsie hɛn.

Verse 5
Dom hɛn gyedzi nye ɔbra pa, Ma hɛn dɔ nye abotar, Gya hɛn berɛberɛ kodu fie:
Jesus krɔnkrɔn, tsie hɛn. Amen.

title: Asomdwee Hen
raw_title: CAN177 Asomdwee Hen
lyrics:
Verse 1
Asomdwee Hen!
Amanaman ruwu;
Wo mba a apon hɔn rotɔ akono.

Verse 2
Asomdwee Hen!
Ɔbɔn no dɔm abɛn!
Naaso yɛwɔ Wo nsam' a hwee nnyɛ hɛn.

Verse 3
Asomdwee Hen!
Yehia Wo daa nyina,
Dɛ nkwa na owu mu nye hɛn ntsena.

Verse 4
Asomdwee Hen!
Sesei ɔnye ndaamba,
W'adaworom, yɛnyɛ Wo nhyira mba.
Amen.

title: Me Kra Nam Mo Pomfo No Do
raw_title: CAN178 Me Kra Nam Mo Pomfo No Do
lyrics:
Verse 1
Me kra nam mo Pomfo no do,
Efi owu mprɛnu no nsa;
Woeyi m'enyi wɔ nyinsuwa mu, Woeyi m'anan so efi hɛll.

Verse 2
Dɛm ntsi m'boguan makɔ No hɔ,
M'enyiwa bɔhwɛ N'ahoɔfɛw,
Me kra bɛtsena ama No nko, Na me kra nyina ehyira No.

title: Bekyebo Kan! Bekebo Kan
raw_title: CAN179 Bekyebo Kan! Bekebo Kan
lyrics:
Verse 1
Bɛkyebo Kan! Bɛkyebo Kan!
Mbrɛ kra ho wɔ dɛ ɔtsew
Wɔ W'enyim a, Ehuntahunii; Ɔmmpem adze, mbom ɔdze dɛw Tum gyina na ɔhwɛ Wo.

Verse 2
W'ahengua ho esunsum dze
Tum sɔw siar hyɛnn no;
Na hɔn nko na hɔn su tse dɛm, Osiandɛ wonnhum bɔn wiadze a Ɔtse dɛ iyi pɛn.

Verse 3
Ao, m'bɛyɛ dɛn na 'mi a wɔawo m'
Sum mu, m'adwen kusuww,
Metum mepue, Nyame, Wenyim, Na mo sunsum kwatserkwaa yi Asɔw nserɛmɛn hyɛnn no?

Verse 4
Kwan bi wɔ hɔ ma nyimpa dɛ
Ɔdze fow kɔ sor fie;
Afɔr bi a wɔabɔ ama hɛn,
Nyame enyim Twitwagyefo, Sunsum krɔnkrɔn No tum.

Verse 5
Yinom na wɔyɛ hɛn krado
Ma sor krɔnkrɔnyɛ no;
Sum mu mba a yɛyɛ atɔbɔ
Nam domankoma Dɔ no do, Bɛtsena bɛkyebo Kanm'.

title: Agyenkwa Jesus, Fi Sor Bra
raw_title: CAN180 Agyenkwa Jesus, Fi Sor Bra
lyrics:
Verse 1
Agyenkwa Jesus, fi sor bra!
Fa W'adom krɔnkrɔn n' bɔboa me: Pra wiadze dɔ fi m'akomam' Na siesie mu fa ma Woho.

Verse 2
O, ma Wo krɔnkrɔnyɛ nhyɛ n' ma Na mo sunsum no kɔn ndɔ Wo!
Ewia o, anago, o, me pɛ kor Nye dɛ minya Wo midzi mee.

Verse 3
Kwan a m'Agyenkwa, W'anamɔn
Hyerɛn mu n', nna m'boduam' mbrɛhoadzem'; Minnketsie na mennkɛka dɔ Fofor bi ho asɛm dɛ Wodze n'.

Verse 4
Me kra a metu mahyɛ Wo nsa 'i, Mma enyigye huhuw nnyam' kyɛpɛn: Woara fa, na Ewɔ ho kwan Dɛ akoma n' nyina No Wura.

Verse 5
Ɔwo nko ara na mutum,
Medze enyigye krɔnn dɔ Wo; Egyigye kɛse bɛn nye yi
Dɛ muhu dɛ edze m' yɛ Wodze!

Verse 6
Moronnhwehwɛ wiadze 'i mu hwee Dɛ Wo dɔ krɔnn n' wɔ m'akomam': Iyiara nko na m'bɔhwehwɛ Na megyaa ndzɛmba nkaa nyinam'.

title: Adze Nyina Ne Ye Nnye Dzen Mma
raw_title: CAN181 Adze Nyina Ne Ye Nnye Dzen Mma
lyrics:
Verse 1
Adze nyinaa ne yɛ nnyɛ dzen mma
Nyia otum gye Jesu dzin dzi;
Munngu Wo nokwar n' ho fi bio,
Mo Wura, megye n' dɔ mu ara; Mutum, megye Wo dzi ampa,
Adze nyinaa ne yɛ nnyɛ dzen mma m'.

Verse 2
Dza ɔyɛ dzen sen adze nyina Nye dɛ m'begyaa bɔn yɛ koraa;
Naaso ne yɛ nnyɛ dzen, minyim:
Jesus, hwɛ Wo nokwaredzi no!
Sɛ biribiara nnyɛ dzen mma Wo a,
Adze nyina ne yɛ nnyɛ dzen mma m'

Verse 3
Asaase nye hɛll gye kyim mpo a,
Nyame N'asɛm nnkotwa apaw da;
Eguambaa n' beyi mo bɔn koraa,
Ampa, sɛ ɔyɛ dzen mpo a;
Dza ɔyɛ dzen mpo ɔbɛyɛ;
Adze nyina ne yɛ nnyɛ dzen mma m'.

Verse 4
Adze nyina Nyame yɛ ma ɔyɛ,
Christ so, nyimpam' Nyame tum no,
Mo so, wɔayɛ m'fofor koraa n',
Wɔayɛ m' fofor wɔ Christ mu no, Midzi dase n', mefi bɔn nsa n',
Adze nyina ne yɛ nnyɛ dzen mma m'.

title: Ao, Nkye Meenya 'Koma A Bon Nnyim
raw_title: CAN182 Ao, Nkye Meenya 'Koma A Bon Nnyim
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ao, nkyɛ meenya 'koma a bɔn nnyim Dze eyi Nyame ayɛw! Dza ɔtse Wo bɔgyaa no tum, Bɔgya a wɔkae gui maa m'.

Verse 2
Akoma a ɔdwe, bɔbɔfo,
Mo Pomfo N'ahengua,
Mbrɛ Christ n-ko na ɔkasa, Mbrɛ Jesus nko dzi hen.

Verse 3
Akoma brɛfo a ɔtwer Wo,
Nokwafo a no mu tsew;
'Koma a nkwa anaa wu nntum mmpaa Mmfi nyia ɔtsem' no ho.

Verse 4
Akoma a ɔasakyer koraa,
Na Nyame dɔ ahyɛm' ma; Odzi mu, na no mu tsew koraa, Nyame, ɔnye Wo sɛ!

Verse 5
Ewuradze, fa Wo suban ma m'! Ma me nsa nka sesei!
Kyerɛw dzin fofor n' m'akoma do, Wo dzin a ɔyɛ Dɔ n'. Amen.

title: Mo Wura Jesus, Mo Kon Do De Midzi Mu
raw_title: CAN183 Mo Wura Jesus, Mo Kon Do De Midzi Mu
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mo Wura Jesus, mo kɔn dɔ dɛ midzi mu! Morohwehwɛ dɛ etsena mo mu daa.
Dwuruw abosom, yi atamfo edzi,
Guar m' sesei ma monhoa dɛ esukwankyɛba.
Chorus
Monhoa fitaa, nyew, monhoa fitaa,
Guar m'sesei ma monhoa dɛ esukwankyɛba.

Verse 2
Jesus, mma efifidze biara nn-ka,
Fa Wo bɔgyaa botu nkekaaba nyina;
Dɛm ahohor ntsi mopow adze nyina,
Guar m' sesei ma monhoa dɛ esukwankyɛba.
Chorus
Monhoa fitaa, nyew, monhoa fitaa,
Guar m'sesei ma monhoa dɛ esukwankyɛba.

Verse 3
Jesus, fi sor ahengua do to enyi hwɛ m',
Boa me ma mombɔ afɔr a odzi mu; Medze moho nye dza mowɔ nyina ma Wo, Guar m' sesei ma monhoa dɛ esunkwankyɛba.
Chorus
Monhoa fitaa, nyew, monhoa fitaa,
Guar m'sesei ma monhoa dɛ esukwankyɛba.

Verse 4
Jesus, yi ntsi na mokotow meserɛ Wo,
Ewuradze, mokosɔw W'ananadze ha; Me gyedzi enyi tua dɛ Wo bɔgyaa repem, Guar m' sesei ma monhoa dɛ esukwankyɛba.
Chorus
Monhoa fitaa, nyew, monhoa fitaa,
Guar m'sesei ma monhoa dɛ esukwankyɛba.

Verse 5
Jesus, matɔ mo bo ase morotweɔn, Bra, bɔbɔ akoma fofor to mo mu; Hɔn a wɔhwehwɛ W', 'nnse obi Oho da; Guar m' sesei ma monhoa dɛ esukwankyɛba.
Chorus
Monhoa fitaa, nyew, monhoa fitaa, Guar m'sesei ma monhoa dɛ esukwankyɛba.

title: Mo Wura Jesus, Wahoofew N'
raw_title: CAN184 Mo Wura Jesus, Wahoofew N'
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mo Wura Jesus, W'ahoɔfɛw n'
Na mo kɔn dɔ dɛ m'bohu;
Wo suban, W'adwen fɛɛfɛw n' Mepɛ mahwɛ mpu-na-mpu. Hue W'adom gu me kra do, Mo mu bɔn nyina popo.

Verse 2
Obiara nnkenya ahotɔ, Gyedɛ Woara tsena no mu. Tsew m'adwen ho, ma me dɔ, Ma m' Nyame dɔ a odzi mu. Ao, Gyefo dɔfo, yɛ ntsɛm, Yɛ ntsɛm fa Woho bɛkyɛ m'.

Verse 3
Ao, bra bɛtsena m'akomam', Ma mombɔ Nyame mu bra;
Enye me ntwa bra nyinam' Mma nngyaa m' hɔ aber biara. Ma mindzi nokwar munwie,
Na fa me kɔ m'Egya fie. Amen.

title: Egya, Megye Dzi Pi
raw_title: CAN185 Egya, Megye Dzi Pi
lyrics:
Verse 1
Egya, megye dzi pi Dɛ eyɛ mbɔbɔrhufo: 'Bɛsan me kra fɔdzifo n' ho, Na ayɛ me fofor.

Verse 2
Dɛm a, Jesus ntsi, bra, Ma m'akoma mu ntsew: Botwa mo fona nyina do, Na ma mingyaa bɔn yɛ.

Verse 3
Adom do na menam Mesan meba Wo hɔ: Ewuradze, to m'akoma pan Na krɔnkrɔnyɛ nhyɛ n' ma.

Verse 4
Mosɔr mberɛw mu serɛ tum,
Hyɛ W'ahendzi no ma
Ndɛ a wɔfrɛ no n-dɛ yi, Na mennkɛyɛ bɔn bio.

Verse 5
Munntum nnhor m'akoma,
Gyedɛ megye Wo dzi,
Na motweɔn Wo bɔgyaa a ɔma Wansayɛ krɔnkrɔn no.

Verse 6
Meda W'asɛndua ase 'i, Jesus, dom me W'adom. Fa Wo bɔgyaa a ɔhor bɔn no Hoa m' dɛ esukwankyɛba.

title: Minyim De Mo Pomfo Tse Ase
raw_title: CAN186 Minyim De Mo Pomfo Tse Ase
lyrics:
Verse 1
Minyim dɛ mo Pomfo tse ase, Na ɔsɔr ma me daa nyina; Ɔma No dɔ ho sɛnkyerɛdze, Eyiedzi ahobadze a.

Verse 2
Muhu N' dɛ ɔrema me tsir do, Ɔdze nkwagye abɛn ha,
W'enyim yɛ me dehye ampaara, Na ɔnnkɛkyɛr na ɔaba.

Verse 3
Ɔpɛ dɛ meyɛ hotsewnyi; 'Bɛnadze siw Ne pɛ kwan?
N'adom pamfo a ɔwɔ mo mu n'
Ɔbɛhyɛ m' ma ampaara

Verse 4
Jesus W'asɛm na midzi do; Me gyedzi nyina nye dɛ Mo Wura, ebɛsan na agye m', Ama Woara Woho.

Verse 5
Minya Nyame, meyɛ Nedze a, Nna menya paradise, Mosɔ nhyira a onnyi kabea Na ahomgye afebɔɔ hwɛ.

title: Wodze Daa! Odo Nyame
raw_title: CAN187 Wodze Daa! Odo Nyame
lyrics:
Verse 1
Wodze daa! Ɔdɔ Nyame,
Fi sor W'ahenguam tsie hɛn;
Yɛnyɛ Wodze afebɔɔ,
Wɔ ha na mbersantsen nyinam'.

Verse 2
Wodze daa! n-kwa Wura,
Kora hɛn wɔ bra aperdzim';
Wo nye Nkwa n', Nokwar n' na Kwan n', Gya hɛn kɔ kan man no mu.

Verse 3
Wodze daa! Ao, esiarfo Bɛn nye hɔn a wɔhom Wo mu! Gyefo, Weɔmfo, Sor Nyɛnko, Ao, twitwa gye hɛn kɔ ewiei!

Verse 4
Wodze daa! Oguanhwɛfo,
Wo nguan a wɔyɛ mberɛw;
Woara kora hɔn yie,
Fa W'ayamuyie dom hɛn nyina.

Verse 5
Wodze daa! hɛn Kwangyefo,
Ema hɛn dza yehia nyina,
Hɛn bɔn nyina edze kyɛ hɛn, Ewuradze, gya hɛn kɔ sor.

title: Asodzi Da Mo Do
raw_title: CAN188 Asodzi Da Mo Do
lyrics:
Verse 1
Asodzi da mo dol
Dɛ miyi Nyame ayɛw,
Megye me kra a onnwu da nkwa, Na mema ɔsɛ sor.

Verse 2
Mosom mbersantsen yi,
Midze dwuma a wɔahyɛ m', Ao, nkyɛ medze m'ahom nyina Maayɛ mo Wura Ne pɛ!

Verse 3
Fa nhwɛyie bɔ me ban
Ma mentsena dɛ ihu m';
Na, mo Wura, siesie Wo somfo Na meebu nkontaa pa.

Verse 4
Boa m' ma monweɔn, monsɔr,
Na montwer Wo nkotoo
Minyim dɛ mogor m'edwuma ho a, M'bowu wu a onnyi ewiei.

title: Gyefo, Owo, Do Ntsi
raw_title: CAN189 Gyefo, Owo, Do Ntsi
lyrics:
Verse 1
Gyefo,Ɔwo, dɔ ntsi
Iwui maa me,
Ɔmmfata dɛ medze,
Hweeara kam Wo;
Dɔm', me kra bɔkotow W',
M'akoma edzi ne nsew do, Na ɔabɔ afɔr bi, Ama W' sesei.

Verse 2
Mbɔbɔr egua n' enyim
Idzi ma me, Jesus, me gyedzi to N'enyi hwɛ Wo:
Boa m' ma monsoa mbeamudua n',
Mombɔ Wo dɔ n' dawur, Montow ndwom, mbɔ mpaa bi Mma Wo sesei!.

Verse 3
Ma m' nokwar 'koma a,
Ɔsɛ Wodze N',
Na da biara a otwam'
Eehu me dɛ
Mahyɛ dɔ dwuma bi ase,
Mayɛ ayamuyie bi, Matwe kobɔnyi bi, Medze ama W'.

Verse 4
Dza mowɔ o, mbrɛ metse o, W' akyɛdze kwa,
Dɛw mu o, yaw mu o, mo Wura, Wodze nye me.
Na muhu W'enyim a,
Me kra a wɔapɔn no yi, Mbersantsen nyina mu, Ɔnyɛ Wodze.

title: Nyan, Soer, Ye Do Na Edwuma
raw_title: CAN190 Nyan, Soer, Ye Do Na Edwuma
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyan, soɛr, yɛ dɔ na edwuma,
Nnoma asoɛr rusu,
Bɔsu atɔ egu nhaban do,
Wiadze nyina asoɛr
Rihyira, Nkwa Wura Ne Mafo Ɔhobrɛadzefo No.

Verse 2
Bra, ma wo ndze mfora hɔn dzem',
Ka mu bi yi N' ayɛw; Hwɛ mbrɛ ewia a ofir tsetse, Asoɛr rehyerɛn dzendzen! Dɛm na ma Jesus dɔ m'bɔsɔ Gya wɔ w' akoma mu.

Verse 3
Fa ma, fa ma, fa ma ara,
Dza Nyame dze ama wo n';
Hwer woho mma mmbu ho nkontaa,
Enyimnyamm' ara som Onyame a ɔmaa wiadze yi Na dza ɔbɛba nyina.

title: Nyame Asomfo, Hom Nsoer
raw_title: CAN191 Nyame Asomfo, Hom Nsoer
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyame asomfo, hom nsoɛr! Hom n-tow nsɛmhun ngu! Hom mfa 'koma, adwen, ndamyɛ Mbɔsom ahemfo Hen!

Verse 2
Nyame asomfo, hom nsoɛr!
N'ahendzi ekyim dodow;
Hom mma enuadɔ nda edzi, Na sum nye manso nkɔ.

Verse 3
Nyame asomfo, hom nsoɛr!
Asɔr no rotweɔn hom; N'edwuma so ma n'hoɔdzen; Hom nsoɛr, hom nhyɛ no dzen.

Verse 4
Hom mma Christ mbeam'dua n'do!
Hom ntsia N'ananɔm m; Onyimpa Ba, hom Nua n', dzi kan:
Nyame asomfo, hom nsoɛr!

title: Ye Edwuma; Hwer, Ma Woho Nkom
raw_title: CAN192 Ye Edwuma; Hwer, Ma Woho Nkom
lyrics:
Verse 1
Yɛ edwuma; hwer, ma woho nkɔm',
Fa dɛw yɛ w'Egya N'edwuma;
Kwan a wo Wura duaa mu nye n'; Na 'wo, somfo, na ennkɛfa do?

Verse 2
Yɛ ara, ɔnnkɛyɛ gyam bi,
Dza 'yew n' ha n', fa n' mfaso wɔ sor: Nɛndze nnkamfo w', mmpɛ w', wommbu w' bi; Owura pen wo; nyimpa nye bɛn?

Verse 3
Yɛ ara, ber a kan wɔ do yi, Wiadze edwumayɛ ber resa:
Mma nnyɛ akwadwerɛ, yɛ w'edwuma ntsɛm; Wonnsi n' dɛm twe sunsum ekyir.

Verse 4
Sum ruku nɛndze a wɔnye W' tse,
Dɛ wonnyi enyidar wɔ wum'; Ma gya no do, na ka n' kɛse, Gya a ɔma mbrɛ sum wɔ yɛ kan n'.

Verse 5
Yɛ ara, mma mberɛ, weɔn na sɔr,
Wɔdze nyansa twe kra ekyir; Sir wiadze bra ne tsempɔn yim' Pon akobɔfo ma wɔmbra.

Verse 6
Yɛ ara, eso dzi mu dɛw;
Na ahomgye pa wɔ ekyir;
Ɔrennkyɛr bi na atse kumfor n'
Ne ndze esuom dɛ, Hwɛ, mereba!

title: Kyere M' kwan, Nyame Tumfo
raw_title: CAN193 Kyere M' kwan, Nyame Tumfo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Kyerɛ m'kwan, Nyame Tumfo,
Ma mundu botae n' ho;
Mutu me nan a ɔnnyɛ,
Na Wo nna wɔdze Wo yɛ
Bɔ m'akɔndɔ mbeamuduam' Na gye me pɛ fi me nsam'.

Verse 2
Kyerɛ m'kwan, 'Hoɔdzen Farbaa,
'Nnyim' a meyɛ a, ɔnnyɛ da Mbrɛ metse na dza mowɔ Nnkotum dze m'aba Wo hɔ. 'Wo nye Sahen, mo Wura 'Mi, meyɛ akowaa koraa.

Verse 3
Kyerɛ m' kwan, m' Egya Papa, Na Wo som yɛ dɛw ampa.
Sɛ mennya Wo, mennhu Wo,
Mennhyia Wo, Nyame Dɔfo, Ao, nkyɛ matɔ dɔnsuar koraa Emi a me gyedzi suar.

Verse 4
Kyerɛ m' kwan, Wiadze Kandzea,
Ma muntum ntutu ntaataa
Dɛ morobɔhom Wo nkyɛn; Mirigya W' hɔ mayɛ dɛn? Sor o, ase o, 'bi nnka W' ho 'N-tsi migyaa moho ma W'.

title: Ewuradze, Wo Dzinm' Na Misim
raw_title: CAN194 Ewuradze, Wo Dzinm' Na Misim
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ewuradze, Wo dzinm' na misim',
Mikedzi me daa daa dwuma, Wo nko na mesua dɛ m'bɔhwɛ W' Wɔ dza modwen, meka, meyɛm'.

Verse 2
Edwuma a Wo nyansaa akyerɛ n'
Ao, ma mempra mo mu nyina nyɛ, Munhu Wo mo ndwuma nyinam', Na menyɛ Wo pɛ a ɔsɛ n'.

Verse 3
Ma memfa Wo ngyina me nyimfa,
'Wo a W'enyi tua mo mu nyina,
Na mindzi dwuma a ebɛkyerɛ m', Muntu mo ndwuma nyina nhyɛ Wo nsa.

Verse 4
Ma monsoa Wo kɔndua harhar n'
Na ber biara mohweɔn, monsɔr, Na monhwɛ bɛkyebo ndzɛmba,
Nyɛ ntsɛm ndu W'enyimnyam da n' mu.

Verse 5
Biribiara a W'adom dze akyɛ m'
Ma memfa nsom Wo enyigyem', Na memfa dɛw nsi m'empire,
Memfam Wo ho nnantsew nkɔ sor.

title: MHB600 Ao, Mo Wura, Ma Menye W' nnantsew
raw_title: CAN195 MHB600 Ao, Mo Wura, Ma Menye W' nnantsew
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ao, mo Wura, ma menye W' nnantsew
Som dwumadzi mbrɛadze kwan mu;
Kyerɛ m' W'esumasɛm, boa m' ma monsɔw,
Dwumadzi ne yaw, dadwen no dur; Boa me ma memfa dɔ kasa Mpuhim akoma nyaanyaa bi:
Kyerɛ me ma mingya akobɔfo, Memfa hɔn nsi sor kwan no mu.

Verse 2
Kyerɛ m' W'abotar; ma menda ho Ntsena Wo fɛkuwbɔ dɛɛdɛwm',
Dwumadzi a ɔhyɛ gyedzi dzen,
Awerɛhyɛm' a odzi bɔn do,
Enyidar a ɔtow nserɛmɛn
Dze hyerɛn nda a ɔreba kwan mu, Asomdwee a Wo nko ara dze ma, Mo Wura, ma menye Wo nnantsew mu.
Amen.

title: Megya, Minyim Me Bra Nyina
raw_title: CAN196 Megya, Minyim Me Bra Nyina
lyrics:
Verse 1
M'egya, minyim me bra nyina Akyekyɛm' ama me,
Na nsakyer a otwar dɛ ɔba n'
Munnsuro dɛ m'bohu;
Dza meserɛ nye adwendahɔ a Ɔper sɔ W'enyi daa.

Verse 2
Meserɛ Wo adwendwen ɔdɔ a
Ɔyɛ aweɔn ho nyansa,
Dze ma ahomkafo enyigye,
Pata nyinsuwakyifo;
Ɔnye 'koma a ɔpow noho Na ɔtse ma binom so.

Verse 3
Monnhwehwɛ ɔpɛ ɔnnda hɔ komm,
Odzi akɔnaaba,
Ɔhwehwɛ akɛsedze ɔayɛ
Na oehu esumasɛm;
Mepɛ dɛ meyɛ abɔtoaba a Woara gye me taataa.

Verse 4
Wiadze mu mbrɛ m'bɛfa biara,
No mu dzibew biara,
Menye nkorɔfo edzi nkitaho a Meper ara ma oeenyin,
Na medze ahobrɛadze nye dɔ Mayɛ Mo Wura edwuma.

Verse 5
Meserɛ daadaa ahoɔdzen a
Yebisa a hɛn nsa ka n';
Ɔnye adwen a onnhwinhwin
Na ɔka Woara ho daa;
Ɔdan mbrɛ mahyɛ W' enyimnyam Mepen som biara do.

Verse 6
Som biara a Wo pɛ kyerɛ me no
Mennyɛ ho akɔmpew;
Na me kra ehu nokwar n' a
Ɔyɛ Wo mba adehye n'; Na ɔdɔ etuhoakyɛ bra Yɛ adehyedzi koraa.

title: Hom A Hom Enyi Tsim
raw_title: CAN197 Hom A Hom Enyi Tsim
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hom a hom enyi tsim
Zion kwan do, hom mbra,
Wɔmma yɛnyɛ kor nyi
Hɛn Wura No ayɛw; Wɔmma yentu ntsen Jesus mu Nkɛpem dɛ yebopue N'enyim.

Verse 2
Mber nyina yɛda ho
Tow kɔ hɛn man no ho,
Kɔ sor kokwaa no ho
Kwantunyi fonafo fie;
Sor Jerusalem fofor no Ɔdomankoma dɔ fie no.

Verse 3
Ma daa nyina yennya
Gyedzi ho asomdwee,
Dɛ woeyi hɛn efi
Bɔn, wiadze, wu, na hɛllm'; Hɛn yɛbɔkɔ hɛn Egya fie,
Hɔ yeekehyia hɛn Nua panyin n'.

Verse 4
Hɛn Nua, Agyenkwa, Tsir
Ɔyɛ hɛn adze nyin;
Hɛn a yɛka No do n'
Yebohu N'enyim ntsɛm, Ɔno nye hɛn nsɛfo esiarfo n'; Hɔ hɛn akwantu bɔbɔ adze.

title: Bethel Nyame, 'Wo a Wo nkorofo
raw_title: CAN198 Bethel Nyame, 'Wo a Wo nkorofo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Bethel Nyame, 'Wo a Wo nkorɔfo
Dan Wo na wonya dzi;
Ɔwo a igyaa tsetse mpanyin Hɔn akwantu nyinam'.

Verse 2
Yɛdze nsewdzi na mpaabɔ ba
W'adom ahengua enyim;
Hɛn egyaam Nyame, yɛserɛ Wo, yɛ Hɔn mba so hɛn Nyame.

Verse 3
Ɔbra n'akwan nyinara mu
Gye hɛn anamɔn taataa; Ma hɛn hɛn daadaa edziban Na hɛn efuradze so.

Verse 4
O trɛ W'atsaban wɔ hɛn do
Kɔ hɛn akwantu ewiei, Na hɛn akra eetum edu Hɛn Egya fie asomdweem'.

Verse 5
Dɛm n-hyira na yɛserɛ
Fi W'adom n-samu; Yɛdze Wo yɛ hɛn Nyankopɔn Na kyɛpɛn afebɔɔ. Amen.

title: Israel Akodom Sahen
raw_title: CAN199 Israel Akodom Sahen
lyrics:
Verse 1
Israel akodɔm Sahen,
Sor akwantufo hɔn kwangyafo,
Wo nwinwin ase na yɛtse,
Wo dɔ mununkum kata hɛn do; Hɛn tum, W'adom; hɛn mbra, W'asɛm; Hɛn ewiei, Ewuradze N'enyimnyam.

Verse 2
Dɛ Wo Sunsum gya hɛn yi dze,
Yɛnnkɔfom kwan wɔ sar yi do;
Yennhia dɛ daa wɔkyerɛ hɛn kwan,
Yɛnnkɔfom hɛn Nyame kwan no; Mbusu nye suro bɔkɔ ekyir, Ber a ɔdɔ kɛse bɛn hɛn.

title: Agyedzifo Hon Kwankyerefo A
raw_title: CAN200 Agyedzifo Hon Kwankyerefo A
lyrics:
Verse 1
Agyedzifo hɔn Kwankyerɛfo a lgya sor akwantufo kwan, Bra na enye hɛn so mbɛtsena,
Yɛpɛ yɛatwer Wo nkotonoo,
Dze hɛn sunsum adan Wo nko Ber a yɛnam ɔbra kwan mu.

Verse 2
Ahɔho nye amamforafo,
Wiadze ha ɔnnyɛ hɛn tsenabew;
Na yetwa mbusu bɔnsa yim',
Yɛper dɛ yebohu W'enyim,
Yɛpɛ ntsɛm yeedu hɛn kurom', Hɛn domakoma fie wɔ sor.

Verse 3
Yennyi mantsimadze wɔ ha,
Yɛhwɛ kurow a wonnhu no kwan; Yɛhom do nantsew kɔ noho,
Yereper yeedu kan mbew no do,k Jerusalem kurow krɔnkrɔn a ɔ Tsease Nyame ɔkyekyeree n'.

Verse 4
Yɛdze abotar tu empire n', Yegya fona wiadze 'i ekyir:
Fi ahoɔdzenm' kɔ ahoɔdzenm',
Hwehwɛ Jerusalem fofor n'; Hɛn mbɔdzembɔ nyina nye dɛ, Yenya Jerusalem fofor n'.

Verse 5
'Wo a asoa hɛn bɔn nyina kɔ, Na adom hɛn bɔnfakyɛ kwa,
Yɛnam Wo do kɔ hɛn sor fie,
Yɛdze adwontow yɛsan Zion; Hɛn 'nyimnyam Hen N'ahenkurow no, Yɛrotow ndwom nna ɔrebɛn hɛn.

Verse 6
Nyame dɔ ne mfar ma hɛn do
Nu hɛn ahoɔdzen mu kɔ kan
Yɛrokɔ Nyame bepɔw n' do
Yɛakɔdɔm mbakan Asɔr no, Yɛdze dɛw bɛyɛ abɔtsir
Yeekehyia hɛn Sahen wɔ sor.

title: Gya Hen, Osor Egya, Gya Hen
raw_title: CAN201 Gya Hen, Osor Egya, Gya Hen
lyrics:
Verse 1
Gya hɛn, ɔsor Egya, gya hɛn
Wɔ wiadze po pramee do,
Gya hɛn, weɔn hɛn, kora hɛn, nyɛn hɛn,
Yennyi boafo dɛ Wo nko, Naaso yɛwɔ nhyira nyinak Sɛ Nyame ne hɛn Egya a.

Verse 2
Agyenkwa, fa hɛn bɔn kyɛ hɛn;
Hɛn mberɛwyɛ nyina Ɔwo nyim;
'Wo dzii hɛn kan nantseew wiadze,l
'Wo tsee no mu yaw wenwen; Eyɛɛ ankonam, dze berɛ, Na fona kyiin sar no do.

Verse 3
Hɛn Nyame Sunsum a 'risian,
Fa sor dɛw hyɛ 'koma ma,
Na yɛmfa ɔdɔ mbɔ dɔ mu,
Wɔ enyigye a ɔnnsɛɛ dam', Edom, dze kyɛ, weɔn hɛn yi dze, Hwere rennsɛɛ hɛn asomdwee.

title: Gya M', Kan Doyefo Wo Sum A Etwa
raw_title: CAN202 Gya M', Kan Doyefo Wo Sum A Etwa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ehyia Yim
Gya m', Kan dɔyɛfo wɔ sum a etwa ehyia yim' Gya m' ara kɔ!
'Nago n' yɛ sum, menye fie ntam' so war; Gya m' ara kɔ!
Weɔn m'anamɔn, mimmbisa dɛ munhu
Mbrɛ kan hɔ tse, namɔn kor ara ma m'.

Verse 2
Nkyɛ menntse dɛm, monnsɔɔr pɛn dɛ Woara Gya m' ara kɔ.
Nkyɛ mefa mo kwan, na muhum', afei Woara gya m' ara kɔ!
Modɔɔ apɔmpɔmpɛ, na musuro mpo a,
Ntsɛn hyɛɛ me ma, mma nnkaa mfe a-etwam' kɔ.

Verse 3
Wo tum ehyira me dze, ɔbɛda ho
Egya m' akɔ
Atra sar, abo na nsu, 'kɛpem dɛ
Sum yi bɛpa;
Na adze kye a, adɔfo a mayew hɔn n'
M'bohu hɔn bio dɛ wɔreserew kyerɛ m'.

title: Gya M', O Gya m', Jehovah Tumfo
raw_title: CAN203 Gya M', O Gya m', Jehovah Tumfo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Gya m', O gya m', Jehovah tumfo,
Kwantunyi a menam sar do;
Meyɛ mberɛw, 'wo yɛ hoɔdzenfo; Fa Wo tum nsa n' suo mo mu; Sor edziban!
Nyɛn me ndɛ na mber nyina.

Verse 2
Bue nsunyiwa hyɛnhyɛnn n' sesei,
Mbrɛ yarsa nsu fi pem no; Ma ogya na mununkum fadum Ngya m' m'akwantu nyina mu: Gyefo tumfo!
Yɛ mo mboa na me kyɛm daa.

Verse 3
Na mudu Jordan nkɔnkɔnoa a,
Bɔ mo suro ham ma ɔnhera; Wu no kumfo, hɛll ne sɛɛfo, Fa me kodu Canaan sɔnn.
Ayɛyindwom
Na medze m'bɛma Wo daa.

title: O Adom Hen, Fi Sor Ahengua N' do
raw_title: CAN204 O Adom Hen, Fi Sor Ahengua N' do
lyrics:
Verse 1
O adom Hen, fi sor ahengua n' do Fa dɔ hwɛ na tsie hɛn mbɔbɔr su.

Verse 2
Hwɛfo pa a edze bɔgya tɔɔ Wo nguan, Kora Wo nguankuw a wɔnnkyɛr kwan fom.

Verse 3
O Pomfo pa, Wo wu mu na agye hɛn:
Ma abɔn awerɛhofo daa nkwa.

Verse 4
Sor Edziban, yɛdze Wo nyɛn hɛnho:
Pin bɔboa hɛn akra hɛn hia ber mu.

Verse 5
Apatasu, ndzebɔnyɛfo Dɔfo, Edɛw na siar nsunyiwa a ɔnnsa da.

Verse 6
Ao, fa sor adom kyekye hɛn werɛ; Yi W'enyim fɛɛfɛw n' enyimnyam kyerɛ.

Verse 7
Adzekyeem' mununkum, adzesaam' ogya, Bɛn hɛn na dan hɛn sum ma ɔnyɛ kan.

Verse 8
Nye hɛn nnantsew, nye hɛn kwan daa daa, Hɛn nkwam' na wum' Werɛkyekyer, Tum, Gyafo.

Verse 9
Fa Wo dɔ enyi n' gya hɛn kwan daa daa,
Na fa hɛn du hɛn sor fi nom' sɔkyee. Amen

title: Dzebonyenyi Kobesae A Mahaw
raw_title: CAN205 Dzebonyenyi Kobesae A Mahaw
lyrics:
Verse 1
Dzebɔnyɛnyi kɔbesae a mahaw, Ɔdomankoma, mma nnto me seraha. Ɔbra n'ehum rutu, kwanm' ayɛ kɔnn, Ɔkra no Kwangyafo, gya m' kodu sɔnn.

Verse 2
Gya m' kodu fie, me kra no korabew, Mbrɛ ankonam bɔbɔfo biara nnyew.
Me bra n'ewiei to m' a, Onyankopɔn, Samanadze Kanea, gya m' kodu sɔnn.

Verse 3
'Wo a kitsa samanadze saafee
Akra a woenya Wo no wɔnnhwehwɛ hwee; 'Wo yɛ Nokwar, Ɔkwan, N-kwa ma abɔn; Annkɔa -wɔnnkɔ Christ e, gya m' kodu sɔnn.

Verse 4
Sum mu etumfo pii risi me mpa,
Woetwa ayer m'; minnya beebi memfa; Naaso ber a medan Wo Nyame dɔ n', M'adɔntsenhen tumfo! gya m' kodu sɔnn.

Verse 5
Medan Wo gya a, mabra; adze ehu m'; Motwer Wo a, mewie, owu nnkotum me; M'adagyaw mu, boa me menyɛ tartweɔn: Ankor-n'apem-Nyame, gya m' kodu sɔnn,

Verse 6
Sɛ 'Wo Christ gya m' a, mowɔ asomdwee;
Me hia mu W'asɛm yɛ m' edzi-amee;
Migyaa moho ma Wo Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn, Dɛ ekyim o, ntsɛm o, gya m' kodu sɔnn.

title: Ebufuw Da! Ao, Nyinsuwa Da
raw_title: CAN206 Ebufuw Da! Ao, Nyinsuwa Da
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ebufuw da! Ao, Nyinsuwa da! Dza nkɔnhyɛfo kae n' abam', Sor nye asaase rotɔ nso.

Verse 2
Akomatu a ogura nyimpa,
Ber a Tsɛmbuafo n' fi sor besian, Ɔno a ɔka a, obi nnka bi.

Verse 3
Totorobɛnto ndze huhu,
Ɔgyegye ndakamaa nyinam' Rotwe dɔm nyina kɔ asɛndzii.

Verse 4
Wɔatsea Wu, wiadze rowosow, Abɔdze nyina rinyanyan, Eyi ano akyerɛ Tsɛmbuafo n'.

Verse 5
Hwɛ, bukuu no mu nsɛm si pi, Wɔ dza wɔakyerɛw n' mu nyina ho, Ɔno na wɔdze bobu atsɛn.

Verse 6
Sɛ Tsɛmbuafo n' tsena N'eguam' Na esumasɛm biara da edzi a, Obiara nnkɛfa noho gyan.

Verse 7
Emidze m'beyi m'ano dɛn?
Woana no obotwitwa agye m' Ber a anokwafo mpo hia adom?

Verse 8
Hen a W'ahentum krɔn mbordo, Ɔwo a ebɔ werdam ma hɛn, Tsema Wura, pinkyɛn hɛn ɛ.

Verse 9
Hwɛ Jesus pa, mo nkwangye ntsi Na ebɛbraa adasa mu; Mma nnto me seraha mma bɔn.

Verse 10
Eku Woho ara ahwehwɛ m',
Atɔ m' wɔ fona mbeamudua n' do; Aso dɛm adom yi nyɛ gyan?

Verse 11
Ɔtsɛmbuafo tseneenyi,
Dom hɛn brafi ho bɔnfakyɛ, Ansaana werdzi da n' aso.

Verse 12
1Midzi fɔ; medze nyinsuwa gye
M'enyimguasebra nyina tom'; Nyame, meserɛ W', fa mo ho kyɛ m'.

Verse 13
Egyee ɔbaa dzebɔnyɛnyi n', Edze wifo n' no bɔn kyɛɛ no, Mo so ama menya enyidar.

Verse 14
Me mpaabɔ na mo mbɔɔ nnsɛ hwee,
Naaso, Nyame, kyerɛ W'adom
Na gye m' fi onnyiewiei gya n' mu.

Verse 15
Ao, fa me ka Wo nguantsen n' ho, Mma mmpem m' adze nnka mberɛkyi n' ho,
Mbom ma m' do si W'abanyimfa.

Verse 16
Mifi m'akoma mu bu ntwɛr, Hwɛ, mo nnuho ayɛ dɛ nso; Sɛ m'ewiei to m' a, ɔno boa m'.

Verse 17
Mewu o! Su na ewuotwa da n' a! Nyimpa fi huntumam' reba n' a, Onsiesie noho mma atsɛmbu.

Verse 18
Ao, Nyame, hu n' mbɔbɔr na gyaa n',
Tse ma hɔn a Jesus ehyira, Dom hɛn W'ahomgye a onnyiewiei.
Amen.

title: Ewuradze, Onnye 'Mi M'asem
raw_title: CAN207 Ewuradze, Onnye 'Mi M'asem
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ewuradze, ɔnnyɛ 'mi m'asɛm
Muwu anaa metse ase o;
M'afamudze nye m'bɔdɔ W', masom W' Yi gyedɛ W'adom ma.

Verse 2
Sɛ nkwa war a, m' enyi bɛgye
Ama maasom Wo akyɛr,
Tsia so a, bɛn ntsi na m'bedzi mbɔɔ Dɛ m'botu akɔ onnyiewieim'?

Verse 3
Christ ɔmmfa m' ndua mbrɛ hɔ yɛ sum
Sen mbrɛ Noara koduae n'; Nyia ɔba Nyame ahenman mu n' Gyedɛ ɔfa abow yim'.

Verse 4
Bra, Mo Wura, sɛ adom ma mesɛ
Dɛ muhu W'enyim a; Na W'asaase edwuma yɛ dɛw a, W'enyimnyam bɛyɛ dɛ dɛn?

Verse 5
Na m'botwa mo suhuhun do,
Na fona na bɔn ndafua, Makɔdɔm esiarfo a wɔtow Jehovah N'ayɛyi.

Verse 6
Me nyimdzee wɔ hɔ bra n' ho suar,
Gyedzi enyi yɛ kusuww;
Na ɔdɔɔ so dɛ Christ nyim Ne nyina, Na menya N' bɛkɛtsena.

title: Man Bi Wo Ho A Dew Mapa Wom'
raw_title: CAN208 Man Bi Wo Ho A Dew Mapa Wom'
lyrics:
Verse 1
Man bi wɔ hɔ a dɛw mapa wɔm',
Ahotsewfo dzim' hen; Adzekyee nko, adze nnsa da, Hɔ enyigye tu yaw.

Verse 2
Hɔ na nhaban wuna dabaa.
Na hɔ nhiren nnyam da; Wu tse dɛ po tseabaa a, otwa Sorman na hɛndze yi ntamu.

Verse 3
Nhaban huanhuam wɔ esuegya hɔ
Woewuna dukuduku;
Dɛm na Jewfo hun Canaan ma n' Dɛ Jordan pem twa ntamu.

Verse 4
Na adasa suro bɔ piriw dɛ
Wobotwa po tseabaa n', Wɔbɔ ngyangyan wɔ esukɔn do, Wosuro dɛ wobepia.

Verse 5
Ao, nkyɛ yeeyi ekyingye akwa,
Na adwen kusukusu n', Na yɛdze enyi a do tsew eehu Canaan a yɛdɔ no.

Verse 6
Nkyɛ yaafow mbrɛ Moses kegyinae n',
Na yaankwɛ noho mbew n', Jordan esu anaa owu nwin, Runntu hɛn bo wɔ hɔ.

title: Jerusalem, M'ahomka Fie
raw_title: CAN209 Jerusalem, M'ahomka Fie
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jerusalem, m'ahomka fie,
Dzin a ɔsom me bo, M'edwuma bɔbɔ adze dabɛn Wɔ wo siar asomdweem'?

Verse 2
Dabɛn na m'enyiwa bohu W'afasu nye mbotsen? N-kwagye ahyɛ w'aban dzen, W'abrɔn mu hyerɛn sika.

Verse 3
Ehɔ nhyiren n' kyɛn Eden turem'; Na bɔn nye yaw nnyi hɔ: Menam abo nye ehum do
Per kɔ siar bea yi do.

Verse 4
Ebɛn ntsi na m'bosuro mbusu, Anaa wu mbɔ me hu? M'enyi da Canaan man pa n' do, Mbew a adze nnsa do da.

Verse 5
Asomafo, atɔfo, nkɔnhyɛfo,
Abɔ Agyenkwa ho aprɔw;
Na ɔnnkɛkyɛr so na m'adɔfo Akɔdɔm 'nyimnyam kuw n'.

Verse 6
Jerusalem, mahomka fie, Me kra per hwehwɛ wo! Da n' na m'dwuma bɔbɔ adze, Da n' na m'bohu wo dɛw.

title: Hen Nkwaber Ye Tsia Wo Ha
raw_title: CAN210 Hen Nkwaber Ye Tsia Wo Ha
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hɛn nkwaber yɛ tsia wɔ ha
Yaw tsia, adwendwen tsia
Nkwa a ɔmmbɔ adze da,
Nyinsu nnyim' wɔ noho,
Ao, ndzinoa a ɔyɛ dɛw
Fona tsia, ahomgye daa; Adasa ndzebɔnyɛ Nye esiarfo bɛtsena.

Verse 2
Akobɔfo abɔbɔfo a, Yebenya fi wɔ sor! Nsaamaa a yɛrohwehwɛ kobew Wɔ nworaba n'ekyir!
Ndɛ dze yɛwɔ akono,
'Kyena na yɛso ahenkyɛw A, odzi mu afebɔɔ Na ne fɛw mmpa ara da.

Verse 3
Sesei dze yɛroweɔn, yɛreper,
Yɛtse enyidadom',
Zion wɔ dɛ n'ahoguam'
Ɔnye Babylon si;
Na nyia sesei yɛtwer No n'
Ndaamba yebohu N' kann,
Hɔn a wonyim N' na Wohu N' Benya N' ayɛ hɔndze.

Verse 4
Ao, enyigye na siar man, Nyame Ne mpamufo fie!
Ao, enyigye na siar man, Akoma kɔn dɔ W', hwɛ W' kwan!
Jesu, mbɔbɔrhum' ara
Fa hɛn kɔ ahomgye bea n', Ɔwo a 'nye Nyame Egya Na Sunsum n' woehyira hom.

Verse 5
Jerusalem sika kurow,
Numfonsu na wo ma
Wo ho adwendwen no ma
Akoma na ndze bɔm
Minnyim ara, ao, minyim
Dɛw a ɔrotweɔn hɛn hɔ, Enyimnyam a ɔhyerɛn Nhyira a ɔnntɔ ka.

Verse 6
Zion asa n' nyina mu
'Nyigye ndwom ahyɛ n' ma,
Abɔfo hyirenn na atɔfo
Ahyɛ mpemdo wɔ hɔ,
Ɔhenba n' tse hɔn finimfin
Adzekyee kan n' tsew wann;
Na esiarfo edzidzibea n' Ayɛ nomanoma fɛɛfɛw.

Verse 7
David n'ahenguan n' si hɔ;
Hɔ na konyimdzifo a
Woefi dadwen nsa bɔ se,
Na apontofo tow ndwom
Hɔn a wɔnye hɔn Sahen
Ako edzi konyim n' Mbersantsen mfesantsen nyina Woewuna hɔn ntar fitaa.

Verse 8
Nyimpa, per nya enyimnyam n'; Ku wo ntsin nya kan no;
Ma enyidar ndzi kan nkosuom'
Kyerɛ ɔyew W'enyi do,
Dzi dɛw, ao, dɛtse na nso,
Nyame bɛyɛ wodze;
Nedze nye w', No nko Nedze Na 'bɛyɛ afebɔɔ.

title: Hon A Wo Ntwamutam Suma Hon N'
raw_title: CAN211 Hon A Wo Ntwamutam Suma Hon N'
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hɔn a wu ntwamutam suma hɔn n',
Hɛn 'gyafo a nkyɛ wɔka hɛn ho n', Woedu sor adzekyee mu ntsi Yɛda W' ase.

Verse 2
Hɔn nkwa no yɛ n-kwa ampa, Woedu empiresi n'ewiei,
Afei wohu W'enyim petee:
Hwee nnsiw hɔn kwan.

Verse 3
Dɛ mbrɛ yehun hɔn wɔ fonam' Na ahohia mu n', wɔnntse dɛm bio: Hɔn enyi hu adze kann: Wo dzin Wɔ hɔn pɔw do.

Verse 4
Kɔdaann-da efi hɔn do koraa,
Na woehu W'apɛdze nyina; Wɔdze dɛw a yennyim wɔ ha Som Wo daa daa.

Verse 5
O nkwa a ɔahyɛ hɔn amaama a!
Sor mframa a wɔgye n' yɛ dɛw; Enyigye n' bor hɛn adwen do; Onnyi kabea.

Verse 6
Edwuma so a seesei wɔyɛ n',
Dza ɔsɛ nyimdzee a oedzi mu a, Na dza ema wɔyɛ ma hɛn Yenntum yennhu.

Verse 7
Wonnkyi nyinsuwa hɔ ara bio, Dɔ nko na wɔdze edzi ehyia; Sor hɔ dwuma, nkamfo, ahomgye Nyina yɛ kor.

title: Ewuradze A Meda Ho Twer Wo
raw_title: CAN212 Ewuradze A Meda Ho Twer Wo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ewuradze a meda ho twer Wo,
'Besie m' nokwarm' akɔ ewiei;
Wo nokwar, Wo dɔ, nye Wo tum
Bɛgye m' akɔ me mber ewiei;
Sɛ moto honam yi ase a
'Dze kyɛw a ɔnnsɛɛ botua m' kaw.

Verse 2
Jesus, Wo dzin kɛse no mu
Na mirikedzi owu do nym;
Migya dɛtse durdur yi hɔ
Na abɔfo soa m' atsaban do a,
Me kra botwa owu-mprɛnu mpo a, Na oedzi hen daa daa wɔ wim'.

Verse 3
Enyi nnhunii, aso nn-tsee
Dza Christ ahyehyɛ ama Ne mba a
Wɔnam Gyefo n' tum mu dzi nyim;
Wɔkɔ emudzi n'etsiwa mu
Wɔdze hɔn nan tsia owu do, Wowu ahomkam' hyia hɔn Wura.

Verse 4
Ana 'pɛ dɛ ehwehwɛ hu Dzin fofor a wɔdze bɛma wo?
Dzi aper wɔ wo tamfo do nyim wɔ wum'; Ɔno 'reper hwehwɛ no gyan:
Konyim nko na otum kyerɛ.
CAN 213 Yesu Mfɛfo A Wɔkɔ Yɛ Dɛn
Yesu mfɛfo a wɔkɔ yɛ dɛn? Yesuro owu dɛm dɛn? Ana nnyɛ Jesus Ne dze a ɔdze Frɛ hɔn kɔ Ne nkyɛn bi a?

Verse 2
Ohyira No nkorɔfo nyina hɔn nda Ɔdwedwe adaa nyina:
Henfa na mfɛwba no bɔhom?
Hɔn Tsir no Ne nkyɛn a?

Verse 3
Hɔ na ofi soɛree foow sor, Na ɔkyerɛɛ hɛn kwan: Ɔsoɛrda kɛse n' hɛn honam Botu akɔ Ewuradze nkyɛn.

Verse 4
Soso a, abɛn kɛse n' ɔmbɔm',
Na hɛn nkorɔfo nsoɛr;
Hom a hom gu daadzetsirm', hom nyan; 'Hotsewfo, hom mfow sor.

title: Yesu Mfefo A Woko Ye Den
raw_title: CAN213 Yesu Mfefo A Woko Ye Den
lyrics:
Verse 1
Yesu mfɛfo a wɔkɔ yɛ dɛn? Yesuro owu dɛm dɛn? Ana nnyɛ Jesus Ne dze a ɔdze Frɛ hɔn kɔ Ne nkyɛn bi a?

Verse 2
Ohyira No nkorɔfo nyina hɔn nda Ɔdwedwe adaa nyina:
Henfa na mfɛwba no bɔhom?
Hɔn Tsir no Ne nkyɛn a?

Verse 3
Hɔ na ofi soɛree foow sor, Na ɔkyerɛɛ hɛn kwan: Ɔsoɛrda kɛse n' hɛn honam Botu akɔ Ewuradze nkyɛn.

Verse 4
Soso a, abɛn kɛse n' ɔmbɔm',
Na hɛn nkorɔfo nsoɛr;
Hom a hom gu daadzetsirm', hom nyan; 'Hotsewfo, hom mfow sor.

title: Man Bi Wo Ho A Ohyeren Sen Wi Mpo
raw_title: CAN214 Man Bi Wo Ho A Ohyeren Sen Wi Mpo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Man bi wɔ hɔ a ɔhyerɛn sen wi mpo,
Na yɛdze gyedzi hu n' wɔ ekyir; Na Egya n' rotweɔn wɔ kwan no do, Oesiesie kobew ama hɛn hɔ.
Chorus
Da bi da . . . dɛɛdɛw n' mu
Yebehyia wɔ mpoano fɛɛfɛw n' do.
Da bi da . . . dɛɛdɛw n' mu, Yebehyia wɔ mpoano fɛɛfɛw n' do.

Verse 2
Yɛbɔtow wɔ mpoano fɛɛfɛw n' do
Esiarfo hɔn ndwom a ɔyɛ dɛw n';
Hɛn sunsum nnkedzi yaw ara pɛn, Apempen nnkɔfora hɛn ahomgye.
Chorus
Da bi da . . . dɛɛdɛw n' mu
Yebehyia wɔ mpoano fɛɛfɛw n' do.
Da bi da . . . dɛɛdɛw n' mu, Yebehyia wɔ mpoano fɛɛfɛw n' do.

Verse 3
Hɛn Egya dɔyɛfo a ɔwɔ sor hɔ,
Yɛdze hɛn ayɛyi bɛkɛma N' Wɔ no dɔ ayamuyie no ne ntsi, Wɔ nhyira a ɔdze adom hɛn ha.
Chorus
Da bi da . . . dɛɛdɛw n' mu
Yebehyia wɔ mpoano fɛɛfɛw n' do.
Da bi da . . . dɛɛdɛw n' mu,
Yebehyia wɔ mpoano fɛɛfɛw n' do.

title: Ao, Dwen Ofi A Owo Ho Ho
raw_title: CAN215 Ao, Dwen Ofi A Owo Ho Ho
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ao, dwen ofi a ɔwɔ hɔ ho,
Osi baka fɛɛfɛw n' ho hɔ,
Mbrɛ apapafo a wonnkowu pɛn Woewuna hɔn ntar efufuw . . . .
Chorus
Ɔwɔ hɔ!. . . . Ɔwɔ hɔ! . . .

Verse 2
Ao, dwen w'afɛ a wɔwɔ hɔ ho,
Hɔn a woedzi kan ewie akwantu n', Dwen ndwom a wɔrotow n' hɔ no ho, Wɔ Nyame ahemfi no mu hɔ . . .
Chorus
Ɔwɔ hɔ!. . . . Ɔwɔ hɔ! . . .

Verse 3
M'Agyenkwa no so ɔwɔ hɔ, Hɔ na m'asɛfo akɔhom, Da bi mo so m'befi yaw nsa Makɔ ahomka man no mu . . .
Chorus
Ɔwɔ hɔ!. . . . Ɔwɔ hɔ! . . .

Verse 4
Aka kumaa ma meedu fie hɔ,
M'enyi tua m'akwantu n'ewiei, M'adɔfo dodowara wɔ hɔ a Hɔn enyiwa tua mo so kwan. . . .
Chorus
Ɔwɔ hɔ!. . . . Ɔwɔ hɔ! . . .

title: Ana Yebehyia Baka N' Ho
raw_title: CAN216 Ana Yebehyia Baka N' Ho
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ana yebehyia baka n' ho,
Mbrɛ ahohyerɛnfo edua n', Dza no nsu gyenen-gyenen pem Daa wɔ Nyame N'egua nkyɛn n'?
Chorus
Nyew, yebehyia baka no ho,
Baka fɛɛfɛw, baka fɛɛfɛw no ho; Yɛnye esiarfo n' behyia baka no ho; Ofi Nyame N'eguam' pem n'.

Verse 2
Baka fɛɛfɛw n' nkɔnkɔnoa hɔ,
Yeboguar ne mpetsema n',
Yɛpasar na yeeyi ayɛw,
Ahomka da fɛɛfɛw n' nyina,

Verse 3
Yerubodu baka fɛɛfɛw n' ho a,
Yɛbɔto adzesoa nyina fam'; Adom bɛgye hɛn kra efim', Na ɔama ntar nye ahenkyɛw.

Verse 4
Baka fɛɛfɛw no hyerɛn a,
Hɛn Agyenkwa N'enyim no a, Esiarfo a wonnwu da no Wotu nkwagye ndwom wɔtow.

Verse 5
'Ka kumaa ma yeedu baka n' ho, Ma yeewie hɛn akwantu, Ma yaakɛtse asomdwee ndwom a, Onunu akoma nyina.
Chorus
Nyew, yebehyia baka no ho,
Baka fɛɛfɛw, baka fɛɛfɛw no ho; Yɛnye esiarfo n' behyia baka no ho; Ofi Nyame N'eguam' pem n'.

title: Oman Bi Wo Ho, No Mu Hyeren
raw_title: CAN217 Oman Bi Wo Ho, No Mu Hyeren
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔman bi wɔ hɔ, no mu hyerɛn, No wim' tsew wann daa nyina Hɔ sum nn-gye dabiara pɛn:
Agyenkwa hyerɛn hɔ daa.
Chorus
Sɛ yɛsoa. . . mbeamudua n' a. . .
Nna ahenkyɛw n'. . . so yɛbɔsoa,. . .
Na yɛnye . . . ahoɔfɛfo astena, . . .
Wɔ ahomka no mu da nyina.

Verse 2
Beebi wɔ hɔ, asomdwee bea
Ɔbra po yi n' ekyir, Hɔ ehum nn-kotu hɛn da:
Sie w'adze nyina wɔ hɔ.

Verse 3
Ofi bi wɔ hɔ, enyimnyam fi,
Sor ahemfi papa;
Na hɔn a yɛdɔ hɔn wɔ ha 'i Bɛyɛ etuu wɔ hɔ.

Verse 4
Hɛn kɔn dɔ dɛ yegya bea yi a Orutwam' hwew hwew yi; Na yɛkɔfora dɔmtutuw n' a Hɔn dɛw ɔmmbɔ adze da n'.
Chorus
Sɛ yɛsoa. . . mbeamudua n' a. . .
Nna ahenkyɛw n'. . . so yɛbɔsoa,. . .
Na yɛnye . . . ahoɔfɛfo astena, . . .
Wɔ ahomka no mu da nyina.

title: N-de Ye Ekan Da
raw_title: CAN218 N-de Ye Ekan Da

title: Yedze Adwontow Hyee Ase Nde
raw_title: CAN219 Yedze Adwontow Hyee Ase Nde
lyrics:
Verse 1
Yɛdze adwontow hyɛɛ ase ndɛ,
Wɔ mbɔbɔr ahengua n' enyim; Ansaana 'nafua sum bɛba n', Yɛtow ewimbir ndaase ndwom.

Verse 2
Dza ofir nokwar akomam',
Enyidzi suro a wɔdze hwɛ W', Sua a yesua, n-tam a yɛka, Hɛn Wura Jesus, pen do gye.

Verse 3
Dza W'enyi ehwiram' ehu
Dɛ ogu hɛn afɔr ho fi n', Yɛakotow komm wɔ W'enyim yi, Hɛn Wura Jesus, fa kyɛ hɛn.

Verse 4
Kyerɛ hɛn ma yɛngye akra nkwa,
Na yɛnkata bɔn mpempem do, Yensi Christ Ne penkyɛr kwan n' mu,
Na yensuasua N' yɛnye N' nsɛ daa. Amen.

title: Hen Wura, Da A Dze Kyee Hen N' Asa
raw_title: CAN220 Hen Wura, Da A Dze Kyee Hen N' Asa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hɛn Wura, da a 'dze kyɛɛ hɛn n' asa,
Sum etsin W'asɛm do rehyɛ;
Yɛtoow hɛn anapa ndwom maa Wo W'abɔdzin bɛtsew hen nda ho.

Verse 2
Ndaase nka W' dɛ W' Asɔr risi pi,
Ber a wiadze rokɔ kan mu; W' Asɔr roweɔn wɔ wiadze nyina, Ɔnngye n' ahom dabiara pɛn.

Verse 3
Aber a 'napawi hyerɛn ka
N-kurow a wɔda ham' na pom', Asɔryɛ ndze ɔda ho ara, Ayɛyindwom ɔmmbɔ adze da.

Verse 4
Ewia rinyan hɛn enuanom a
Wɔtse anee ber a yɛadeda; Dɔnhwer nyina ano fofor ma Wɔtse Wo nyɛe nwanwa n' wɔ sor.

Verse 5
Ɔnyɛ dɛm daa, hɛn Wura; W'ahengua
Nnkotwam' da dɛ amansuon tum; W'ahenman betsim hɔ akɛpem dɛ Ibedzi adze nyina do hen.

title: Ahomgye Wura, Tsie Hen Asor
raw_title: CAN221 Ahomgye Wura, Tsie Hen Asor
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ahomgye Wura, tsie hɛn asɔr
Wo da yi mu, wɔ Wo fie ha; Na ma ndwom a Wo nkowaa rotow Nyɛ afɔr a ɔsɔ W'enyi.

Verse 2
Yɛdɔ W'ahomgye yi wɔ ase,
Na mbom ahomgye pa n' wɔ sor;
Ɔno na hɛn kra fonafo yi N'enyi tua kwan dɛ ɔbɔkɔm'.

Verse 3
Ɔfona nnyi hɔ, yaw nnyi hɔ,
Na bɔn na mbusu nnkodu hɔ,
N-krumsi biara nnkɔfora
Hɔn a wonnwu da hɔn ndwom no.

Verse 4
Wɔnntse atamfo nka wɔ hɔ:
Dadwen biara nnkɔfona hɔn; Adze nnsa hɔ, mununkum nnsi hɔ, Na daa nyina ewigyinae a.

Verse 5
Ao, da a yɛatweɔn akyɛr, hyɛ ase
Wɔ mbusu na bɔn wiadze yim' Wo mu nhyira na asomdwee
Nyɛ hɛn kyɛpɛn nkɔ bɛkyebo n'.

title: Sor Abofo Ndze Nye Nsanku
raw_title: CAN222 Sor Abofo Ndze Nye Nsanku
lyrics:
Verse 1
Sor abɔfo ndze nye nsanku
Twa W'ahengua ho,
Wɔwosow n-dwom dɛɛdɛw a
Ɔmmbɔ adze ara da;
M-pempem na wohyira Wo Dɛ tum nyina Ewuradze.

Verse 2
Ɔwo a ewɔ sorsor noho
Mbrɛ nyimpa nntum nnhu n', Aso abɔn yɛtow ndwom a, Ɔwo 'bu no bi? Na yetum hu dɛ ebɛn hɛn Na itsie hɛn?
Nyew, yetum.

Verse 3
Nyew, yenyim dɛ idzi ehurusi
Wɔ W'edwinsa ho;
Eyɛɛ asowa na nsa na kɔmɛr
Dze maa W'ayɛyi;
Dwimfo nyansa, sanku ne dɛw, Ne nyina bɔm' ma W' Enyigye.

Verse 4
Tumfo Nyame, Woara Wodze Na yɛdze brɛ Wo,
Ɔmmfata dze, naaso yɛserɛ Dɛ gye n' dɛmara:
'Koma, adwen, nsa, na kɔmɛr, Yɛdze bɔm' wɔ Hɛn ndwom pam'.

Verse 5
Tum nye enyidzi nye enyimnyam.
Bɛyɛ Wodze daa,
Egya, Ba, na Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn, Ɔkorsa siarfo.
Dza edze ama no mu mapa n',
Na sor na ase San dze ma W'. Amen.

title: Hom Ntow Alleluia Nkyere Hom Ndaase
raw_title: CAN223 Hom Ntow Alleluia Nkyere Hom Ndaase
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hom ntow Alleluia nkyerɛ hom ndaase, Ao, ɔsor mba, hom mfa ndze dɛɛdɛw nhur Alleluia a ɔmmbɔ adze.

Verse 2
Kuro krɔnkrɔn no bɛgye hom ndwom no do, Na wɔdze ehurusi ndwom enyan Alleluia a ɔmmbɔ adze.

Verse 3
Hɔ na hom bɔbɔm' atow afebɔɔ, Ndwom a ɔkyerɛ hom Hen N'enyimnyam, Alleluia a ɔmmbɔ adze.

Verse 4
Iyi nye afonafo hɔn ahomgye, Edziban na nsu a obi nnkehia, Alleluia a ɔmmbɔ adze.

Verse 5
Bɔadze a eyɛ adze nyina Yɛfo, Yɛdze ndwom bɔ de yi W' ayɛ afebɔɔ Alleluia a ɔmmbɔ adze.
Verse
Ɔdomankoma Ba, yɛma hɛn ndze do ma W'; Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn, hɛn nyina bɔm' tow Wo Alleluia a ɔmmbɔ adze.

title: Hen Nyame Ye Kese
raw_title: CAN224 Hen Nyame Ye Kese
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hɛn Nyame yɛ Kɛse,
N'ayɛyi nyɛ kɛse;
Ɔyɛ N'asɔrasɔr Ne fie, N' egua a N'enyi gye mu.

Verse 2
N'adom Asɔrfi horow, Mbrɛ wodua yɛ fɛw a! Hɛn asaase do enyidzi, Hɛn man twitwagyefo.

Verse 3
Zion na wonyim dɛ
Nyame yɛ guansumabew; Mbrɛ No nkwagye esi ahyerɛn Wɔ n'ahemfie nyina a.

Verse 4
Ɔhaw fofor biaram'!
Yɛbɛkɛhyɛ Ne fie;
Yɛbɔdwen N'adom nwanwa n' ho, Na hɔ yɛanhwehwɛ ɔgye.

title: Nyame, Yedo Wo Fie
raw_title: CAN225 Nyame, Yedo Wo Fie
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyame, Yɛdɔ Wo Fie,
Mbrɛ W'enyidzi wɔ no;
Wo tsenabea no mu dɛw Kyɛn wiadze dɛw nyina.

Verse 2
Ɔyɛ m-paabɔ fie,
Mbrɛ Wo nkowaa dzi ehyia; Na 'Wo, Ewuradze, Eba behyira Wo mba.

Verse 3
Yɛdɔ n-kwasɛm no;
Ɔma hɛn asomdwee, Nye dzenhyɛ wɔ ko mu, Nye dɛw a ɔmmbɔ adze.

Verse 4
Yɛdɔ dɛ yɛtow ndwom
Kamfo Wo mbɔbɔrhu; Na mbom yɛpɛ yeesua Ɔsor konyimdzi ndwom.

Verse 5
Hɛn Wura Jesus, dom hɛn
Ma yɛndɔ Wo mbordo, Na ndaamba yeebohu Na yaasom Wo sor hɔ. Amen.

title: Sor Wiadze Horow Nyame
raw_title: CAN226 Sor Wiadze Horow Nyame
lyrics:
Verse 1
Sor wiadze horow Nyame,
Mbrɛ Wo dɔ tsenabea
Na ase ha asɔrfi
Dua yɛ fɛw yɛ ahomka a!
M'akoma per
Ba Wo tsebea Ama oeehu Me Nyankopɔn.

Verse 2
Ao, akra esiarfo na
Wɔsɔr bea a Nyame tsie, Ao, esiarfo nye hɔn A wɔsom wɔ hɔ daa!
Wɔtonton Wo,
Wɔyɛ esiarfo
Hɔn a wɔfow Zion kokwaa n'!

Verse 3
Wofi ahomm' kɔ ahom mu,
Wɔ nyinsu bɔnsa yim',
Kɛpem dɛ obiara dzi nyim, Kɛpem dɛ obiara pue sor, 'Nyimnyam egua! Hɛn Hen Nyame Dze hɛn pɛ anan Dze bodu hɔ.

Verse 4
Nyame nye hɛn 'kokyɛm, Hɛn kan na akoban;
Ne nsamu akyɛdze ma,
