Yenya hɛn nhyira fir mu
Ɔbɔdom hɛn
Nkorɔfo nyina Nkwagye adom, Nye enyimnyam so.

Verse 5
Nyame dɔ No nkorɔfo,
Hɔn a wɔsɔ N'enyi n'
Akra krɔnkrɔn botoo n', Ɔnnkan hɔn Ne ndzepa:
Nyia ne kra twer
Dɔm Ewuradze
Wo nkotoo n', yɛ Siarfo mprɛnsa.

title: Wo Sor Abangua Ye Few
raw_title: CAN227 Wo Sor Abangua Ye Few
lyrics:
Verse 1
Wo sor abangua yɛ fɛw,
Wɔ kan na dɔ man no mu;
Ha so W'abangua yɛ fɛw,
Wɔ bɔn na mbusu man yim'
Ao, mo sunsum no kɔn dɔ
W'asɔrmba hɔn fɛkuwbɔ, W'enyim ne hyerɛn fɛɛfɛw n', W'amayɛ n', Adom Nyame!

Verse 2
Abɔso Nyame, nnoma a Wosu kyin Wo fie, woewie! Na akra a wɔhom sor Egya No bom' no, woewie dodow!
Wɔtse dɛ ebubur n' a
Oennya 'saase do sibea n', Wɔsan kɔ hɔn hɛn no mu, Hɔ na hɔn enyi gye daa.

Verse 3
Woewie ampa! hɔn ayɛyi
Pem mbusu bɔnsa 'i mu mpo; N-su pue sar do ma hɔn, Edziban fi sor nyɛn hɔn.
Wofi ahom mu kɔ ahom mu,
Dze kodu W'ahengua n' ho; W'anan ho na wobom som, 'Wo a agye hɔn ne nyinam'.

Verse 4
Mo Wura, ma muntu ehu dɛm:
Gya m' twa bɔn wiadze yi mu; Fa W'adom no suo mo mu, Ma minnya kwan wɔ Wo nkyɛn.
M'ewia nye me kyɛm nye 'Wo;
Gya mo mfom 'koma 'i, weɔn no; Adom nye enyimnyam fir Wo; O mo Wura, hue gu mo do. Amen.

title: M'akoma Dzii Ehurusi
raw_title: CAN228 M'akoma Dzii Ehurusi
lyrics:
Verse 1
M'akoma dzii ehurusi
Dɛ me mfɛfo see dɛ,
Bra ma yɛnkɔ Nyame Ne fie; Afahyɛ da nye ndɛ.

Verse 2
Hɛn anan bɛyɛ ntsɛm
Ahɛn asɔrdan nom' Ber a mobra na mpanyin pii Rehyɛ som-bea no ma.

Verse 3
Ebusua wɔtɔ dɛ
Wɔbɔ punkum ba ha;
Ehumbɔbɔr egua n'enyim Wɔdze dɛw kotow hɔ.

Verse 4
Sɔr ma Jerusalem,
Nyankopɔm ahenkurow n'; Nyame ntɔ Ne nhyira ngu hɔn a Wɔdɔ Ne fie papa.

Verse 5
Ha 'i dze wɔmma koryɛ
Na asomdwee ntsintsim daa;
Zion, ahonya pii nhyehyɛ W'ahemfi amaama.

Verse 6
Hɛn afɛ nye enuanom
Nnkɛpa hɛn mpaayim' da;
Wohyiam' asɔryɛm' ara pem a
Nyame mma N'asomdwee! Amen.

title: Jesus, Fa Wusoer Tum N'
raw_title: CAN229 Jesus, Fa Wusoer Tum N'
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jesus, fa wusoɛr tum n'
Gyina hɛn finimfin; Ma hɛn asɔryɛ yi Ɔnyɛ mber krɔnkrɔn.

Verse 2
Hue Wo Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn
Gu akoma nyina do; Tu suro na yaw fi Akra nyina mu.

Verse 3
Na yebemia mu dzen
Yeetu hɛn kwan yi,
Dɛ hɛn enyiwa da Bɛkyebo da n' kwan. Amen.

title: Wimbir Ansaana Wi Roto N'
raw_title: CAN230 Wimbir Ansaana Wi Roto N'
lyrics:
Verse 1
'Wimbir ansaana wi rotɔ n' Ewuradze, nna ayarfo gu W' nkyɛn;
Ao, yaw horow bɛn nna ɔannka hɔn!
Ao, dɛw bɛn nna wɔammfa annkɔ!

Verse 2
Bio, edu 'wimbir, na hɛn so Yɛdze yarba horow twe pin;
Sɛ Yennhu wo mpo a, ɔyɛ dɛn?
Yenyim na yɛtse dɛ 'wɔ ha.

Verse 3
Agyenkwa Christ, pam hɛn mbusu,
Na binom abɔm,
Na binom nndɔɔ W' nokwar mu pɛn, Binom so ayew dɔ a wonyae.

Verse 4
Binom hu dɛ wiadze yɛ gyan,
Naaso wonntum mmfi wiadze nsa; Binom hɔn mfɛfo how hɔn werɛ, Naaso wɔmmfaa Ɔwo nnyɛɛ nyɛnko.

Verse 5
Ewuradze hɔn nyina serɛ ahomgye,
Na wobefi bɔn mu koraa; Hɔn a wɔper asom Wo yie n' Nna wohu bɔn a ɔwɔ hɔn mu.

Verse 6
Agyenkwa Christ, Nyimpa nye W' so;
Wɔatseetsee Wo, wɔasɔ W' ahwɛ; Ema Wo dɔ enyi do a, ihu Epirakur a fɛr dze rusuma n'.

Verse 7
Wo nsaano wɔ tum dɛ tsetse n',
W'anomusɛm biara nnkefir gyan; Ewimbir bɔw nwinwin yim' tsie, Na W'ehumbɔbɔbɔrm' sa hɛn yar.

title: Nyame, Fa Wo Nhyira Gya Hen Kwan
raw_title: CAN231 Nyame, Fa Wo Nhyira Gya Hen Kwan
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyame, fa Wo nhyira gya hɛn kwan,
Dom hɛn dɛw na asomdwee;
Ma ankorankor yennya Wo dɔ
Mfa ndzi nkwagye adom ho dɛw; Ao, hyɛ hɛn dzen
Wɔ bra sar akwantu yim'.

Verse 2
Yɛdze ndaase na ntonton ma W' Wɔ Wo nsɛmpa dɛɛdɛw n' ho;
Nkyɛ Wo nkwangye no ho aba
Asow hɛn akoma nye bram';
Nkyɛ Woara so
"Yeehu W' hɛn nkyɛn afebɔɔ. Amen. "

title: Asor Ne Fapem Kortoo
raw_title: CAN232 Asor Ne Fapem Kortoo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Asɔr ne fapem kortoo
Nye Jesus Christ hɛn Wura; Ɔnam nsu nye N'asɛm do Yɛɛ n' N'abɔdze fofor.
Ofi sor bɔhwehɛɛ no.
Yɛɛ n' N'ayefor krɔnkrɔn. Ɔdze No bɔgyaa tɔɔ no No nkwa ntsi na owui.

Verse 2
Wɔpaam' yii n' aman nyinam', Naaso ɔyɛ Asɔr kor.
No nkwagye tum ɔnye yi-
Wura kor, gyedzi kor,
Dzin krɔnkrɔn kor na ohyira;
N'edziban krɔnkrɔn kor, Enyidar kor na ɔper ho, Adom nyina wɔ mu.

Verse 3
Sɛ mpo nyimpa si atwetwe
Hwɛ N'ahokyer kɛse,
Dɛ mpaapaam' atsetsew mu
Nkyerɛkyerɛ bɔn tseetsee N' a, Ahotsewfo n' weɔn, wosu Dɛ, ondu da bɛn ara? Anago su n' nnkyɛkyɛr na Ɔadan anapa ndwom.

Verse 4
Berɛ nye amandzehu mu, N'akodzi dede n' mu,
Ɔtweɔn daadaa asomdwee a
Ɔmmbɔ adze n' n'emudzi n',
Kɛpem dɛ n'enyi bohu
'Nyimnyam enyidado n', Na Asɔr konyimdzifo no Bɛhɛn n' ahomgye mu.

Verse 5
Na ɔwɔ wiadze yi, ɔnye
Ɔkorsa Nyame bɔm',
Na ɔnye hɔn a wɔrohom Dzi nkitaho dɛɛdɛw.
O ahotsewfo esiarfo!
Ewuradze, dom hɛn,
Dɛ abrɛfo yinom, ma
Yɛnye W' mbɛtsena sor hɔ. Amen.

title: Nyame Kuro Mbre Odua So
raw_title: CAN233 Nyame Kuro Mbre Odua So
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyame kurow mbrɛ odua so Na n' afasu war a!
'Nokwafo nye W' adehye dɔm, Wɔ mbew na mber nyinam'.

Verse 2
Asɔr krɔnkrɔn kor, nkodɔm kor,
Botae a ɔkrɔn kor,
Dwumadzi kuw kor, ndɔbaa ndwom kor, Ɔhen Otumfo kor.

Verse 3
Ofitsi nyimpa n' ahyɛse Mbrɛ W' asɛm esi edwir n'! Mbrɛ W' aman esi atserɛw Wɔ ahotɔ na dɔm' a!

Verse 4
Mbrɛ Wo gya si dzɛw anago Dze weɔn na ɔnnhwer a! W' akoban hyerɛn sunm' ara Dze kɛpem adzekyee.

Verse 5
Asorɛkye bu akɛse kwa,
Anhwea dwurudwuruw gyan; Onntum mmpuhim botantsim a Bɛkyebo kurow si do n'.

title: Woka Wo Ho Enyimnyam Nsem
raw_title: CAN234 Woka Wo Ho Enyimnyam Nsem
lyrics:
Verse 1
Wɔka wo ho enyimnyam nsɛm,
Zion, hɛn Nyame Ne man; Nyia ɔnnsan N' asɛm no kyekyeer Wo dɛ No kurow a ɔtsenam'. Tsetse Bo no nye wo fapem, Ebɛn botum awosow w'? N-kwagye yɛ wo ho afasu; Ebɛserew w' atamfo.

Verse 2
Hwɛ, n-kwa nsu a ofi Nyame
Ne daadaa dɔ mu pem no Ma wo mba wɔmee, na oyi Hia ho suro fi hɔn do. Woana na ɔbɔtɔ bitsi Wɔ dɛm esutsen yi ho?
Adom a ɔpem daa nyina Wo Nyame dze dom wo daa.

Verse 3
M' Agyenkwa, menam W' adom do
Mofora Zion mamfom' a,
Ma wiadze nsi me atwetwe,
Ɔno mpo bɛyɛ mo ntuw, Wiadze nye no mu enyigye Nye ahokyerɛ resen. Enyigye nye ahonya a otsim Zionmba nko na wonya.

title: Yeda Ho Yetse Nkam'
raw_title: CAN235 Yeda Ho Yetse Nkam'
lyrics:
Verse 1
Yɛda ho yɛtse nkwam'? Yeehu hɛn enyim bio? Christ N' adom a ɔapon hɛn ntsi Hom mma yenyi N' ayɛw.

Verse 2
Nyame tum akora hɛn
Wɔ nkwagye a odzi mum'; Yɛbɔm' bio wɔ Christ N' ayɛyim', Yedzi N' enyim ehyia.

Verse 3
Mbusu pii a yeehu a! Akodzi a yeeduam' a! Guado a ɔko a, imu a hu a, Fitsi dɛ yehyiaa nkan n'.

Verse 4
Ewuradze No dɔ
Agye hɛn ne nyinam', Na ɔda ho dze No mboa ma hɛn Na osie hɛn nkwa wɔ sor.

Verse 5
Dɛm a hom mma yentuw
No nkwagye tum no mu,
Tum a ɔgye hɛn nkwa koraa Kɛpem dɛ yeetua bɔn.

Verse 6
Hom mma yɛmfa mbeamudua n'
Na yeenya ahenkyɛw n'; Sɛ yebenya Jesus Noara a dza aka n'- yemmbu no hwee.

title: Ma Hen Honam Ndzi Mpaa
raw_title: CAN236 Ma Hen Honam Ndzi Mpaa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ma hɛn honam ndzi mpaa
Nkɔ mbew horow do mpo; Jesus N'adɔfo dze, dabaa Hɔn akoma yɛ kor.

Verse 2
Jesus na odzii kan
Dze hɛn akoma bɔɔm'; Hɛn a yɛnye N' nantsew fufuwn' Ɔma yɛka koryɛm'.

Verse 3
O wɔmma yɛnkɔ do
Wɔ Jesus N'edwumam';
Asɔr ne Tsir konyimdzifo n', Yɛnka No do ndzi nyim.

Verse 4
Christ no wenyin ture n'
Saw n'edwumafo enyim; Na hwɛ! akatua kɛse no Da sor hɔ rotweɔn hɛn.

Verse 5
O hɛn 'koma nye adwen
N-da ho ara mfow sor,
Nkɔhwɛ hɛn ahomgye bea no, Mbrɛ hɛn fona bɔ adze.

Verse 6
Hɔ dwumadzen nyina,
Nye amandzehu nye yaw Wotwa do wɔ siar mpoano hɔ; Hɔ yehyia a yɛmmpaam' bio.

Verse 7
Ahomka bea dɛɛdɛw, Hɔ na abɔfo hyia hɛn,
Hɔ yebohu hɛn enyim bio, Na yeekyiakyia hɛnho.

Verse 8
Abakamfo Asɔr,
Hɔn nhyira n' yebenya,
Na yɛdze dɛw ayɛ abɔtsir Yɛakɔ sor ahomgyem'.

title: Christ A Nhyira Nyina Fir Wo
raw_title: CAN237 Christ A Nhyira Nyina Fir Wo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Christ a nhyira nyina fir Wo,
Ema ahosewfo dzi mu,
Tsie hɛn a Wo su sɛ hɛn, Yɛyɛ Wo honam nwanwa n'.

Verse 2
Ka hɛn ho wɔ sunsum korm',
Ma yɛnda ho nya Wodze n'; Yɛba bebisa mbordo, Ɔwo a ehyɛ adze nyina ma.

Verse 3
Kenyan, nunu na gya hɛn
Kyɛn ankorankor akyɛdze,
Wɔahyehyɛ n' dɛ mbrɛ epɛ, Ma hɛn ndwuma nyina nhyɛ ma.

Verse 4
Dɛw mu ara yɛnyɛ kor Yennya tsema mma hɛnto: Na yɛmboa hɛnho nkorkor; Obiara nyɛ n'afamudze.

Verse 5
Ɔdɔ tse dɛ wu, ɔasɛɛ
Mpaapaamu na adehyesɛm nyina
Edzin, ekuw nyina gu
Christ yɛ adze nyinam' adze nyina.

title: Jesus, 'Nye W' Asor Ntsena
raw_title: CAN238 Jesus, 'Nye W' Asor Ntsena
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jesus, 'nye W' Asɔr ntsena, Yɛ n' Agyenkwa, Wura, Gyafo; Wɔrosɔ ne gyedzi ahwɛ n', Yɛserɛ Wo, tsie hɛn.

Verse 2
Tsew ne bra na nkyerɛkyerɛ ho;
Dom n' abotar ma ɔnsɔw Na ɔntwer W' anohoba n', Yɛserɛ Wo, tsie hɛn.

Verse 3
Ma ne ndze nyɛ wansa daa;
Ɔmbɔ nkaa wɔ atsɛmbu ho; Ɔnka Agyenkwa pa ho nsɛm, Yɛserɛ Wo, tsie hɛn.

Verse 4
Tsetsew ne nkyehoma mu;
Tseam ma ko na 'nyiber ngyaa; Dom no ɔsor asomdwee n', Yɛserɛ Wo, tsie hɛn.

Verse 5
Ongya ehiafo na efurafo,
Nda ho nhwehwɛ dza ayew n', Ɔnkyekyer 'koma bobɔe, Yɛserɛ Wo, tsie hɛn.

Verse 6
No nokwar kanea n' nhyerɛn; Ɔmma ne kan n' do wɔ sor Wɔ abosom-man sum mu.
Yɛserɛ Wo, tsie hɛn.

Verse 7
Ma ne nyimdzi nyɛ krɔnkrɔn; Ɔnka bɔn no dɔm nyina ngu; Ɔmboa aman nyina ngu;
Yɛserɛ Wo, tsie hɛn. Amen.

title: Guanhwefo pa, dom hen Wo mboa
raw_title: CAN239 Guanhwefo pa, dom hen Wo mboa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Guanhwɛfo pa, dom hɛn Wo mboa
Wɔ hɛn mbusu nda yim',
Tum a wɔdze weɔn, wɔdze sɔr, Fa ma Wo mba nyina.

Verse 2
Ber a yɛda ho da nsɔhwɛm',
Ber a yɛso mbeamudua 'i,
Ma yɛmfa hɛn kra nto Wo do Wɔ mpaabɔ a ɔmmbɔ adzem'.

Verse 3
Ma yendua gyedzim' hɛn nsa nka
M-paabɔ sunsum no; Yemmia ndzi ako gyedɛ yehu W' enyim nye Wo dzin pa n'.

Verse 4
Ma 'koma biara nsu nka dɛ:
Minnkegyaa Wo ma akɔ,
Gyedɛ ama m' dɔ a odzi mu, Na edze Woho akyɛ m'.

Verse 5
Minnkegyaa Wo ma akɔ gyedɛ
Ebɔ Wo dzin kyerɛ m',
Na egye me kra nkwa nwionn nwionn, Ma meyɛ dɛ Ɔwo.

Verse 6
Ekyir no ma munhu W' enyim
Wɔ kokwaa n' etsifi, Mbrɛ wɔmen gyedzi nye mpaabɔ Wɔ adzehu nye ayɛyim'. Amen.

title: Kenyan W' edwuma Yi
raw_title: CAN240 Kenyan W' edwuma Yi
lyrics:
Verse 1
Kenyan W' edwuma yi,
Ewuradze, kyerɛ Wo tum;
Bɔ Wo ndze a onyan ewufom', Na ma Wo nkorɔfo ntse.
Chorus
Kenyan W' edwuma yi, Ber a yɛkotow Wo yi,
Sian, ao Ewuradze domfo, sian!
Bra behyira hɛn sesei.

Verse 2
Kenyan W' edwuma yi, Ma akra nhwehwɛ nkwa-su n': O ma hɛn esunsum kɔn ndɔ N-kwa edziban no!

Verse 3
Kenyan W' edwuma yi,
Krɔn W' enyimnyam dzin no;
Wo sunsum mma hɛn dɔ m-fram Mma W' nye Wo mba nyina.

Verse 4
Kenyan W' edwuma yi,
Ma W' asɛm no nnya tum;
Ma wɔmfa enyikan gyedzi ntsie W' asɛmpa a nhyira wɔm' n'.

Verse 5
Kenyan W' edwuma yi,
Tɔ Pentecost bɔw no;
Na enyimnyam no bɛyɛ Wodze, Na nhyira n' aka hɛn.
Chorus
Kenyan W' edwuma yi, Ber a yɛkotow Wo yi,
Sian, ao Ewuradze domfo, sian!
Bra behyira hɛn sesei.

title: Ahomka Da Onye Da N' A
raw_title: CAN241 Ahomka Da Onye Da N' A
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ahomka da ɔnye da n' a Medze moho maa m' Agyenkwa!
Ɔsɛ dɛ mo 'koma dzi dɛw Na ɔka ne dɛw kyerɛ aman.
Chorus
Ahomka da! ahomka da!
Da a Jesus hoor mo ho bɔn nyina
Ɔkyerɛɛ m' dɛ monweɔn na monsɔr Na mindzi dɛw aber nyina Ahomka da! ahomka da!
Da a Jesus hoor mo ho bɔn nyina!

Verse 2
Siar n-hyehyɛɛ! ɔsɔw nsew a Midzii kyerɛɛ mo Dɔfo n' ano! Ber a meba N' asɔrfim' yi,
Wɔmma ayɛyindwom nhyɛ hɔ ma.

Verse 3
Ahyɛmu kɛse no yeewie dzi!
Mo Wura dze nye m', No so yɛ medze; Ɔtwetwee m' ma mekaa No do,
Ne Nyame ndze n' ɔyɛ me dɛw.

Verse 4
M' akoma a ekyima akyɛr Bɔhom wɔ ahomka bea ha: Mma mmfi w' Ewuradze nkyɛn da Afa N' a, afa siar nyina.

Verse 5
Sor man nyina a hom tsee me nsew n,
M' besi do daa ma hom aatse, Akɛpem da a owu bɛba a M' behyira me kra wɔ nsew yi ho.
Chorus
Ahomka da! ahomka da!
Da a Jesus hoor mo ho bɔn nyina
Ɔkyerɛɛ m' dɛ monweɔn na monsɔr Na mindzi dɛw aber nyina Ahomka da! ahomka da!
Da a Jesus hoor mo ho bɔn nyina!

title: Hwe Mbre Israel Guanhwefo
raw_title: CAN242 Hwe Mbre Israel Guanhwefo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hwɛ mbrɛ Israel Guanhwɛfo
Esi dze dɔ gyina hɔ; Tsie! ɔrefrɛ m- bɔtoaba, Ɔreyɛ hɔn etuu.

Verse 2
Ɔse, Hom ngyaa hɔn ma wɔmbra, Mma hom mmbu hɔn 'nyimtsia! Osian akra yinom n-tsi Na Ewuradze bae.

Verse 3
O, Ewuradze, ndaasem' ara
Na yɛdze hɔn brɛ Wo, Yedzi dɛw dɛ yɛyɛ Wodze,
Hɛn mbra so nyɛ Wodze. Amen.

title: Okofo, Soer Gyina
raw_title: CAN243 Okofo, Soer Gyina
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔkofo, soɛr gyina,
Suo Christ mbeamudua n' mu;
Fa wo Pomfo dzin ka ntam dɛ
Apow wiadze ndzɛmba

Verse 2
Soɛr ma wonnuma wo- Wɔnhor wo ho bɔn nyina; 'Nye wo Nyankopɔn ndzi ahyɛmu, Ndɛ to wo gyedzi dzin.

Verse 3
Ndɛ Christ akowaa nye wo
Wɔkan wo fora esiarfo n',
Ndɛ edɔm tsetse nkɔnhyɛfo n', Na asomafo n' na atɔfo n'.

Verse 4
Ma Nyame akodze nyina Nhyɛ w' dzen; 'nye abɔnsam nko: Ɔsa n' bɛyɛ dzen, ɔbɛkyɛr, Na otwar dɛ yedzi nyim.

Verse 5
Konyim abɔtsir n' a!
Sor ndwom dɛɛdɛw bi n' a! Yi na Sahen n' dze ma hɔn a Hɔn gyedzi bedzi nyim!

title: Honam A Wobuu Mboborhu Mu
raw_title: CAN244 Honam A Wobuu Mboborhu Mu
lyrics:
Verse 1
Honam a wobuu mbɔbɔrhu mu.
Bɔgya a wokyii mbɔbɔrhu mu; Ɔwo na ekaa nkwa asɛm no, 'Wo ewu ma hɛn bɔn ewu.

Verse 2
Hwɛ akoma a yaw epira no,
Hwɛ nyinsu a ndzebɔnyɛfo kyi,
Ma W' edziban nyɛ nsɛnkyerɛdze Dɛ W' adom nyɛn hɛn kra ampa.

title: Ewuradze Kronkron, Memmfata
raw_title: CAN245 Ewuradze Kronkron, Memmfata
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ewuradze Krɔnkrɔn, memmfata
Dɛ 'Wo 'bɛba mo hɔ,
Kasa ara: ka adomsɛm kor, Na me kra ho bɛsan.

Verse 2
Memmfata: me kra mu tsenabew Yɛ nwinwin, yɛ nkɔnkɔw; Ebɛyɛ dɛn ahɛn mu hɔ?
Kasa, na m'bɛtse apɔw.

Verse 3
Memmfata dze; na m'bɛyɛ dɛn Mesiw me Nyame kwan? Ɔwo a Wo honam nye bɔgyaa Edze tɔɔ nkwa maa me.

Verse 4
Obra! Anapa *bɔw yi mu
Fa Woho bɛnyɛn me; Fa Wo dɔ nye Wo tum nyina Bɛyhɛ m'akoma ma. Amen.

title: Afei Hen Egya Yereka Wo Do N'
raw_title: CAN246 Afei Hen Egya Yereka Wo Do N'
lyrics:
Verse 1
Afei hɛn Egya yɛrekaa Wo dɔ n',
Dɔ a ɔtɔɔ hɛn prɛko wɔ mbeamudua n' do n';
Na hɛn sor Dzimafo n' so wɔ ha yi,
Yɛtrɛ hɛn afɔrbɔdze mu ma Wo,
Afɔrbɔdze a no nko fata W'enyim, Jesus, nokwar afɔrbɔdze a otsim.

Verse 1
Jesus a wɔasera No n' na hwɛ N'enyim,
Ehwɛ hɛn a, hwɛ hɛn wɔ Christ no mu; Mma nnhwɛ hɛn dɛ yeetsiatsia W'adom do; Mma nnhwɛ hɛn mpaabɔ nye gyedzi nwinwin n': Na hwɛ! hɛn mfom nye hɔn ho akatua, Wo Ba, hɛn Wura, N'amandzehu so ntam'.

Verse 3
Hɔn so a yɛdɔ hɔn kyɛn adze nyina n', Yedua Christ do yɛtotɔ serɛ ma hɔn;
O fa W'ehumbɔbɔr fua hɔn Wo bom',
Bɔ mbɔdzen nyina hɔn kra ne yie ho; Sie hɔn krɔnn fi emumuyɛ nkekaa ho, Fa dzenhyɛ wie dwuma n' ma wɔnkɔ kan.

Verse 4
N-tsi yɛaba; twe hɛn pin W'anan ho,
Agyenkwa pa a yɛafom mpo a edɔ hɛn; Edziban dɛɛdɛw mu yɛ hu yi, Dua do yi hɛn fi mbusu nyina ho:
Ma hɛn dɛw na fahodzi Wo som mu,
Na mma nngya hɛn mma yemmfi Wo nkyɛn da. Amen.

title: Agyenkwa No Do Ho Nkaa Ntsi
raw_title: CAN247 Agyenkwa No Do Ho Nkaa Ntsi
lyrics:
Verse 1
Agyenkwa no dɔ ho nkaa ntsi Na yɛaba pon yi ho: Ha na Jesus to nsa dze frɛ Hɔn a woenu hɔnho.

Verse 2
Yɛnam gyedzim' fa nkwa paano
Yɛdze nyɛn hɛn akra;
Yɛnom wenyin dze kaa bɔgya a Ogui maa abɔn no.

Verse 3
Ha na yɛtow ndwom yɛkamfo
Jesus N'anwanwa dɔ;
Da bi sor aponto edziban Na yɛsɔ hwɛ wɔ ha.

title: De Mbre W'adom Asem No Tse
raw_title: CAN248 De Mbre W'adom Asem No Tse
lyrics:
Verse 1
Dɛ mbrɛ W'adom Asɛm no tse,
Ahobrɛadzem' ara Yi na m'bɛyɛ, m'Ewuradze a 'Ruwu, mebɛkaa Wo.

Verse 2
Wo honam a 'mi ntsi wobui n'
Bɛyɛ mo sor paanoo;
W'ahyɛmudze kuraba n' na megye, Ma medze makaa Wo.

Verse 3
Sɛ medan m'enyi hwɛ mbeamudua n'
Na mohom Calvary hɔ a Nyame Egumba e, m'afɔrdze e, Otwar dɛ mekaa Wo.

Verse 4
M'bɛkaa W' ɔnnye Wo fona nyina,
Nye Wo dɔ a adɔ m' nyina
Nyew ber a ahom kakra wɔ hɔ 'i M'bɛda ho ara makaa W'.

Verse 5
Na aber a mobɔtɔ mmum
Na adwen na nkaa bɛhera n' Ber a 'nam W'ahendzim' bɛba n' Jesus, ɔyɛ a kaa me.

title: Ma Yenhu W' ber a yeridzidzi
raw_title: CAN249 Ma Yenhu W' ber a yeridzidzi
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ma yenhu W' ber a yeridzidzi,
Na mma nn-dan hɛn nngya; Agyenkwa, nye hɛn ntsena, na to Wo pon hɛn 'koma mu.

Verse 2
Enye hɛn ndzidzi Nyame dɔm';
Wo honam na bɔgyaa, N-kwa paanoo, sor wenyin no, Nyɛ hɛn edziban daa. Amen.

title: Sor Paano A Enyen Me
raw_title: CAN250 Sor Paano A Enyen Me
lyrics:
Verse 1
Sor paano a enyɛn me, 'Wo 'yɛ edziban ampa:
Ma nokwar nkwa paano yi
Nyɛn me kra daa daa nyina; Ɔwo a iwui na etse ase, Minnya Wo mu ahoɔdzen daa.

Verse 2
Sor Wenyin, fa Wo bɔgyaa Hyɛ afɔr kuraba yi ma:
W'epirakur ma n-kwa ,
Mohwɛ W'asɛndua n' nya nkwa;
Ɔwo a eyɛ mo nkwa,
Ma mintsim wo mu pintsinn. Amen.

title: O Ewuradze, Ha Na Muhu W'enyim
raw_title: CAN251 O Ewuradze, Ha Na Muhu W'enyim
lyrics:
Verse 1
O Ewuradze, ha na muhu W'enyim,
Ha na mepɛ mesuo dza wonnhu mu; Morohwehwɛ menya Nyame N'adom, Na medze me berɛ mato Wo do.

Verse 2
Ha na m'bedzi Onyame edziban,
Na menye Wo anom ɔsor wenyin; Na medze m'adzesoa mato n-kyɛn Na makaa Wo fakyɛ ne dɛw no bio.

Verse 3
Edzidzi na adwontow aber nye yi, Ɔsor pon na wɔato ama me yi. Ma menye Wo mbɔ mu yendzidzi ha, Na enye me ndzi nkitaho dɛɛdɛw.

Verse 4
Ɔnnkyɛr na wɔakata nsɛnkyerɛdze n' do: Aponto n' etwam'; dɔ no dze nntwam' da. Woyi paano na wenyin no kɔ mpo a 'Wo, hɛn Kyɛm na Ewia, ebɛn hɛn daa.

Verse 5
Minnyi mboa bi dɛ Wo nko Wodze no, Na onnhia mpo dɛ motwer obi so. M'Ewuradze, Woara dɔɔ so ma me, Wo tum n-ko ara nye m'ahoɔdzen.

Verse 6
Mber pii na yɛaba W'edzidziase:
Ne nyina kyerɛ hɛn sor dze kɛse no, Sor edziban a da bi yebedzi
Na yɛsɔ ne dɛw hwɛ ase ha yi.

title: Christ Abo Werdam Apon Hen
raw_title: CAN252 Christ Abo Werdam Apon Hen
lyrics:
Verse 1
Christ abɔ werdam apon hɛn,
No ho nkaabɔdze na yɛyɛ yi; Yɛkyerɛ hɛn Wura No wu kɛpem Da a ɔbɛba.

Verse 2
No honam a wobui maa hɛn
Wɔ nkaabɔ paano yi mu ha, Ɔno na ɔnyɛn hɛn dɔ kɛpem Da a ɔbɛba.

Verse 3
Bɔgya a oruwu a okyii no Wenyin yi yɛ ho sɛnkyerɛdze. Yɛbɔnom ara akɛpem Da a ɔbɛba.

Verse 4
Anago bɔn a wonyii N' mae n'
Na Ne mbae a odzi ekyir no Yɛdze dɔ nyɛbea bɔm' kɛpem Da a ɔbɛba.

Verse 5
O, asɛm pa a ɔhyɛ hɛn dzeen! Ɔma hɛn akomatɔmu. Hom mma yengyina dzen nkɛpem Da a ɔbɛba.

title: N-dze A Wetsee Wo Eden
raw_title: CAN253 N-dze A Wetsee Wo Eden
lyrics:
Verse 1
N-dze a wɔtsee wɔ Eden Ayerhyia kan n-dze n', Asɔpɔn awar nhyira n' Ɔda ho ara wɔ hɔ.

Verse 2
Christian ɔbaa na barimba So rokɔ awar a, Nyame Ɔkorsa wɔm' bi, Na yɛserɛ Ne nhyira:

Verse 3
Dɛ ɔndom hɔn m-ba pa,
Nye dɔ na nokwardzi, Na ɔndom hɔn koryɛ bi a Biribiara nntum mmpa mu.

Verse 4
Sor Egya, Woara bɛfa, Ayefor yi ma awar, Dɛ mbrɛ 'dze Eve maa Adam, Fii noara ne mfem' no.

Verse 5
Agyenkwa domfo, bra na Bɛka hɔn bɔm' ɔdɔm',
Dɛ mbrɛ edze su ebien
Bɔɔm' wɔ Woara Wo mu n'

Verse 6
Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn, behyira hɔn, Ber a wɔrobɔ mpaa yi, Dɛ mbrɛ ehyira Christ N'Asɔr Ma ɔyɛ N'Ayefor n'.

Verse 7
Trɛ W'atsaban wɔ hɔn do,
Pa hɔn mbusu nyina,-
Ber a worutu anamɔn
Ba W'afɔrmbukyia ho,

Verse 8
Dze hɔn 'nyimnyam abɔtsir Abɔbɔ Wo afɔr,-
Kɛpem dɛ wɔnye Agyenkwa N' Ayefor no bɔsoɛr.

title: Egya, Adze Nyina Yefo
raw_title: CAN254 Egya, Adze Nyina Yefo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Egya, adze nyina Yɛfo,
Wo nyansaa, tum na dɔ
Dzii kan dze akra ebien bɔɔm'
Wɔ Eden ture mu;
N-dɛ fa nkan n' akyɛdze n'
Ma Wo mbofra yi so,
Ofi a W'asomdwee wɔ mu, Ɔdɔ a nokwardzi wɔm'.

Verse 2
Gyefo a ekɔr Galilee
Ayeforase hɔ, N-dɛ so fa enyimpa ma Hɔn a wɔfrɛ Wo yi:
Ma hɔn wiadze enyigye
Ɔndan sor enyingye Na wɔsɔ hwɛ a, ma wonhu Dɛ Woara W'akyɛdze a.

Verse 3
O Nyame Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn,
Ɔwo a Wo dɔ yɛ dzen,
W'ahotsewee so dzi mu,
Fi sor gu hɔn do ahom,
Ama Woara wowaw hɔn
Fi ntokwaa ho n-tsi,
Hɔn bra aakyerɛ dɛ 'Wo na Ehyɛ hɔn 'koma do.

Verse 4
Egya, Woara ennsi dan yi a, Wɔnnkɛfa edu beebi;
Gyefo, Woara ennhyira do a,
Hɔn dɛw bɛdan hɔn yaw;
Na hweeara nnkotum asɛɛ
Awar a ehyira do; Ɔdɔ a Wo Sunsum tsew ho Yɛ dɔ a ɔmmbɔ adze da.

title: Yebo Wo Ewuo, Domfo Nyame Okorsa
raw_title: CAN255 Yebo Wo Ewuo, Domfo Nyame Okorsa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Yɛbɔ Wo ewuo, Domfo Nyame Ɔkorsa, Nana Adam na Eve hɔn hyiafo kor! Fa Wo Nyame suro, ɔdɔ, nye nyansa Behyira Okumfor na Ayefor.

Verse 2
Ehumbɔbɔr, kyɛw nye yi, dom hɔn awarsɔ,
Wɔ bra n'atseetsee gyatanaa mpo mu;
Ndafua nyinara mu ɔsor enyisɔ
Nyɛ hɔn kyɛpɛn ber a hɔn nkwa wɔw do

Verse 3
Sɛ yaw to hɔn, wɔka n' fabi a ɔmmba a,
Ɔbra n'ehum Taafo, pa hɔn esian;
Weɔn hɔn, na ma wɔmfa enyi ntsim Wo do,
Mbɛgye akatua pa a ofi nkodzen

Verse 4
Osian Christ n-tsi, fa abotar mu dom hɔn, Ɔnye asomdwee a ɔtra n-hum'. Nyame Egya, Ɔba nye Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn, Gya hɔn kwan pa kodu bɛkyebo nom'.

title: Sunsum Kronkron, Tsena Hen Kra Mu
raw_title: CAN256 Sunsum Kronkron, Tsena Hen Kra Mu
lyrics:
Verse 1
Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn, tsena hɛn kra mu,
Na ma Wo gya mfi sor nhyerɛn; Edze sunsum n-go sera hɛn, Na ema akyɛdze horow.

Verse 2
W'adom ngohuam a ofi sor
Yɛ awerɛkyer, nkwa na dɔ; Ma Wo kan a onndum da no N-hyerɛn hɛn do ɔmpa hɛn sum.

Verse 3
Fa W'adom mbordo no ma hɛn, Ɔnsera hɛn, ɔntsew hɛn enyim: Pam atamfo, ma asomdwee; Mbrɛ ewɔ mbusu nntum mmba hɔ.

Verse 4
Kyerɛ hɛn ma yenhu dɛ Egya n' Ɔnye asomdwee a ɔtra n-hum'.
Ama ber a onnyi ewiei mu
Iyi nko aayɛ hɛn daa ndwom,----
Ayɛyi nka Wo dzin mbersantsen, Egya, Ɔba, nye Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn. Amen.

title: Ewuradze, Kasa Kyere Me
raw_title: CAN257 Ewuradze, Kasa Kyere Me
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ewuradze, kasa kyerɛ me,
Ma munsusu Wo do nkasa; Ahwehwɛ me yi ma mo so Monhwehwɛ Wo mba a wɔayew no.

Verse 2
Mo Wura, gya me kwan ma mo so
Mingya W'akobɔfo taataa; O nyɛn me ma mo so memfa Manna mma hɔn a kɔm dze hɔn.

Verse 3
O hyɛ me dzen ama ber a
Migyina pintsinn wɔ Wo mu n', Maatsen me nsa ama hɔn a Woridzi aper wɔ bra po do.

Verse 4
Kyerɛkyerɛ m' na meetum makyerɛ
N-dzɛmba pa a ada n' edzi; Ma m'anosɛm n-hwira ndu Akoma pii ase noho.

Verse 5
Fa W'asomdwee dɛɛdɛw n' ma me,
Ma minnya nyansa memfa nka
Asomdwee nsɛm nkyerɛ Wo mba Asonafo wɔ mbusu mber mu.

Verse 6
Mo Wura, fa Wo mayɛ no ma m',
Kodu dɛ m'akoma bu do, Ma memfa ndam mombɔ dawur, Menka Wo dɔ, minyi W' ayɛw.

Verse 7
Fa me yɛ dɛ Woara 'pɛ,
Aber nyina na bea biara,
Kodu dɛ mubohu W'enyim
Wɔ ahomgye, dɛw, na enyimnyam ma.
Amen.

title: Ewuradze, Hyeren Hen Do
raw_title: CAN258 Ewuradze, Hyeren Hen Do
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ewuradze, hyerɛn hɛn do,
'Wo, adasamba kan;
Dua Wo kyerɛwsem do
Yi woho kyerɛ hɛn ndɛ;
Na yɛhwɛ W'enyim a
Hɛn akoma dzɛw ntsi Nkɔkowaba nam hɛn do Eesua W'adom nwanwa n'.

Verse 2
Ewuradze, hue Sunsum
Gyaframee n' gu hɛn do, Ma yɛdze ano kor Yaabɔ Wo dzin dawur.
Ma Wo mba aso pa, Ma hɔn nyina eehu Ndzɛmba akɛse a ayɛ.

Verse 3
Hɛn Wura, kasa ma hɛn,
Dza yɛka nyina mu,
Ma dza yɛkyerɛ nyɛ dɛ
Mbrɛ W'asɛm tse ara;
Ama nguambaa aatse
Hɔn Guanhɛfo n' Ne ndze, Na wɔaaka No do daa, Na woeedzi No mu dɛw.

Verse 4
Hɛn Wura, tsena hɛn mu;
Ma hɛn W'adwen no bi;
Ma yɛmfa hɛn ahom
Nyina ndɔ Wo, nsom Wo;
Ma hɛn bra aakyerɛ
Wo mbofra mbrɛ etse, Na yɛdze hɛn suban
Aatwe Wo mba nyina. Amen.

title: N-dobaa Ewuradze, Tsie
raw_title: CAN259 N-dobaa Ewuradze, Tsie
lyrics:
Verse 1
N-dɔbaa Ewuradze, tsie
Wo nkowaa ehiafo hɛn su; Tsie hɛn gyedzi mu mpaabɔ yi Na dom hɛn dza yehia.

Verse 2
Yɛtweɔn Wo mbɔbɔr mu; Inyim hɛn hia nyina: Ampa dɛ n-dɔbaa no so, Na edwumafo no suar.

Verse 3
Sakyer wobinom so
Na soma hɔm W'asɔr mu
Ma wɔnka Wo tum kasa no
Dɛ 'Wo nye hɔn wɔ hɔ

Verse 4
Ma wɔnka W'asɛmpa a
Adom ahyɛ no ma n', Wɔnkyerɛ dɛ 'Wo nye Ewuradze, Adasamba Gyefo.

Verse 5
Ma wɔntrɛ Wo dzin mu, Ma wɔmfata hɔn frɛ,
Wɔmbɔ W'adom kɛse no mu, Wo dɔ a onnyi ewiei n'!

title: Hen Wura, Se W'asem Ntsi
raw_title: CAN260 Hen Wura, Se W'asem Ntsi
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hɛn Wura, sɛ W'asɛm ntsi
Yedua n-kwasɛm n' a, Wo tum nsa no gugu do yi Aba no befifir.

Verse 2
W'adom ne ndam ara
Na ɔbɛma ndɔbaa pii,
Na ɔadɔr agyedzifo a
Wɔtse ma W'enyimnyam.

Verse 3
Nsɛmpa n' ne nhyira nsu n', Ma ɔntɔ mma hɛn daa, Ma tum a ɔsakyer akra n' Ɔmbra W'asɔfoe do.

Verse 4
Ma ɔdodowara
Nnya dɔ a ɔdan 'koma n', Ma W'adom ne dɛw nsiesie hɔn Mma ɔsor dɛw kɛse n'.

title: O Twerammpon Nyame
raw_title: CAN261 O Twerammpon Nyame
lyrics:
Verse 1
O Twearammpon Nyame,
Ma W'ahendzi no mbra, O Christ, ma W'abaw do Bubu ɔbɔn no tum.

Verse 2
W'ahendzi a asomdwee Nye dɔ wɔ mu n' wɔ hen? Dabɛn na enyitan Bɔbɔ adze wɔ ha?

Verse 3
W'anohoba n' wɔ hen
Dɛ mber bi rebɛba a Akodzi nye brafun Boguan efi W'enyim?

Verse 4
Ewuradze yɛserɛ Wo,
Ma Woho do na bra Wo tum kɛse no mu, Na ma hɛn enyi ngye.

Verse 5
Nyimpa mmbu Wo dzin bi,
Mbataku kyer Wo nguan; Pii wɔyew Wo ho dɔ, Wɔbɔ 'nyimguasebra.

Verse 6
Abosonsɔr dze sum
Agye aman pii do;
O Anapa Nworaba,
Pue, na mma nntɔ ara da. Amen.

title: Wiadze Ruwu; Daa Nyinara
raw_title: CAN262 Wiadze Ruwu; Daa Nyinara
lyrics:
Verse 1
Wiadze ruwu; daa nyinara
Mpempem mpempem na wɔsen kɔ!
Christianfo, hom m-per ngye hɔn; Hom nka Jesus nkyerɛ hɔn ntsɛntsɛm.

Verse 2
Ahodze, ahoɔdzen, nyimdzee, Nyew, hom n-kwa mpo hom mfa mma; Hom Gyefo ayɛ bi ama hom!
Na 'bɛn na hom nnkɛyɛ ama N'?

Verse 3
Nyame No Sunsum, fi edzi, Keka po mu, nunu kwaa mu.
Mbew nyina do, mbea nyinara,
Prapra Nyame Ne mba boa ano.

title: Wokobo Dawur Wo Mbea Nyinara De
raw_title: CAN263 Wokobo Dawur Wo Mbea Nyinara De
lyrics:
Verse 1
Wɔnkɔbɔ dawur wɔ mbea nyinara dɛ, Asomdwee Hen n' oridzi Ne hen: N'adzesoa yɛ har, na No som so yɛ dɛw; Wonyi No ayɛw, ahemfo hɔn Ɔhen.
Chorus
Jesus akofo atamfo n' gyina a,
Wɔnper ndzi nyim, ɔkogu yɛ mbusu;
Christ N'ahenman ntsi yɛsɔw ɔfona a, No som yɛ dɛw, na owu yɛ mfaso.

Verse 2
Jesus Ɔkatakyi no dɔm adehye,
Wɔnsoɛr ngyina ma adasa nnya nkwa;
Wɔnhwɛ mbrɛ Christ Ne dzin edua atahye, Wɔ mbea nyina dɛ wiadze Agyenkwa.
Chorus
Jesus akofo atamfo n' gyina a,
Wɔnper ndzi nyim, ɔkogu yɛ mbusu;
Christ N'ahenman ntsi yɛsɔw ɔfona a, No som yɛ dɛw, na owu yɛ mfaso.

Verse 3
Nokwar frankaa na orinyam wim' noho n', Ɔda na tsenenee aba wiadze;
Hɛn Wura apa hɛn sum mu amandzehu, Jesus apon hɛn ama fahodzi.
Chorus
Jesus akofo atamfo n' gyina a,
Wɔnper ndzi nyim, ɔkogu yɛ mbusu;
Christ N'ahenman ntsi yɛsɔw ɔfona a, No som yɛ dɛw, na owu yɛ mfaso.

title: Womfa Asempa N' Nko Ekyirekyir
raw_title: CAN264 Womfa Asempa N' Nko Ekyirekyir
lyrics:
Verse 1
Wɔmfa Asɛmpa n' nkɔ ekyirekyir, Mbrɛ wɔnntsee Jesus Ne nka. Wɔmpaam' dɛ No mu wɔ fafir, Asomdwee, isiar na nkwa.
Wɔnka N' yie ma bahatɔfo Wɔmfa dɛw nkamfo Ne dzin. Na mber nyinara wɔmpaa mu Nka dɛ, Jesus bedzi Hen.

Verse 2
Wɔmfa enyigye nsi Asɛm n' do, Wɔnka n' bɔkɔɔ ara dɛ:
Nyame Ba Jesus ebowu Na wiadze enya nkwa ndɛ!
Obiara a ɔgye No dzi no
Obenya sor ahendzi n';
Na amanaman ntonton No Nse dɛ, Jesus bedzi Hen.

Verse 3
Enyimnyam nka Egya Nyame
Wɔ No domankoma dɔ;
Wɔmfa Jesus Ne dzin ntahye
Wɔ mbrɛ nyimpa biara wɔ;
Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn n' wɔmma N' nhyira
M-fesantsen mbersantsen;
Na hɛn ndwom dabaa nyinara Nyɛ dɛ, Jesus bedzi Hen!

title: Hom Ngyina, Hom Ngyina Mma Jesus
raw_title: CAN265 Hom Ngyina, Hom Ngyina Mma Jesus
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hom ngyina, hom ngyina mma Jesus!
Mbeamudua ho nsordaafo;
Hom mma N'ahen-frankaa n' do;
Onnyi dɛ ofi nsa
Obedzi No dɔm kan fi
Konyimm' akɔ konyimm'
Kyerɛ wɔka atamfo nyina hyɛ Ma Christ dzi hen ampa.

Verse 2
Hom ngyina, hom ngyina mma Jesus!
Hom ntsie abɛn ne frɛ; Hom nduom ɔko kɛse n' mu Wɔ N'enyimnyam da yim'!
Mbarimba, afei hom nsom no
Mfa ntsia atamfo dɔm n'
Hom mfa ndam ngyina mbusu ano, Hom ntutu dɔm nka dɔm.

Verse 3
Hom ngyina, hom ngyina mma Jesus!
Hom ngyina N'ahoɔdzen nkom' Honam abaw bɛpa hom; Mma hom nntwer hombo da.
Hom nhyɛ Christian akontar,
Na hom nweɔn asɔryɛm',
Edwumayɛ mu o, mbusu mu o Mma hom nntwa abrɔdɔ.

Verse 4
Hom ngyina, hom ngyina mma Jesus!
Aperdzi no rennkyɛr
Ndɛ dze ɔko mu dede
'Kyena konyimdzifo ndwom a
Nyia obedzi konyim no
Wɔbɛma n' nkwa ahenkyɛw
Ɔnye enyimnyam Hen no
Bedzi hen afebɔɔ.

title: Christian N-sordaafo
raw_title: CAN266 Christian N-sordaafo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Christian n-sordaafo, Hom nduom akono! Jesus Ne mbeamudua n' Dzi hɛn enyim kan.
Hɛn Hen Christ etu sa
Roko tsia tamfo n', Hom nduom n-seraban do,
Hom nhwɛ ne mfrankaa n'.
Chorus
Christian n-sordaafo, Hom nduom akono! Jesus Ne mbeamudua n' Dzi hɛn envim kan.
Verse
Yɛma Ne frankaa n' do a,
Abɔnsam dɔm gu;
Dɛm a Christ akofo, Hom nkedzi konyim! Yɛbɔ se yi ayɛw a,
Hɛll fapem wosow;
Enuanom, hom ntow ndwom, Hom mma hom ndze do.

Verse 3
Nyame N'asɔr tse dɛ Dɔm a wɔyɛ dzen: Yɛnam ahotsewfo Hɔn anamɔn mu. Hɛn mu nnyi mpaapaamu, Yɛyɛ adze kor. Hɛn botae, hɛn nkyerɛkyerɛ Hɛn dɔ nyina kor.

Verse 4
Ahengua botutu,
Ahenman etwam',
Na Jesus N'asɔr dze
Betsim afebɔɔ;
Samanadze akoban Runntum ahyɛ do: Christ Noara na ɔkae, N'asɛm so yɛ hɔ.

Verse 5
Mo nkorɔfo e, hom mbɔdɔm
Egyigye kuw yi; Hom mfa hom ndze mbɔto Hɛn konyim ndwom yim': Enyimnyam na nkamfo N-ka hɛn Hen Christ! Yi nyimpa na abɔfo Bɔtow afebɔɔ.
Chorus
Christian n-sordaafo, Hom nduom akono! Jesus Ne mbeamudua n' Dzi hɛn envim kan.

title: Ma M' Gyedzi Ntsaban Ma Muntu
raw_title: CAN267 Ma M' Gyedzi Ntsaban Ma Muntu
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ma m' gyedzi ntsaban na muntu
Nkɔ fua n' mu hɔ nkɔhwɛ
Sor esiarfo hɔn dɛw kɛse n', Mbrɛ hɔn 'nyimnyam hyerɛn pa.

Verse 2
Ber bi nna wogyam wɔ ase ha,
Na wɔkaa m' kyii nyinsu;
Wɔnye bɔn, ekyingye na suro Dzii aper dzen dɛ hɛn so.

Verse 3
M'bisa dɛ hɔn konyim n' fir hen?
Hɔn nyina bɔ mu ka dɛ
Hɔn konyimdzi fir Eguambaa n', Hɔn konyim fir No wu.

Verse 4
Wɔhyɛɛ mbrɛ otsiatsiae no nsew;
No ndwuma hyɛɛ hɔn nkuran, Na wɔkaa Nyame- nyimpa N' do Nyaa anohoba ahomgye n'.

Verse 5
Hɛn kandzifo hia hɛn nkamfo
Wɔ Ne fasusu ntsi;
Na adasefo mununkum no
Kyerɛ dɛm sor kwan n' ara

title: Ahotsewfo A Apon Hon Edwuma A
raw_title: CAN268 Ahotsewfo A Apon Hon Edwuma A
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ahotsewfo a apon hɔn edwuma a Wiadze enyim wɔbɔɔ Wo dzin no ntsi,
O Jesus, nhyira nka Wo dzin daa daa.
Alleluia!

Verse 2
Hɔn Bontan, Aban, Ahoɔdzen, nye 'Wo, Eyɛɛ hɔn Sahen wɔ nkodzen no mu;
Sum kadoo no mu hɔn nokwar kan kor.
Alleluia!

Verse 3
O ma Wo nkowaa anokwafo wɔnko
M-barimbam' dɛ tsetse ahotsewfo n',
Ama wɔnye hɔn eenya ahenkyɛw no!
Alleluia!

Verse 4
Siar nkitaho bit! fɛkuwbɔ krɔnkrɔn! Yɛper mberɛwm', wɔhyerɛn enyimnyam mu; Naaso wɔnye hɛn bɔm' yɛ kor Wo mu.
Alleluia!

Verse 5
Sɛ aperdzi n' yɛ dzen, ko n' war m-po a, Konyim ndwom no fi 'kyirekyir du asomu, Ma akoko yɛ dur, abaw hyɛ dzen.
Alleluia!

Verse 6
6Witɔree dze sika hyerɛn wim' guann, Ɔnnkyɛr na akofo enya ahomgye.
Wohu siar Paradise no mu dɛw no.
Alleluia!

Verse 7
Hwɛ! enyimnyam da bi so ɔreba a, Ahotsewfo n' bɔsoɛr konyimdzi mu,
Enyimnyam Hen no bopue No kwan do.
Alleluia!

Verse 8
Dɔm kukuankoma fi wiadze nyina
Dze ndwom bɛpem bota mbotsen no mu,
Woeyi Egya, Ba, nye Sunsum ayɛw;
Alleluia!

title: Woanam' Wohye Fufuw Yi
raw_title: CAN269 Woanam' Wohye Fufuw Yi
lyrics:
Verse 1
Woanam' wɔhyɛ futuw yi, Wɔhyerɛn sen wigyinae mpo 'i? Kan no mu mba a wodzi kan, Wɔbɛn Nyame N'ahengua 'i?
Yinom na wɔsoaa mbeamudua n',
Wodzii Christ ho dase pa, Hɔn Wura N'asɛ ntsi wowui,.
Wɔkaa Nyame a owu n' do n'.

Verse 2
Wofir fona kɛsem' bae,
Wɔdze gyedzi hoor hɔn ntar
Wɔ Eguambaa n' bɔgyaa mu, Bɔgya a ɔma ahosan krɔnn:
N-tsi wɔbɛn ahengua n',
Na wɔsom hɔn Wura daa daa, Nyame ko No nkorɔfo mu.
Nyame pɛ N'apapafo.

Verse 3
Wɔkyɛn ekonyimdzifo,
Ha na hɔn nsɔhwɛ asa;
Hɔn berɛ nyina etwam',
Kɔm na nsukɔm nnyi hɔ bio;
Wɔnntse ɔhyew a ɔyɛ dzen a
Ofir ewia ne mfirii no mu,
Wɔtse ahomka mbew no mu, Domankoma bea no do.

Verse 4
Nyia ɔtse ahengua n' do n', Bɛnyɛn hɔn aber nyina,
Dze nkwadua no bɛnyɛn hɔn,
Dze hɔn bɔkɔ nkwa nsu n' ho;
Bɛpa hɔn mbusu nyina, Nye hɔn ehiadze biara,
Ɔbɛpepa hɔn nyinsuwa.
Ɔdze dɔ bɛhyɛ hɔn ma.

title: Jesus De Nkwangye Reba N'
raw_title: CAN270 Jesus De Nkwangye Reba N'
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jesus dze nkwagye reba n'
Zion hɔ na ɔbae,
Mbofraba nyina soɛree Wɔtoow Hosanna maa N'.
Hɔn ho annyɛ No ebufuw Na ɔtse abowa do n', Ɔmaa wɔkaa No do ara:
Hɔn ndwom yɛɛ N' enyigye.

Verse 2
Na osiandɛ Ewuradze
Da ho dɔ mbofra ntsi,
Kaansa n-dɛ odzi hen
Wɔ sor Zion m-po a,
Yɛbɔfɔr Ne frankaa ho,
Ɔhen Jesus frankaa n', Na yɛatseam' dɛ, Hosanna N-ka David ne Ba.

Verse 3
Osiandɛ sɛ hɛn yeentum
Yɛannkamfo hɛn Pomfo a, Abo bɔtow Hosanna Ahyɛ hɛn enyito.
Na aso hɛn ano nko Na yɛdze bɔsom No? Dabi! yɛdze hɛn 'koma So bɛma Ewuradze.

title: Jerusalem Mbofraba
raw_title: CAN271 Jerusalem Mbofraba
lyrics:
Verse 1
Jerusalem mbofraba
Toow Jesus N'ayɛyindwom; Ndɛ mber yi mbofraba so Bɔm' tow Gyefo N'ayɛyi:
Chorus
Tsie! mbofra kekam' dzendzen Dɛ, Hosanna nka hɛn Hen.

Verse 2
Wɔkyerɛ hɛn Ewuradze dɔ, Wɔkyerɛ hɛn N'asɛm kenkan, Wɔkyerɛ hɛn ɔsor do kwan:
Yi ntsi yeyi Nyame ayɛw.
Chorus
Tsie! mbofra kekam' dzendzen Dɛ, Hosanna nka hɛn Hen.

Verse 3
Abaatan na akyerɛkyerɛfo,
Mpanyin na mbofra nhur ndwom n'; Wɔmma do kɛsenara Ma Hosanna ngyigye wim'.
Chorus
Tsie! mbofra kekam' dzendzen Dɛ, Hosanna nka hɛn Hen.

title: Jesus Brefo A Edwe
raw_title: CAN272 Jesus Brefo A Edwe

title: Ewimbir Som Ekyir
raw_title: CAN273 Ewimbir Som Ekyir
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ewimbir som ekyir,
Asɔrfim' sunkamm nom',
Krɔnkrɔn 'daka n' enyim
Kanea n' ayɛ munsumm, Awerɛfir mu ara nna
Nyame ne ndze ogyigyee hɔ.

Verse 2
Nna akɔdaa brɛfo,
Israel sɔfo n' ada;
Levinyi kakraba n' Roweɔn asɔrfim' hɔ:
Na dza ohuntaa Eli no;
Ewuradze yii kyerɛɛ Hannah ba n'.

Verse 3
O Ewuradze, ma me
Samuel asomkyɛn a
No mu yɛ har, ɔtse
W' ano wasa biara; Emi so m' bɛgye Wo frɛ do,
Na m' bedzi kan metsie Ɔwo.

title: Dza Oye Few Na Ohyeren
raw_title: CAN274 Dza Oye Few Na Ohyeren
lyrics:
Verse 1
Dza ɔyɛ fɛw na ɔhyerɛn,
Abɔdze nyinara, 'Nyansadze na anwanwadze, Nyame yɛɛ ne nyina.
Chorus
Dza ɔyɛ fɛw na ɔhyerɛn,
Abɔdze nyinara, 'Nyansadze na anwanwadze, Nyame yɛɛ ne nyina.

Verse 2
N-hyiren biara a ɔpae, Nyame maa n' ahoɔfɛw;
Anomaba a ɔtow ndwom, Nyame yɛɛ ne ntɛkyerɛ.

Verse 3
Bepɔw a osi habanm', 'Sutsen a ɔda ho, N-woraba na bosoom,
Adzekyee na adzesaa.

Verse 4
N-su a ɔtɔ esusow,
Ewia a ɔpae pɛber,
N-duaba a ɔsow ndua do, Na hamu edziban.

Verse 5
Enyiwa wɔ hɔ ma yeehu,
Ano so ma yaaka,
Dɛ saa Nyame yɛ tumfo, Ɔayɛ adze nyina yie.
Chorus
Dza ɔyɛ fɛw na ɔhyerɛn,
Abɔdze nyinara, 'Nyansadze na anwanwadze, Nyame yɛɛ ne nyina.

title: Modo De Metse Nsem A
raw_title: CAN275 Modo De Metse Nsem A
lyrics:
Verse 1
Modɔ dɛ metse nsɛm a
Abɔfo ndze ka no, Dɛ enyimnyam Hen n' mber bi Ɔbɛtsenaa asaase do.
Bɔnyɛnyi a meyɛ mberɛw so,
Na 'yi minyim petee
Dɛ, Ewuradze bae bɛgyee m' nkwa.
Osiandɛ ɔdɔ m' kɛse.

Verse 2
M' Agyenkwa siarfo bɛyɛɛ
Abɔdomaba dɛ emi,
Ma ɔaakyerɛ No nkɔkowaba
Krɔnkrɔnyɛ mu akwan;
Na sɛ mobɔ ho mbɔdzen
Tsiatsia N' anamɔnm' a, Ɔnnkɔtow m' akyen ara da Osiandɛ ɔdɔ m'kɛse.

Verse 3
No mbɔbɔrhu nye No dɔ n', M' bɔtow ho ndwom dɛɛdɛw; Muhu N' a ɔnnyɛ mpo a, minyim Dɛ ɔtse m' ayɛyi.
Na ɔabɔ m' anohoba
Ayamuyiem' dɛ monkɔ
Menkɛnye abɔfo ntow ndwom, Osiandɛ ɔdɔ m' kɛse.

title: Ka Jesus Ho N-sem Kyere M
raw_title: CAN276 Ka Jesus Ho N-sem Kyere M
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ka Jesus ho n-sɛm kyerɛ m',
Mepɛ metsie;
Ndzɛmba a nkyɛ mibebisa No, Sɛ ɔwɔ ha a:
Ɔkwan nkyɛn ndzɛmba,
Epo do nsɛm,
Jesus No ho nsɛm, Ka kyerɛ me.

Verse 2
Ma mindzi kan ntse mbrɛ mbofra
Kɔbɔɔ N' aprɔw;
Na emi so me nsa bɛka Ne nhyira n' bi.
Ayamuyie kasa,
Adom ndzeyɛɛ,
Dze ɔdɔ hyerɛɛn Jesus N' enyim.

Verse 3
Kyerɛ m' enyinyandze a osii
Ture no mu n';
Na mbeamudua n' a wɔdze kum M' Agyenkwa no:
Ne yaw na Ne dɛw,
Dɛ mbrɛ wɔyɛ
Jesus No ho nsɛm n', Ka kyerɛ me.

title: David Ahenkurowm Preko Bi
raw_title: CAN277 David Ahenkurowm Preko Bi
lyrics:
Verse 1
David ahenkurowm' prɛko bi,
Nantwibuw tantan bi mu, Ɔbaatan dedaa ne ba bi Wɔ mbowa dzidzidaka mu.
Mary nye ɔbaatan pa n', Jesus Christ ɔnye ne Ba n'.

Verse 2
Nyame, adze nyina Wura,
Fi sor siaan asaase do;
M-bowadan ɔnye No dɔbea,
Ne dabew nye mpɔnkɔbuw, Hɛn Agyenkwa Krɔnkrɔnnyi Ɔnye abɔbɔfo tsenaa ase.

Verse 3
No mbofraber nwanwa nyina
Ɔyɛɛ enyidzi na setsie; Ɔdɔe, ɔweɔn ne na brɛfo a Ɔdaa n' abaw mu foo n' yie.
Christian mbofra nyɛ setsie, Wɔndwe, nyɛ pa dɛ mbrɛ ɔyɛe.

Verse 4
Mbofra hɛn fasusu nye No,
Onyinii dɛ hɛnara,
Kakrabaa, m-berɛmberɛw;
Osui, serewee dɛ hɛnara; Ntsi hɛn yaw ɔtse ma hɛn, Na hɛn dɛw onyam' kyɛpɛn.

Verse 5
Ɔnam No nkwagye dɔ no do
Da bi hɛn enyi bohu N'
Osiandɛ abofra fɛɛfɛw n'
Nye Ewuradze a ɔwɔ sor;
Na ogya No mbofra kwan Kɔ mbrɛ Ɔnoara oedu n'.

title: Akokowaba Jesus Ennya Adasoe
raw_title: CAN278 Akokowaba Jesus Ennya Adasoe
lyrics:
Verse 1
Akɔkowaba Jesus ennya adasoe; Wɔdedaa N' wɔ mbowa edzidzidaka mu. N-woraba fi sorsor hyerɛɛn mbrɛ ɔda no, Nna Jesus ada komm wɔ efuw no do.

Verse 2
Anantwi no sui na Ɔba no nyanee,
Naaso, hwɛ, oennsu, na mbom ɔdaa hɔ komm. O Jesus, modɔ Wo; fi sor hwɛ mo do, Tsena me nkyɛn araa kodu adzekyee.

Verse 3
Ewuradze Jesus, meserɛ Wo dɛ
Bɛn me nkyɛn na dɔ me aber nyinara,
Hyira mbofra nyina wɔ W' abaatan dɔ mu, Na tsew hɛn ho ama yaafata Wo nkyɛn.

title: Se Meba Jesus Ho A
raw_title: CAN279 Se Meba Jesus Ho A
lyrics:
Verse 1
Sɛ meba Jesus hɔ a,
Mo hom bɔtɔ mo ho; Sɛ mo werɛ how a Ɔbɛkyekye m' werɛ.
Chorus
Sɛ meba Jesus hɔ a,
Ahomka bɛka m'; Oegum' ara refrɛ Mbofra tse dɛ emi.

Verse 2
Sɛ meba Jesus hɔ a,
Obetsie m' asɔr, Ɔbɔdɔ m' ampaara, Owui maa mo bɔn.
Chorus
Sɛ meba Jesus hɔ a,
Ahomka bɛka m'; Oegum' ara refrɛ Mbofra tse dɛ emi.

Verse 3
Sɛ meba Jesus hɔ a,
Obosuo me nsam',
Obogum' ara egya me Akɔ man papam'.
Chorus
Sɛ meba Jesus hɔ a,
Ahomka bɛka m'; Oegum' ara refrɛ Mbofra tse dɛ emi.

Verse 4
Hɔ menye mbofra pa
Bɛhyɛ ntar fitaa; Mubohu m' Agyenkwa ampa Wɔ sor man n' mu daa.
Chorus
Sɛ meba Jesus hɔ a,
Ahomka bɛka m'; Oegum' ara refrɛ
Mbofra tse dɛ emi.

title: Mepe Mesua Jesus
raw_title: CAN280 Mepe Mesua Jesus
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mepɛ mesua Jesus: Ɔyɛ ayamuyie; Obowui agye m' nkwa, Wɔbɔɔ N' mbeamuduam'.

Verse 2
Sɛ mokɔ Jesus hɔ a,
Obetsie m' asɔr,
Ɔbɛma mo ho atsew, Ɔdze m' bɔn bɛkyɛ m'.

Verse 3
Mobɔdwen Jesus ho:
Ɔyɛ dɔ dodow Ɔtse N' ahenguam hɔ, Ɔhwɛ m' ase ha.

Verse 4
Sɛ mo werɛ twer Jesus,
Sɛ meyɛ Ne pɛ a,
Nna m' ahom bɛka m' ho, Biribiara nnkɛyɛ m'.

Verse 5
Yamuyiefo pa Jesus!
Nkyɛ oeesuo me nsam', Na ewiei n' ɔaagye m' ato Ɔman papa n' mu.

title: Daa Daa Nyina Yetonton Wo
raw_title: CAN281 Daa Daa Nyina Yetonton Wo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Daa daa nyina yɛtonton Wo,
Ber a adze akye bio, Yebu ntwɛr wɔ fie hyira Wo, Wɔ adzekyeem' adom ho.

Verse 2
Daa daa nyina yɛtonton Wo,
Ber a yeetu hɛn ndwom wɔ skuul, Dabaa yɛdze W' ayɛyi hyɛ Dwumadzi ase, yɛdze wie.

Verse 3
Daa daa nyina yɛtonton Wo,
Wɔ hɛn ndwomm' ana yɛada;
Abɔfo tsie, wɔweɔn hɛn,
Christ no nguambaa anago nyina.

Verse 4
Daa daa nyina yɛtonton Wo,
Nnyɛ ayɛyi nsɛm mu nko;
Nokwardzi na setsie mu so Yɛkyerɛ Woara W' enyimnyam.

Verse 5
Daa daa nyina yɛtonton Wo,
Dɛ ɔnam Jesus ara ntsi Yɛdze abotar sɔw mfom nyina, Na yeku ɔbɔn biara.

Verse 6
Daa daa nyina yɛtonton Wo,
Gyedɛ hɛn nda bɔ adze,
Gyedɛ yɛhom fi hɛn berɛm',
Yɛrotweɔn Wo da n' asomdweem'.

title: Ewuradze, Fa Wo Nhyira Dom Hen
raw_title: CAN282 Ewuradze, Fa Wo Nhyira Dom Hen
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ewuradze, fa Wo nhyira dom hɛn,
Yebehyia mu bio wɔ ha;
Ma yentu anamɔn nkɔ kan
Wɔ Wo dɔ, gyedzi na surom';
Bɔ hɛn ho ban
Dɛ ebɛn hɛn daa nyina.

Verse 2
W' ehumbɔbɔr ho yɛsɔr Wo,
Edze dom hɛn kwan nyinam',
Nyame yetwa hwe W' enyim bio
Ma hɛn edwuma nkɔ do daa
Ma hɛn sunsum
Na adwen nnya W' akyɛdze pa.

Verse 3
Ma fidua mu enuadɔ ntsim
Akoma biara mu daa,
No tum nkyerɛkyerɛ hɛn ma
Yenyi pɛsɛankonya akwa
Ndu dɛ Wo mba
Bohu dɛ hɔn Egya nye W'.

Verse 4
Mpaamudzi
Nyame fa Wo nhyira gya hɛn kwan, Yɛda ase na ehumbɔbɔr;
Fa nnuhofo nyina mfom kyɛ hɔn;
Wonnya mber mfa ntsen dza asɛɛ n'
Na mma Wo mba
Mmfom Wo Sunsum ara bio.

Verse 5
Ma Wo Sunsum pa no nkenyan
Ndzepa biara a yeenya n' ha,
Na dza ndzebɔn dze na nyina nsɛɛ,
Fa Wo tum kɛse n' siw ano,
Na yɛmper daa
Nnya nyimdzee na dɔ mapa.

Verse 6
Egya baatan, kora hɔn a Worinnhyia mu bio wɔ ha;
Ma dza woedua n' nsow aba pa
Bafuu ofi ber to ber;
Hɔn a wɔresan n'
Nnyɛ anokwafo nsen nkan' n'. Amen.

title: Nyame Doyefo A W' ehumbobor
raw_title: CAN283 Nyame Doyefo A W' ehumbobor
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyame dɔyɛfo a W' ehumbɔbɔr
Dom hɛn fie kan na enuadɔ, Fa hɛn nguankuw gu W' abaw mu, Dɛ mbrɛ eyɛɛ n' tsetsebaado n'.

Verse 2
N-dze a yɛdze tow ndwom yɛserew,
Ma hɛn fie yɛ enyigye yi, Yɛdze tow ndwom yi Wo ayɛw a, Aso, Ewuradze, innketsie hɛn?

Verse 3
Ɔbram' nhyira na awerɛhow ntsi,
Enyigye a wɔtse ase n-tsi,
Nye hɔn a woewu nyina ntsi, Yɛda W' ase, hɛn Egya pa.

Verse 4
Hɛn mber pam' dɛw a etwam' ntsi,
Enyigye a yɛwɔm' sesei ntsi, Hɛn bra n' ewimbir mu kan ntsi, Yɛda W' ase hɛn Egya pa.

Verse 5
Ma W' adom mbɔ hɛn ho aprɔw,
Ma W' ehumbɔbɔr mbra hɛn do,
Ma W' asomdwee ntsena hɛn nkyɛn
"M-berantsen nyinara mu. Amen. "

title: Ahomka Fi Nye Mbre Wodo Wo Kese
raw_title: CAN284 Ahomka Fi Nye Mbre Wodo Wo Kese
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ahomka fi nye mbrɛ wɔdɔ wo kɛse,
'Wo, Nyɛnko pa, adasa Agyenkwa, Na wɔdze Wo tsena mpanyin tsenabea Wɔ ahɔho a wɔba hɔ nyina mu.

Verse 2
Ahomka fi nye mbrɛ beenu abɔ mu Ayɛ kor gyedzi na enyidar mu, Ma owu nkotoo na otum paa hɔn mu, Na ɔno mpo nntum nnsɛɛ koryɛ n' koraa.

Verse 3
Ahomka fi nye bea a wɔdze no mu mba
Hyɛ Wo nsa wɔ gyedzi nye mpaabɔ mu, Na Ɔwo, hɔn Damfo, ifi sor weɔn hɔn, Na ehwɛ hɔn do kyɛn mbrɛ na bɔhwɛ.

Verse 4
Ahomka fi nye mbrɛ obiara som Wo
Ahobrɛadze mu wɔ no dwumadzim', Dze kodu dɛ fam' dwuma nyina ho tsew, Dɛ wɔdze rema Wo, Ewuradze.

Verse 5
Ahomka fi nye beebi a werɛ mmfir Wo
Ber a enyigye na dɛw abor do;
Ahomka fim' na wɔdze sunsum pirafo Brɛ Wo, Duyɛfo, Werɛkyekyefo.

Verse 6
Dze kɛpem dɛ sɛ wiadze dwumadzi sa a,
Hɔn nyina behyia Wo wɔ sor fi n' mu, Mbrɛ ifir bae, na efowee kɔree no,
Ɔdɔ na asomdwee domankoma fi n'.

title: Nyame Hen Mboa Mber A Oasen
raw_title: CAN285 Nyame Hen Mboa Mber A Oasen
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyame hɛn mboa mber a ɔasen,
Hɛn ndaamba enyidar, Hɛn sumabew wɔ ehumtu ber, Hɛn domankoma fi.

Verse 2
W' ahengua no no nwim ase
Na yɛbɛda ho ahyɛ;
W' abaw no nko mpo ɔdɔɔ so, Obotwitwa agye hɛn.

Verse 3
Ansaana wɔreyɛ nkokwaa,
Mbrɛ Wonnyae mmbɔɔ wiadze Ofi tsetse eyɛ Nyame, Eyɛ so afebɔɔ.

Verse 4
M-fe apem yɛ W' enyi do
Dɛ da kor a ɔasen, Ɔyɛ tsia dɛ anago sum Na anapa kan ehyiae.

Verse 5
Adasamba a wɔtse wiadze
Na hɔn dadwen nyina,
Ɔnnkyɛr biara na wɔapem kɔ, Wɔayew hɛn enyi do.

Verse 6
M-ber soa ne mba nyina kɔ
Dɛ esu a ɔrepem;
Wɔhera dɛ mbrɛ adaaso hera Ber a adze rekye.

Verse 7
Nyame hɛn mboa mber a ɔasen, Hɛn ndaamba enyidar,
Yɛtse nkwa mu yi wowaw hɛn,
Yɛ hɛn fi a onnyi ewiei. Amen.

title: Nyame Ngye Hen Hen Pa
raw_title: CAN286 Nyame Ngye Hen Hen Pa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyame ngye hɛn Hen pa, Hɛn Hen kunyin nnyin nkyɛr, Nyame ngye Ɔhen!
Ɔmma n' konyimdzi daa,
Ahomka nye enyimnyam, Ma ɔnhwɛ ɔman do nkyɛr; Nyame ngye Ɔhen!

Verse 2
Wo nsam' nhyira papa n',
Kyɛw nye yi, wora gu no do
Ondzi hen nkyɛr,
Nkyɛ ɔaawowaw hɛn mbra,
Ma daa hɛn so yɛdze
'Koma na dɛw yaatow Nyame ngye Ɔhen!

title: Amansuon Twerammpon
raw_title: CAN287 Amansuon Twerammpon
lyrics:
Verse 1
Amansuon Twerammpon,
Yesu bɔ Wo ewuo,
Dɛ tsie Wo mba abɔn, Hwɛ hɛn do dwudwoodwo.
Chorus
Nyame, ma Ghana Mbew ngyina, Nhyira nka no mu mba nyina.

Verse 2
Ao, dom hɛn President
Ɔsor tum na nyansa, Ama n' aber yi do Nsiesie aaka hɛn nsa.

Verse 3
Nyame, apam Wura,
Pam hɛn man mu apamfo; Ma Woho do, kora Wo mba anokwafo.

Verse 4
Edwumayɛfo pa a
Wɔdwen na wɔhwɛ kan, Ewuradze, ma daa
Wɔnsoɛr wɔnhwɛ hɛn man.

Verse 5
Dom hɛn daa W' asomdwee,
Ɔdomankoma Hen; Yɛserɛ Wo amandwee Dze ma hɛn mbasantsen.
Chorus
Nyame, ma Ghana Mbew ngyina, Nhyira nka no mu mba nyina.

title: Aman Wura A W' adom Doo So
raw_title: CAN288 Aman Wura A W' adom Doo So
lyrics:
Verse 1
Aman Wura a W' adom dɔɔ so,
Wo nkowaa atɔbɔ tonton Wo dzin; Ayɛ hɛn man n' Apatasu; Wo tum nwanwa fir mbersantsen.
Verse
Asɛɛ tamfo n' mamman;
Agye hɛn so hɛn man; Aman-suro Nyame,
'Wo nye mbɔbɔrhunyi.
Yehuhor Wo, Ɔnwanwanyi!

Verse 2
Yɛtotɔ serɛ Wo amandwee
Ɔnye Wo ho nyimdzee daa so;
Ma yie nyina mu yɛnnkɛyɛ hwee Atwe hɛn man yi do mbusu.
Verse
Ber a ndzepa abɛn n',
Ɔdɔ Nyame, bɛn hɛn,
Egya, hu hɛn mbɔbɔr; Yehia gyedzi no dɔr.
Adom Wura, tsie hɛn asɔr.

Verse 3
Aman Wura, Tsetse Tumfo, 'Wo nye hɛn Enyindado Sekyɛ! Egyanom mpanyin hɔn Boafo Dza yɛafom do nyina fakyɛ.
Verse
Dzi Wo tum daa wɔ ha, Mma nnto hɛn seraha. Dom hɛn mbanyinndam Wɔ krɔnkrɔnyɛ nyinam'.
Na dzi hen wɔ hɛn akomam'.

Verse 4
Asomdwee Hen, bɔ ndze yie ma Amankofo ngu ndadze fam'! Fa koryɛ na ɔdɔ homa Twe wiadze nyina bra W' afam'.
Verse
Nyame, mber nyɛ ntsɛm mbra
Ma wiadzem' amambra
N-yɛ Wo nko Wodze,
N' amambu na tumdzi, M-fata Wo sor ahendzi.

Verse 5
Asomdwee da a aman dze dɔ
Bɔbɔ dɔ mu n' ka ho mbra ntsɛm; Ma nsisi nkɔ; ma enuadɔ Nyɛ wiadze nyina hɔn asɛm.
Verse
Nkambaa bɛdan sɔsɔw,
Ako-mfowa bɛdan nsɔw,
Wiadze bɛdan Heaven, Da a Jesus Christ Sahen Bedzi wiadze hen mbersatsen.

title: Nyame Egya Tumfo
raw_title: CAN289 Nyame Egya Tumfo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyame Egya Tumfo, Tsetse mpanyin Boafo Na Guandɔbea!
Kyea W' enyi hwɛ hɛn m an,
Ao, yɛ n' dɛ W' ahenman, Yie nyinara fa ma n'; Hɛn awobea a!

Verse 2
Abɔ hɛn man ne tsir
Sika pa abɔtsir
Enyimnyam mu;
Na mbrɛ Woara esi
Ehyira hɛn asaase,
Aman nntum nntse ase; Ntonton nka Wo.

Verse 3
Egyapadze bɛn nye Hɛn siar awobea yi!
Ahomka man!
No mu ndzepa a wɔnntɔ,
N' amandzwee, n' ahotɔ, Ofir, Nyame, Wo dɔ Dadaada no.

Verse 4
Egyanom fona piigyan n' Aso ɔbɛyɛ gyan?
Dabiarada!
Hɛn man ne yieyɛ ntsi
Atseetsee mpo Wɔanntse; Wɔpɛ hɛn yie; dɛm ntsi Yɛkaa hɔn daa.

Verse 5
Nyame, nsiesie Pɛfo Na asomdwee Mafo, Yɛ hɛn Fapem.
Sɛɛ mansotwe akɔndɔ;
Ma nsisi nyina nkɔ; Fa koryɛ, amandɔ Dom hɛn daapem.

Verse 6
Hɛn nkwa, Nyame Ɔba,
Ma yɛnyɛ nhyira mba,
Adehye man;
Sunsum a ennsakyer
Hɛn Awerɛkyekyer, Wo nsa ndzi hɛn ekyir; Kora hɛn man!

title: Nyame, Fa Wo Nhyira Pon Hen
raw_title: CAN290 Nyame, Fa Wo Nhyira Pon Hen
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyame, fa wo nhyira pon hɛn,
Ma yɛnkɔ asomdwee mu; Yɛnda ho ndzi sor edziban; Dɔr hɛn gyedzi nye hɛn dɔ:
Fa akomatɔmu hyɛ hɛn mu;
Verse
Yɛdze hɛn 'koma ma Wo; Yenya du hɛn siar bea no do a, Yɛbɛma Wo ayɛyi pa!
Alleluia. Amen.

title: Awerekyekyer Nyankopon
raw_title: CAN291 Awerekyekyer Nyankopon
lyrics:
Verse 1
Awerɛkyekyer Nyankopɔn, Gye nyim no yɛ Wodze; Woara Wodze na yɛdze ma W' Wɔ daa ayɛyi mu.

Verse 2
Yɛnam Woara Wo mu yɛbae, Hɛn akoma yɛ kor; O Jesus, yehyiaa Wo dzin mu, Yɛpaam' so Wo dzin mu.

Verse 3
Yɛpaam' honamm', nnyɛ sunsum mu,
Na hɛn adwen si kor;
Hɛn nyina yɛfam Jesus ho a, Hɛn nsa bɛda nsam' daa.

Verse 4
Hɛn sunsum nyinaa yɛ adze kor,
Wɔpaa hɛnm' a ɔnnkɛyɛ;
Nkokwaa bɔsoɛr, epo bɛpram, Worunntum mmpaa hɛn mu.

Verse 5
Hɛn nkwa wɔ Christ hɔ wɔ Nyamem'; Hɛn Nkwa befir edze ntsɛm,
Na oeyi N' enyimnyam akyerɛ Wɔ Ne mfɛwbam' wɔ ha.

Verse 6
Hɛn sunsum wɔ No tum n-sam', Ɔdze hɛn besie daa; Na menye wo yɛnye N' begyina zion koko no do.

Verse 7
Hɛn enyi bohu No wɔ hɔ, Yɛbɛhyerɛn dɛ Ɔno: Ahotsewfo nye abɔfo hyia a, O 'bɛn enyimnyam nye 'i!

Verse 8
O, n-hyiamu no bɛyɛ dɛw!
Yɛbɛhyɛ ntar fitaa,
Yebenyinam menankɔnson Na yɛasoa ahenkyɛw.

Verse 9
Nna hom mbɔ mbɔdzen ma yɛnko,
Yɛnko ntsew mu nkɔ sor;
Hɛn adwen ngyina ewiei no do, Hɛn enyi ntsim botae n'.

Verse 10
Nna hom ma yɛnhom do nkodu
Eda a yebodu fie;
O bra, yɛ ntsɛm fi sor sian bra Jesus, Pomfo Kɛse!

title: Odofo, Yema W' Nantseyie
raw_title: CAN292 Odofo, Yema W' Nantseyie
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔdofo, yɛma w' "Nantseyie!"
Nyame nkora wo nkodu fie, Ongya w' nkɔ w' akwantu n' ewiei Sɔkyee na komm.

Verse 2
Nyame N' enyimpa nka wo do,
Ɔmboa w' akwan nyinara mu, Ɔnweɔn wo yie ara nkodu Da a yebehyiam'.

Verse 3
Kaansa hɛn honam ridzi mpaa
Ma yennkohu w' enyim mpo a, Yebehyiam' wɔ Nyame mu daa Dɛ yɛnnkɛpaam'.

Verse 4
Nyame Ne kan ntsew w' akwan mu,
Ɔmma ne nhyira mbra wo do, Ɔmfa N' ahoɔdzen mma w' mbordo, Sesei na daa.

title: Kronkron Nyame A W' enyim
raw_title: CAN293 Kronkron Nyame A W' enyim
lyrics:
Verse 1
Krɔnkrɔn Nyame a w' enyim
Atantandze remmba,
Naaso edze mbɔbɔrhu
Ehwɛ bɔn wiadze yi;
Ma hɛn akɔndɔ pa ma
Yembubu bɔn mpokyerɛm', Ma hɛn Christ mbɔbɔrhu ma Yɛmpɛ hɔn a wɔayew.

Verse 2
Hɛn tamfo n' yɛ nyitsewfo;
No dɔm so ho yɛ hu
Ɔdze mbusu piinara
Sɛɛ hɛn asaase pa;
Hɔn a wɔko tsia hɔn no
Wɔ ɔko dzendzen no mu n', Wɔ dɛ wɔyɛ dzen mbordo Wɔ Christ akodze mu.

Verse 3
'Wo na ayɛ wɔ hɛn mu
Ndwuma akɛse a yehu 'i,
Yɛda W' ase dza ayɛ,
Ɔnye dza ebɛyɛ;
Yɛda W' ase wɔ enyidar
A ɔhyɛ hɛn nsa dzen, Ma yɛper hwehwɛ nhyira a Ɔkyɛn dza hɛn nsa aka.

Verse 4
Ahotsew na Mbɔbɔrhu Na Dɔ na Tum Nyame e!
Dzi kan kodu dɛ ko yi
Ɔbɔ adze asomdwee mu. Na hɔn a wɔdze mpaabɔ
Peer gyee hɔn enuanom
Dze konyindwom behyia Wo
O Ɔkorsa Krɔnkrɔn! Amen.

title: Dza Yedze Ma W' biara
raw_title: CAN294 Dza Yedze Ma W' biara
lyrics:
Verse 1
Dza yɛdze ma W' biara,
Hɛn Wura, Woara Wodze a; Dza yɛwɔ nyina yɛ Wodze:
Edze maa hɛn esie.

Verse 2
Ma yɛngye W' akyɛdze
Dɛ ahwɛdofo pa,
Dɛ mbrɛ ihyira hɛn n', yɛmfa dɛw, Mfa hɛn ndɔbaa mbrɛ Wo.

Verse 3
'Koma pii abobɔ,
Hia wɔ efi pii mu,
Na nguambaa pii a Guanhwɛfo n' Wui maa hɔn n' atɔ gon.

Verse 4
Ebɛkyekye werɛ,
'Behyira abɔbɔfo,
Bɔhwehwɛ ankonam nye ngyanka, Iyi nye nyamesom.

Verse 5
Ebɛgye adaduafo,
'Dze abɔn bɛbrɛ Nyame,
'Bɛkyerɛ nkwa na asomdwee kwan n', Yɛ Christianyɛ ampa.

Verse 6
Hɛn gyedzi yɛ mberɛw dze,
So yɛgye W' asɛm dzi; Nyame, dza yɛyɛ ma Wo mba, Yɛyɛ ma Woara.

title: Christ, W' enyimnyam Hye Wim' Ma
raw_title: CAN295 Christ, W' enyimnyam Hye Wim' Ma
lyrics:
Verse 1
Christ, W' enyimnyam hyɛ wim' ma,
Christ, Wo nko nye nokwar kan,
Ndzeyɛtsenenee Ewia, pue,
Hyɛ anago sum nyina do; Sor Adzekyee, bra me nkyɛn Hyerɛn m' akomam', yɛ hɔ kann.

Verse 2
Annka adzekyee ho ammba a,
Nna da n' nyina ayɛ awerɛhow;
Metse sum nye mbusu mu,
Kɛpem dɛ W' ehumbɔbɔr Hyerɛn dze dɛw hyɛ mo mu, Na ɔbɔ m' akoma mu hyew.

Verse 3
Dem ntsi bra bɛsera me kra; Pa bɔn nye awerɛhow sum no;
Nyame kan, hyɛ mo mu ma;
Pa m' ekyingye nyinara;
Da Woho edzi mbordo ara
Kodu da a onnyi ewiei n' mu.

title: Me Kra, Ye Ntsem Nye Ewia Nnyan
raw_title: CAN296 Me Kra, Ye Ntsem Nye Ewia Nnyan
lyrics:
Verse 1
Me kra, yɛ ntsɛm nye ewia nnyan
N-si mu ntu wo daadaa kwan; Sun akwadwer to nkyɛn na soɛr Fa dɛw bɔ w' anapa afɔr.

Verse 2
Mber a asɛɛ n' kwa hyɛ ananm';
Bɔ bra dɛ ndɛ owu nam kwanm';
Kɔ kan kora akyɛdze a Nyame ama n'; Siesie woho ma atsɛmbu da n'.

Verse 3
Fa nokwar ka w' asɛm biara;
Mma wo tsibowa mmbu w' atsɛn da;
Nyame enyi hu mbea nyina do
Hyɛ nsumaam' adwen nye nyɛe nsew;

Verse 4
Me kra, nyan na ma woho do,
Fa woho bɔ abɔfo ho,
Na hɔndze, anago nyina
Wɔtow ndwom ma Ɔsor Hen daa.

Verse 5
Ayɛyi nka W', Ɔwo a esie m' Na ama m' ahomgye a ɔwɔ ndam': Sɛ mifi wum' so minyan a Ma mo so me nsa nka daa nkwa.

Verse 6
Mobɔ W' anohoba fofor:
Ma mo bɔn ntwamm' dɛ bɔsu nkɔ, Woara weɔn m' adwen nsunyiwa, Fa Wo Sunsum hyɛ me kra ma.

Verse 7
M' adwen, me nsɛm, nye me ndeyɛɛ- Woara dzi ne nyina do ndɛ, Na dza mowɔ na dza mutum Nyina aabɔm' wɔ Wo nkamfom'.

Verse 8
Ayɛyi nka Nyame dɔyɛfo;
Asaasemba, hom nkamfo No;
Sor abɔfo hom so ntonton N', Egya, Ɔba, Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn! Amen.

title: Adzekyee Kan
raw_title: CAN297 Adzekyee Kan
lyrics:
Verse 1
Adzekyee kan
Ama menyan,
Na mefi me nda mu;
M' Egya, minyim Dɛ Wo dɔ nko Na ɔkora W' abofra.

Verse 2
N-dɛ da yi,
Meserɛ Wo,
Gya me, yɛ mo Hwɛfo;
Yi mo bɔn kɔ,
Jesus siarfo,
Na ma mentsena Wo nkyɛn.

Verse 3
O Sunsum a
Ema adom,
Bɛtsena m' akoma mu;
Ma memfata,
Na da bi so
Maaba ebohu W' enyim.

title: Bra Ntsem, O Hen Wura, Pa Jesus
raw_title: CAN298 Bra Ntsem, O Hen Wura, Pa Jesus
lyrics:
Verse 1
Bra ntsɛm, O hɛn Wura, pa Jesus,
Ansaana adze akye, Yenyan a ma yenhu W' enyim Anapa yɛ Ewia ma hɛn.

Verse 2
Bɛn hɛn O hɛn Wura pa Jesus,
Na yeennsuro ara da; Ewiaber mu hyew ka hɛn a, Yɛserɛ Wo dɛ yɛ hɛn Nwin.

Verse 3
Ka hɛn nkyɛn, Wura pa Jesus,
Ber a ewia akɔtɔ;
Ewimbir a yɛaberɛ no,
Woara yɛ hɛn Ahomgye.

title: Adze Akye O
raw_title: CAN299 Adze Akye O
lyrics:
Verse 1
Adze akye O!
Da fofor yi
Dze enyigye frɛ me dɛ Monsoɛr m-fi me mpa do.

Verse 2
Adzekyee
Pa a ɔtse dɛm
Nn-kyee wɔ wiadze ha pɛn- Da fɛɛfɛw yi yɛ soronko.

Verse 3
Adzekyee
Pii bɛba bio;
Na wim' a ɔatsew kann yi Ɔnnkɛyɛ dɛmara bio.

Verse 4
Sor Egya,
M' asɔr nye dɛ
Ma menyɛ dza Ɔwo 'pɛ
Ndɛ da yi nye mber nyina.

title: Gyefo, Hyira Hen Ana Yeako
raw_title: CAN300 Gyefo, Hyira Hen Ana Yeako
lyrics:
Verse 1
Gyefo, hyira hɛn ana yɛakɔ;
Fa W' asɛm hyɛ hɛn adwen mu; Fa dɔ, mbrɛhoadze, nye pɛ pa Bɔ hɛn akoma nwin yi hyew.
Chorus
O Jesus brɛfo, yɛserɛ dɛ
Nkwa mu o, owu mu o, yɛ hɛn Kan.

Verse 2
Adze asa, no mu mber etwam',
Konyim kakra a adom edzi, Hɛn esintɔ, hɛn asehwe, Ebu ne nyina ho nkontaa.
Chorus
O Jesus brɛfo, yɛserɛ dɛ
Nkwa mu o, owu mu o, yɛ hɛn Kan.

Verse 3
Ewuradze, dom hɛn ahosan
Fi akwan bɔn nyinara mu;
Dom hɛn krɔnkrɔnyɛ nye asomdwee Ma ɔnkyɛn mber a abɛsen.
Chorus
O Jesus brɛfo, yɛserɛ dɛ
Nkwa mu o, owu mu o, yɛ hɛn Kan.

Verse 4
Nnyɛ fakyɛ nko bi na yɛserɛ,
Dom hɛn Wo suro nye fahodzi, Nye akoma a dɔ ahyɛ no ma, Na ɔpɛ dɛ ɔnye Wo sɛ.
Chorus
O Jesus brɛfo, yɛserɛ dɛ
Nkwa mu o, owu mu o, yɛ hɛn Kan.

Verse 5
Yɛbɔ Wo mpaa ma adɔfo, 'Werɛhofo na ndzebɔnyɛfo;
O fa W' ehumbɔbɔr dom hɔn, Hɛn adze nyina nye Woara.
Chorus
O Jesus brɛfo, yɛserɛ dɛ
Nkwa mu o, owu mu o, yɛ hɛn Kan. Amen.

title: Anapawi Hyenhyenn N' etwam
raw_title: CAN301 Anapawi Hyenhyenn N' etwam
lyrics:
Verse 1
Anapawi hyɛnhyɛnn n' etwam'
Ɔahwer ne hyɛnhyɛnn nyina ntsɛm Adzesaa no sunsuma retsen Prɛko so bio.

Verse 2
Hɛn nkwa tse dɛ ɔpɛber da
N' enyimnyam wi n' twam' ntsɛmara Gya hɛn, O Christ, 'Wo a eyɛ nkwa, Kodu fie sɔnn.

Verse 3
Fa W' adom a ɔhyɛ kra nkuran n'
Twe hɛn 'koma kɔ sor man ho; Boa hɛn ma yɛmfa hɛn enyi Ntsim sor man n' do.

Verse 4
Mbrɛ kan na dɛw na asomdwee Bɔ mu yɛ kor dzi hen wɔ hɔ n', Nna sor abɔfo nngyaa hɔn ndwom Tow ara da n'.

Verse 5
Mbrɛ ahotsewfo hyɛ ntar fitaa n'
Na ewimbir sunsuma ngye hɔ da n' Mbrɛ 'Wo ɔdomankoma Kan mu kan Yɛ abɔso Hen.

title: Gyefo Dofo, Me Kra N' ewia
raw_title: CAN302 Gyefo Dofo, Me Kra N' ewia
lyrics:
Verse 1
Gyefo dɔfo, me kra n' ewia,
Ɔwo 'bɛn a, adze nnsa da; O mma mununkum biara mmfi fam' Nn-suma W' mmfi W' akowaa enyiwam'!

Verse 2
Ber a enyikom aka me
Dɛ bɔsu a ogu asaase do, N-da refa m' a, m' adwen nyɛ Dɛ Christ bom' nda n' ɔbɛyɛ dɛw!

Verse 3
Bra begya m' kwan fi ahema,
Na innyi hɔ a, munntum mmbɔ bra; Adze sa so a nye me bɛtsena:
Musuro owu sɛ innyi hɔ a.

Verse 4
Wo ba bi a ɔafom kwan wɔ hɔ a
N-dɛ so oetsia W' asɛm do a, Adom dwuma n' nhyɛ ase ber yim'; Mma ɔnnda ho ara nnda bɔn mu.

Verse 5
Hwɛ ayarfo do; ma ehiafo
Nhyira a ofi W' adom mbordo; Hɔn a awerɛhow atɔ hɔn do, Wɔnda dɛ mbɔtoaba berɛww.

Verse 6
Yenyan a, bra na behyira hɛn
Ansaana yeesim' etu kwan, Ekodu dɛ hɛn nkwa yi ayew
Wɔ sorsor Wo dɔ no bun mu.

title: Adze Resa Ampa
raw_title: CAN303 Adze Resa Ampa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Adze resa ampa
Ewimbir aba, Na enyimkan rudum, Ma wim' reyɛ sum.

Verse 2
Isum rehyɛ ampa,
Nworaba rupuepue, Nnoma, mbowa nye nhyiren Bɛdeda sesei.

Verse 3
Jesus, fa Wo nsa to
Hɔn a wɔaberɛ do;
Na fa Wo nhyira pa Dom hɔn ma wɔnda.

Verse 4
Dom mbofra nkakraba
Ma wonhu Wo daa; Hɔn a wɔwɔ po do, Woara hwɛ hɔn do.

Verse 5
Hɔn so a wonntum nnda,
Hyɛ hɔn dzen daa daa;
Hɔn a wɔdwendwen bɔn, Dan hɔn na twe hɔn.

Verse 6
W' abɔfo mpa m' mbusu
Anago yi mu, Wɔmfa hɔn atsaban M-bɔ mo ho ban.

Verse 7
Ao, fa mo bɔn kyɛ me,
Na ma adze nkye me Dɛ m' akoma mu tsen Na mo ho yɛ dzen.

Verse 8
Enyimnyam nka Egya,
Enyimnyam nka Ba, Nye 'Wo, Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn,
Daa, hɛn Nyankopɔn. Amen.

title: Ansaana M' beda N', Yie Biara
raw_title: CAN304 Ansaana M' beda N', Yie Biara
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ansaana m' bɛda n' , yie biara
Me Nyame
Ayɛ m' ndɛ,
M' bɛda m' Agyenkwa ase.

Verse 2
Mo Wura, memfa ndaase bɛn mma
Wo dzin a
Ɔnnsesa n'
Mbɔbɔrhufo, dɔfo?

Verse 3
M' ekyinkyin nyinam' 'Wo na 'gya m'
Wɔ Wo kwanm',
Tsiee m' asɔr,
Saan me nyɛe nyina ho.

Verse 4
Mma nndan me nngya na dɔ me daa;
W' Asomdwee
Nyɛ me nhyira,
Nkodu dɛ 'beyi me ha.

Verse 5
Mo botan, mo weɔmfo, m' aban,
Kora m' sɔnn, Ber a mada,
Fa Wo tum nyinara.

Verse 6
Meka m' enyi gu do wum' a,
Ma monsoɛr Dɛ meka Enyansafo no ho.

title: Enye Me Ntsena
raw_title: CAN305 Enye Me Ntsena
lyrics:
Verse 1
Enye me ntsena! onwim ano rotɔ; Sum regye, Ewuradze, nye me ntsena! Aboafo pa, na akyekyewerɛfo sa a, Onnyibi-ne-bi-a-ɔba, enye m' ntsena!

Verse 2
N-kwa da ketseaba yi rotwe kɔ;
Wiadze dɛw repa; n' enyimnyam resen;
N-sakyer na ɔsɛɛ nko ara na muhu; Ao, 'Wo a ennsakyer da, enye me ntsena.

Verse 3
Mihia Wo me nkyɛn aber nyinara, W' adom n-ko na ɔka siamfo hyɛ;
Gyafo nye Taafo wɔ hen ka Wo ho?
Isum o, ekan o, enye me ntsena.

Verse 4
Sɛ menye Wo nam a, munnsuro hwee; Ɔyaw nnyɛ durdur, na nyinsu nnyɛ wen:
Owu, wo bɔr na wo konyim wɔ hen?
Mo konyim wɔ do daa, sɛ 'Wo nye m' tse a.

Verse 5
Murumua m' enyi a, yi Wo mbeamudua n' kyerɛ m';
Hyerɛn wɔ sum mu, kyerɛ m' ɔsor do kwan; Ɔsor rehyerɛn, wiadze kusuww repa; N-kwam' o, owum' o, enye me ntsena!

title: Nyame A Eboo Sor Nye Asaase
raw_title: CAN306 Nyame A Eboo Sor Nye Asaase
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyame a ebɔɔ sor nye asaase,
Nye kan na sum,
Ma yɛyɛ edwuma adzekyee,
Yɛda anago;
Ma sor abɔfo mbɔweɔn hɛn,
Dom hɛn n-da pa ma yɛnda, Adaaso krɔnkrɔn mbra hɛn do, Anago 'i nyina.

Verse 2
Weɔn hɛn kan mu; weɔn hɛn sum mu;
Na sɛ yewu a,
Wo tum nsa no nkora hɛn nyina Ma yɛnda komm.
Abɛn kɛse no nyan hɛn a,
Da no a, Ewuradze mma mmpa hɛn, Na fa hɛn kɔ W' enyimnyam mu Yenkedzi dɛw.

title: Ewuradze, Yerefre Wo
raw_title: CAN307 Ewuradze, Yerefre Wo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ewuradze, yɛrefrɛ Wo;
Nye hɛn ntsena, hɛn Hɔho pa, Ber a ewia rokɔtɔ Ma adzesaa so reba.

Verse 2
Hɔn a hɔn werɛ ahow,
Nye hɔn ntsena, hɔn Hɔho pa; Fa W' asomdwee na Wo dɛw Hyɛ hɔn akoma mu ma.

Verse 3
Boa akoma a oepira
Na obiara a ɔretseetsee n';
Tsena hɔn mu dɛ Hɔho pa, Fa W' adom bɛhyɛ hɔn dzen.

Verse 4
Fa Wo nkwagye tum bɔsoɛ
Na hyira ɔkra biara;
Ewimbir yim' bra bɛyɛ
Ndzebɔnyɛfo Hɔho pa.

title: Ewuradze, Nyame Otumfo
raw_title: CAN308 Ewuradze, Nyame Otumfo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ewuradze, Nyame Otumfo,
Tsie Wo mba hɛn ayɛyi,
Ɔwo a eyɛ mbɔbɔrhufo,
Yɛ aso ma hɛn mpaayi;
Adom Hen, tsie hɛn asɔr, Egya, hu Wo mba mbɔbɔr.

Verse 2
'Wo a aweɔn hɛn enyimkan, Weɔn hɛn anago yim' so.
Ma W' abɔfo mbɔ hɛn ho ban,
Wɔmpa hɛn sum mu mbusu;
Gye hɛn awerɛfir wum', Sie hɛn honam nye sunsum.

Verse 3
Adzekyee pa nya kye hɛn a,
Ma yɛnde Wo yie ase;
Boa ma yɛmfa hɛn bra nyina,
Ndzi W' adɔyɛ ho dase;
Mber n' nya ba a, Agyenkwa Christ, Fa hɛn kodu Paradise.

title: Nhyira Nka Akomamutsewfo
raw_title: CAN309 Nhyira Nka Akomamutsewfo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nhyira nka akomamutsewfo,
Wobohu hɛn Nyame;
Nyame esumadze yɛ hɔndze Hɛn kra yɛ Christ ne fi.

Verse 2
Ewuradze a ofii sor
Brɛɛ hɛn nkwa na asomdwee,
Nye nyimpa bɛtsenaa botooyɛm',
Yɛɛ Fasusu na Hen-

Verse 3
Ɔda ho dze Noho
Ma ɔkra brɛfo no; Na ɔdze N' ahengua no ma Akoma a no mu tsew.

Verse 4
Ewuradze, yɛrohwehwɛ W' Ma nhyira yi nyɛ hɛndze. Ma hɛn akoma a ɔbotow, Asɔrfi a ɔsɛ Wo.

title: Hom Mbra Ma Yentu
raw_title: CAN310 Hom Mbra Ma Yentu
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hom mbra ma yentu
Hɛn kwan yi fofor
Yɛnye afe yi nkyin,
Na mma yenngyina kyerɛ hɛn Wura aba.

Verse 2
Hom ma yɛmfa dɛw
Yɛnyɛ N' apɛdze,
Yɛmfa abotar
Na dɔ dwumadzi nsi hɛn adom no pi.

Verse 3
Hɛn nkwa yɛ adaaso;
Hɛn mber tse dɛ nsu a
Ɔrepem hwew hwew
Na mber kobɔnyi no nngyina ara pɛn.

Verse 4
Wɔatow egyen no,
M-ber no ɔkɔ;
Apem afe no
Ɔrobɔto hɛn, na onnyiewiei aba.

Verse 5
Ao, nkyɛ biara aaka
Da a ɔbɛba n' dɛ,
Mako ɔko pa n'
Dwuma a edze maa me n' mewie ne nyina yɛ.

Verse 6
Ao, nkyɛ biara aatse, No Wura reka n' dɛ:
M-bo, ayɛ n' yie
Hɛn me dɛw mu na tsena M' ahengua no do.

title: Hom Ntow Jehovah N' ayeyi
raw_title: CAN311 Hom Ntow Jehovah N' ayeyi
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hom ntow Jehovah N' ayɛyi
Nkamfo nyina dzi wɔ N';
Ɔno a ɔma hɛn nda mu war, Hɛn ndwom pa no fata N'.

Verse 2
Ɔahwɛ hɛn do dze hɛn etwa
Afe kor so no mu;
Hɛn nyina dzedze ndwom fofor Befir Nyame N' enyim.

Verse 3
Egya, ehu hɛn mbɔbɔr pɛn;
Na 'da ho hwɛ hɛn so; Mbrɛ yɛtse, dza yɛwɔ biara, Yedua Christ do dze ma W'.

Verse 4
Hɛn ano na hɛn bra bɛka
Wo dɔ n' anwanwadze;
Yɛnam Jesus N' anamɔn mu Bohu W' enyim wɔ sor.

Verse 5
Hɛn nda ne nkaase yɛ Wodze,
Ne nyina yɛdze ma W';
Hɛn tum biara yetu si nkyɛn Yɛdze bɔ afɔr ma Wo.

title: Yema Hen Akoma Do Tow
raw_title: CAN312 Yema Hen Akoma Do Tow
lyrics:
Verse 1
Yɛma hɛn akoma do tow,
N-tonton ndwom ma W' Wura,
Yɛdze hɛn dɛw afɔr brɛ Wo
Wɔ dɛw esebɔm' ara;
Harban ahyehyɛ sika ntar
Mbepɔw dze dɛw rowosow Mbɔnsam' ayɛ eburow ma Ma hɔn so wɔrotow ndwom.

Verse 2
N-dɛ hɛn afahyɛ da yim',
Yɛkaa Wo nsaano ayamuyie n',
Wo nhyira ndɔbaa-kan ndaase n',
Nna yɛdze gu W' enyim no
Adom akyɛdze soronko n'
Edze nyɛn hɛn nkorɔfo akra;
'Wo a 'ma hɛn asaase paanoo, Ma hɛn onnyiewiei paanoo.

Verse 3
Yɛsɔw adzekyee yim' fona,
Yɛberɛ hɛn dwumadzi mu;
Na wi tɔ a, edwuma sa,
Ma nyia ɔaberɛ n' nya ahomgye
Sɛ abɔfo buber n' wie a,
N-kyɛ ekyir n' yaafata Christ sika efiefi no a
Wɔdze kɔ asan fɛɛfɛw do n'.

Verse 4
Nyame Ne bea a apapafo
Tse do no woehyira do, Mbrɛ sika haban kɛse wɔ, Na esutsen hyɛnhyɛn pem.
Dɔm krɔnkrɔ nyina hɔn ndwoma no
Ndɛ ɔnye hɛndze asaa;
Buber ndwom a ɔmmbɔ adze n' Woehyira do m-prɛnsa.

title: Nyew, Nyame Ye
raw_title: CAN313 Nyew, Nyame Ye
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyew, Nyame ye- wɔ sor na ase
Epo no bun mu na kwaa mu, Ndze ɔpedu retsea mu dɛ Nyame bɔɔ hɛn, na Nyame ye.

Verse 2
Ewia a ɔnam ne kyenan do,
Na ɔtow ne nserɛmɛn gu ase ha, Wimu anago dɔm hyɛnhyɛnn n' nyina Tsea mu dɛ Nyame ye.

Verse 3
Nnoma dze dɛw gye ndwom no do,
Wɔtow n' fofor afe biara, Mframa pa a ɔbɔ na nyankom Wɔsa berɛww dɛ Nyame ye.

Verse 4
Metse n' wɔ mframa a ɔrobɔm',
Ɔnye tsetse mbepɔw no do, Sor a ɔpaapaam', po a ɔwor Hɔn nyinaa gye do dɛ Nyame ye.

Verse 5
Nyew, Nyame ye, abɔdze ka
Dɛ mbrɛ Nyame ama kasahom;
Nyimpa mfa ayɛyi mbordo
Ntow ndwom dɛw mu dɛ Nyame ye.

Verse 6
Nyame yɛda W' adom ase,
Nkanka hɛn sor edziban ho; W' adom fakyɛ, Wo nkwasɛm no, Ɔma yɛtow dɛ Nyame ye.

title: Hen Wura, Fi Wo Sor Tsenabew Do Tsie Hen
raw_title: CAN314 Hen Wura, Fi Wo Sor Tsenabew Do Tsie Hen
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hɛn Wura, fi Wo sor tsenabew do tsie hɛn:
Dɛ tsetsemba n' hɛn so yɛfona kwa, Gyesɛ Ɔwo a eyɛ Kan n' nye hɛn kɔ; Bra, Ewuradze, ama yeehu W' enyim.

Verse 2
Ewuradze 'Wo na 'dzi po a ɔwor do, Ber a oetutu ne tsir sgu do n': W' abaw yɛ dzen, hɛn ahɛn yɛ mberɛw, Kaa Galilee, na fa Wo mboa ma hɛn.

Verse 3
Yɛdze hɛn fifo nyina hyɛ Wo nsa:
Hɔn ntsi na yɛdɔw haban, yenu po, Hɔn ntsi na dabaa yebu eburow pa, Na 'nafua yebu pom' ndɔbaa fɛɛfɛw n'.

Verse 4
Yɛda W' ase na ewia, bɔsu, nyankom,
Wo tum n-sa no dze fir sor petse;-
Nnoma, mbowa, nam, nhaban, aba, nye eburow:
N-kwa horow nyina Farbaa nye 'Wo.

Verse 5
N-kwa Paanoo, aka n' W' asɛm mu dɛ: Nyia ɔfa Wo dzi gyedzim' n' onnkowu da!
Fa ehumbɔbɔr tsie Wo mba hɛn sufrɛ:
Ma hɛn ndɛ so hɛn daadaa edziban.

Verse 6
Dua Wo dɔ pa n' n' aba wɔ hɛn 'komam', Na yeebu abodwee na akomatɔm'.
Na ndaamba sɛ hɛn dwuma bɔ adze a,
Hɛn so yaaka Wo sor ndɔbaa no ho. Amen.

title: Nyame, Ndobaa Wura
raw_title: CAN315 Nyame, Ndobaa Wura
lyrics:
Verse 1
Nyame, ndɔbaa Wura,
Yɛbɔtonton Wo; Dza yɛwɔ nyinara W' ehumbɔbɔr nko.

Verse 2
Nyame, ndɔbaa Wura, W' ayamuyie dɔɔ so: Dza 'dze ma nyinara, Yɛdze san brɛ Wo.

Verse 3
Nyame, ndɔbaa Wura,
Tsie Wo mba mpaayi; Hɛn nkwa nyina fir Woara; Gye hɛn ayɛyi.

Verse 4
Enyimnyam nka Nyame,
Na Christ Agyenkwa, Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn wonyi Ne dzin ayɛw daa.

title: Amansuon, Hom Mbra
raw_title: CAN316 Amansuon, Hom Mbra
lyrics:
Verse 1
Amansuon, hom mbra, Na ndɔbaa Wura N' adom nwanwa no Sɛ ndaase mbordo.
Hom mfa akasamu
Ne ndze mbɔ hom nsam', Na hom mbɔ se dɛ, Ɔnnso Nyame yɛ.
Chorus
Ɔnnso Nyame yɛ
Ɔnnso Nyame yɛ,
Ɔsormba mma do,
Asempa ngye do;
Mpanyin na mbofra
Mbasia na mbarima, Hom mbɔ se nka dɛ, Ɔnnso Nyame yɛ.

Verse 2
Ewia wɔ hɔ yi,
Nyankom nngyaa tɔ yi,
Buber nnkɔbɔ hɛn,
Yebenya kyɛpɛn,
Hɛn anomu nnkofuw,
Hɛn atam nnkosuw, Ma daa yaaka dɛ, Ɔnnso Nyame yɛ.

Verse 3
Sɛ ɔbra bisiw Ma enyi do siw,
Sɛ ɔpaa hɛn do,
Ɔkyer do, bam do,
Sɛ yɛka a ɔmmba,
Sɛ yɛyɛ a ɔnnyɛ a,
Hɛn ndwom daa nye dɛ, Ɔnnso Nyame yɛ.

Verse 4
Hwɛ wo mbɔrkutu
N' ase onnkotu,
Wo ngo pɔr kakra Nnkɛsa dabiara.
Tow petse Nyame,
Ɔbɛma amee, Ma daa aaka dɛ, Ɔnnso Nyame yɛ.

title: Abodze Nyinara Womfa Ndaase Ndwom
raw_title: CAN317 Abodze Nyinara Womfa Ndaase Ndwom
lyrics:
Verse 1
Abɔdze nyinara wɔmfa ndaase ndwom
Mbra ndɔbaa Wura, Twerammpon enyim; Duaber nye buber ɔhyew nye awɔw Ne nyinara fir Nyankopɔn Wo dɔ.

Verse 2
Dza yɛwɔ biara- sika nye dwɛɛtɛɛ,
Nyimpadua nye kra, -Nyankopɔn dze kyɛe, Ntsi yɛdze ma N' bio dɛ afɔrbɔdze a Ɔsɔ n' enyi nwionn na ɔgye nhyira.

Verse 3
Hambowa nye tumbowa, nkakraba, akɛse, Hwɛ mbrɛ wɔrekyea dze reda ase! Dasanyi nkotoo na mayɛ tsiafo;
Me kra, fa ahotɔ bɛkamfo Dɔfo.

Verse 4
Yɛdze hɛn adwen, akoma nye nkwa
Ma Jesus hɛn Hen na hɛn Agyenkwa;
Sunsum Siarfo no wɔmfa nhyira ma N',
Wonhua, wɔnkamfo, wɔnhyɛ N' enyimnyam.

title: Mberantse Na Mbabaawa, Nkodaa Na Mberwa
raw_title: CAN318 Mberantse Na Mbabaawa, Nkodaa Na Mberwa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mberantsɛ na mbabaawa, nkɔdaa na mberwa,
Hom mfa ehurusi ndwom nkamfo Ɔkyɛso Nyame nno; N' adom nwanwa Wɔ amanaman nyinara mu.
Chorus
Enyimnyam, ndaase, na ntonton sɛ
Ɔkyɛso Nyame, Ɔbaatan pa; Nkɔkowaba ntow ndwom nhyira No dɛ:
Ɔkyɛso Nyame N' ayamuyie mmpa.

Verse 2
Yensi dɛn ara nda Nyame ase? Yensi dɛn nka No dɔ ho asɛm? Yɛbɔtow N' ayamuyie ho ndwom kɛse, Yɛbɔtoa N' adɔyɛ ho atsɛn.

Verse 3
Abɔdze biara nya N' akɔndɔdze;
Nam, nnoma na hambowa nyina so; Ɔkyɛso Nyame ma wonya wodzi, Ntsi wohuhor Ne dzin afebɔɔ.

Verse 4
Ao, hwɛ hamu nkyɛkyɛr ɔnye ndupɔn,
Dza wɔnnto nsa, so wɔnnto anan,
Ɔkyɛso Nyame nsamu bue ma hɔn Ma wonya hɔn daadaa edziban.

Verse 5
Ɔkyɛso Nyame, hɛn Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn Mfir Ne siar ewia no nhyɛ hɛn dzen, Ntɔ Ne nhyira nsu no nyɛ hɛn prɔmprɔm, Ma akra nyina nkamfo Ne dzin.

Verse 6
Ɔkyɛso Nyame ndom hɛn sor ndɔbaa,- Sunsum N' aba nyinara,- mbordo.
Na sɛ bɛkyebo buber no nya ba a, Yɛdze dɛw yeebu daa nkwa mbɔho.
Chorus
Enyimnyam, ndaase, na ntonton sɛ
Ɔkyɛso Nyame, Ɔbaatan pa; Nkɔkowaba ntow ndwom nhyira No dɛ:
Ɔkyɛso Nyame N' ayamuyie mmpa.

title: Wondzi Dew Mma Onua A Oewu Yi
raw_title: CAN319 Wondzi Dew Mma Onua A Oewu Yi
lyrics:
Verse 1
Wondzi dɛw mma onua a oewu yi,
No wu yi yɛ no mfaso kɛse,
Woeyi ne kra wɔ efiadze,
Woeyi no honam mpokyerɛ n' mu;
Wɔmma yɛmfa ndwom nka no do,
Yɛnye no sunsum mfow ɔsor, Oefi nsa kɔ kan man no mu, Ɔakɛtsena dɔ Eden no mu.

Verse 2
Hɛn nua edu ahɛndwirii hɔ,
Ɔatsew ehum nye aahow no mu, Tsiabaa yi ne nsa aka n' ahomgye, Ɔadan n' afrɛ egya ekyir.
Hɔn wɔda ho da fona pom',
Reper edu siar mpoano hɔ,
Beebi mbrɛ asomdwee nko wɔ, Na bɔn nye yaw nn-yi hɔ bio.

Verse 3
Hɔ na ahɛn dɔm nyina hyia,
Hɔn a wɔnye Agyenkwa nantseew ha n', Wɔbɔ se wokyiakyia hɔnho, Na wodzi fona nye wu do nyim:
Ɔbra n' akwantu n' abɔ adze;
Honam n' ahohia no etwam'; M-ber a wodzi n' wɔ sor no, Ɔnnkɔbɔ adze dabiara pɛn.

title: Ber A Dwumadzi Da Asa N
raw_title: CAN320 Ber A Dwumadzi Da Asa N
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ber a dwumadzi da asa n', Ber a bra 'mpiresi abɔ adze n! Egya, dom Wo ba fonafo Ahomgye afebɔɔ.

Verse 2
Ber a bɔn nkodzen abɔ adze n',
Ber a woeku kra mu tamfo n', W' adom asɛm no nhyɛ ma- Asomdwee afebɔɔ.

Verse 3
Ber a sum no enya apa n'
Ma enyim atsetsew no, Ma yenhuahua dɛw kan no- Kan ara afebɔɔ.

Verse 4
Ber a yaw atsɛ akoma
Ma afei oegyaa tow no, Fa hɛn kɔ mbrɛ nyinsu nnyi n', Dɛw ara afebɔɔ.

Verse 5
Ber a yɛrodwen nda a yɛasɛɛ n' ho,
Nda a ɔrennsan mmba bio n', Wo dɔm' kyerɛkyerɛ ma yensua Dɔ ara afebɔɔ.

Verse 6
Ber a nkwahwea etu kɔ n',
Ber a wumaa regye nedze n', Nkwa Wura, yɛnsoa W' ahenkyɛw n'- Nkwa ara afebɔɔ. Amen.

title: Osomfo Yi Apon Nde
raw_title: CAN321 Osomfo Yi Apon Nde
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔsomfo yi apon ndɛ,
Oewie ɔko pa no ko; Afei ɔkwantunyi no Edu esuegya noho:
Chorus
Egya, yɛdze Wo ba a ɔada Hyɛ W' abaatan dɔ n-sa n' mu.

Verse 2
Hɔ na hɛn nyinsuwa bɔ adze;
Hɔ na wɔkyerɛ hɛn ase; Hɔ na ɔsɛndzifo pa n' Hwɛ hɛn bra nyinara mu:

Verse 3
Hɔ na Guanhwɛfo no dze
Nguambaa no a wɔayew ba fie, Ɔkora hɔn wɔ bea a Pataku n' nnkotum aba:

Verse 4
Hɔn a ɔasakyer wɔ ha,
Na wɔhwɛ mbeamudua no n',
Wohu Jesus dɔ n' kɛse Wɔ Ne nkyɛn wɔ Paradise:

Verse 5
Hɔ na sum mu etumfo
Nsa nnkɛka ara da; Ewuradze Christ bɔweɔn hɔn, Ɔno a owui gyee hɔn nkwa:
.

Verse 6
Fa nkɔ fam', n-so nkɔ nsom'!
Yɛhyɛ dzen na yɛka yi; Hɛn so yɛdze enyidar Yɛhwɛ wusoɛr da no kwan:
Chorus
Egya, yɛdze Wo ba a ɔada
Hyɛ W' abaatan dɔ n-sa n' mu.

title: Ber A Mbusu Abre Hen Adze
raw_title: CAN322 Ber A Mbusu Abre Hen Adze
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ber a mbusu abrɛ hɛn adze,
Ber a hɛn nyinsu abor do;
Yerigyam dɔfo a ɔayew n', Jesu, Mary Ba, tsie hɛn.

Verse 2
Ber a hɛn akoma ridzi yaw,
Wɔ no bɔn ho adwen ntsi, Ber a suro ekitsa hɛn n', Jesu, Mary Ba, tsie hɛn.

Verse 3
'Wo abyɛ hɛn honam yi bi.
'Wo asoa hɛn yaw nyina, 'Wo esu dɛ nyimpa pɛn,
Jesu, Mary Ba, tsie hɛn.

Verse 4
'Wo abɔ Wo tsir adze ewu,
'Wo ekyi n-kwa bɔgya, 'Wo ada fundaka mu,
Jesu, Mary Ba, tsie hɛn.

title: Mbo Na Ko, Sordaanyi Pa
raw_title: CAN323 Mbo Na Ko, Sordaanyi Pa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mbo na ko, sordaanyi pa; Gyedzi ko no ewie ko!
Sor ahenkyɛw a ɔmmpa Nna Egya dze bɛma wo.

Verse 2
Hwɛ, edzikamfo dze dɛw,
Rihyia wo konyimdzi mu;
Hwɛ, wɔhyehyɛ ntar fɛɛfɛw, Ruhuahua wo dɔ man n' mu.

Verse 3
Christ N' adaworom edzi
Tamfo owu do konyim; Daadaa som mu eyiedzi Nyɛ wodze Nyame N' enyim.

Verse 4
Nyame Egya, hɛn Dɔfo,
Jesus Christ hɛn Agyenkwa, Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn hɛn Boafo, Baasakor sɛ ndaase daa.

title: Da Yie, Dofo Fonafo
raw_title: CAN324 Da Yie, Dofo Fonafo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Da yie, dɔfo fonafo,
W' edwuma abɔ adze; Ahomgye pa, siar mbordo Na dɛw mapa nyɛ wodze.
Chorus
Da yie, da yie, Nyame mfa w' nsie, Adzesaa ahyɛ sum, da yie!

Verse 2
Nyinsu bɔnsam' kwantunyi
Hom fi yaw na suro nsa,
Hom mbrɛ su na mbusu nnyi, W' akwantu ber no asa.
Chorus
Da yie, da yie, Nyame mfa w' nsie, Adzesaa ahyɛ sum, da yie!

Verse 3
Twer Jesu N' abaw mu komm, Nyame dɔ nkata wo do; Sun W' Agyenkwa No bom' sɔnn, Mbrɛ bɔn biara nnkɛhaw wo.
Chorus
Da yie, da yie, Nyame mfa w' nsie, Yebehyiam' afebɔɔ, da yie!

Verse 4
Kwantunyi berɛfo dɔfo,
W' akwantu abɔ adze;
Atsew esian nyina mu, Efi awerɛhow wiadze.
Chorus
Da yie, da yie, Nyame mfa w' nsie, Dzi fie kan kɔtweɔn hɛn, da yie!

title: Menka Den Werehonyi
raw_title: CAN325 Menka Den Werehonyi
lyrics:
Verse 1
Menka dɛn werɛhonyi?
Owu edzi m' emim,
Hwɛ, ɔayɛ m' kyirpaanyi Na ɔama awɔw dze m'
Chorus
'Patasu Christ e! suo mo mu
Na gye m' dɔfo n' kra dwudwoodwo.

Verse 2
Menka dɛn hɛll gyantsia? Munnhu mo dɔfo n' bio- Henfa na ɔkɔ ara?
Saana ne mber aso.

Verse 3
Menka dɛn ankonam?
Saana nyimpa nnsɛ hwee- Ɔnye hɛn edzi mpaam' N' akwantu abɔ adze.

Verse 4
Menka dɛn enuanom?
Nyamesuronyi kɔ- Tsema, ɔdwe, adom Na dɔ, onyaa n' mbordo.

Verse 5
Menka dɛn? mennka hwee,
Nyame ayɛ dza oye; Ɔbɛkyerɛ m' yi ase Ndaamba wɔ N' ahemfie.

Verse 6
Dɛm ntsi, da yie, dɔfo,
Christ ngya w' kosɛkosɛ;
Mirinndzi mbɔɔ ara bio,
Yebehyiam' sor, da yie,
Chorus
Na sɛ yehyiam' a, mo dɔfo, Ɔno yɛnnkɛpaam' are bio.

title: Hom Ntaa Dzinn, Ehum Kese Etu
raw_title: CAN326 Hom Ntaa Dzinn, Ehum Kese Etu
lyrics:
Verse 1
Hom ntaa dzinn, ehum kɛse etu,
Fie gya edum, poma dzendzen ebu; Hom nyɛ komm, ɔsagyefo atɔr,
Abefo reka mmɔm, hɔn enyiwa abɔ;
Na daakye Enyimnyam Hen Ne nkyɛn,
Christ mu ewufo benya hɔn kyɛpɛn, Bɛkyebɔ Nkwa, Kan ɔnye Ɔdɔ
Bɛma wɔahyerɛn dɛ anapawi afebɔɔ.

title: Wontow Ehurusi Ndwom No
raw_title: CAN327 Wontow Ehurusi Ndwom No
lyrics:
Verse 1
Wɔntow ehurusi ndwom no,
Hom ndwom a ɔyɛ dɛw no;
Hom werɛ mfir hom yaw nyina,
Na hom nhue hom ayɛyi
Mma nyia oegya hom aba ha
Nye mfɛfo ebehyia mu,
Hɔn a wɔakyerɛkyerɛ hɛn Mbrɛ wodua kɔ Jesus hɔ.
Chorus
Wɔntow ndwom, wɔntow ndwom,
Dɛw na enyigye ndwom no, Wɔntow ndwom, wɔntow ndwom, Ahomka afe ndwom no.

Verse 2
Binom dze ndwom nye mfrankaa baa
M-feda hɛn nhyiamu n' mu a,
Wɔrotow Hosanna ndɛ wɔ
Ɔsor mbrɛ abɔfo wɔ n';
Hɔ, Jesus N' enyimnyam mu hɔ,
Na wɔwɔ riyi N' ayɛw,
Nyame dɔ nsɛm dadaada n', Ɔnye dza wɔtow no hɔ.
Chorus
Wɔntow ndwom, wɔntow ndwom,
Dɛw na enyigye ndwom no, Wɔntow ndwom, wɔntow ndwom, Ahomka afe ndwom no.

Verse 3
Ao, hɛn Egya, yɛda W' ase,
Wɔ afe yi na ne nhyira;
Ao, nkyɛ hɛn a yeehyia ha nyina,
Hɛn akoma aada W' ase,
Ao, Agyenkwa, yɛda W' ase, 'Dze Wo bɔgyaa apon hɛn: Sunsum Krɔnkrɔn, yɛda W' ase Wo ntwetwe dɛɛdɛw no ntsi.
Chorus
Wɔntow ndwom, wɔntow ndwom,
Dɛw na enyigye ndwom no,
Wɔntow ndwom, wɔntow ndwom, Ahomka afe ndwom no.

title: Ahosepew Da Ato Hen
raw_title: CAN328 Ahosepew Da Ato Hen
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ahosɛpɛw da ato hɛn,
Nyame N' adom no dɔɔ so daa; Ɔama siar ayɛ hɛn kyɛpɛn, Yɛbɔtonton No daa daa daa.
Chorus
Wonhur ndwom no, wɔmbɔm' kɛse,
Ahosɛpɛw afe n' aba, Nyame Egya fata ndaase Yɛbɔtonton No daa daa daa.

Verse 2
Hɛn Wura Christ a nnsakyer da,
Twitwa gye hɛn Kwesida Skuul, Kyerɛkyerɛ Wo mbofraba, Wo a eyɛ Kwangyafo Kor.

Verse 3
Hɛn sua, agor, dwuma nyinam',
Jesus, mbofra Damfo, bɛn hɛn; 'Wo nye hɛn Kwan, Nokwar, na Nkwa n' Adze nyinam' kora hɛn Wo nkyɛn.
Chorus
Wonhur ndwom no, wɔmbɔm' kɛse,
Ahosɛpɛw afe n' aba, Nyame Egya fata ndaase
Yɛbɔtonton No daa daa daa.

title: Sunsum, Soer Yi Nyame Ayew
raw_title: CAN329 Sunsum, Soer Yi Nyame Ayew
lyrics:
Verse 1
Sunsum, soɛr yi Nyame ayɛw!... Mo sunsum, soɛr yi N' ayɛw.
Mo sunsum, soɛr yi Ewuradze ayɛw!...
Mo sunsum, soɛr yi N' ayɛw.
N-hyira ɔnka Nyankopɔn na Ne Ba!
N-daase ɔnka Nyame Hen na Ne Ba!
N-tonton ɔnka Dɔfo Egya na Ne Ba!
Nyan, mo sunsum, soɛr yi N' ayɛw.

title: Ayeyi Se N
raw_title: CAN330 Ayeyi Se N
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ayɛyi sɛ N', Ndaase sɛ N',
Abɔdzin sɛ N' o!
Wɔmfa mma N'.

title: Midzi Nyim Daa, Daa
raw_title: CAN331 Midzi Nyim Daa, Daa
lyrics:
Verse 1
Midzi nyim daa, daa!
M' akokyɛm Nyame,
Medze Wo dzi ako a, Midzi nyim daa, daa!
M' akokyɛm Nyame, Medze Wo dzi ako a, Midzi nyim daa!

title: Odo Yi Anwanwa Do A
raw_title: CAN332 Odo Yi Anwanwa Do A
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔdɔ yi anwanwa dɔ a,
Ɔdɔ yi anwanwa dɔ a, Onyame No dɔ yi anwanwa dɔ a,
M' Agyenkwa No dɔ yi anwanwa dɔ a!

title: Bra Ma Hen Yegye Christ Dzi
raw_title: CAN333 Bra Ma Hen Yegye Christ Dzi
lyrics:
Verse 1
Bra ma hɛn a yɛgye Christ dzi
Ntonton hɛn Agyenkwa,
Yɛmfa enyigye ndze nkamfo N' adom enyimnyam no.

Verse 2
Ogyina bɔnyɛnyi biara
N' akoma ekyir robɔm';
Nyia ɔasɛɛ koraa nnyi dɛ ɔpam N' bio, Anaa ɔyɛ ma ɔkɔ.

Verse 3
Yɛnam adom do tsie Wo ndze,
Pen do dɛ yi hɛn bɔnm', Yesi pi dzi dɛw enyidarm', Dɛ Ɔwo 'bɛhɛn mu.

Verse 4
Bra mu ntsɛmara, sor Hɔho,
Na mma mmfi ha nnkɔ da Nye hɛn ndzidzi, ma edziban no Nyɛ ɔdomankoma dɔ. Amen.

title: Bofo Pa E! M' Egya Nyame E
raw_title: CAN334 Bofo Pa E! M' Egya Nyame E
lyrics:
Verse 1
Bofo pa e! M' Egya Nyame e! Minnkegyaa Wo ma akɔ, Gyesɛ ehyira m' o!

title: Buebue Sor Ntokura
raw_title: CAN335 Buebue Sor Ntokura
lyrics:
Verse 1
Buebue sor ntokura, Fa Wo nhyira ma hɛn o!
Buebue sor ntokura, Fa Wo nhyira ma hɛn o!
Hɛn Egya Nyame e,
Asɔrmba hɛn Egya dɔyɛfo e, Buebue sor ntokura, Fa Wo nhyira ma hɛn o!

Verse 2
Dabɛn na ebɛba?
Hɛn enyi ada Wo kwan.

Verse 3
Ɔnnkɛba no dɛ Eguambaa bio, Ɔbɛba no dɛ Awendadze o!

Verse 4
Yɛnye No twetwe a ɔnnkɛyɛ:
Yɛdze Ne tsentsen ma No.

Verse 5
Adze rekye, adze resa, Mber nyinara resen.

Verse 6
Ebɛnadze na ɔregye?
M' akoma na ɔregye.

Verse 7
M' akoma na ɔregye?
Medze mema N' a, mepɛ.

Verse 8
Metse ase a, metse mema N', Muwu a, meyɛ Nedze o!

title: Ndaase, Ndaase Nka Odoyefo
raw_title: CAN336 Ndaase, Ndaase Nka Odoyefo
lyrics:
Verse 1
Verse
Ndaase, ndaase nka Ɔdɔyɛfo
Ayɛyi, ayɛyi nka Twerammpon o!
Enyimnyam, enyimnyam nka hɛn Gyefo o!
Oeyi m' sum mu ekesi kan mu. Ɔsabarimba Katakyi, Yegya Wo ekyir a ɔnnyɛ o!
Verse
Ewuradze e! Ɔsabarima e!
Hɛn Agyenkwa e! Ɔsabarima e!
Ɔsabarima e!
Yegya Wo ekyir a ɔnnyɛ o!

title: Mbaabun Beenum N
raw_title: CAN337 Mbaabun Beenum N
lyrics:
Verse 1
Mbaabun beenum n',
Wɔammba ntsɛm, Wɔammbɔto ayeforkun n'.

title: Per Gye Hon A Woreyew
raw_title: CAN338 Per Gye Hon A Woreyew
lyrics:
Verse 1
Per gye hɔn a wɔreyew,
Tse ma hɔn a woruwu,
Hwim hɔn fi bɔn na adakamaa mu:
Su ma dza ɔafom kwan,
Ma asehwefo do,
Se hɔn dɛ Jesus tum dɛ ɔgye nkwa.
Chorus
Per gye hɔn a wɔreyew,
Tse ma hɔn a woruwu,
Jesus yɛ mbɔbɔrhu, ɔbɛgye nkwa.

Verse 2
Sɛ wɔmmfa N' nnyɛ hwee mpo a, Ɔda ho rotweɔn.
'Rotweɔn ɔba a oenu noho n' ɔagye n'.
Enye hɔn nka n' ka pa, Enye hɔn nka n' berɛww; Sɛ wɔgye dzi ara a ɔdze bɛkyɛ.

Verse 3
Sɛ abɔnsam daadaa
'Nyimpa n' akoma a,
Nyame N' adom twe n' ekyir a ɔyɛ:
Eyɛ no ayamuyie,
Ekyerɛ no Wo dɔ a,
Dza nkyɛ ɔnntse no afei ɔbɛtse.

Verse 4
Per gye hɔn a wɔreyew:
Dwuma 'i da wo do;
Ewuradze bɛma w' ho ahoɔdzen.
Frɛ hɔn ma wɔnsan mbra,
Fa abotar twe hɔn;
Se kobɔfo n' dɛ Gyefo n' wui maa no.
Chorus
Per gye hɔn a wɔreyew,
Tse ma hɔn a woruwu,
Jesus yɛ mbɔbɔrhu, ɔbɛgye nkwa.

title: Oba Dzeseefo Nye Me
raw_title: CAN339 Oba Dzeseefo Nye Me
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔba dzesɛɛfo nye me,
Magye m' enyikandze medzi,
Menu moho na maba;
Fa me yɛ W' apaafo no mu baako.

title: Oba No Woawo No O
raw_title: CAN340 Oba No Woawo No O
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ɔba no wɔawo No o! Ɔba no wɔawo No o!
Dzin bi a wɔdze ama N' a!
N' ahendzi gu N' abaw do!

title: Enyansafo Roko O
raw_title: CAN341 Enyansafo Roko O
lyrics:
Verse 1
Enyansafo rokɔ o!
Wɔrokɔsom Ɔhen n' o!
Mary awo Osiarfo n'.
Enyansafo rokɔ o!
Wɔrokɔsom Ɔhen n' !

title: Ne Dzin Ara Nye Jesus O
raw_title: CAN342 Ne Dzin Ara Nye Jesus O
lyrics:
Verse 1
Ne dzin ara nye Jesus o! Ɔda yamu n' ara na wɔtoo No dzin; Ne dzin ara nye Jesus o!

title: Meenya Ngyirama Mpempem O
raw_title: CAN343 Meenya Ngyirama Mpempem O
lyrics:
Verse 1
Meenya ngyirama mpempem o!
Medze maada N' ase; Medze maada me Nyame ase, N' adom n' konyimdzi a!

title: Kronkron! Kronkron! Kronkron
raw_title: CAN344 Kronkron! Kronkron! Kronkron
lyrics:
Verse 1
Krɔnkrɔn! Krɔnkrɔn! Krɔnkrɔn! Edɔm Ewuradze e! Ɔsor nye asaase
Ahyɛ W' enyimnyam ma.
Me Nyame, ayɛyi nka W' !
